ayahs.1:7: ṣirāṭa alladhīna anʿamta ʿalayhim ghayri l-maghḍūbi ʿalayhim walā l-ḍālīna
ayahs.2:2: dhālika l-kitābu lā rayba fīhi hudan lilmuttaqīna
ayahs.2:3: alladhīna yuʾminūna bil-ghaybi wayuqīmūna l-ṣalata wamimmā razaqnāhum yunfiqūna
ayahs.2:4: wa-alladhīna yuʾminūna bimā unzila ilayka wamā unzila min qablika wabil-ākhirati hum yūqinūna
ayahs.2:5: ulāika ʿalā hudan min rabbihim wa-ulāika humu l-mufliḥūna
ayahs.2:6: inna alladhīna kafarū sawāon ʿalayhim a-andhartahum am lam tundhirhum lā yuʾminūna
ayahs.2:7: khatama Allāhu ʿalā qulūbihim waʿalā samʿihim waʿalā abṣārihim ghishāwatun walahum ʿadhābun ʿaẓīmun
ayahs.2:8: wamina l-nāsi man yaqūlu āmannā billāhi wabil-yawmi l-ākhiri wamā hum bimuʾminīna
ayahs.2:9: yukhādiʿūna Allāha wa-alladhīna āmanū wamā yakhdaʿūna illā anfusahum wamā yashʿurūna
ayahs.2:10: fī qulūbihim maraḍun fazādahumu Allāhu maraḍan walahum ʿadhābun alīmun bimā kānū yakdhibūna
ayahs.2:11: wa-idhā qīla lahum lā tufsidū fī l-arḍi qālū innamā naḥnu muṣliḥūna
ayahs.2:12: alā innahum humu l-mufsidūna walākin lā yashʿurūna
ayahs.2:13: wa-idhā qīla lahum āminū kamā āmana l-nāsu qālū anuʾminu kamā āmana l-sufahāu alā innahum humu l-sufahāu walākin lā yaʿlamūna
ayahs.2:14: wa-idhā laqū alladhīna āmanū qālū āmannā wa-idhā khalaw ilā shayāṭīnihim qālū innā maʿakum innamā naḥnu mustahziūna
ayahs.2:15: Allāhu yastahzi-u bihim wayamudduhum fī ṭughyānihim yaʿmahūna
ayahs.2:16: ulāika alladhīna ishtarawū l-ḍalālata bil-hudā famā rabiḥat tijāratuhum wamā kānū muhtadīna
ayahs.2:17: mathaluhum kamathali alladhī istawqada nāran falammā aḍāʾat mā ḥawlahu dhahaba Allāhu binūrihim watarakahum fī ẓulumātin lā yubṣirūna
ayahs.2:18: ṣummun bukmun ʿumyun fahum lā yarjiʿūna
ayahs.2:19: aw kaṣayyibin mina l-samāi fīhi ẓulumātun waraʿdun wabarqun yajʿalūna aṣābiʿahum fī ādhānihim mina l-ṣawāʿiqi ḥadhara l-mawti wallāhu muḥīṭun bil-kāfirīna
ayahs.2:20: yakādu l-barqu yakhṭafu abṣārahum kullamā aḍāʾa lahum mashaw fīhi wa-idhā aẓlama ʿalayhim qāmū walaw shāʾa Allāhu ladhahaba bisamʿihim wa-abṣārihim inna Allāha ʿalā kulli shayin qadīrun
ayahs.2:21: yāʾayyuhā l-nāsu uʿbudū rabbakumu alladhī khalaqakum wa-alladhīna min qablikum laʿallakum tattaqūna
ayahs.2:22: alladhī jaʿala lakumu l-arḍa firāshan wal-samāʾa bināʾan wa-anzala mina l-samāi māʾan fa-akhraja bihi mina l-thamarāti rizqan lakum falā tajʿalū lillāhi andādan wa-antum taʿlamūna
ayahs.2:23: wa-in kuntum fī raybin mimmā nazzalnā ʿalā ʿabdinā fatū bisūratin min mithlihi wa-idʿū shuhadāʾakum min dūni Allāhi in kuntum ṣādiqīna
ayahs.2:24: fa-in lam tafʿalū walan tafʿalū fa-ittaqū l-nāra allatī waqūduhā l-nāsu wal-ḥijāratu uʿiddat lilkāfirīna
ayahs.2:25: wabashiri alladhīna āmanū waʿamilū l-ṣāliḥāti anna lahum jannātin tajrī min taḥtihā l-anhāru kullamā ruziqū minhā min thamaratin rizqan qālū hādhā alladhī ruziqnā min qablu wa-utū bihi mutashābihan walahum fīhā azwājun muṭahharatun wahum fīhā khālidūna
ayahs.2:26: inna Allāha lā yastaḥyī an yaḍriba mathalan mā baʿūḍatan famā fawqahā fa-ammā alladhīna āmanū fayaʿlamūna annahu l-ḥaqu min rabbihim wa-ammā alladhīna kafarū fayaqūlūna mādhā arāda Allāhu bihādhā mathalan yuḍillu bihi kathīran wayahdī bihi kathīran wamā yuḍillu bihi illā l-fāsiqīna
ayahs.2:27: alladhīna yanquḍūna ʿahda Allāhi min baʿdi mīthāqihi wayaqṭaʿūna mā amara Allāhu bihi an yūṣala wayufsidūna fī l-arḍi ulāika humu l-khāsirūna
ayahs.2:28: kayfa takfurūna billāhi wakuntum amwātan fa-aḥyākum thumma yumītukum thumma yuḥyīkum thumma ilayhi turjaʿūna
ayahs.2:29: huwa alladhī khalaqa lakum mā fī l-arḍi jamīʿan thumma istawā ilā l-samāi fasawwāhunna sabʿa samāwātin wahuwa bikulli shayin ʿalīmun
ayahs.2:30: wa-idh qāla rabbuka lilmalāikati innī jāʿilun fī l-arḍi khalīfatan qālū atajʿalu fīhā man yufsidu fīhā wayasfiku l-dimāʾa wanaḥnu nusabbiḥu biḥamdika wanuqaddisu laka qāla innī aʿlamu mā lā taʿlamūna
ayahs.2:31: waʿallama ādama l-asmāʾa kullahā thumma ʿaraḍahum ʿalā l-malāikati faqāla anbiūnī bi-asmāi hāulāi in kuntum ṣādiqīna
ayahs.2:32: qālū subḥānaka lā ʿilma lanā illā mā ʿallamtanā innaka anta l-ʿalīmu l-ḥakīmu
ayahs.2:33: qāla yāādamu anbiʾhum bi-asmāihim falammā anba-ahum bi-asmāihim qāla alam aqul lakum innī aʿlamu ghayba l-samāwāti wal-arḍi wa-aʿlamu mā tubdūna wamā kuntum taktumūna
ayahs.2:34: wa-idh qulnā lilmalāikati usjudū liādama fasajadū illā iblīsa abā wa-istakbara wakāna mina l-kāfirīna
ayahs.2:35: waqulnā yāādamu uskun anta wazawjuka l-janata wakulā minhā raghadan ḥaythu shiʾtumā walā taqrabā hādhihi l-shajarata fatakūnā mina l-ẓālimīna
ayahs.2:36: fa-azallahumā l-shayṭānu ʿanhā fa-akhrajahumā mimmā kānā fīhi waqulnā ihbiṭū baʿḍukum libaʿḍin ʿaduwwun walakum fī l-arḍi mustaqarrun wamatāʿun ilā ḥīnin
ayahs.2:37: fatalaqqā ādamu min rabbihi kalimātin fatāba ʿalayhi innahu huwa l-tawābu l-raḥīmu
ayahs.2:38: qulnā ihbiṭū minhā jamīʿan fa-immā yatiyannakum minnī hudan faman tabiʿa hudāya falā khawfun ʿalayhim walā hum yaḥzanūna
ayahs.2:39: wa-alladhīna kafarū wakadhabū biāyātinā ulāika aṣḥābu l-nāri hum fīhā khālidūna
ayahs.2:40: yābanī isrāīla udhkurū niʿmatiya allatī anʿamtu ʿalaykum wa-awfū biʿahdī ūfi biʿahdikum wa-iyyāya fa-irhabūni
ayahs.2:41: waʾāminū bimā anzaltu muṣaddiqan limā maʿakum walā takūnū awwala kāfirin bihi walā tashtarū biāyātī thamanan qalīlan wa-iyyāya fa-ittaqūni
ayahs.2:42: walā talbisū l-ḥaqa bil-bāṭili wataktumū l-ḥaqa wa-antum taʿlamūna
ayahs.2:43: wa-aqīmū l-ṣalata waʾātū l-zakata wa-irkaʿū maʿa l-rākiʿīna
ayahs.2:44: atamurūna l-nāsa bil-biri watansawna anfusakum wa-antum tatlūna l-kitāba afalā taʿqilūna
ayahs.2:45: wa-istaʿīnū bil-ṣabri wal-ṣalati wa-innahā lakabīratun illā ʿalā l-khāshiʿīna
ayahs.2:46: alladhīna yaẓunnūna annahum mulāqū rabbihim wa-annahum ilayhi rājiʿūna
ayahs.2:47: yābanī isrāīla udhkurū niʿmatiya allatī anʿamtu ʿalaykum wa-annī faḍḍaltukum ʿalā l-ʿālamīna
ayahs.2:48: wa-ittaqū yawman lā tajzī nafsun ʿan nafsin shayan walā yuqbalu minhā shafāʿatun walā yuʾkhadhu minhā ʿadlun walā hum yunṣarūna
ayahs.2:49: wa-idh najjaynākum min āli firʿawna yasūmūnakum sūa l-ʿadhābi yudhabbiḥūna abnāʾakum wayastaḥyūna nisāʾakum wafī dhālikum balāon min rabbikum ʿaẓīmun
ayahs.2:50: wa-idh faraqnā bikumu l-baḥra fa-anjaynākum wa-aghraqnā āla firʿawna wa-antum tanẓurūna
ayahs.2:51: wa-idh wāʿadnā mūsā arbaʿīna laylatan thumma ittakhadhtumu l-ʿijla min baʿdihi wa-antum ẓālimūna
ayahs.2:52: thumma ʿafawnā ʿankum min baʿdi dhālika laʿallakum tashkurūna
ayahs.2:53: wa-idh ātaynā mūsā l-kitāba wal-furqāna laʿallakum tahtadūna
ayahs.2:54: wa-idh qāla mūsā liqawmihi yāqawmi innakum ẓalamtum anfusakum bi-ittikhādhikumu l-ʿijla fatūbū ilā bāri-ikum fa-uqtulū anfusakum dhālikum khayrun lakum ʿinda bāri-ikum fatāba ʿalaykum innahu huwa l-tawābu l-raḥīmu
ayahs.2:55: wa-idh qultum yāmūsā lan nuʾmina laka ḥattā narā Allāha jahratan fa-akhadhatkumu l-ṣāʿiqatu wa-antum tanẓurūna
ayahs.2:56: thumma baʿathnākum min baʿdi mawtikum laʿallakum tashkurūna
ayahs.2:57: waẓallalnā ʿalaykumu l-ghamāma wa-anzalnā ʿalaykumu l-mana wal-salwā kulū min ṭayyibāti mā razaqnākum wamā ẓalamūnā walākin kānū anfusahum yaẓlimūna
ayahs.2:58: wa-idh qulnā udkhulū hādhihi l-qaryata fakulū minhā ḥaythu shiʾtum raghadan wa-udkhulū l-bāba sujjadan waqūlū ḥiṭṭatun naghfir lakum khaṭāyākum wasanazīdu l-muḥsinīna
ayahs.2:59: fabaddala alladhīna ẓalamū qawlan ghayra alladhī qīla lahum fa-anzalnā ʿalā alladhīna ẓalamū rijzan mina l-samāi bimā kānū yafsuqūna
ayahs.2:60: wa-idhi istasqā mūsā liqawmihi faqulnā iḍrib biʿaṣāka l-ḥajara fa-infajarat minhu ithnatā ʿashrata ʿaynan qad ʿalima kullu unāsin mashrabahum kulū wa-ishrabū min rizqi Allāhi walā taʿthaw fī l-arḍi mufsidīna
ayahs.2:61: wa-idh qultum yāmūsā lan naṣbira ʿalā ṭaʿāmin wāḥidin fa-udʿu lanā rabbaka yukhrij lanā mimmā tunbitu l-arḍu min baqlihā waqithāihā wafūmihā waʿadasihā wabaṣalihā qāla atastabdilūna alladhī huwa adnā bi-alladhī huwa khayrun ihbiṭū miṣran fa-inna lakum mā sa-altum waḍuribat ʿalayhimu l-dhilatu wal-maskanatu wabāū bighaḍabin mina Allāhi dhālika bi-annahum kānū yakfurūna biāyāti Allāhi wayaqtulūna l-nabiyīna bighayri l-ḥaqi dhālika bimā ʿaṣaw wakānū yaʿtadūna
ayahs.2:62: inna alladhīna āmanū wa-alladhīna hādū wal-naṣārā wal-ṣābiʾīna man āmana billāhi wal-yawmi l-ākhiri waʿamila ṣāliḥan falahum ajruhum ʿinda rabbihim walā khawfun ʿalayhim walā hum yaḥzanūna
ayahs.2:63: wa-idh akhadhnā mīthāqakum warafaʿnā fawqakumu l-ṭūra khudhū mā ātaynākum biquwwatin wa-udhkurū mā fīhi laʿallakum tattaqūna
ayahs.2:64: thumma tawallaytum min baʿdi dhālika falawlā faḍlu Allāhi ʿalaykum waraḥmatuhu lakuntum mina l-khāsirīna
ayahs.2:65: walaqad ʿalimtumu alladhīna iʿtadaw minkum fī l-sabti faqulnā lahum kūnū qiradatan khāsiʾīna
ayahs.2:66: fajaʿalnāhā nakālan limā bayna yadayhā wamā khalfahā wamawʿiẓatan lilmuttaqīna
ayahs.2:67: wa-idh qāla mūsā liqawmihi inna Allāha yamurukum an tadhbaḥū baqaratan qālū atattakhidhunā huzuwan qāla aʿūdhu billāhi an akūna mina l-jāhilīna
ayahs.2:68: qālū udʿu lanā rabbaka yubayyin lanā mā hiya qāla innahu yaqūlu innahā baqaratun lā fāriḍun walā bikrun ʿawānun bayna dhālika fa-ifʿalū mā tuʾmarūna
ayahs.2:69: qālū udʿu lanā rabbaka yubayyin lanā mā lawnuhā qāla innahu yaqūlu innahā baqaratun ṣafrāu fāqiʿun lawnuhā tasurru l-nāẓirīna
ayahs.2:70: qālū udʿu lanā rabbaka yubayyin lanā mā hiya inna l-baqara tashābaha ʿalaynā wa-innā in shāʾa Allāhu lamuhtadūna
ayahs.2:71: qāla innahu yaqūlu innahā baqaratun lā dhalūlun tuthīru l-arḍa walā tasqī l-ḥartha musallamatun lā shiyata fīhā qālū l-āna jiʾta bil-ḥaqi fadhabaḥūhā wamā kādū yafʿalūna
ayahs.2:72: wa-idh qataltum nafsan fa-iddāratum fīhā wallāhu mukhrijun mā kuntum taktumūna
ayahs.2:73: faqulnā iḍribūhu bibaʿḍihā kadhālika yuḥyī Allāhu l-mawtā wayurīkum āyātihi laʿallakum taʿqilūna
ayahs.2:74: thumma qasat qulūbukum min baʿdi dhālika fahiya kal-ḥijārati aw ashaddu qaswatan wa-inna mina l-ḥijārati lamā yatafajjaru minhu l-anhāru wa-inna minhā lamā yashaqqaqu fayakhruju minhu l-māu wa-inna minhā lamā yahbiṭu min khashyati Allāhi wamā Allāhu bighāfilin ʿammā taʿmalūna
ayahs.2:75: afataṭmaʿūna an yuʾminū lakum waqad kāna farīqun minhum yasmaʿūna kalāma Allāhi thumma yuḥarrifūnahu min baʿdi mā ʿaqalūhu wahum yaʿlamūna
ayahs.2:76: wa-idhā laqū alladhīna āmanū qālū āmannā wa-idhā khalā baʿḍuhum ilā baʿḍin qālū atuḥaddithūnahum bimā fataḥa Allāhu ʿalaykum liyuḥājjūkum bihi ʿinda rabbikum afalā taʿqilūna
ayahs.2:77: awalā yaʿlamūna anna Allāha yaʿlamu mā yusirrūna wamā yuʿlinūna
ayahs.2:78: waminhum ummiyyūna lā yaʿlamūna l-kitāba illā amāniyya wa-in hum illā yaẓunnūna
ayahs.2:79: fawaylun lilladhīna yaktubūna l-kitāba bi-aydīhim thumma yaqūlūna hādhā min ʿindi Allāhi liyashtarū bihi thamanan qalīlan fawaylun lahum mimmā katabat aydīhim wawaylun lahum mimmā yaksibūna
ayahs.2:80: waqālū lan tamassanā l-nāru illā ayyāman maʿdūdatan qul attakhadhtum ʿinda Allāhi ʿahdan falan yukhlifa Allāhu ʿahdahu am taqūlūna ʿalā Allāhi mā lā taʿlamūna
ayahs.2:81: balā man kasaba sayyi-atan wa-aḥāṭat bihi khaṭīatuhu fa-ulāika aṣḥābu l-nāri hum fīhā khālidūna
ayahs.2:82: wa-alladhīna āmanū waʿamilū l-ṣāliḥāti ulāika aṣḥābu l-janati hum fīhā khālidūna
ayahs.2:83: wa-idh akhadhnā mīthāqa banī isrāīla lā taʿbudūna illā Allāha wabil-wālidayni iḥsānan wadhī l-qurbā wal-yatāmā wal-masākīni waqūlū lilnnāsi ḥusnan wa-aqīmū l-ṣalata waʾātū l-zakata thumma tawallaytum illā qalīlan minkum wa-antum muʿriḍūna
ayahs.2:84: wa-idh akhadhnā mīthāqakum lā tasfikūna dimāʾakum walā tukhrijūna anfusakum min diyārikum thumma aqrartum wa-antum tashhadūna
ayahs.2:85: thumma antum hāulāi taqtulūna anfusakum watukhrijūna farīqan minkum min diyārihim taẓāharūna ʿalayhim bil-ithmi wal-ʿudwāni wa-in yatūkum usārā tufādūhum wahuwa muḥarramun ʿalaykum ikhrājuhum afatuʾminūna bibaʿḍi l-kitābi watakfurūna bibaʿḍin famā jazāu man yafʿalu dhālika minkum illā khizyun fī l-ḥayati l-dunyā wayawma l-qiyāmati yuraddūna ilā ashaddi l-ʿadhābi wamā Allāhu bighāfilin ʿammā taʿmalūna
ayahs.2:86: ulāika alladhīna ishtarawū l-ḥayata l-dunyā bil-ākhirati falā yukhaffafu ʿanhumu l-ʿadhābu walā hum yunṣarūna
ayahs.2:87: walaqad ātaynā mūsā l-kitāba waqaffaynā min baʿdihi bil-rusuli waʾātaynā ʿīsā ibna maryama l-bayināti wa-ayyadnāhu birūḥi l-qudusi afakullamā jāʾakum rasūlun bimā lā tahwā anfusukumu istakbartum fafarīqan kadhabtum wafarīqan taqtulūna
ayahs.2:88: waqālū qulūbunā ghulfun bal laʿanahumu Allāhu bikufrihim faqalīlan mā yuʾminūna
ayahs.2:89: walammā jāʾahum kitābun min ʿindi Allāhi muṣaddiqun limā maʿahum wakānū min qablu yastaftiḥūna ʿalā alladhīna kafarū falammā jāʾahum mā ʿarafū kafarū bihi falaʿnatu Allāhi ʿalā l-kāfirīna
ayahs.2:90: biʾsamā ishtaraw bihi anfusahum an yakfurū bimā anzala Allāhu baghyan an yunazzila Allāhu min faḍlihi ʿalā man yashāu min ʿibādihi fabāū bighaḍabin ʿalā ghaḍabin walilkāfirīna ʿadhābun muhīnun
ayahs.2:91: wa-idhā qīla lahum āminū bimā anzala Allāhu qālū nuʾminu bimā unzila ʿalaynā wayakfurūna bimā warāʾahu wahuwa l-ḥaqu muṣaddiqan limā maʿahum qul falima taqtulūna anbiyāʾa Allāhi min qablu in kuntum muʾminīna
ayahs.2:92: walaqad jāʾakum mūsā bil-bayināti thumma ittakhadhtumu l-ʿijla min baʿdihi wa-antum ẓālimūna
ayahs.2:93: wa-idh akhadhnā mīthāqakum warafaʿnā fawqakumu l-ṭūra khudhū mā ātaynākum biquwwatin wa-ismaʿū qālū samiʿnā waʿaṣaynā wa-ushribū fī qulūbihimu l-ʿijla bikufrihim qul biʾsamā yamurukum bihi īmānukum in kuntum muʾminīna
ayahs.2:94: qul in kānat lakumu l-dāru l-ākhiratu ʿinda Allāhi khāliṣatan min dūni l-nāsi fatamannawū l-mawta in kuntum ṣādiqīna
ayahs.2:95: walan yatamannawhu abadan bimā qaddamat aydīhim wallāhu ʿalīmun bil-ẓālimīna
ayahs.2:96: walatajidannahum aḥraṣa l-nāsi ʿalā ḥayatin wamina alladhīna ashrakū yawaddu aḥaduhum law yuʿammaru alfa sanatin wamā huwa bimuzaḥziḥihi mina l-ʿadhābi an yuʿammara wallāhu baṣīrun bimā yaʿmalūna
ayahs.2:97: qul man kāna ʿaduwwan lijibrīla fa-innahu nazzalahu ʿalā qalbika bi-idhni Allāhi muṣaddiqan limā bayna yadayhi wahudan wabushrā lilmuʾminīna
ayahs.2:98: man kāna ʿaduwwan lillāhi wamalāikatihi warusulihi wajibrīla wamīkāla fa-inna Allāha ʿaduwwun lilkāfirīna
ayahs.2:99: walaqad anzalnā ilayka āyātin bayyinātin wamā yakfuru bihā illā l-fāsiqūna
ayahs.2:100: awakullamā ʿāhadū ʿahdan nabadhahu farīqun minhum bal aktharuhum lā yuʾminūna
ayahs.2:101: walammā jāʾahum rasūlun min ʿindi Allāhi muṣaddiqun limā maʿahum nabadha farīqun mina alladhīna ūtū l-kitāba kitāba Allāhi warāʾa ẓuhūrihim ka-annahum lā yaʿlamūna
ayahs.2:102: wa-ittabaʿū mā tatlū l-shayāṭīnu ʿalā mulki sulaymāna wamā kafara sulaymānu walākinna l-shayāṭīna kafarū yuʿallimūna l-nāsa l-siḥra wamā unzila ʿalā l-malakayni bibābila hārūta wamārūta wamā yuʿallimāni min aḥadin ḥattā yaqūlā innamā naḥnu fitnatun falā takfur fayataʿallamūna minhumā mā yufarriqūna bihi bayna l-mari wazawjihi wamā hum biḍārrīna bihi min aḥadin illā bi-idhni Allāhi wayataʿallamūna mā yaḍurruhum walā yanfaʿuhum walaqad ʿalimū lamani ishtarāhu mā lahu fī l-ākhirati min khalāqin walabiʾsa mā sharaw bihi anfusahum law kānū yaʿlamūna
ayahs.2:103: walaw annahum āmanū wa-ittaqaw lamathūbatun min ʿindi Allāhi khayrun law kānū yaʿlamūna
ayahs.2:104: yāʾayyuhā alladhīna āmanū lā taqūlū rāʿinā waqūlū unẓurnā wa-ismaʿū walilkāfirīna ʿadhābun alīmun
ayahs.2:105: mā yawaddu alladhīna kafarū min ahli l-kitābi walā l-mushrikīna an yunazzala ʿalaykum min khayrin min rabbikum wallāhu yakhtaṣṣu biraḥmatihi man yashāu wallāhu dhū l-faḍli l-ʿaẓīmi
ayahs.2:106: mā nansakh min āyatin aw nunsihā nati bikhayrin minhā aw mithlihā alam taʿlam anna Allāha ʿalā kulli shayin qadīrun
ayahs.2:107: alam taʿlam anna Allāha lahu mulku l-samāwāti wal-arḍi wamā lakum min dūni Allāhi min waliyyin walā naṣīrin
ayahs.2:108: am turīdūna an tasalū rasūlakum kamā su-ila mūsā min qablu waman yatabaddali l-kufra bil-īmāni faqad ḍalla sawāʾa l-sabīli
ayahs.2:109: wadda kathīrun min ahli l-kitābi law yaruddūnakum min baʿdi īmānikum kuffāran ḥasadan min ʿindi anfusihim min baʿdi mā tabayyana lahumu l-ḥaqu fa-iʿfū wa-iṣfaḥū ḥattā yatiya Allāhu bi-amrihi inna Allāha ʿalā kulli shayin qadīrun
ayahs.2:110: wa-aqīmū l-ṣalata waʾātū l-zakata wamā tuqaddimū li-anfusikum min khayrin tajidūhu ʿinda Allāhi inna Allāha bimā taʿmalūna baṣīrun
ayahs.2:111: waqālū lan yadkhula l-janata illā man kāna hūdan aw naṣārā tilka amāniyyuhum qul hātū burhānakum in kuntum ṣādiqīna
ayahs.2:112: balā man aslama wajhahu lillāhi wahuwa muḥsinun falahu ajruhu ʿinda rabbihi walā khawfun ʿalayhim walā hum yaḥzanūna
ayahs.2:113: waqālati l-yahūdu laysati l-naṣārā ʿalā shayin waqālati l-naṣārā laysati l-yahūdu ʿalā shayin wahum yatlūna l-kitāba kadhālika qāla alladhīna lā yaʿlamūna mithla qawlihim fallāhu yaḥkumu baynahum yawma l-qiyāmati fīmā kānū fīhi yakhtalifūna
ayahs.2:114: waman aẓlamu mimman manaʿa masājida Allāhi an yudhkara fīhā usmuhu wasaʿā fī kharābihā ulāika mā kāna lahum an yadkhulūhā illā khāifīna lahum fī l-dunyā khizyun walahum fī l-ākhirati ʿadhābun ʿaẓīmun
ayahs.2:115: walillahi l-mashriqu wal-maghribu fa-aynamā tuwallū fathamma wajhu Allāhi inna Allāha wāsiʿun ʿalīmun
ayahs.2:116: waqālū ittakhadha Allāhu waladan subḥānahu bal lahu mā fī l-samāwāti wal-arḍi kullun lahu qānitūna
ayahs.2:117: badīʿu l-samāwāti wal-arḍi wa-idhā qaḍā amran fa-innamā yaqūlu lahu kun fayakūnu
ayahs.2:118: waqāla alladhīna lā yaʿlamūna lawlā yukallimunā Allāhu aw tatīnā āyatun kadhālika qāla alladhīna min qablihim mithla qawlihim tashābahat qulūbuhum qad bayyannā l-āyāti liqawmin yūqinūna
ayahs.2:119: innā arsalnāka bil-ḥaqi bashīran wanadhīran walā tusalu ʿan aṣḥābi l-jaḥīmi
ayahs.2:120: walan tarḍā ʿanka l-yahūdu walā l-naṣārā ḥattā tattabiʿa millatahum qul inna hudā Allāhi huwa l-hudā wala-ini ittabaʿta ahwāʾahum baʿda alladhī jāʾaka mina l-ʿilmi mā laka mina Allāhi min waliyyin walā naṣīrin
ayahs.2:121: alladhīna ātaynāhumu l-kitāba yatlūnahu ḥaqqa tilāwatihi ulāika yuʾminūna bihi waman yakfur bihi fa-ulāika humu l-khāsirūna
ayahs.2:122: yābanī isrāīla udhkurū niʿmatiya allatī anʿamtu ʿalaykum wa-annī faḍḍaltukum ʿalā l-ʿālamīna
ayahs.2:123: wa-ittaqū yawman lā tajzī nafsun ʿan nafsin shayan walā yuqbalu minhā ʿadlun walā tanfaʿuhā shafāʿatun walā hum yunṣarūna
ayahs.2:124: wa-idhi ibtalā ibrāhīma rabbuhu bikalimātin fa-atammahunna qāla innī jāʿiluka lilnnāsi imāman qāla wamin dhurriyyatī qāla lā yanālu ʿahdī l-ẓālimīna
ayahs.2:125: wa-idh jaʿalnā l-bayta mathābatan lilnnāsi wa-amnan wa-ittakhidhū min maqāmi ibrāhīma muṣallan waʿahidnā ilā ibrāhīma wa-ismāʿīla an ṭahhirā baytiya lilṭṭāifīna wal-ʿākifīna wal-rukaʿi l-sujūdi
ayahs.2:126: wa-idh qāla ibrāhīmu rabbi ijʿal hādhā baladan āminan wa-urzuq ahlahu mina l-thamarāti man āmana minhum billāhi wal-yawmi l-ākhiri qāla waman kafara fa-umattiʿuhu qalīlan thumma aḍṭarruhu ilā ʿadhābi l-nāri wabiʾsa l-maṣīru
ayahs.2:127: wa-idh yarfaʿu ibrāhīmu l-qawāʿida mina l-bayti wa-ismāʿīlu rabbanā taqabbal minnā innaka anta l-samīʿu l-ʿalīmu
ayahs.2:128: rabbanā wa-ijʿalnā muslimayni laka wamin dhurriyyatinā ummatan muslimatan laka wa-arinā manāsikanā watub ʿalaynā innaka anta l-tawābu l-raḥīmu
ayahs.2:129: rabbanā wa-ibʿath fīhim rasūlan minhum yatlū ʿalayhim āyātika wayuʿallimuhumu l-kitāba wal-ḥikmata wayuzakkīhim innaka anta l-ʿazīzu l-ḥakīmu
ayahs.2:130: waman yarghabu ʿan millati ibrāhīma illā man safiha nafsahu walaqadi iṣṭafaynāhu fī l-dunyā wa-innahu fī l-ākhirati lamina l-ṣāliḥīna
ayahs.2:131: idh qāla lahu rabbuhu aslim qāla aslamtu lirabbi l-ʿālamīna
ayahs.2:132: wawaṣṣā bihā ibrāhīmu banīhi wayaʿqūbu yābaniyya inna Allāha iṣṭafā lakumu l-dīna falā tamūtunna illā wa-antum muslimūna
ayahs.2:133: am kuntum shuhadāʾa idh ḥaḍara yaʿqūba l-mawtu idh qāla libanīhi mā taʿbudūna min baʿdī qālū naʿbudu ilāhaka wa-ilāha ābāika ibrāhīma wa-ismāʿīla wa-isḥāqa ilāhan wāḥidan wanaḥnu lahu muslimūna
ayahs.2:134: tilka ummatun qad khalat lahā mā kasabat walakum mā kasabtum walā tusalūna ʿammā kānū yaʿmalūna
ayahs.2:135: waqālū kūnū hūdan aw naṣārā tahtadū qul bal millata ibrāhīma ḥanīfan wamā kāna mina l-mushrikīna
ayahs.2:136: qūlū āmannā billāhi wamā unzila ilaynā wamā unzila ilā ibrāhīma wa-ismāʿīla wa-isḥāqa wayaʿqūba wal-asbāṭi wamā ūtiya mūsā waʿīsā wamā ūtiya l-nabiyūna min rabbihim lā nufarriqu bayna aḥadin minhum wanaḥnu lahu muslimūna
ayahs.2:137: fa-in āmanū bimithli mā āmantum bihi faqadi ihtadaw wa-in tawallaw fa-innamā hum fī shiqāqin fasayakfīkahumu Allāhu wahuwa l-samīʿu l-ʿalīmu
ayahs.2:138: ṣibghata Allāhi waman aḥsanu mina Allāhi ṣibghatan wanaḥnu lahu ʿābidūna
ayahs.2:139: qul atuḥājjūnanā fī Allāhi wahuwa rabbunā warabbukum walanā aʿmālunā walakum aʿmālukum wanaḥnu lahu mukhliṣūna
ayahs.2:140: am taqūlūna inna ibrāhīma wa-ismāʿīla wa-isḥāqa wayaʿqūba wal-asbāṭa kānū hūdan aw naṣārā qul a-antum aʿlamu ami Allāhu waman aẓlamu mimman katama shahādatan ʿindahu mina Allāhi wamā Allāhu bighāfilin ʿammā taʿmalūna
ayahs.2:141: tilka ummatun qad khalat lahā mā kasabat walakum mā kasabtum walā tusalūna ʿammā kānū yaʿmalūna
ayahs.2:142: sayaqūlu l-sufahāu mina l-nāsi mā wallāhum ʿan qiblatihimu allatī kānū ʿalayhā qul lillāhi l-mashriqu wal-maghribu yahdī man yashāu ilā ṣirāṭin mustaqīmin
ayahs.2:143: wakadhālika jaʿalnākum ummatan wasaṭan litakūnū shuhadāʾa ʿalā l-nāsi wayakūna l-rasūlu ʿalaykum shahīdan wamā jaʿalnā l-qiblata allatī kunta ʿalayhā illā linaʿlama man yattabiʿu l-rasūla mimman yanqalibu ʿalā ʿaqibayhi wa-in kānat lakabīratan illā ʿalā alladhīna hadā Allāhu wamā kāna Allāhu liyuḍīʿa īmānakum inna Allāha bil-nāsi laraūfun raḥīmun
ayahs.2:144: qad narā taqalluba wajhika fī l-samāi falanuwalliyannaka qiblatan tarḍāhā fawalli wajhaka shaṭra l-masjidi l-ḥarāmi waḥaythu mā kuntum fawallū wujūhakum shaṭrahu wa-inna alladhīna ūtū l-kitāba layaʿlamūna annahu l-ḥaqu min rabbihim wamā Allāhu bighāfilin ʿammā yaʿmalūna
ayahs.2:145: wala-in atayta alladhīna ūtū l-kitāba bikulli āyatin mā tabiʿū qiblataka wamā anta bitābiʿin qiblatahum wamā baʿḍuhum bitābiʿin qiblata baʿḍin wala-ini ittabaʿta ahwāʾahum min baʿdi mā jāʾaka mina l-ʿilmi innaka idhan lamina l-ẓālimīna
ayahs.2:146: alladhīna ātaynāhumu l-kitāba yaʿrifūnahu kamā yaʿrifūna abnāʾahum wa-inna farīqan minhum layaktumūna l-ḥaqa wahum yaʿlamūna
ayahs.2:147: al-ḥaqu min rabbika falā takūnanna mina l-mumtarīna
ayahs.2:148: walikullin wijhatun huwa muwallīhā fa-istabiqū l-khayrāti ayna mā takūnū yati bikumu Allāhu jamīʿan inna Allāha ʿalā kulli shayin qadīrun
ayahs.2:149: wamin ḥaythu kharajta fawalli wajhaka shaṭra l-masjidi l-ḥarāmi wa-innahu lalḥaqqu min rabbika wamā Allāhu bighāfilin ʿammā taʿmalūna
ayahs.2:150: wamin ḥaythu kharajta fawalli wajhaka shaṭra l-masjidi l-ḥarāmi waḥaythu mā kuntum fawallū wujūhakum shaṭrahu li-allā yakūna lilnnāsi ʿalaykum ḥujjatun illā alladhīna ẓalamū minhum falā takhshawhum wa-ikhshawnī wali-utimma niʿmatī ʿalaykum walaʿallakum tahtadūna
ayahs.2:151: kamā arsalnā fīkum rasūlan minkum yatlū ʿalaykum āyātinā wayuzakkīkum wayuʿallimukumu l-kitāba wal-ḥikmata wayuʿallimukum mā lam takūnū taʿlamūna
ayahs.2:152: fa-udhkurūnī adhkurkum wa-ushkurū lī walā takfurūni
ayahs.2:153: yāʾayyuhā alladhīna āmanū istaʿīnū bil-ṣabri wal-ṣalati inna Allāha maʿa l-ṣābirīna
ayahs.2:154: walā taqūlū liman yuqtalu fī sabīli Allāhi amwātun bal aḥyāon walākin lā tashʿurūna
ayahs.2:155: walanabluwannakum bishayin mina l-khawfi wal-jūʿi wanaqṣin mina l-amwāli wal-anfusi wal-thamarāti wabashiri l-ṣābirīna
ayahs.2:156: alladhīna idhā aṣābathum muṣībatun qālū innā lillāhi wa-innā ilayhi rājiʿūna
ayahs.2:157: ulāika ʿalayhim ṣalawātun min rabbihim waraḥmatun wa-ulāika humu l-muhtadūna
ayahs.2:158: inna l-ṣafā wal-marwata min shaʿāiri Allāhi faman ḥajja l-bayta awi iʿtamara falā junāḥa ʿalayhi an yaṭṭawwafa bihimā waman taṭawwaʿa khayran fa-inna Allāha shākirun ʿalīmun
ayahs.2:159: inna alladhīna yaktumūna mā anzalnā mina l-bayināti wal-hudā min baʿdi mā bayyannāhu lilnnāsi fī l-kitābi ulāika yalʿanuhumu Allāhu wayalʿanuhumu l-lāʿinūna
ayahs.2:160: illā alladhīna tābū wa-aṣlaḥū wabayyanū fa-ulāika atūbu ʿalayhim wa-anā l-tawābu l-raḥīmu
ayahs.2:161: inna alladhīna kafarū wamātū wahum kuffārun ulāika ʿalayhim laʿnatu Allāhi wal-malāikati wal-nāsi ajmaʿīna
ayahs.2:162: khālidīna fīhā lā yukhaffafu ʿanhumu l-ʿadhābu walā hum yunẓarūna
ayahs.2:163: wa-ilāhukum ilāhun wāḥidun lā ilāha illā huwa l-raḥmānu l-raḥīmu
ayahs.2:164: inna fī khalqi l-samāwāti wal-arḍi wa-ikhtilāfi al-layli wal-nahāri wal-fulki allatī tajrī fī l-baḥri bimā yanfaʿu l-nāsa wamā anzala Allāhu mina l-samāi min māin fa-aḥyā bihi l-arḍa baʿda mawtihā wabatha fīhā min kulli dābbatin wataṣrīfi l-riyāḥi wal-saḥābi l-musakhari bayna l-samāi wal-arḍi laʾāyātin liqawmin yaʿqilūna
ayahs.2:165: wamina l-nāsi man yattakhidhu min dūni Allāhi andādan yuḥibbūnahum kaḥubbi Allāhi wa-alladhīna āmanū ashaddu ḥubban lillāhi walaw yarā alladhīna ẓalamū idh yarawna l-ʿadhāba anna l-quwata lillāhi jamīʿan wa-anna Allāha shadīdu l-ʿadhābi
ayahs.2:166: idh tabarra-a alladhīna ittubiʿū mina alladhīna ittabaʿū wara-awū l-ʿadhāba wataqaṭṭaʿat bihimu l-asbābu
ayahs.2:167: waqāla alladhīna ittabaʿū law anna lanā karratan fanatabarra-a minhum kamā tabarraū minnā kadhālika yurīhimu Allāhu aʿmālahum ḥasarātin ʿalayhim wamā hum bikhārijīna mina l-nāri
ayahs.2:168: yāʾayyuhā l-nāsu kulū mimmā fī l-arḍi ḥalālan ṭayyiban walā tattabiʿū khuṭuwāti l-shayṭāni innahu lakum ʿaduwwun mubīnun
ayahs.2:169: innamā yamurukum bil-sūi wal-faḥshāi wa-an taqūlū ʿalā Allāhi mā lā taʿlamūna
ayahs.2:170: wa-idhā qīla lahumu ittabiʿū mā anzala Allāhu qālū bal nattabiʿu mā alfaynā ʿalayhi ābāʾanā awalaw kāna ābāuhum lā yaʿqilūna shayan walā yahtadūna
ayahs.2:171: wamathalu alladhīna kafarū kamathali alladhī yanʿiqu bimā lā yasmaʿu illā duʿāʾan wanidāʾan ṣummun bukmun ʿumyun fahum lā yaʿqilūna
ayahs.2:172: yāʾayyuhā alladhīna āmanū kulū min ṭayyibāti mā razaqnākum wa-ushkurū lillāhi in kuntum iyyāhu taʿbudūna
ayahs.2:173: innamā ḥarrama ʿalaykumu l-maytata wal-dama walaḥma l-khinzīri wamā uhilla bihi lighayri Allāhi famani uḍṭurra ghayra bāghin walā ʿādin falā ithma ʿalayhi inna Allāha ghafūrun raḥīmun
ayahs.2:174: inna alladhīna yaktumūna mā anzala Allāhu mina l-kitābi wayashtarūna bihi thamanan qalīlan ulāika mā yakulūna fī buṭūnihim illā l-nāra walā yukallimuhumu Allāhu yawma l-qiyāmati walā yuzakkīhim walahum ʿadhābun alīmun
ayahs.2:175: ulāika alladhīna ishtarawū l-ḍalālata bil-hudā wal-ʿadhāba bil-maghfirati famā aṣbarahum ʿalā l-nāri
ayahs.2:176: dhālika bi-anna Allāha nazzala l-kitāba bil-ḥaqi wa-inna alladhīna ikhtalafū fī l-kitābi lafī shiqāqin baʿīdin
ayahs.2:177: laysa l-bira an tuwallū wujūhakum qibala l-mashriqi wal-maghribi walākinna l-bira man āmana billāhi wal-yawmi l-ākhiri wal-malāikati wal-kitābi wal-nabiyīna waʾātā l-māla ʿalā ḥubbihi dhawī l-qurbā wal-yatāmā wal-masākīna wa-ibna l-sabīli wal-sāilīna wafī l-riqābi wa-aqāma l-ṣalata waʾātā l-zakata wal-mūfūna biʿahdihim idhā ʿāhadū wal-ṣābirīna fī l-basāi wal-ḍarāi waḥīna l-basi ulāika alladhīna ṣadaqū wa-ulāika humu l-mutaqūna
ayahs.2:178: yāʾayyuhā alladhīna āmanū kutiba ʿalaykumu l-qiṣāṣu fī l-qatlā l-ḥuru bil-ḥuri wal-ʿabdu bil-ʿabdi wal-unthā bil-unthā faman ʿufiya lahu min akhīhi shayon fa-ittibāʿun bil-maʿrūfi wa-adāon ilayhi bi-iḥsānin dhālika takhfīfun min rabbikum waraḥmatun famani iʿtadā baʿda dhālika falahu ʿadhābun alīmun
ayahs.2:179: walakum fī l-qiṣāṣi ḥayatun yāulī l-albābi laʿallakum tattaqūna
ayahs.2:180: kutiba ʿalaykum idhā ḥaḍara aḥadakumu l-mawtu in taraka khayran l-waṣiyatu lilwālidayni wal-aqrabīna bil-maʿrūfi ḥaqqan ʿalā l-mutaqīna
ayahs.2:181: faman baddalahu baʿdamā samiʿahu fa-innamā ithmuhu ʿalā alladhīna yubaddilūnahu inna Allāha samīʿun ʿalīmun
ayahs.2:182: faman khāfa min mūṣin janafan aw ithman fa-aṣlaḥa baynahum falā ithma ʿalayhi inna Allāha ghafūrun raḥīmun
ayahs.2:183: yāʾayyuhā alladhīna āmanū kutiba ʿalaykumu l-ṣiyāmu kamā kutiba ʿalā alladhīna min qablikum laʿallakum tattaqūna
ayahs.2:184: ayyāman maʿdūdātin faman kāna minkum marīḍan aw ʿalā safarin faʿiddatun min ayyāmin ukhara waʿalā alladhīna yuṭīqūnahu fidyatun ṭaʿāmu miskīnin faman taṭawwaʿa khayran fahuwa khayrun lahu wa-an taṣūmū khayrun lakum in kuntum taʿlamūna
ayahs.2:185: shahru ramaḍāna alladhī unzila fīhi l-qurānu hudan lilnnāsi wabayyinātin mina l-hudā wal-furqāni faman shahida minkumu l-shahra falyaṣumhu waman kāna marīḍan aw ʿalā safarin faʿiddatun min ayyāmin ukhara yurīdu Allāhu bikumu l-yusra walā yurīdu bikumu l-ʿusra walitukmilū l-ʿidata walitukabbirū Allāha ʿalā mā hadākum walaʿallakum tashkurūna
ayahs.2:186: wa-idhā sa-alaka ʿibādī ʿannī fa-innī qarībun ujību daʿwata l-dāʿi idhā daʿāni falyastajībū lī walyuʾminū bī laʿallahum yarshudūna
ayahs.2:187: uḥilla lakum laylata l-ṣiyāmi l-rafathu ilā nisāikum hunna libāsun lakum wa-antum libāsun lahunna ʿalima Allāhu annakum kuntum takhtānūna anfusakum fatāba ʿalaykum waʿafā ʿankum fal-āna bāshirūhunna wa-ibtaghū mā kataba Allāhu lakum wakulū wa-ishrabū ḥattā yatabayyana lakumu l-khayṭu l-abyaḍu mina l-khayṭi l-aswadi mina l-fajri thumma atimmū l-ṣiyāma ilā al-layli walā tubāshirūhunna wa-antum ʿākifūna fī l-masājidi tilka ḥudūdu Allāhi falā taqrabūhā kadhālika yubayyinu Allāhu āyātihi lilnnāsi laʿallahum yattaqūna
ayahs.2:188: walā takulū amwālakum baynakum bil-bāṭili watudlū bihā ilā l-ḥukāmi litakulū farīqan min amwāli l-nāsi bil-ithmi wa-antum taʿlamūna
ayahs.2:189: yasalūnaka ʿani l-ahilati qul hiya mawāqītu lilnnāsi wal-ḥaji walaysa l-biru bi-an tatū l-buyūta min ẓuhūrihā walākinna l-bira mani ittaqā watū l-buyūta min abwābihā wa-ittaqū Allāha laʿallakum tufliḥūna
ayahs.2:190: waqātilū fī sabīli Allāhi alladhīna yuqātilūnakum walā taʿtadū inna Allāha lā yuḥibbu l-muʿtadīna
ayahs.2:191: wa-uqtulūhum ḥaythu thaqiftumūhum wa-akhrijūhum min ḥaythu akhrajūkum wal-fitnatu ashaddu mina l-qatli walā tuqātilūhum ʿinda l-masjidi l-ḥarāmi ḥattā yuqātilūkum fīhi fa-in qātalūkum fa-uqtulūhum kadhālika jazāu l-kāfirīna
ayahs.2:192: fa-ini intahaw fa-inna Allāha ghafūrun raḥīmun
ayahs.2:193: waqātilūhum ḥattā lā takūna fitnatun wayakūna l-dīnu lillāhi fa-ini intahaw falā ʿudwāna illā ʿalā l-ẓālimīna
ayahs.2:194: al-shahru l-ḥarāmu bil-shahri l-ḥarāmi wal-ḥurumātu qiṣāṣun famani iʿtadā ʿalaykum fa-iʿtadū ʿalayhi bimithli mā iʿtadā ʿalaykum wa-ittaqū Allāha wa-iʿlamū anna Allāha maʿa l-mutaqīna
ayahs.2:195: wa-anfiqū fī sabīli Allāhi walā tulqū bi-aydīkum ilā l-tahlukati wa-aḥsinū inna Allāha yuḥibbu l-muḥsinīna
ayahs.2:196: wa-atimmū l-ḥaja wal-ʿumrata lillāhi fa-in uḥṣirtum famā istaysara mina l-hadyi walā taḥliqū ruʾūsakum ḥattā yablugha l-hadyu maḥillahu faman kāna minkum marīḍan aw bihi adhan min rasihi fafidyatun min ṣiyāmin aw ṣadaqatin aw nusukin fa-idhā amintum faman tamattaʿa bil-ʿumrati ilā l-ḥaji famā istaysara mina l-hadyi faman lam yajid faṣiyāmu thalāthati ayyāmin fī l-ḥaji wasabʿatin idhā rajaʿtum tilka ʿasharatun kāmilatun dhālika liman lam yakun ahluhu ḥāḍirī l-masjidi l-ḥarāmi wa-ittaqū Allāha wa-iʿlamū anna Allāha shadīdu l-ʿiqābi
ayahs.2:197: al-ḥaju ashhurun maʿlūmātun faman faraḍa fīhinna l-ḥaja falā rafatha walā fusūqa walā jidāla fī l-ḥaji wamā tafʿalū min khayrin yaʿlamhu Allāhu watazawwadū fa-inna khayra l-zādi l-taqwā wa-ittaqūni yāulī l-albābi
ayahs.2:198: laysa ʿalaykum junāḥun an tabtaghū faḍlan min rabbikum fa-idhā afaḍtum min ʿarafātin fa-udhkurū Allāha ʿinda l-mashʿari l-ḥarāmi wa-udhkurūhu kamā hadākum wa-in kuntum min qablihi lamina l-ḍālīna
ayahs.2:199: thumma afīḍū min ḥaythu afāḍa l-nāsu wa-istaghfirū Allāha inna Allāha ghafūrun raḥīmun
ayahs.2:200: fa-idhā qaḍaytum manāsikakum fa-udhkurū Allāha kadhikrikum ābāʾakum aw ashadda dhikran famina l-nāsi man yaqūlu rabbanā ātinā fī l-dunyā wamā lahu fī l-ākhirati min khalāqin
ayahs.2:201: waminhum man yaqūlu rabbanā ātinā fī l-dunyā ḥasanatan wafī l-ākhirati ḥasanatan waqinā ʿadhāba l-nāri
ayahs.2:202: ulāika lahum naṣībun mimmā kasabū wallāhu sarīʿu l-ḥisābi
ayahs.2:203: wa-udhkurū Allāha fī ayyāmin maʿdūdātin faman taʿajjala fī yawmayni falā ithma ʿalayhi waman ta-akhara falā ithma ʿalayhi limani ittaqā wa-ittaqū Allāha wa-iʿlamū annakum ilayhi tuḥsharūna
ayahs.2:204: wamina l-nāsi man yuʿjibuka qawluhu fī l-ḥayati l-dunyā wayushhidu Allāha ʿalā mā fī qalbihi wahuwa aladdu l-khiṣāmi
ayahs.2:205: wa-idhā tawallā saʿā fī l-arḍi liyufsida fīhā wayuhlika l-ḥartha wal-nasla wallāhu lā yuḥibbu l-fasāda
ayahs.2:206: wa-idhā qīla lahu ittaqi Allāha akhadhathu l-ʿizatu bil-ithmi faḥasbuhu jahannamu walabiʾsa l-mihādu
ayahs.2:207: wamina l-nāsi man yashrī nafsahu ibtighāʾa marḍāti Allāhi wallāhu raūfun bil-ʿibādi
ayahs.2:208: yāʾayyuhā alladhīna āmanū udkhulū fī l-silmi kāffatan walā tattabiʿū khuṭuwāti l-shayṭāni innahu lakum ʿaduwwun mubīnun
ayahs.2:209: fa-in zalaltum min baʿdi mā jāʾatkumu l-bayinātu fa-iʿlamū anna Allāha ʿazīzun ḥakīmun
ayahs.2:210: hal yanẓurūna illā an yatiyahumu Allāhu fī ẓulalin mina l-ghamāmi wal-malāikatu waquḍiya l-amru wa-ilā Allāhi turjaʿu l-umūru
ayahs.2:211: sal banī isrāīla kam ātaynāhum min āyatin bayyinatin waman yubaddil niʿmata Allāhi min baʿdi mā jāʾathu fa-inna Allāha shadīdu l-ʿiqābi
ayahs.2:212: zuyyina lilladhīna kafarū l-ḥayatu l-dunyā wayaskharūna mina alladhīna āmanū wa-alladhīna ittaqaw fawqahum yawma l-qiyāmati wallāhu yarzuqu man yashāu bighayri ḥisābin
ayahs.2:213: kāna l-nāsu ummatan wāḥidatan fabaʿatha Allāhu l-nabiyīna mubashirīna wamundhirīna wa-anzala maʿahumu l-kitāba bil-ḥaqi liyaḥkuma bayna l-nāsi fīmā ikhtalafū fīhi wamā ikhtalafa fīhi illā alladhīna ūtūhu min baʿdi mā jāʾathumu l-bayinātu baghyan baynahum fahadā Allāhu alladhīna āmanū limā ikhtalafū fīhi mina l-ḥaqi bi-idhnihi wallāhu yahdī man yashāu ilā ṣirāṭin mustaqīmin
ayahs.2:214: am ḥasibtum an tadkhulū l-janata walammā yatikum mathalu alladhīna khalaw min qablikum massathumu l-basāu wal-ḍarāu wazulzilū ḥattā yaqūla l-rasūlu wa-alladhīna āmanū maʿahu matā naṣru Allāhi alā inna naṣra Allāhi qarībun
ayahs.2:215: yasalūnaka mādhā yunfiqūna qul mā anfaqtum min khayrin falilwālidayni wal-aqrabīna wal-yatāmā wal-masākīni wa-ibni l-sabīli wamā tafʿalū min khayrin fa-inna Allāha bihi ʿalīmun
ayahs.2:216: kutiba ʿalaykumu l-qitālu wahuwa kurhun lakum waʿasā an takrahū shayan wahuwa khayrun lakum waʿasā an tuḥibbū shayan wahuwa sharrun lakum wallāhu yaʿlamu wa-antum lā taʿlamūna
ayahs.2:217: yasalūnaka ʿani l-shahri l-ḥarāmi qitālin fīhi qul qitālun fīhi kabīrun waṣaddun ʿan sabīli Allāhi wakufrun bihi wal-masjidi l-ḥarāmi wa-ikhrāju ahlihi minhu akbaru ʿinda Allāhi wal-fitnatu akbaru mina l-qatli walā yazālūna yuqātilūnakum ḥattā yaruddūkum ʿan dīnikum ini istaṭāʿū waman yartadid minkum ʿan dīnihi fayamut wahuwa kāfirun fa-ulāika ḥabiṭat aʿmāluhum fī l-dunyā wal-ākhirati wa-ulāika aṣḥābu l-nāri hum fīhā khālidūna
ayahs.2:218: inna alladhīna āmanū wa-alladhīna hājarū wajāhadū fī sabīli Allāhi ulāika yarjūna raḥmata Allāhi wallāhu ghafūrun raḥīmun
ayahs.2:219: yasalūnaka ʿani l-khamri wal-maysiri qul fīhimā ithmun kabīrun wamanāfiʿu lilnnāsi wa-ithmuhumā akbaru min nafʿihimā wayasalūnaka mādhā yunfiqūna quli l-ʿafwa kadhālika yubayyinu Allāhu lakumu l-āyāti laʿallakum tatafakkarūna
ayahs.2:220: fī l-dunyā wal-ākhirati wayasalūnaka ʿani l-yatāmā qul iṣlāḥun lahum khayrun wa-in tukhāliṭūhum fa-ikhwānukum wallāhu yaʿlamu l-mufsida mina l-muṣliḥi walaw shāʾa Allāhu la-aʿnatakum inna Allāha ʿazīzun ḥakīmun
ayahs.2:221: walā tankiḥū l-mushrikāti ḥattā yuʾminna wala-amatun muʾminatun khayrun min mushrikatin walaw aʿjabatkum walā tunkiḥū l-mushrikīna ḥattā yuʾminū walaʿabdun muʾminun khayrun min mushrikin walaw aʿjabakum ulāika yadʿūna ilā l-nāri wallāhu yadʿū ilā l-janati wal-maghfirati bi-idhnihi wayubayyinu āyātihi lilnnāsi laʿallahum yatadhakkarūna
ayahs.2:222: wayasalūnaka ʿani l-maḥīḍi qul huwa adhan fa-iʿtazilū l-nisāʾa fī l-maḥīḍi walā taqrabūhunna ḥattā yaṭhurna fa-idhā taṭahharna fatūhunna min ḥaythu amarakumu Allāhu inna Allāha yuḥibbu l-tawābīna wayuḥibbu l-mutaṭahirīna
ayahs.2:223: nisāukum ḥarthun lakum fatū ḥarthakum annā shiʾtum waqaddimū li-anfusikum wa-ittaqū Allāha wa-iʿlamū annakum mulāqūhu wabashiri l-muʾminīna
ayahs.2:224: walā tajʿalū Allāha ʿurḍatan li-aymānikum an tabarrū watattaqū watuṣliḥū bayna l-nāsi wallāhu samīʿun ʿalīmun
ayahs.2:225: lā yuākhidhukumu Allāhu bil-laghwi fī aymānikum walākin yuākhidhukum bimā kasabat qulūbukum wallāhu ghafūrun ḥalīmun
ayahs.2:226: lilladhīna yuʾlūna min nisāihim tarabbuṣu arbaʿati ashhurin fa-in fāū fa-inna Allāha ghafūrun raḥīmun
ayahs.2:227: wa-in ʿazamū l-ṭalāqa fa-inna Allāha samīʿun ʿalīmun
ayahs.2:228: wal-muṭalaqātu yatarabbaṣna bi-anfusihinna thalāthata qurūin walā yaḥillu lahunna an yaktumna mā khalaqa Allāhu fī arḥāmihinna in kunna yuʾminna billāhi wal-yawmi l-ākhiri wabuʿūlatuhunna aḥaqqu biraddihinna fī dhālika in arādū iṣlāḥan walahunna mithlu alladhī ʿalayhinna bil-maʿrūfi walilrrijāli ʿalayhinna darajatun wallāhu ʿazīzun ḥakīmun
ayahs.2:229: al-ṭalāqu marratāni fa-imsākun bimaʿrūfin aw tasrīḥun bi-iḥsānin walā yaḥillu lakum an takhudhū mimmā ātaytumūhunna shayan illā an yakhāfā allā yuqīmā ḥudūda Allāhi fa-in khiftum allā yuqīmā ḥudūda Allāhi falā junāḥa ʿalayhimā fīmā iftadat bihi tilka ḥudūdu Allāhi falā taʿtadūhā waman yataʿadda ḥudūda Allāhi fa-ulāika humu l-ẓālimūna
ayahs.2:230: fa-in ṭallaqahā falā taḥillu lahu min baʿdu ḥattā tankiḥa zawjan ghayrahu fa-in ṭallaqahā falā junāḥa ʿalayhimā an yatarājaʿā in ẓannā an yuqīmā ḥudūda Allāhi watilka ḥudūdu Allāhi yubayyinuhā liqawmin yaʿlamūna
ayahs.2:231: wa-idhā ṭallaqtumu l-nisāʾa fabalaghna ajalahunna fa-amsikūhunna bimaʿrūfin aw sarriḥūhunna bimaʿrūfin walā tumsikūhunna ḍirāran litaʿtadū waman yafʿal dhālika faqad ẓalama nafsahu walā tattakhidhū āyāti Allāhi huzuwan wa-udhkurū niʿmata Allāhi ʿalaykum wamā anzala ʿalaykum mina l-kitābi wal-ḥikmati yaʿiẓukum bihi wa-ittaqū Allāha wa-iʿlamū anna Allāha bikulli shayin ʿalīmun
ayahs.2:232: wa-idhā ṭallaqtumu l-nisāʾa fabalaghna ajalahunna falā taʿḍulūhunna an yankiḥna azwājahunna idhā tarāḍaw baynahum bil-maʿrūfi dhālika yūʿaẓu bihi man kāna minkum yuʾminu billāhi wal-yawmi l-ākhiri dhālikum azkā lakum wa-aṭharu wallāhu yaʿlamu wa-antum lā taʿlamūna
ayahs.2:233: wal-wālidātu yurḍiʿna awlādahunna ḥawlayni kāmilayni liman arāda an yutimma l-raḍāʿata waʿalā l-mawlūdi lahu rizquhunna wakiswatuhunna bil-maʿrūfi lā tukallafu nafsun illā wusʿahā lā tuḍārra wālidatun biwaladihā walā mawlūdun lahu biwaladihi waʿalā l-wārithi mithlu dhālika fa-in arādā fiṣālan ʿan tarāḍin minhumā watashāwurin falā junāḥa ʿalayhimā wa-in aradttum an tastarḍiʿū awlādakum falā junāḥa ʿalaykum idhā sallamtum mā ātaytum bil-maʿrūfi wa-ittaqū Allāha wa-iʿlamū anna Allāha bimā taʿmalūna baṣīrun
ayahs.2:234: wa-alladhīna yutawaffawna minkum wayadharūna azwājan yatarabbaṣna bi-anfusihinna arbaʿata ashhurin waʿashran fa-idhā balaghna ajalahunna falā junāḥa ʿalaykum fīmā faʿalna fī anfusihinna bil-maʿrūfi wallāhu bimā taʿmalūna khabīrun
ayahs.2:235: walā junāḥa ʿalaykum fīmā ʿarraḍtum bihi min khiṭbati l-nisāi aw aknantum fī anfusikum ʿalima Allāhu annakum satadhkurūnahunna walākin lā tuwāʿidūhunna sirran illā an taqūlū qawlan maʿrūfan walā taʿzimū ʿuqdata l-nikāḥi ḥattā yablugha l-kitābu ajalahu wa-iʿlamū anna Allāha yaʿlamu mā fī anfusikum fa-iḥdharūhu wa-iʿlamū anna Allāha ghafūrun ḥalīmun
ayahs.2:236: lā junāḥa ʿalaykum in ṭallaqtumu l-nisāʾa mā lam tamassūhunna aw tafriḍū lahunna farīḍatan wamattiʿūhunna ʿalā l-mūsiʿi qadaruhu waʿalā l-muqtiri qadaruhu matāʿan bil-maʿrūfi ḥaqqan ʿalā l-muḥsinīna
ayahs.2:237: wa-in ṭallaqtumūhunna min qabli an tamassūhunna waqad faraḍtum lahunna farīḍatan faniṣfu mā faraḍtum illā an yaʿfūna aw yaʿfuwā alladhī biyadihi ʿuqdatu l-nikāḥi wa-an taʿfū aqrabu lilttaqwā walā tansawū l-faḍla baynakum inna Allāha bimā taʿmalūna baṣīrun
ayahs.2:238: ḥāfiẓū ʿalā l-ṣalawāti wal-ṣalati l-wusṭā waqūmū lillāhi qānitīna
ayahs.2:239: fa-in khiftum farijālan aw rukbānan fa-idhā amintum fa-udhkurū Allāha kamā ʿallamakum mā lam takūnū taʿlamūna
ayahs.2:240: wa-alladhīna yutawaffawna minkum wayadharūna azwājan waṣiyyatan li-azwājihim matāʿan ilā l-ḥawli ghayra ikhrājin fa-in kharajna falā junāḥa ʿalaykum fī mā faʿalna fī anfusihinna min maʿrūfin wallāhu ʿazīzun ḥakīmun
ayahs.2:241: walilmuṭallaqāti matāʿun bil-maʿrūfi ḥaqqan ʿalā l-mutaqīna
ayahs.2:242: kadhālika yubayyinu Allāhu lakum āyātihi laʿallakum taʿqilūna
ayahs.2:243: alam tara ilā alladhīna kharajū min diyārihim wahum ulūfun ḥadhara l-mawti faqāla lahumu Allāhu mūtū thumma aḥyāhum inna Allāha ladhū faḍlin ʿalā l-nāsi walākinna akthara l-nāsi lā yashkurūna
ayahs.2:244: waqātilū fī sabīli Allāhi wa-iʿlamū anna Allāha samīʿun ʿalīmun
ayahs.2:245: man dhā alladhī yuqriḍu Allāha qarḍan ḥasanan fayuḍāʿifahu lahu aḍʿāfan kathīratan wallāhu yaqbiḍu wayabṣuṭu wa-ilayhi turjaʿūna
ayahs.2:246: alam tara ilā l-mala-i min banī isrāīla min baʿdi mūsā idh qālū linabiyyin lahumu ibʿath lanā malikan nuqātil fī sabīli Allāhi qāla hal ʿasaytum in kutiba ʿalaykumu l-qitālu allā tuqātilū qālū wamā lanā allā nuqātila fī sabīli Allāhi waqad ukhrijnā min diyārinā wa-abnāinā falammā kutiba ʿalayhimu l-qitālu tawallaw illā qalīlan minhum wallāhu ʿalīmun bil-ẓālimīna
ayahs.2:247: waqāla lahum nabiyyuhum inna Allāha qad baʿatha lakum ṭālūta malikan qālū annā yakūnu lahu l-mulku ʿalaynā wanaḥnu aḥaqqu bil-mulki minhu walam yuʾta saʿatan mina l-māli qāla inna Allāha iṣṭafāhu ʿalaykum wazādahu basṭatan fī l-ʿilmi wal-jismi wallāhu yuʾtī mulkahu man yashāu wallāhu wāsiʿun ʿalīmun
ayahs.2:248: waqāla lahum nabiyyuhum inna āyata mulkihi an yatiyakumu l-tābūtu fīhi sakīnatun min rabbikum wabaqiyyatun mimmā taraka ālu mūsā waʾālu hārūna taḥmiluhu l-malāikatu inna fī dhālika laʾāyatan lakum in kuntum muʾminīna
ayahs.2:249: falammā faṣala ṭālūtu bil-junūdi qāla inna Allāha mubtalīkum binaharin faman shariba minhu falaysa minnī waman lam yaṭʿamhu fa-innahu minnī illā mani ightarafa ghurfatan biyadihi fasharibū minhu illā qalīlan minhum falammā jāwazahu huwa wa-alladhīna āmanū maʿahu qālū lā ṭāqata lanā l-yawma bijālūta wajunūdihi qāla alladhīna yaẓunnūna annahum mulāqū Allāhi kam min fi-atin qalīlatin ghalabat fi-atan kathīratan bi-idhni Allāhi wallāhu maʿa l-ṣābirīna
ayahs.2:250: walammā barazū lijālūta wajunūdihi qālū rabbanā afrigh ʿalaynā ṣabran wathabbit aqdāmanā wa-unṣurnā ʿalā l-qawmi l-kāfirīna
ayahs.2:251: fahazamūhum bi-idhni Allāhi waqatala dāwūdu jālūta waʾātāhu Allāhu l-mulka wal-ḥikmata waʿallamahu mimmā yashāu walawlā dafʿu Allāhi l-nāsa baʿḍahum bibaʿḍin lafasadati l-arḍu walākinna Allāha dhū faḍlin ʿalā l-ʿālamīna
ayahs.2:252: tilka āyātu Allāhi natlūhā ʿalayka bil-ḥaqi wa-innaka lamina l-mursalīna
ayahs.2:253: tilka l-rusulu faḍḍalnā baʿḍahum ʿalā baʿḍin minhum man kallama Allāhu warafaʿa baʿḍahum darajātin waʾātaynā ʿīsā ibna maryama l-bayināti wa-ayyadnāhu birūḥi l-qudusi walaw shāʾa Allāhu mā iqtatala alladhīna min baʿdihim min baʿdi mā jāʾathumu l-bayinātu walākini ikhtalafū faminhum man āmana waminhum man kafara walaw shāʾa Allāhu mā iqtatalū walākinna Allāha yafʿalu mā yurīdu
ayahs.2:254: yāʾayyuhā alladhīna āmanū anfiqū mimmā razaqnākum min qabli an yatiya yawmun lā bayʿun fīhi walā khullatun walā shafāʿatun wal-kāfirūna humu l-ẓālimūna
ayahs.2:255: Allāhu lā ilāha illā huwa l-ḥayu l-qayūmu lā takhudhuhu sinatun walā nawmun lahu mā fī l-samāwāti wamā fī l-arḍi man dhā alladhī yashfaʿu ʿindahu illā bi-idhnihi yaʿlamu mā bayna aydīhim wamā khalfahum walā yuḥīṭūna bishayin min ʿilmihi illā bimā shāʾa wasiʿa kursiyyuhu l-samāwāti wal-arḍa walā yaūduhu ḥifẓuhumā wahuwa l-ʿaliyu l-ʿaẓīmu
ayahs.2:256: lā ikrāha fī l-dīni qad tabayyana l-rushdu mina l-ghayi faman yakfur bil-ṭāghūti wayuʾmin billāhi faqadi istamsaka bil-ʿurwati l-wuthqā lā infiṣāma lahā wallāhu samīʿun ʿalīmun
ayahs.2:257: Allāhu waliyyu alladhīna āmanū yukhrijuhum mina l-ẓulumāti ilā l-nūri wa-alladhīna kafarū awliyāuhumu l-ṭāghūtu yukhrijūnahum mina l-nūri ilā l-ẓulumāti ulāika aṣḥābu l-nāri hum fīhā khālidūna
ayahs.2:258: alam tara ilā alladhī ḥājja ibrāhīma fī rabbihi an ātāhu Allāhu l-mulka idh qāla ibrāhīmu rabbiya alladhī yuḥyī wayumītu qāla anā uḥyī wa-umītu qāla ibrāhīmu fa-inna Allāha yatī bil-shamsi mina l-mashriqi fati bihā mina l-maghribi fabuhita alladhī kafara wallāhu lā yahdī l-qawma l-ẓālimīna
ayahs.2:259: aw ka-alladhī marra ʿalā qaryatin wahiya khāwiyatun ʿalā ʿurūshihā qāla annā yuḥyī hādhihi Allāhu baʿda mawtihā fa-amātahu Allāhu mi-ata ʿāmin thumma baʿathahu qāla kam labithta qāla labithtu yawman aw baʿḍa yawmin qāla bal labithta mi-ata ʿāmin fa-unẓur ilā ṭaʿāmika washarābika lam yatasannah wa-unẓur ilā ḥimārika walinajʿalaka āyatan lilnnāsi wa-unẓur ilā l-ʿiẓāmi kayfa nunshizuhā thumma naksūhā laḥman falammā tabayyana lahu qāla aʿlamu anna Allāha ʿalā kulli shayin qadīrun
ayahs.2:260: wa-idh qāla ibrāhīmu rabbi arinī kayfa tuḥyī l-mawtā qāla awalam tuʾmin qāla balā walākin liyaṭma-inna qalbī qāla fakhudh arbaʿatan mina l-ṭayri faṣurhunna ilayka thumma ijʿal ʿalā kulli jabalin minhunna juzan thumma udʿuhunna yatīnaka saʿyan wa-iʿlam anna Allāha ʿazīzun ḥakīmun
ayahs.2:261: mathalu alladhīna yunfiqūna amwālahum fī sabīli Allāhi kamathali ḥabbatin anbatat sabʿa sanābila fī kulli sunbulatin mi-atu ḥabbatin wallāhu yuḍāʿifu liman yashāu wallāhu wāsiʿun ʿalīmun
ayahs.2:262: alladhīna yunfiqūna amwālahum fī sabīli Allāhi thumma lā yutbiʿūna mā anfaqū mannan walā adhan lahum ajruhum ʿinda rabbihim walā khawfun ʿalayhim walā hum yaḥzanūna
ayahs.2:263: qawlun maʿrūfun wamaghfiratun khayrun min ṣadaqatin yatbaʿuhā adhan wallāhu ghaniyyun ḥalīmun
ayahs.2:264: yāʾayyuhā alladhīna āmanū lā tubṭilū ṣadaqātikum bil-mani wal-adhā ka-alladhī yunfiqu mālahu riāʾa l-nāsi walā yuʾminu billāhi wal-yawmi l-ākhiri famathaluhu kamathali ṣafwānin ʿalayhi turābun fa-aṣābahu wābilun fatarakahu ṣaldan lā yaqdirūna ʿalā shayin mimmā kasabū wallāhu lā yahdī l-qawma l-kāfirīna
ayahs.2:265: wamathalu alladhīna yunfiqūna amwālahumu ibtighāʾa marḍāti Allāhi watathbītan min anfusihim kamathali jannatin birabwatin aṣābahā wābilun faʾātat ukulahā ḍiʿfayni fa-in lam yuṣibhā wābilun faṭallun wallāhu bimā taʿmalūna baṣīrun
ayahs.2:266: ayawaddu aḥadukum an takūna lahu jannatun min nakhīlin wa-aʿnābin tajrī min taḥtihā l-anhāru lahu fīhā min kulli l-thamarāti wa-aṣābahu l-kibaru walahu dhurriyyatun ḍuʿafāu fa-aṣābahā iʿṣārun fīhi nārun fa-iḥtaraqat kadhālika yubayyinu Allāhu lakumu l-āyāti laʿallakum tatafakkarūna
ayahs.2:267: yāʾayyuhā alladhīna āmanū anfiqū min ṭayyibāti mā kasabtum wamimmā akhrajnā lakum mina l-arḍi walā tayammamū l-khabītha minhu tunfiqūna walastum biākhidhīhi illā an tughmiḍū fīhi wa-iʿlamū anna Allāha ghaniyyun ḥamīdun
ayahs.2:268: al-shayṭānu yaʿidukumu l-faqra wayamurukum bil-faḥshāi wallāhu yaʿidukum maghfiratan minhu wafaḍlan wallāhu wāsiʿun ʿalīmun
ayahs.2:269: yuʾtī l-ḥikmata man yashāu waman yuʾta l-ḥikmata faqad ūtiya khayran kathīran wamā yadhakkaru illā ulū l-albābi
ayahs.2:270: wamā anfaqtum min nafaqatin aw nadhartum min nadhrin fa-inna Allāha yaʿlamuhu wamā lilẓẓālimīna min anṣārin
ayahs.2:271: in tubdū l-ṣadaqāti faniʿimmā hiya wa-in tukhfūhā watuʾtūhā l-fuqarāʾa fahuwa khayrun lakum wayukaffiru ʿankum min sayyiātikum wallāhu bimā taʿmalūna khabīrun
ayahs.2:272: laysa ʿalayka hudāhum walākinna Allāha yahdī man yashāu wamā tunfiqū min khayrin fali-anfusikum wamā tunfiqūna illā ibtighāʾa wajhi Allāhi wamā tunfiqū min khayrin yuwaffa ilaykum wa-antum lā tuẓlamūna
ayahs.2:273: lilfuqarāi alladhīna uḥṣirū fī sabīli Allāhi lā yastaṭīʿūna ḍarban fī l-arḍi yaḥsabuhumu l-jāhilu aghniyāʾa mina l-taʿafufi taʿrifuhum bisīmāhum lā yasalūna l-nāsa ilḥāfan wamā tunfiqū min khayrin fa-inna Allāha bihi ʿalīmun
ayahs.2:274: alladhīna yunfiqūna amwālahum bi-al-layli wal-nahāri sirran waʿalāniyatan falahum ajruhum ʿinda rabbihim walā khawfun ʿalayhim walā hum yaḥzanūna
ayahs.2:275: alladhīna yakulūna l-riba lā yaqūmūna illā kamā yaqūmu alladhī yatakhabbaṭuhu l-shayṭānu mina l-masi dhālika bi-annahum qālū innamā l-bayʿu mithlu l-riba wa-aḥalla Allāhu l-bayʿa waḥarrama l-riba faman jāʾahu mawʿiẓatun min rabbihi fa-intahā falahu mā salafa wa-amruhu ilā Allāhi waman ʿāda fa-ulāika aṣḥābu l-nāri hum fīhā khālidūna
ayahs.2:276: yamḥaqu Allāhu l-riba wayurbī l-ṣadaqāti wallāhu lā yuḥibbu kulla kaffārin athīmin
ayahs.2:277: inna alladhīna āmanū waʿamilū l-ṣāliḥāti wa-aqāmū l-ṣalata waʾātawū l-zakata lahum ajruhum ʿinda rabbihim walā khawfun ʿalayhim walā hum yaḥzanūna
ayahs.2:278: yāʾayyuhā alladhīna āmanū ittaqū Allāha wadharū mā baqiya mina l-riba in kuntum muʾminīna
ayahs.2:279: fa-in lam tafʿalū fadhanū biḥarbin mina Allāhi warasūlihi wa-in tubtum falakum ruʾūsu amwālikum lā taẓlimūna walā tuẓlamūna
ayahs.2:280: wa-in kāna dhū ʿusratin fanaẓiratun ilā maysaratin wa-an taṣaddaqū khayrun lakum in kuntum taʿlamūna
ayahs.2:281: wa-ittaqū yawman turjaʿūna fīhi ilā Allāhi thumma tuwaffā kullu nafsin mā kasabat wahum lā yuẓlamūna
ayahs.2:282: yāʾayyuhā alladhīna āmanū idhā tadāyantum bidaynin ilā ajalin musamman fa-uktubūhu walyaktub baynakum kātibun bil-ʿadli walā yaba kātibun an yaktuba kamā ʿallamahu Allāhu falyaktub walyumlili alladhī ʿalayhi l-ḥaqu walyattaqi Allāha rabbahu walā yabkhas minhu shayan fa-in kāna alladhī ʿalayhi l-ḥaqu safīhan aw ḍaʿīfan aw lā yastaṭīʿu an yumilla huwa falyumlil waliyyuhu bil-ʿadli wa-istashhidū shahīdayni min rijālikum fa-in lam yakūnā rajulayni farajulun wa-imra-atāni mimman tarḍawna mina l-shuhadāi an taḍilla iḥdāhumā fatudhakkira iḥdāhumā l-ukhrā walā yaba l-shuhadāu idhā mā duʿū walā tasamū an taktubūhu ṣaghīran aw kabīran ilā ajalihi dhālikum aqsaṭu ʿinda Allāhi wa-aqwamu lilshahādati wa-adnā allā tartābū illā an takūna tijāratan ḥāḍiratan tudīrūnahā baynakum falaysa ʿalaykum junāḥun allā taktubūhā wa-ashhidū idhā tabāyaʿtum walā yuḍārra kātibun walā shahīdun wa-in tafʿalū fa-innahu fusūqun bikum wa-ittaqū Allāha wayuʿallimukumu Allāhu wallāhu bikulli shayin ʿalīmun
ayahs.2:283: wa-in kuntum ʿalā safarin walam tajidū kātiban farihānun maqbūḍatun fa-in amina baʿḍukum baʿḍan falyu-addi alladhī uʾtumina amānatahu walyattaqi Allāha rabbahu walā taktumū l-shahādata waman yaktumhā fa-innahu āthimun qalbuhu wallāhu bimā taʿmalūna ʿalīmun
ayahs.2:284: lillāhi mā fī l-samāwāti wamā fī l-arḍi wa-in tubdū mā fī anfusikum aw tukhfūhu yuḥāsibkum bihi Allāhu fayaghfiru liman yashāu wayuʿadhibu man yashāu wallāhu ʿalā kulli shayin qadīrun
ayahs.2:285: āmana l-rasūlu bimā unzila ilayhi min rabbihi wal-muʾminūna kullun āmana billāhi wamalāikatihi wakutubihi warusulihi lā nufarriqu bayna aḥadin min rusulihi waqālū samiʿnā wa-aṭaʿnā ghufrānaka rabbanā wa-ilayka l-maṣīru
ayahs.2:286: lā yukallifu Allāhu nafsan illā wusʿahā lahā mā kasabat waʿalayhā mā iktasabat rabbanā lā tuākhidhnā in nasīnā aw akhṭanā rabbanā walā taḥmil ʿalaynā iṣran kamā ḥamaltahu ʿalā alladhīna min qablinā rabbanā walā tuḥammilnā mā lā ṭāqata lanā bihi wa-uʿfu ʿannā wa-ighfir lanā wa-irḥamnā anta mawlānā fa-unṣurnā ʿalā l-qawmi l-kāfirīna
ayahs.3:2: Allāhu lā ilāha illā huwa l-ḥayu l-qayūmu
ayahs.3:3: nazzala ʿalayka l-kitāba bil-ḥaqi muṣaddiqan limā bayna yadayhi wa-anzala l-tawrāta wal-injīla
ayahs.3:4: min qablu hudan lilnnāsi wa-anzala l-furqāna inna alladhīna kafarū biāyāti Allāhi lahum ʿadhābun shadīdun wallāhu ʿazīzun dhū intiqāmin
ayahs.3:5: inna Allāha lā yakhfā ʿalayhi shayon fī l-arḍi walā fī l-samāi
ayahs.3:6: huwa alladhī yuṣawwirukum fī l-arḥāmi kayfa yashāu lā ilāha illā huwa l-ʿazīzu l-ḥakīmu
ayahs.3:7: huwa alladhī anzala ʿalayka l-kitāba minhu āyātun muḥkamātun hunna ummu l-kitābi wa-ukharu mutashābihātun fa-ammā alladhīna fī qulūbihim zayghun fayattabiʿūna mā tashābaha minhu ibtighāʾa l-fitnati wa-ibtighāʾa tawīlihi wamā yaʿlamu tawīlahu illā Allāhu wal-rāsikhūna fī l-ʿilmi yaqūlūna āmannā bihi kullun min ʿindi rabbinā wamā yadhakkaru illā ulū l-albābi
ayahs.3:8: rabbanā lā tuzigh qulūbanā baʿda idh hadaytanā wahab lanā min ladunka raḥmatan innaka anta l-wahābu
ayahs.3:9: rabbanā innaka jāmiʿu l-nāsi liyawmin lā rayba fīhi inna Allāha lā yukhlifu l-mīʿāda
ayahs.3:10: inna alladhīna kafarū lan tughniya ʿanhum amwāluhum walā awlāduhum mina Allāhi shayan wa-ulāika hum waqūdu l-nāri
ayahs.3:11: kadabi āli firʿawna wa-alladhīna min qablihim kadhabū biāyātinā fa-akhadhahumu Allāhu bidhunūbihim wallāhu shadīdu l-ʿiqābi
ayahs.3:12: qul lilladhīna kafarū satughlabūna watuḥsharūna ilā jahannama wabiʾsa l-mihādu
ayahs.3:13: qad kāna lakum āyatun fī fi-atayni l-taqatā fi-atun tuqātilu fī sabīli Allāhi wa-ukhrā kāfiratun yarawnahum mithlayhim raya l-ʿayni wallāhu yu-ayyidu binaṣrihi man yashāu inna fī dhālika laʿibratan li-ulī l-abṣāri
ayahs.3:14: zuyyina lilnnāsi ḥubbu l-shahawāti mina l-nisāi wal-banīna wal-qanāṭīri l-muqanṭarati mina l-dhahabi wal-fiḍati wal-khayli l-musawamati wal-anʿāmi wal-ḥarthi dhālika matāʿu l-ḥayati l-dunyā wallāhu ʿindahu ḥusnu l-maʾābi
ayahs.3:15: qul a-unabbi-ukum bikhayrin min dhālikum lilladhīna ittaqaw ʿinda rabbihim jannātun tajrī min taḥtihā l-anhāru khālidīna fīhā wa-azwājun muṭahharatun wariḍwānun mina Allāhi wallāhu baṣīrun bil-ʿibādi
ayahs.3:16: alladhīna yaqūlūna rabbanā innanā āmannā fa-ighfir lanā dhunūbanā waqinā ʿadhāba l-nāri
ayahs.3:17: al-ṣābirīna wal-ṣādiqīna wal-qānitīna wal-munfiqīna wal-mustaghfirīna bil-asḥāri
ayahs.3:18: shahida Allāhu annahu lā ilāha illā huwa wal-malāikatu wa-ulū l-ʿilmi qāiman bil-qisṭi lā ilāha illā huwa l-ʿazīzu l-ḥakīmu
ayahs.3:19: inna l-dīna ʿinda Allāhi l-islāmu wamā ikhtalafa alladhīna ūtū l-kitāba illā min baʿdi mā jāʾahumu l-ʿilmu baghyan baynahum waman yakfur biāyāti Allāhi fa-inna Allāha sarīʿu l-ḥisābi
ayahs.3:20: fa-in ḥājjūka faqul aslamtu wajhiya lillāhi wamani ittabaʿani waqul lilladhīna ūtū l-kitāba wal-umiyīna a-aslamtum fa-in aslamū faqadi ihtadaw wa-in tawallaw fa-innamā ʿalayka l-balāghu wallāhu baṣīrun bil-ʿibādi
ayahs.3:21: inna alladhīna yakfurūna biāyāti Allāhi wayaqtulūna l-nabiyīna bighayri ḥaqqin wayaqtulūna alladhīna yamurūna bil-qisṭi mina l-nāsi fabashirhum biʿadhābin alīmin
ayahs.3:22: ulāika alladhīna ḥabiṭat aʿmāluhum fī l-dunyā wal-ākhirati wamā lahum min nāṣirīna
ayahs.3:23: alam tara ilā alladhīna ūtū naṣīban mina l-kitābi yudʿawna ilā kitābi Allāhi liyaḥkuma baynahum thumma yatawallā farīqun minhum wahum muʿriḍūna
ayahs.3:24: dhālika bi-annahum qālū lan tamassanā l-nāru illā ayyāman maʿdūdātin wagharrahum fī dīnihim mā kānū yaftarūna
ayahs.3:25: fakayfa idhā jamaʿnāhum liyawmin lā rayba fīhi wawuffiyat kullu nafsin mā kasabat wahum lā yuẓlamūna
ayahs.3:26: quli Allāhumma mālika l-mulki tuʾtī l-mulka man tashāu watanziʿu l-mulka mimman tashāu watuʿizzu man tashāu watudhillu man tashāu biyadika l-khayru innaka ʿalā kulli shayin qadīrun
ayahs.3:27: tūliju al-layla fī l-nahāri watūliju l-nahāra fī al-layli watukhriju l-ḥaya mina l-mayiti watukhriju l-mayita mina l-ḥayi watarzuqu man tashāu bighayri ḥisābin
ayahs.3:28: lā yattakhidhi l-muʾminūna l-kāfirīna awliyāʾa min dūni l-muʾminīna waman yafʿal dhālika falaysa mina Allāhi fī shayin illā an tattaqū minhum tuqātan wayuḥadhirukumu Allāhu nafsahu wa-ilā Allāhi l-maṣīru
ayahs.3:29: qul in tukhfū mā fī ṣudūrikum aw tubdūhu yaʿlamhu Allāhu wayaʿlamu mā fī l-samāwāti wamā fī l-arḍi wallāhu ʿalā kulli shayin qadīrun
ayahs.3:30: yawma tajidu kullu nafsin mā ʿamilat min khayrin muḥḍaran wamā ʿamilat min sūin tawaddu law anna baynahā wabaynahu amadan baʿīdan wayuḥadhirukumu Allāhu nafsahu wallāhu raūfun bil-ʿibādi
ayahs.3:31: qul in kuntum tuḥibbūna Allāha fa-ittabiʿūnī yuḥbibkumu Allāhu wayaghfir lakum dhunūbakum wallāhu ghafūrun raḥīmun
ayahs.3:32: qul aṭīʿū Allāha wal-rasūla fa-in tawallaw fa-inna Allāha lā yuḥibbu l-kāfirīna
ayahs.3:33: inna Allāha iṣṭafā ādama wanūḥan waʾāla ibrāhīma waʾāla ʿimrāna ʿalā l-ʿālamīna
ayahs.3:34: dhurriyyatan baʿḍuhā min baʿḍin wallāhu samīʿun ʿalīmun
ayahs.3:35: idh qālati imra-atu ʿimrāna rabbi innī nadhartu laka mā fī baṭnī muḥarraran fataqabbal minnī innaka anta l-samīʿu l-ʿalīmu
ayahs.3:36: falammā waḍaʿathā qālat rabbi innī waḍaʿtuhā unthā wallāhu aʿlamu bimā waḍaʿat walaysa l-dhakaru kal-unthā wa-innī sammaytuhā maryama wa-innī uʿīdhuhā bika wadhurriyyatahā mina l-shayṭāni l-rajīmi
ayahs.3:37: fataqabbalahā rabbuhā biqabūlin ḥasanin wa-anbatahā nabātan ḥasanan wakaffalahā zakariyyā kullamā dakhala ʿalayhā zakariyyā l-miḥrāba wajada ʿindahā rizqan qāla yāmaryamu annā laki hādhā qālat huwa min ʿindi Allāhi inna Allāha yarzuqu man yashāu bighayri ḥisābin
ayahs.3:38: hunālika daʿā zakariyyā rabbahu qāla rabbi hab lī min ladunka dhurriyyatan ṭayyibatan innaka samīʿu l-duʿāi
ayahs.3:39: fanādathu l-malāikatu wahuwa qāimun yuṣallī fī l-miḥrābi anna Allāha yubashiruka biyaḥyā muṣaddiqan bikalimatin mina Allāhi wasayyidan waḥaṣūran wanabiyyan mina l-ṣāliḥīna
ayahs.3:40: qāla rabbi annā yakūnu lī ghulāmun waqad balaghaniya l-kibaru wa-imra-atī ʿāqirun qāla kadhālika Allāhu yafʿalu mā yashāu
ayahs.3:41: qāla rabbi ijʿal lī āyatan qāla āyatuka allā tukallima l-nāsa thalāthata ayyāmin illā ramzan wa-udhkur rabbaka kathīran wasabbiḥ bil-ʿashiyi wal-ibkāri
ayahs.3:42: wa-idh qālati l-malāikatu yāmaryamu inna Allāha iṣṭafāki waṭahharaki wa-iṣṭafāki ʿalā nisāi l-ʿālamīna
ayahs.3:43: yāmaryamu uqnutī lirabbiki wa-usjudī wa-irkaʿī maʿa l-rākiʿīna
ayahs.3:44: dhālika min anbāi l-ghaybi nūḥīhi ilayka wamā kunta ladayhim idh yulqūna aqlāmahum ayyuhum yakfulu maryama wamā kunta ladayhim idh yakhtaṣimūna
ayahs.3:45: idh qālati l-malāikatu yāmaryamu inna Allāha yubashiruki bikalimatin minhu usmuhu l-masīḥu ʿīsā ubnu maryama wajīhan fī l-dunyā wal-ākhirati wamina l-muqarabīna
ayahs.3:46: wayukallimu l-nāsa fī l-mahdi wakahlan wamina l-ṣāliḥīna
ayahs.3:47: qālat rabbi annā yakūnu lī waladun walam yamsasnī basharun qāla kadhāliki Allāhu yakhluqu mā yashāu idhā qaḍā amran fa-innamā yaqūlu lahu kun fayakūnu
ayahs.3:49: warasūlan ilā banī isrāīla annī qad jiʾtukum biāyatin min rabbikum annī akhluqu lakum mina l-ṭīni kahayati l-ṭayri fa-anfukhu fīhi fayakūnu ṭayran bi-idhni Allāhi wa-ubri-u l-akmaha wal-abraṣa wa-uḥyī l-mawtā bi-idhni Allāhi wa-unabbi-ukum bimā takulūna wamā taddakhirūna fī buyūtikum inna fī dhālika laʾāyatan lakum in kuntum muʾminīna
ayahs.3:50: wamuṣaddiqan limā bayna yadayya mina l-tawrāti wali-uḥilla lakum baʿḍa alladhī ḥurrima ʿalaykum wajiʾtukum biāyatin min rabbikum fa-ittaqū Allāha wa-aṭīʿūni
ayahs.3:51: inna Allāha rabbī warabbukum fa-uʿbudūhu hādhā ṣirāṭun mustaqīmun
ayahs.3:52: falammā aḥassa ʿīsā minhumu l-kufra qāla man anṣārī ilā Allāhi qāla l-ḥawāriyūna naḥnu anṣāru Allāhi āmannā billāhi wa-ishhad bi-annā muslimūna
ayahs.3:53: rabbanā āmannā bimā anzalta wa-ittabaʿnā l-rasūla fa-uktubnā maʿa l-shāhidīna
ayahs.3:54: wamakarū wamakara Allāhu wallāhu khayru l-mākirīna
ayahs.3:55: idh qāla Allāhu yāʿīsā innī mutawaffīka warāfiʿuka ilayya wamuṭahhiruka mina alladhīna kafarū wajāʿilu alladhīna ittabaʿūka fawqa alladhīna kafarū ilā yawmi l-qiyāmati thumma ilayya marjiʿukum fa-aḥkumu baynakum fīmā kuntum fīhi takhtalifūna
ayahs.3:56: fa-ammā alladhīna kafarū fa-uʿadhibuhum ʿadhāban shadīdan fī l-dunyā wal-ākhirati wamā lahum min nāṣirīna
ayahs.3:57: wa-ammā alladhīna āmanū waʿamilū l-ṣāliḥāti fayuwaffīhim ujūrahum wallāhu lā yuḥibbu l-ẓālimīna
ayahs.3:58: dhālika natlūhu ʿalayka mina l-āyāti wal-dhikri l-ḥakīmi
ayahs.3:59: inna mathala ʿīsā ʿinda Allāhi kamathali ādama khalaqahu min turābin thumma qāla lahu kun fayakūnu
ayahs.3:60: al-ḥaqu min rabbika falā takun mina l-mumtarīna
ayahs.3:61: faman ḥājjaka fīhi min baʿdi mā jāʾaka mina l-ʿilmi faqul taʿālaw nadʿu abnāʾanā wa-abnāʾakum wanisāʾanā wanisāʾakum wa-anfusanā wa-anfusakum thumma nabtahil fanajʿal laʿnata Allāhi ʿalā l-kādhibīna
ayahs.3:62: inna hādhā lahuwa l-qaṣaṣu l-ḥaqu wamā min ilāhin illā Allāhu wa-inna Allāha lahuwa l-ʿazīzu l-ḥakīmu
ayahs.3:63: fa-in tawallaw fa-inna Allāha ʿalīmun bil-mufsidīna
ayahs.3:64: qul yāʾahla l-kitābi taʿālaw ilā kalimatin sawāin baynanā wabaynakum allā naʿbuda illā Allāha walā nushrika bihi shayan walā yattakhidha baʿḍunā baʿḍan arbāban min dūni Allāhi fa-in tawallaw faqūlū ishhadū bi-annā muslimūna
ayahs.3:65: yāʾahla l-kitābi lima tuḥājjūna fī ibrāhīma wamā unzilati l-tawrātu wal-injīlu illā min baʿdihi afalā taʿqilūna
ayahs.3:66: hāʾantum hāulāi ḥājajtum fīmā lakum bihi ʿilmun falima tuḥājjūna fīmā laysa lakum bihi ʿilmun wallāhu yaʿlamu wa-antum lā taʿlamūna
ayahs.3:67: mā kāna ibrāhīmu yahūdiyyan walā naṣrāniyyan walākin kāna ḥanīfan musliman wamā kāna mina l-mushrikīna
ayahs.3:68: inna awlā l-nāsi bi-ibrāhīma lalladhīna ittabaʿūhu wahādhā l-nabiyu wa-alladhīna āmanū wallāhu waliyyu l-muʾminīna
ayahs.3:69: waddat ṭāifatun min ahli l-kitābi law yuḍillūnakum wamā yuḍillūna illā anfusahum wamā yashʿurūna
ayahs.3:70: yāʾahla l-kitābi lima takfurūna biāyāti Allāhi wa-antum tashhadūna
ayahs.3:71: yāʾahla l-kitābi lima talbisūna l-ḥaqa bil-bāṭili wataktumūna l-ḥaqa wa-antum taʿlamūna
ayahs.3:72: waqālat ṭāifatun min ahli l-kitābi āminū bi-alladhī unzila ʿalā alladhīna āmanū wajha l-nahāri wa-ukfurū ākhirahu laʿallahum yarjiʿūna
ayahs.3:73: walā tuʾminū illā liman tabiʿa dīnakum qul inna l-hudā hudā Allāhi an yuʾtā aḥadun mithla mā ūtītum aw yuḥājjūkum ʿinda rabbikum qul inna l-faḍla biyadi Allāhi yuʾtīhi man yashāu wallāhu wāsiʿun ʿalīmun
ayahs.3:74: yakhtaṣṣu biraḥmatihi man yashāu wallāhu dhū l-faḍli l-ʿaẓīmi
ayahs.3:75: wamin ahli l-kitābi man in tamanhu biqinṭārin yu-addihi ilayka waminhum man in tamanhu bidīnārin lā yu-addihi ilayka illā mā dumta ʿalayhi qāiman dhālika bi-annahum qālū laysa ʿalaynā fī l-umiyīna sabīlun wayaqūlūna ʿalā Allāhi l-kadhiba wahum yaʿlamūna
ayahs.3:76: balā man awfā biʿahdihi wa-ittaqā fa-inna Allāha yuḥibbu l-mutaqīna
ayahs.3:77: inna alladhīna yashtarūna biʿahdi Allāhi wa-aymānihim thamanan qalīlan ulāika lā khalāqa lahum fī l-ākhirati walā yukallimuhumu Allāhu walā yanẓuru ilayhim yawma l-qiyāmati walā yuzakkīhim walahum ʿadhābun alīmun
ayahs.3:78: wa-inna minhum lafarīqan yalwūna alsinatahum bil-kitābi litaḥsabūhu mina l-kitābi wamā huwa mina l-kitābi wayaqūlūna huwa min ʿindi Allāhi wamā huwa min ʿindi Allāhi wayaqūlūna ʿalā Allāhi l-kadhiba wahum yaʿlamūna
ayahs.3:79: mā kāna libasharin an yuʾtiyahu Allāhu l-kitāba wal-ḥukma wal-nubuwata thumma yaqūla lilnnāsi kūnū ʿibādan lī min dūni Allāhi walākin kūnū rabbāniyyīna bimā kuntum tuʿallimūna l-kitāba wabimā kuntum tadrusūna
ayahs.3:80: walā yamurakum an tattakhidhū l-malāikata wal-nabiyīna arbāban ayamurukum bil-kufri baʿda idh antum muslimūna
ayahs.3:81: wa-idh akhadha Allāhu mīthāqa l-nabiyīna lamā ātaytukum min kitābin waḥikmatin thumma jāʾakum rasūlun muṣaddiqun limā maʿakum latuʾminunna bihi walatanṣurunnahu qāla a-aqrartum wa-akhadhtum ʿalā dhālikum iṣrī qālū aqrarnā qāla fa-ishhadū wa-anā maʿakum mina l-shāhidīna
ayahs.3:82: faman tawallā baʿda dhālika fa-ulāika humu l-fāsiqūna
ayahs.3:83: afaghayra dīni Allāhi yabghūna walahu aslama man fī l-samāwāti wal-arḍi ṭawʿan wakarhan wa-ilayhi yurjaʿūna
ayahs.3:84: qul āmannā billāhi wamā unzila ʿalaynā wamā unzila ʿalā ibrāhīma wa-ismāʿīla wa-isḥāqa wayaʿqūba wal-asbāṭi wamā ūtiya mūsā waʿīsā wal-nabiyūna min rabbihim lā nufarriqu bayna aḥadin minhum wanaḥnu lahu muslimūna
ayahs.3:85: waman yabtaghi ghayra l-islāmi dīnan falan yuqbala minhu wahuwa fī l-ākhirati mina l-khāsirīna
ayahs.3:86: kayfa yahdī Allāhu qawman kafarū baʿda īmānihim washahidū anna l-rasūla ḥaqqun wajāʾahumu l-bayinātu wallāhu lā yahdī l-qawma l-ẓālimīna
ayahs.3:87: ulāika jazāuhum anna ʿalayhim laʿnata Allāhi wal-malāikati wal-nāsi ajmaʿīna
ayahs.3:88: khālidīna fīhā lā yukhaffafu ʿanhumu l-ʿadhābu walā hum yunẓarūna
ayahs.3:89: illā alladhīna tābū min baʿdi dhālika wa-aṣlaḥū fa-inna Allāha ghafūrun raḥīmun
ayahs.3:90: inna alladhīna kafarū baʿda īmānihim thumma izdādū kufran lan tuqbala tawbatuhum wa-ulāika humu l-ḍālūna
ayahs.3:91: inna alladhīna kafarū wamātū wahum kuffārun falan yuqbala min aḥadihim milu l-arḍi dhahaban walawi iftadā bihi ulāika lahum ʿadhābun alīmun wamā lahum min nāṣirīna
ayahs.3:92: lan tanālū l-bira ḥattā tunfiqū mimmā tuḥibbūna wamā tunfiqū min shayin fa-inna Allāha bihi ʿalīmun
ayahs.3:93: kullu l-ṭaʿāmi kāna ḥillan libanī isrāīla illā mā ḥarrama isrāīlu ʿalā nafsihi min qabli an tunazzala l-tawrātu qul fatū bil-tawrāti fa-itlūhā in kuntum ṣādiqīna
ayahs.3:94: famani iftarā ʿalā Allāhi l-kadhiba min baʿdi dhālika fa-ulāika humu l-ẓālimūna
ayahs.3:95: qul ṣadaqa Allāhu fa-ittabiʿū millata ibrāhīma ḥanīfan wamā kāna mina l-mushrikīna
ayahs.3:96: inna awwala baytin wuḍiʿa lilnnāsi lalladhī bibakkata mubārakan wahudan lilʿālamīna
ayahs.3:97: fīhi āyātun bayyinātun maqāmu ibrāhīma waman dakhalahu kāna āminan walillahi ʿalā l-nāsi ḥijju l-bayti mani istaṭāʿa ilayhi sabīlan waman kafara fa-inna Allāha ghaniyyun ʿani l-ʿālamīna
ayahs.3:98: qul yāʾahla l-kitābi lima takfurūna biāyāti Allāhi wallāhu shahīdun ʿalā mā taʿmalūna
ayahs.3:99: qul yāʾahla l-kitābi lima taṣuddūna ʿan sabīli Allāhi man āmana tabghūnahā ʿiwajan wa-antum shuhadāu wamā Allāhu bighāfilin ʿammā taʿmalūna
ayahs.3:100: yāʾayyuhā alladhīna āmanū in tuṭīʿū farīqan mina alladhīna ūtū l-kitāba yaruddūkum baʿda īmānikum kāfirīna
ayahs.3:101: wakayfa takfurūna wa-antum tutlā ʿalaykum āyātu Allāhi wafīkum rasūluhu waman yaʿtaṣim billāhi faqad hudiya ilā ṣirāṭin mustaqīmin
ayahs.3:102: yāʾayyuhā alladhīna āmanū ittaqū Allāha ḥaqqa tuqātihi walā tamūtunna illā wa-antum muslimūna
ayahs.3:103: wa-iʿtaṣimū biḥabli Allāhi jamīʿan walā tafarraqū wa-udhkurū niʿmata Allāhi ʿalaykum idh kuntum aʿdāʾan fa-allafa bayna qulūbikum fa-aṣbaḥtum biniʿmatihi ikhwānan wakuntum ʿalā shafā ḥufratin mina l-nāri fa-anqadhakum minhā kadhālika yubayyinu Allāhu lakum āyātihi laʿallakum tahtadūna
ayahs.3:104: waltakun minkum ummatun yadʿūna ilā l-khayri wayamurūna bil-maʿrūfi wayanhawna ʿani l-munkari wa-ulāika humu l-mufliḥūna
ayahs.3:105: walā takūnū ka-alladhīna tafarraqū wa-ikhtalafū min baʿdi mā jāʾahumu l-bayinātu wa-ulāika lahum ʿadhābun ʿaẓīmun
ayahs.3:106: yawma tabyaḍḍu wujūhun wataswaddu wujūhun fa-ammā alladhīna iswaddat wujūhuhum akafartum baʿda īmānikum fadhūqū l-ʿadhāba bimā kuntum takfurūna
ayahs.3:107: wa-ammā alladhīna ibyaḍḍat wujūhuhum fafī raḥmati Allāhi hum fīhā khālidūna
ayahs.3:108: tilka āyātu Allāhi natlūhā ʿalayka bil-ḥaqi wamā Allāhu yurīdu ẓulman lilʿālamīna
ayahs.3:109: walillahi mā fī l-samāwāti wamā fī l-arḍi wa-ilā Allāhi turjaʿu l-umūru
ayahs.3:110: kuntum khayra ummatin ukhrijat lilnnāsi tamurūna bil-maʿrūfi watanhawna ʿani l-munkari watuʾminūna billāhi walaw āmana ahlu l-kitābi lakāna khayran lahum minhumu l-muʾminūna wa-aktharuhumu l-fāsiqūna
ayahs.3:111: lan yaḍurrūkum illā adhan wa-in yuqātilūkum yuwallūkumu l-adbāra thumma lā yunṣarūna
ayahs.3:112: ḍuribat ʿalayhimu l-dhilatu ayna mā thuqifū illā biḥablin mina Allāhi waḥablin mina l-nāsi wabāū bighaḍabin mina Allāhi waḍuribat ʿalayhimu l-maskanatu dhālika bi-annahum kānū yakfurūna biāyāti Allāhi wayaqtulūna l-anbiyāʾa bighayri ḥaqqin dhālika bimā ʿaṣaw wakānū yaʿtadūna
ayahs.3:113: laysū sawāʾan min ahli l-kitābi ummatun qāimatun yatlūna āyāti Allāhi ānāʾa al-layli wahum yasjudūna
ayahs.3:114: yuʾminūna billāhi wal-yawmi l-ākhiri wayamurūna bil-maʿrūfi wayanhawna ʿani l-munkari wayusāriʿūna fī l-khayrāti wa-ulāika mina l-ṣāliḥīna
ayahs.3:115: wamā yafʿalū min khayrin falan yukfarūhu wallāhu ʿalīmun bil-mutaqīna
ayahs.3:116: inna alladhīna kafarū lan tughniya ʿanhum amwāluhum walā awlāduhum mina Allāhi shayan wa-ulāika aṣḥābu l-nāri hum fīhā khālidūna
ayahs.3:117: mathalu mā yunfiqūna fī hādhihi l-ḥayati l-dunyā kamathali rīḥin fīhā ṣirrun aṣābat ḥartha qawmin ẓalamū anfusahum fa-ahlakathu wamā ẓalamahumu Allāhu walākin anfusahum yaẓlimūna
ayahs.3:118: yāʾayyuhā alladhīna āmanū lā tattakhidhū biṭānatan min dūnikum lā yalūnakum khabālan waddū mā ʿanittum qad badati l-baghḍāu min afwāhihim wamā tukhfī ṣudūruhum akbaru qad bayyannā lakumu l-āyāti in kuntum taʿqilūna
ayahs.3:119: hāʾantum ulāi tuḥibbūnahum walā yuḥibbūnakum watuʾminūna bil-kitābi kullihi wa-idhā laqūkum qālū āmannā wa-idhā khalaw ʿaḍḍū ʿalaykumu l-anāmila mina l-ghayẓi qul mūtū bighayẓikum inna Allāha ʿalīmun bidhāti l-ṣudūri
ayahs.3:120: in tamsaskum ḥasanatun tasuʾhum wa-in tuṣibkum sayyi-atun yafraḥū bihā wa-in taṣbirū watattaqū lā yaḍurrukum kayduhum shayan inna Allāha bimā yaʿmalūna muḥīṭun
ayahs.3:121: wa-idh ghadawta min ahlika tubawwi-u l-muʾminīna maqāʿida lilqitāli wallāhu samīʿun ʿalīmun
ayahs.3:122: idh hammat ṭāifatāni minkum an tafshalā wallāhu waliyyuhumā waʿalā Allāhi falyatawakkali l-muʾminūna
ayahs.3:123: walaqad naṣarakumu Allāhu bibadrin wa-antum adhillatun fa-ittaqū Allāha laʿallakum tashkurūna
ayahs.3:124: idh taqūlu lilmuʾminīna alan yakfiyakum an yumiddakum rabbukum bithalāthati ālāfin mina l-malāikati munzalīna
ayahs.3:125: balā in taṣbirū watattaqū wayatūkum min fawrihim hādhā yumdidkum rabbukum bikhamsati ālāfin mina l-malāikati musawwimīna
ayahs.3:126: wamā jaʿalahu Allāhu illā bushrā lakum walitaṭma-inna qulūbukum bihi wamā l-naṣru illā min ʿindi Allāhi l-ʿazīzi l-ḥakīmi
ayahs.3:127: liyaqṭaʿa ṭarafan mina alladhīna kafarū aw yakbitahum fayanqalibū khāibīna
ayahs.3:128: laysa laka mina l-amri shayon aw yatūba ʿalayhim aw yuʿadhibahum fa-innahum ẓālimūna
ayahs.3:129: walillahi mā fī l-samāwāti wamā fī l-arḍi yaghfiru liman yashāu wayuʿadhibu man yashāu wallāhu ghafūrun raḥīmun
ayahs.3:130: yāʾayyuhā alladhīna āmanū lā takulū l-riba aḍʿāfan muḍāʿafatan wa-ittaqū Allāha laʿallakum tufliḥūna
ayahs.3:133: wasāriʿū ilā maghfiratin min rabbikum wajannatin ʿarḍuhā l-samāwātu wal-arḍu uʿiddat lilmuttaqīna
ayahs.3:134: alladhīna yunfiqūna fī l-sarāi wal-ḍarāi wal-kāẓimīna l-ghayẓa wal-ʿāfīna ʿani l-nāsi wallāhu yuḥibbu l-muḥsinīna
ayahs.3:135: wa-alladhīna idhā faʿalū fāḥishatan aw ẓalamū anfusahum dhakarū Allāha fa-istaghfarū lidhunūbihim waman yaghfiru l-dhunūba illā Allāhu walam yuṣirrū ʿalā mā faʿalū wahum yaʿlamūna
ayahs.3:136: ulāika jazāuhum maghfiratun min rabbihim wajannātun tajrī min taḥtihā l-anhāru khālidīna fīhā waniʿma ajru l-ʿāmilīna
ayahs.3:137: qad khalat min qablikum sunanun fasīrū fī l-arḍi fa-unẓurū kayfa kāna ʿāqibatu l-mukadhibīna
ayahs.3:138: hādhā bayānun lilnnāsi wahudan wamawʿiẓatun lilmuttaqīna
ayahs.3:139: walā tahinū walā taḥzanū wa-antumu l-aʿlawna in kuntum muʾminīna
ayahs.3:140: in yamsaskum qarḥun faqad massa l-qawma qarḥun mithluhu watilka l-ayāmu nudāwiluhā bayna l-nāsi waliyaʿlama Allāhu alladhīna āmanū wayattakhidha minkum shuhadāʾa wallāhu lā yuḥibbu l-ẓālimīna
ayahs.3:141: waliyumaḥḥiṣa Allāhu alladhīna āmanū wayamḥaqa l-kāfirīna
ayahs.3:142: am ḥasibtum an tadkhulū l-janata walammā yaʿlami Allāhu alladhīna jāhadū minkum wayaʿlama l-ṣābirīna
ayahs.3:143: walaqad kuntum tamannawna l-mawta min qabli an talqawhu faqad ra-aytumūhu wa-antum tanẓurūna
ayahs.3:144: wamā muḥammadun illā rasūlun qad khalat min qablihi l-rusulu afa-in māta aw qutila inqalabtum ʿalā aʿqābikum waman yanqalib ʿalā ʿaqibayhi falan yaḍurra Allāha shayan wasayajzī Allāhu l-shākirīna
ayahs.3:145: wamā kāna linafsin an tamūta illā bi-idhni Allāhi kitāban mu-ajjalan waman yurid thawāba l-dunyā nuʾtihi minhā waman yurid thawāba l-ākhirati nuʾtihi minhā wasanajzī l-shākirīna
ayahs.3:146: waka-ayyin min nabiyyin qātala maʿahu ribbiyyūna kathīrun famā wahanū limā aṣābahum fī sabīli Allāhi wamā ḍaʿufū wamā istakānū wallāhu yuḥibbu l-ṣābirīna
ayahs.3:147: wamā kāna qawlahum illā an qālū rabbanā ighfir lanā dhunūbanā wa-isrāfanā fī amrinā wathabbit aqdāmanā wa-unṣurnā ʿalā l-qawmi l-kāfirīna
ayahs.3:148: faʾātāhumu Allāhu thawāba l-dunyā waḥusna thawābi l-ākhirati wallāhu yuḥibbu l-muḥsinīna
ayahs.3:149: yāʾayyuhā alladhīna āmanū in tuṭīʿū alladhīna kafarū yaruddūkum ʿalā aʿqābikum fatanqalibū khāsirīna
ayahs.3:150: bali Allāhu mawlākum wahuwa khayru l-nāṣirīna
ayahs.3:151: sanulqī fī qulūbi alladhīna kafarū l-ruʿba bimā ashrakū billāhi mā lam yunazzil bihi sulṭānan wamawāhumu l-nāru wabiʾsa mathwā l-ẓālimīna
ayahs.3:152: walaqad ṣadaqakumu Allāhu waʿdahu idh taḥussūnahum bi-idhnihi ḥattā idhā fashiltum watanāzaʿtum fī l-amri waʿaṣaytum min baʿdi mā arākum mā tuḥibbūna minkum man yurīdu l-dunyā waminkum man yurīdu l-ākhirata thumma ṣarafakum ʿanhum liyabtaliyakum walaqad ʿafā ʿankum wallāhu dhū faḍlin ʿalā l-muʾminīna
ayahs.3:153: idh tuṣʿidūna walā talwūna ʿalā aḥadin wal-rasūlu yadʿūkum fī ukhrākum fa-athābakum ghamman bighammin likaylā taḥzanū ʿalā mā fātakum walā mā aṣābakum wallāhu khabīrun bimā taʿmalūna
ayahs.3:154: thumma anzala ʿalaykum min baʿdi l-ghami amanatan nuʿāsan yaghshā ṭāifatan minkum waṭāifatun qad ahammathum anfusuhum yaẓunnūna billāhi ghayra l-ḥaqi ẓanna l-jāhiliyati yaqūlūna hal lanā mina l-amri min shayin qul inna l-amra kullahu lillāhi yukhfūna fī anfusihim mā lā yubdūna laka yaqūlūna law kāna lanā mina l-amri shayon mā qutilnā hāhunā qul law kuntum fī buyūtikum labaraza alladhīna kutiba ʿalayhimu l-qatlu ilā maḍājiʿihim waliyabtaliya Allāhu mā fī ṣudūrikum waliyumaḥḥiṣa mā fī qulūbikum wallāhu ʿalīmun bidhāti l-ṣudūri
ayahs.3:155: inna alladhīna tawallaw minkum yawma l-taqā l-jamʿāni innamā istazallahumu l-shayṭānu bibaʿḍi mā kasabū walaqad ʿafā Allāhu ʿanhum inna Allāha ghafūrun ḥalīmun
ayahs.3:156: yāʾayyuhā alladhīna āmanū lā takūnū ka-alladhīna kafarū waqālū li-ikhwānihim idhā ḍarabū fī l-arḍi aw kānū ghuzzan law kānū ʿindanā mā mātū wamā qutilū liyajʿala Allāhu dhālika ḥasratan fī qulūbihim wallāhu yuḥyī wayumītu wallāhu bimā taʿmalūna baṣīrun
ayahs.3:157: wala-in qutiltum fī sabīli Allāhi aw muttum lamaghfiratun mina Allāhi waraḥmatun khayrun mimmā yajmaʿūna
ayahs.3:158: wala-in muttum aw qutiltum la-ilā Allāhi tuḥsharūna
ayahs.3:159: fabimā raḥmatin mina Allāhi linta lahum walaw kunta faẓẓan ghalīẓa l-qalbi la-infaḍḍū min ḥawlika fa-uʿfu ʿanhum wa-istaghfir lahum washāwirhum fī l-amri fa-idhā ʿazamta fatawakkal ʿalā Allāhi inna Allāha yuḥibbu l-mutawakilīna
ayahs.3:160: in yanṣurkumu Allāhu falā ghāliba lakum wa-in yakhdhulkum faman dhā alladhī yanṣurukum min baʿdihi waʿalā Allāhi falyatawakkali l-muʾminūna
ayahs.3:161: wamā kāna linabiyyin an yaghulla waman yaghlul yati bimā ghalla yawma l-qiyāmati thumma tuwaffā kullu nafsin mā kasabat wahum lā yuẓlamūna
ayahs.3:162: afamani ittabaʿa riḍwāna Allāhi kaman bāʾa bisakhaṭin mina Allāhi wamawāhu jahannamu wabiʾsa l-maṣīru
ayahs.3:163: hum darajātun ʿinda Allāhi wallāhu baṣīrun bimā yaʿmalūna
ayahs.3:164: laqad manna Allāhu ʿalā l-muʾminīna idh baʿatha fīhim rasūlan min anfusihim yatlū ʿalayhim āyātihi wayuzakkīhim wayuʿallimuhumu l-kitāba wal-ḥikmata wa-in kānū min qablu lafī ḍalālin mubīnin
ayahs.3:165: awalammā aṣābatkum muṣībatun qad aṣabtum mithlayhā qultum annā hādhā qul huwa min ʿindi anfusikum inna Allāha ʿalā kulli shayin qadīrun
ayahs.3:166: wamā aṣābakum yawma l-taqā l-jamʿāni fabi-idhni Allāhi waliyaʿlama l-muʾminīna
ayahs.3:167: waliyaʿlama alladhīna nāfaqū waqīla lahum taʿālaw qātilū fī sabīli Allāhi awi idfaʿū qālū law naʿlamu qitālan la-ittabaʿnākum hum lilkufri yawma-idhin aqrabu minhum lilīmāni yaqūlūna bi-afwāhihim mā laysa fī qulūbihim wallāhu aʿlamu bimā yaktumūna
ayahs.3:168: alladhīna qālū li-ikhwānihim waqaʿadū law aṭāʿūnā mā qutilū qul fa-idraū ʿan anfusikumu l-mawta in kuntum ṣādiqīna
ayahs.3:169: walā taḥsabanna alladhīna qutilū fī sabīli Allāhi amwātan bal aḥyāon ʿinda rabbihim yurzaqūna
ayahs.3:170: fariḥīna bimā ātāhumu Allāhu min faḍlihi wayastabshirūna bi-alladhīna lam yalḥaqū bihim min khalfihim allā khawfun ʿalayhim walā hum yaḥzanūna
ayahs.3:171: yastabshirūna biniʿmatin mina Allāhi wafaḍlin wa-anna Allāha lā yuḍīʿu ajra l-muʾminīna
ayahs.3:172: alladhīna istajābū lillāhi wal-rasūli min baʿdi mā aṣābahumu l-qarḥu lilladhīna aḥsanū minhum wa-ittaqaw ajrun ʿaẓīmun
ayahs.3:173: alladhīna qāla lahumu l-nāsu inna l-nāsa qad jamaʿū lakum fa-ikhshawhum fazādahum īmānan waqālū ḥasbunā Allāhu waniʿma l-wakīlu
ayahs.3:174: fa-inqalabū biniʿmatin mina Allāhi wafaḍlin lam yamsashum sūon wa-ittabaʿū riḍwāna Allāhi wallāhu dhū faḍlin ʿaẓīmin
ayahs.3:175: innamā dhālikumu l-shayṭānu yukhawwifu awliyāʾahu falā takhāfūhum wakhāfūni in kuntum muʾminīna
ayahs.3:176: walā yaḥzunka alladhīna yusāriʿūna fī l-kufri innahum lan yaḍurrū Allāha shayan yurīdu Allāhu allā yajʿala lahum ḥaẓẓan fī l-ākhirati walahum ʿadhābun ʿaẓīmun
ayahs.3:177: inna alladhīna ishtarawū l-kufra bil-īmāni lan yaḍurrū Allāha shayan walahum ʿadhābun alīmun
ayahs.3:178: walā yaḥsabanna alladhīna kafarū annamā numlī lahum khayrun li-anfusihim innamā numlī lahum liyazdādū ithman walahum ʿadhābun muhīnun
ayahs.3:179: mā kāna Allāhu liyadhara l-muʾminīna ʿalā mā antum ʿalayhi ḥattā yamīza l-khabītha mina l-ṭayibi wamā kāna Allāhu liyuṭliʿakum ʿalā l-ghaybi walākinna Allāha yajtabī min rusulihi man yashāu faʾāminū billāhi warusulihi wa-in tuʾminū watattaqū falakum ajrun ʿaẓīmun
ayahs.3:180: walā yaḥsabanna alladhīna yabkhalūna bimā ātāhumu Allāhu min faḍlihi huwa khayran lahum bal huwa sharrun lahum sayuṭawwaqūna mā bakhilū bihi yawma l-qiyāmati walillahi mīrāthu l-samāwāti wal-arḍi wallāhu bimā taʿmalūna khabīrun
ayahs.3:181: laqad samiʿa Allāhu qawla alladhīna qālū inna Allāha faqīrun wanaḥnu aghniyāu sanaktubu mā qālū waqatlahumu l-anbiyāʾa bighayri ḥaqqin wanaqūlu dhūqū ʿadhāba l-ḥarīqi
ayahs.3:182: dhālika bimā qaddamat aydīkum wa-anna Allāha laysa biẓallāmin lilʿabīdi
ayahs.3:183: alladhīna qālū inna Allāha ʿahida ilaynā allā nuʾmina lirasūlin ḥattā yatiyanā biqurbānin takuluhu l-nāru qul qad jāʾakum rusulun min qablī bil-bayināti wabi-alladhī qultum falima qataltumūhum in kuntum ṣādiqīna
ayahs.3:184: fa-in kadhabūka faqad kudhiba rusulun min qablika jāū bil-bayināti wal-zuburi wal-kitābi l-munīri
ayahs.3:185: kullu nafsin dhāiqatu l-mawti wa-innamā tuwaffawna ujūrakum yawma l-qiyāmati faman zuḥziḥa ʿani l-nāri wa-udkhila l-janata faqad fāza wamā l-ḥayatu l-dunyā illā matāʿu l-ghurūri
ayahs.3:186: latublawunna fī amwālikum wa-anfusikum walatasmaʿunna mina alladhīna ūtū l-kitāba min qablikum wamina alladhīna ashrakū adhan kathīran wa-in taṣbirū watattaqū fa-inna dhālika min ʿazmi l-umūri
ayahs.3:187: wa-idh akhadha Allāhu mīthāqa alladhīna ūtū l-kitāba latubayyinunnahu lilnnāsi walā taktumūnahu fanabadhūhu warāʾa ẓuhūrihim wa-ishtaraw bihi thamanan qalīlan fabiʾsa mā yashtarūna
ayahs.3:188: lā taḥsabanna alladhīna yafraḥūna bimā ataw wayuḥibbūna an yuḥmadū bimā lam yafʿalū falā taḥsabannahum bimafāzatin mina l-ʿadhābi walahum ʿadhābun alīmun
ayahs.3:189: walillahi mulku l-samāwāti wal-arḍi wallāhu ʿalā kulli shayin qadīrun
ayahs.3:190: inna fī khalqi l-samāwāti wal-arḍi wa-ikhtilāfi al-layli wal-nahāri laʾāyātin li-ulī l-albābi
ayahs.3:191: alladhīna yadhkurūna Allāha qiyāman waquʿūdan waʿalā junūbihim wayatafakkarūna fī khalqi l-samāwāti wal-arḍi rabbanā mā khalaqta hādhā bāṭilan subḥānaka faqinā ʿadhāba l-nāri
ayahs.3:192: rabbanā innaka man tudkhili l-nāra faqad akhzaytahu wamā lilẓẓālimīna min anṣārin
ayahs.3:193: rabbanā innanā samiʿnā munādiyan yunādī lilīmāni an āminū birabbikum faʾāmannā rabbanā fa-ighfir lanā dhunūbanā wakaffir ʿannā sayyiātinā watawaffanā maʿa l-abrāri
ayahs.3:194: rabbanā waʾātinā mā waʿadttanā ʿalā rusulika walā tukhzinā yawma l-qiyāmati innaka lā tukhlifu l-mīʿāda
ayahs.3:195: fa-istajāba lahum rabbuhum annī lā uḍīʿu ʿamala ʿāmilin minkum min dhakarin aw unthā baʿḍukum min baʿḍin fa-alladhīna hājarū wa-ukhrijū min diyārihim waūdhū fī sabīlī waqātalū waqutilū la-ukaffiranna ʿanhum sayyiātihim wala-udkhilannahum jannātin tajrī min taḥtihā l-anhāru thawāban min ʿindi Allāhi wallāhu ʿindahu ḥusnu l-thawābi
ayahs.3:196: lā yaghurrannaka taqallubu alladhīna kafarū fī l-bilādi
ayahs.3:197: matāʿun qalīlun thumma mawāhum jahannamu wabiʾsa l-mihādu
ayahs.3:198: lākini alladhīna ittaqaw rabbahum lahum jannātun tajrī min taḥtihā l-anhāru khālidīna fīhā nuzulan min ʿindi Allāhi wamā ʿinda Allāhi khayrun lilabrāri
ayahs.3:199: wa-inna min ahli l-kitābi laman yuʾminu billāhi wamā unzila ilaykum wamā unzila ilayhim khāshiʿīna lillāhi lā yashtarūna biāyāti Allāhi thamanan qalīlan ulāika lahum ajruhum ʿinda rabbihim inna Allāha sarīʿu l-ḥisābi
ayahs.3:200: yāʾayyuhā alladhīna āmanū iṣbirū waṣābirū warābiṭū wa-ittaqū Allāha laʿallakum tufliḥūna
ayahs.4:1: yāʾayyuhā l-nāsu ittaqū rabbakumu alladhī khalaqakum min nafsin wāḥidatin wakhalaqa minhā zawjahā wabatha minhumā rijālan kathīran wanisāʾan wa-ittaqū Allāha alladhī tasāʾalūna bihi wal-arḥāma inna Allāha kāna ʿalaykum raqīban
ayahs.4:2: waʾātū l-yatāmā amwālahum walā tatabaddalū l-khabītha bil-ṭayibi walā takulū amwālahum ilā amwālikum innahu kāna ḥūban kabīran
ayahs.4:3: wa-in khiftum allā tuqsiṭū fī l-yatāmā fa-inkiḥū mā ṭāba lakum mina l-nisāi mathnā wathulātha warubāʿa fa-in khiftum allā taʿdilū fawāḥidatan aw mā malakat aymānukum dhālika adnā allā taʿūlū
