ayahs.4:4: waʾātū l-nisāʾa ṣaduqātihinna niḥlatan fa-in ṭibna lakum ʿan shayin minhu nafsan fakulūhu hanīan marīan
ayahs.4:5: walā tuʾtū l-sufahāʾa amwālakumu allatī jaʿala Allāhu lakum qiyāman wa-urzuqūhum fīhā wa-iksūhum waqūlū lahum qawlan maʿrūfan
ayahs.4:6: wa-ibtalū l-yatāmā ḥattā idhā balaghū l-nikāḥa fa-in ānastum minhum rushdan fa-idfaʿū ilayhim amwālahum walā takulūhā isrāfan wabidāran an yakbarū waman kāna ghaniyyan falyastaʿfif waman kāna faqīran falyakul bil-maʿrūfi fa-idhā dafaʿtum ilayhim amwālahum fa-ashhidū ʿalayhim wakafā billāhi ḥasīban
ayahs.4:7: lilrrijāli naṣībun mimmā taraka l-wālidāni wal-aqrabūna walilnnisāi naṣībun mimmā taraka l-wālidāni wal-aqrabūna mimmā qalla minhu aw kathura naṣīban mafrūḍan
ayahs.4:8: wa-idhā ḥaḍara l-qismata ulū l-qurbā wal-yatāmā wal-masākīnu fa-urzuqūhum minhu waqūlū lahum qawlan maʿrūfan
ayahs.4:9: walyakhsha alladhīna law tarakū min khalfihim dhurriyyatan ḍiʿāfan khāfū ʿalayhim falyattaqū Allāha walyaqūlū qawlan sadīdan
ayahs.4:10: inna alladhīna yakulūna amwāla l-yatāmā ẓulman innamā yakulūna fī buṭūnihim nāran wasayaṣlawna saʿīran
ayahs.4:11: yūṣīkumu Allāhu fī awlādikum lildhakari mithlu ḥaẓẓi l-unthayayni fa-in kunna nisāʾan fawqa ithnatayni falahunna thuluthā mā taraka wa-in kānat wāḥidatan falahā l-niṣfu wali-abawayhi likulli wāḥidin minhumā l-sudusu mimmā taraka in kāna lahu waladun fa-in lam yakun lahu waladun wawarithahu abawāhu fali-ummihi l-thuluthu fa-in kāna lahu ikhwatun fali-ummihi l-sudusu min baʿdi waṣiyyatin yūṣī bihā aw daynin ābāukum wa-abnāukum lā tadrūna ayyuhum aqrabu lakum nafʿan farīḍatan mina Allāhi inna Allāha kāna ʿalīman ḥakīman
ayahs.4:12: walakum niṣfu mā taraka azwājukum in lam yakun lahunna waladun fa-in kāna lahunna waladun falakumu l-rubuʿu mimmā tarakna min baʿdi waṣiyyatin yūṣīna bihā aw daynin walahunna l-rubuʿu mimmā taraktum in lam yakun lakum waladun fa-in kāna lakum waladun falahunna l-thumunu mimmā taraktum min baʿdi waṣiyyatin tūṣūna bihā aw daynin wa-in kāna rajulun yūrathu kalālatan awi imra-atun walahu akhun aw ukhtun falikulli wāḥidin minhumā l-sudusu fa-in kānū akthara min dhālika fahum shurakāu fī l-thuluthi min baʿdi waṣiyyatin yūṣā bihā aw daynin ghayra muḍārrin waṣiyyatan mina Allāhi wallāhu ʿalīmun ḥalīmun
ayahs.4:13: tilka ḥudūdu Allāhi waman yuṭiʿi Allāha warasūlahu yudkhilhu jannātin tajrī min taḥtihā l-anhāru khālidīna fīhā wadhālika l-fawzu l-ʿaẓīmu
ayahs.4:14: waman yaʿṣi Allāha warasūlahu wayataʿadda ḥudūdahu yudkhilhu nāran khālidan fīhā walahu ʿadhābun muhīnun
ayahs.4:15: wa-allātī yatīna l-fāḥishata min nisāikum fa-istashhidū ʿalayhinna arbaʿatan minkum fa-in shahidū fa-amsikūhunna fī l-buyūti ḥattā yatawaffāhunna l-mawtu aw yajʿala Allāhu lahunna sabīlan
ayahs.4:16: wa-alladhāni yatiyānihā minkum faʾādhūhumā fa-in tābā wa-aṣlaḥā fa-aʿriḍū ʿanhumā inna Allāha kāna tawwāban raḥīman
ayahs.4:17: innamā l-tawbatu ʿalā Allāhi lilladhīna yaʿmalūna l-sūa bijahālatin thumma yatūbūna min qarībin fa-ulāika yatūbu Allāhu ʿalayhim wakāna Allāhu ʿalīman ḥakīman
ayahs.4:18: walaysati l-tawbatu lilladhīna yaʿmalūna l-sayiāti ḥattā idhā ḥaḍara aḥadahumu l-mawtu qāla innī tubtu l-āna walā alladhīna yamūtūna wahum kuffārun ulāika aʿtadnā lahum ʿadhāban alīman
ayahs.4:19: yāʾayyuhā alladhīna āmanū lā yaḥillu lakum an tarithū l-nisāʾa karhan walā taʿḍulūhunna litadhhabū bibaʿḍi mā ātaytumūhunna illā an yatīna bifāḥishatin mubayyinatin waʿāshirūhunna bil-maʿrūfi fa-in karihtumūhunna faʿasā an takrahū shayan wayajʿala Allāhu fīhi khayran kathīran
ayahs.4:20: wa-in aradttumu istibdāla zawjin makāna zawjin waʾātaytum iḥdāhunna qinṭāran falā takhudhū minhu shayan atakhudhūnahu buhtānan wa-ithman mubīnan
ayahs.4:21: wakayfa takhudhūnahu waqad afḍā baʿḍukum ilā baʿḍin wa-akhadhna minkum mīthāqan ghalīẓan
ayahs.4:22: walā tankiḥū mā nakaḥa ābāukum mina l-nisāi illā mā qad salafa innahu kāna fāḥishatan wamaqtan wasāʾa sabīlan
ayahs.4:23: ḥurrimat ʿalaykum ummahātukum wabanātukum wa-akhawātukum waʿammātukum wakhālātukum wabanātu l-akhi wabanātu l-ukhti wa-ummahātukumu allātī arḍaʿnakum wa-akhawātukum mina l-raḍāʿati wa-ummahātu nisāikum warabāibukumu allātī fī ḥujūrikum min nisāikumu allātī dakhaltum bihinna fa-in lam takūnū dakhaltum bihinna falā junāḥa ʿalaykum waḥalāilu abnāikumu alladhīna min aṣlābikum wa-an tajmaʿū bayna l-ukhtayni illā mā qad salafa inna Allāha kāna ghafūran raḥīman
ayahs.4:24: wal-muḥṣanātu mina l-nisāi illā mā malakat aymānukum kitāba Allāhi ʿalaykum wa-uḥilla lakum mā warāʾa dhālikum an tabtaghū bi-amwālikum muḥṣinīna ghayra musāfiḥīna famā istamtaʿtum bihi minhunna faʾātūhunna ujūrahunna farīḍatan walā junāḥa ʿalaykum fīmā tarāḍaytum bihi min baʿdi l-farīḍati inna Allāha kāna ʿalīman ḥakīman
ayahs.4:25: waman lam yastaṭiʿ minkum ṭawlan an yankiḥa l-muḥṣanāti l-muʾmināti famin mā malakat aymānukum min fatayātikumu l-muʾmināti wallāhu aʿlamu biʾīmānikum baʿḍukum min baʿḍin fa-inkiḥūhunna bi-idhni ahlihinna waʾātūhunna ujūrahunna bil-maʿrūfi muḥṣanātin ghayra musāfiḥātin walā muttakhidhāti akhdānin fa-idhā uḥṣinna fa-in atayna bifāḥishatin faʿalayhinna niṣfu mā ʿalā l-muḥṣanāti mina l-ʿadhābi dhālika liman khashiya l-ʿanata minkum wa-an taṣbirū khayrun lakum wallāhu ghafūrun raḥīmun
ayahs.4:26: yurīdu Allāhu liyubayyina lakum wayahdiyakum sunana alladhīna min qablikum wayatūba ʿalaykum wallāhu ʿalīmun ḥakīmun
ayahs.4:27: wallāhu yurīdu an yatūba ʿalaykum wayurīdu alladhīna yattabiʿūna l-shahawāti an tamīlū maylan ʿaẓīman
ayahs.4:28: yurīdu Allāhu an yukhaffifa ʿankum wakhuliqa l-insānu ḍaʿīfan
ayahs.4:29: yāʾayyuhā alladhīna āmanū lā takulū amwālakum baynakum bil-bāṭili illā an takūna tijāratan ʿan tarāḍin minkum walā taqtulū anfusakum inna Allāha kāna bikum raḥīman
ayahs.4:30: waman yafʿal dhālika ʿudwānan waẓulman fasawfa nuṣlīhi nāran wakāna dhālika ʿalā Allāhi yasīran
ayahs.4:31: in tajtanibū kabāira mā tunhawna ʿanhu nukaffir ʿankum sayyiātikum wanudkhilkum mudkhalan karīman
ayahs.4:32: walā tatamannaw mā faḍḍala Allāhu bihi baʿḍakum ʿalā baʿḍin lilrrijāli naṣībun mimmā iktasabū walilnnisāi naṣībun mimmā iktasabna wasalū Allāha min faḍlihi inna Allāha kāna bikulli shayin ʿalīman
ayahs.4:33: walikullin jaʿalnā mawāliya mimmā taraka l-wālidāni wal-aqrabūna wa-alladhīna ʿaqadat aymānukum faʾātūhum naṣībahum inna Allāha kāna ʿalā kulli shayin shahīdan
ayahs.4:34: al-rijālu qawwāmūna ʿalā l-nisāi bimā faḍḍala Allāhu baʿḍahum ʿalā baʿḍin wabimā anfaqū min amwālihim fal-ṣāliḥātu qānitātun ḥāfiẓātun lilghaybi bimā ḥafiẓa Allāhu wa-allātī takhāfūna nushūzahunna faʿiẓūhunna wa-uhjurūhunna fī l-maḍājiʿi wa-iḍribūhunna fa-in aṭaʿnakum falā tabghū ʿalayhinna sabīlan inna Allāha kāna ʿaliyyan kabīran
ayahs.4:35: wa-in khiftum shiqāqa baynihimā fa-ibʿathū ḥakaman min ahlihi waḥakaman min ahlihā in yurīdā iṣlāḥan yuwaffiqi Allāhu baynahumā inna Allāha kāna ʿalīman khabīran
ayahs.4:36: wa-uʿbudū Allāha walā tushrikū bihi shayan wabil-wālidayni iḥsānan wabidhī l-qurbā wal-yatāmā wal-masākīni wal-jāri dhī l-qurbā wal-jāri l-junubi wal-ṣāḥibi bil-janbi wa-ibni l-sabīli wamā malakat aymānukum inna Allāha lā yuḥibbu man kāna mukhtālan fakhūran
ayahs.4:37: alladhīna yabkhalūna wayamurūna l-nāsa bil-bukhli wayaktumūna mā ātāhumu Allāhu min faḍlihi wa-aʿtadnā lilkāfirīna ʿadhāban muhīnan
ayahs.4:38: wa-alladhīna yunfiqūna amwālahum riāʾa l-nāsi walā yuʾminūna billāhi walā bil-yawmi l-ākhiri waman yakuni l-shayṭānu lahu qarīnan fasāʾa qarīnan
ayahs.4:39: wamādhā ʿalayhim law āmanū billāhi wal-yawmi l-ākhiri wa-anfaqū mimmā razaqahumu Allāhu wakāna Allāhu bihim ʿalīman
ayahs.4:40: inna Allāha lā yaẓlimu mithqāla dharratin wa-in taku ḥasanatan yuḍāʿifhā wayuʾti min ladunhu ajran ʿaẓīman
ayahs.4:41: fakayfa idhā jiʾnā min kulli ummatin bishahīdin wajiʾnā bika ʿalā hāulāi shahīdan
ayahs.4:42: yawma-idhin yawaddu alladhīna kafarū waʿaṣawū l-rasūla law tusawwā bihimu l-arḍu walā yaktumūna Allāha ḥadīthan
ayahs.4:43: yāʾayyuhā alladhīna āmanū lā taqrabū l-ṣalata wa-antum sukārā ḥattā taʿlamū mā taqūlūna walā junuban illā ʿābirī sabīlin ḥattā taghtasilū wa-in kuntum marḍā aw ʿalā safarin aw jāʾa aḥadun minkum mina l-ghāiṭi aw lāmastumu l-nisāʾa falam tajidū māʾan fatayammamū ṣaʿīdan ṭayyiban fa-imsaḥū biwujūhikum wa-aydīkum inna Allāha kāna ʿafuwwan ghafūran
ayahs.4:44: alam tara ilā alladhīna ūtū naṣīban mina l-kitābi yashtarūna l-ḍalālata wayurīdūna an taḍillū l-sabīla
ayahs.4:45: wallāhu aʿlamu bi-aʿdāikum wakafā billāhi waliyyan wakafā billāhi naṣīran
ayahs.4:46: mina alladhīna hādū yuḥarrifūna l-kalima ʿan mawāḍiʿihi wayaqūlūna samiʿnā waʿaṣaynā wa-ismaʿ ghayra musmaʿin warāʿinā layyan bi-alsinatihim waṭaʿnan fī l-dīni walaw annahum qālū samiʿnā wa-aṭaʿnā wa-ismaʿ wa-unẓurnā lakāna khayran lahum wa-aqwama walākin laʿanahumu Allāhu bikufrihim falā yuʾminūna illā qalīlan
ayahs.4:47: yāʾayyuhā alladhīna ūtū l-kitāba āminū bimā nazzalnā muṣaddiqan limā maʿakum min qabli an naṭmisa wujūhan fanaruddahā ʿalā adbārihā aw nalʿanahum kamā laʿannā aṣḥāba l-sabti wakāna amru Allāhi mafʿūlan
ayahs.4:48: inna Allāha lā yaghfiru an yushraka bihi wayaghfiru mā dūna dhālika liman yashāu waman yushrik billāhi faqadi iftarā ithman ʿaẓīman
ayahs.4:49: alam tara ilā alladhīna yuzakkūna anfusahum bali Allāhu yuzakkī man yashāu walā yuẓlamūna fatīlan
ayahs.4:50: unẓur kayfa yaftarūna ʿalā Allāhi l-kadhiba wakafā bihi ithman mubīnan
ayahs.4:51: alam tara ilā alladhīna ūtū naṣīban mina l-kitābi yuʾminūna bil-jibti wal-ṭāghūti wayaqūlūna lilladhīna kafarū hāulāi ahdā mina alladhīna āmanū sabīlan
ayahs.4:52: ulāika alladhīna laʿanahumu Allāhu waman yalʿani Allāhu falan tajida lahu naṣīran
ayahs.4:53: am lahum naṣībun mina l-mulki fa-idhan lā yuʾtūna l-nāsa naqīran
ayahs.4:54: am yaḥsudūna l-nāsa ʿalā mā ātāhumu Allāhu min faḍlihi faqad ātaynā āla ibrāhīma l-kitāba wal-ḥikmata waʾātaynāhum mulkan ʿaẓīman
ayahs.4:55: faminhum man āmana bihi waminhum man ṣadda ʿanhu wakafā bijahannama saʿīran
ayahs.4:56: inna alladhīna kafarū biāyātinā sawfa nuṣlīhim nāran kullamā naḍijat julūduhum baddalnāhum julūdan ghayrahā liyadhūqū l-ʿadhāba inna Allāha kāna ʿazīzan ḥakīman
ayahs.4:57: wa-alladhīna āmanū waʿamilū l-ṣāliḥāti sanudkhiluhum jannātin tajrī min taḥtihā l-anhāru khālidīna fīhā abadan lahum fīhā azwājun muṭahharatun wanudkhiluhum ẓillan ẓalīlan
ayahs.4:58: inna Allāha yamurukum an tu-addū l-amānāti ilā ahlihā wa-idhā ḥakamtum bayna l-nāsi an taḥkumū bil-ʿadli inna Allāha niʿimmā yaʿiẓukum bihi inna Allāha kāna samīʿan baṣīran
ayahs.4:59: yāʾayyuhā alladhīna āmanū aṭīʿū Allāha wa-aṭīʿū l-rasūla wa-ulī l-amri minkum fa-in tanāzaʿtum fī shayin faruddūhu ilā Allāhi wal-rasūli in kuntum tuʾminūna billāhi wal-yawmi l-ākhiri dhālika khayrun wa-aḥsanu tawīlan
ayahs.4:60: alam tara ilā alladhīna yazʿumūna annahum āmanū bimā unzila ilayka wamā unzila min qablika yurīdūna an yataḥākamū ilā l-ṭāghūti waqad umirū an yakfurū bihi wayurīdu l-shayṭānu an yuḍillahum ḍalālan baʿīdan
ayahs.4:61: wa-idhā qīla lahum taʿālaw ilā mā anzala Allāhu wa-ilā l-rasūli ra-ayta l-munāfiqīna yaṣuddūna ʿanka ṣudūdan
ayahs.4:62: fakayfa idhā aṣābathum muṣībatun bimā qaddamat aydīhim thumma jāūka yaḥlifūna billāhi in aradnā illā iḥsānan watawfīqan
ayahs.4:63: ulāika alladhīna yaʿlamu Allāhu mā fī qulūbihim fa-aʿriḍ ʿanhum waʿiẓhum waqul lahum fī anfusihim qawlan balīghan
ayahs.4:64: wamā arsalnā min rasūlin illā liyuṭāʿa bi-idhni Allāhi walaw annahum idh ẓalamū anfusahum jāūka fa-istaghfarū Allāha wa-istaghfara lahumu l-rasūlu lawajadū Allāha tawwāban raḥīman
ayahs.4:65: falā warabbika lā yuʾminūna ḥattā yuḥakkimūka fīmā shajara baynahum thumma lā yajidū fī anfusihim ḥarajan mimmā qaḍayta wayusallimū taslīman
ayahs.4:66: walaw annā katabnā ʿalayhim ani uqtulū anfusakum awi ukhrujū min diyārikum mā faʿalūhu illā qalīlun minhum walaw annahum faʿalū mā yūʿaẓūna bihi lakāna khayran lahum wa-ashadda tathbītan
ayahs.4:67: wa-idhan laʾātaynāhum min ladunnā ajran ʿaẓīman
ayahs.4:69: waman yuṭiʿi Allāha wal-rasūla fa-ulāika maʿa alladhīna anʿama Allāhu ʿalayhim mina l-nabiyīna wal-ṣidīqīna wal-shuhadāi wal-ṣāliḥīna waḥasuna ulāika rafīqan
ayahs.4:70: dhālika l-faḍlu mina Allāhi wakafā billāhi ʿalīman
ayahs.4:71: yāʾayyuhā alladhīna āmanū khudhū ḥidhrakum fa-infirū thubātin awi infirū jamīʿan
ayahs.4:72: wa-inna minkum laman layubaṭṭi-anna fa-in aṣābatkum muṣībatun qāla qad anʿama Allāhu ʿalayya idh lam akun maʿahum shahīdan
ayahs.4:73: wala-in aṣābakum faḍlun mina Allāhi layaqūlanna ka-an lam takun baynakum wabaynahu mawaddatun yālaytanī kuntu maʿahum fa-afūza fawzan ʿaẓīman
ayahs.4:74: falyuqātil fī sabīli Allāhi alladhīna yashrūna l-ḥayata l-dunyā bil-ākhirati waman yuqātil fī sabīli Allāhi fayuqtal aw yaghlib fasawfa nuʾtīhi ajran ʿaẓīman
ayahs.4:75: wamā lakum lā tuqātilūna fī sabīli Allāhi wal-mustaḍʿafīna mina l-rijāli wal-nisāi wal-wildāni alladhīna yaqūlūna rabbanā akhrijnā min hādhihi l-qaryati l-ẓālimi ahluhā wa-ijʿal lanā min ladunka waliyyan wa-ijʿal lanā min ladunka naṣīran
ayahs.4:76: alladhīna āmanū yuqātilūna fī sabīli Allāhi wa-alladhīna kafarū yuqātilūna fī sabīli l-ṭāghūti faqātilū awliyāʾa l-shayṭāni inna kayda l-shayṭāni kāna ḍaʿīfan
ayahs.4:77: alam tara ilā alladhīna qīla lahum kuffū aydiyakum wa-aqīmū l-ṣalata waʾātū l-zakata falammā kutiba ʿalayhimu l-qitālu idhā farīqun minhum yakhshawna l-nāsa kakhashyati Allāhi aw ashadda khashyatan waqālū rabbanā lima katabta ʿalaynā l-qitāla lawlā akhartanā ilā ajalin qarībin qul matāʿu l-dunyā qalīlun wal-ākhiratu khayrun limani ittaqā walā tuẓlamūna fatīlan
ayahs.4:78: aynamā takūnū yudrikkumu l-mawtu walaw kuntum fī burūjin mushayyadatin wa-in tuṣibhum ḥasanatun yaqūlū hādhihi min ʿindi Allāhi wa-in tuṣibhum sayyi-atun yaqūlū hādhihi min ʿindika qul kullun min ʿindi Allāhi famāli hāulāi l-qawmi lā yakādūna yafqahūna ḥadīthan
ayahs.4:79: mā aṣābaka min ḥasanatin famina Allāhi wamā aṣābaka min sayyi-atin famin nafsika wa-arsalnāka lilnnāsi rasūlan wakafā billāhi shahīdan
ayahs.4:80: man yuṭiʿi l-rasūla faqad aṭāʿa Allāha waman tawallā famā arsalnāka ʿalayhim ḥafīẓan
ayahs.4:81: wayaqūlūna ṭāʿatun fa-idhā barazū min ʿindika bayyata ṭāifatun minhum ghayra alladhī taqūlu wallāhu yaktubu mā yubayyitūna fa-aʿriḍ ʿanhum watawakkal ʿalā Allāhi wakafā billāhi wakīlan
ayahs.4:82: afalā yatadabbarūna l-qurāna walaw kāna min ʿindi ghayri Allāhi lawajadū fīhi ikhtilāfan kathīran
ayahs.4:83: wa-idhā jāʾahum amrun mina l-amni awi l-khawfi adhāʿū bihi walaw raddūhu ilā l-rasūli wa-ilā ulī l-amri minhum laʿalimahu alladhīna yastanbiṭūnahu minhum walawlā faḍlu Allāhi ʿalaykum waraḥmatuhu la-ittabaʿtumu l-shayṭāna illā qalīlan
ayahs.4:84: faqātil fī sabīli Allāhi lā tukallafu illā nafsaka waḥarriḍi l-muʾminīna ʿasā Allāhu an yakuffa basa alladhīna kafarū wallāhu ashaddu basan wa-ashaddu tankīlan
ayahs.4:85: man yashfaʿ shafāʿatan ḥasanatan yakun lahu naṣībun minhā waman yashfaʿ shafāʿatan sayyi-atan yakun lahu kiflun minhā wakāna Allāhu ʿalā kulli shayin muqītan
ayahs.4:86: wa-idhā ḥuyyītum bitaḥiyyatin faḥayyū bi-aḥsana minhā aw ruddūhā inna Allāha kāna ʿalā kulli shayin ḥasīban
ayahs.4:87: Allāhu lā ilāha illā huwa layajmaʿannakum ilā yawmi l-qiyāmati lā rayba fīhi waman aṣdaqu mina Allāhi ḥadīthan
ayahs.4:88: famā lakum fī l-munāfiqīna fi-atayni wallāhu arkasahum bimā kasabū aturīdūna an tahdū man aḍalla Allāhu waman yuḍlili Allāhu falan tajida lahu sabīlan
ayahs.4:89: waddū law takfurūna kamā kafarū fatakūnūna sawāʾan falā tattakhidhū minhum awliyāʾa ḥattā yuhājirū fī sabīli Allāhi fa-in tawallaw fakhudhūhum wa-uqtulūhum ḥaythu wajadttumūhum walā tattakhidhū minhum waliyyan walā naṣīran
ayahs.4:90: illā alladhīna yaṣilūna ilā qawmin baynakum wabaynahum mīthāqun aw jāūkum ḥaṣirat ṣudūruhum an yuqātilūkum aw yuqātilū qawmahum walaw shāʾa Allāhu lasallaṭahum ʿalaykum falaqātalūkum fa-ini iʿtazalūkum falam yuqātilūkum wa-alqaw ilaykumu l-salama famā jaʿala Allāhu lakum ʿalayhim sabīlan
ayahs.4:91: satajidūna ākharīna yurīdūna an yamanūkum wayamanū qawmahum kulla mā ruddū ilā l-fitnati urkisū fīhā fa-in lam yaʿtazilūkum wayulqū ilaykumu l-salama wayakuffū aydiyahum fakhudhūhum wa-uqtulūhum ḥaythu thaqiftumūhum wa-ulāikum jaʿalnā lakum ʿalayhim sulṭānan mubīnan
ayahs.4:92: wamā kāna limuʾminin an yaqtula muʾminan illā khaṭa-an waman qatala muʾminan khaṭa-an fataḥrīru raqabatin muʾminatin wadiyatun musallamatun ilā ahlihi illā an yaṣṣaddaqū fa-in kāna min qawmin ʿaduwwin lakum wahuwa muʾminun fataḥrīru raqabatin muʾminatin wa-in kāna min qawmin baynakum wabaynahum mīthāqun fadiyatun musallamatun ilā ahlihi wataḥrīru raqabatin muʾminatin faman lam yajid faṣiyāmu shahrayni mutatābiʿayni tawbatan mina Allāhi wakāna Allāhu ʿalīman ḥakīman
ayahs.4:93: waman yaqtul muʾminan mutaʿammidan fajazāuhu jahannamu khālidan fīhā waghaḍiba Allāhu ʿalayhi walaʿanahu wa-aʿadda lahu ʿadhāban ʿaẓīman
ayahs.4:94: yāʾayyuhā alladhīna āmanū idhā ḍarabtum fī sabīli Allāhi fatabayyanū walā taqūlū liman alqā ilaykumu l-salāma lasta muʾminan tabtaghūna ʿaraḍa l-ḥayati l-dunyā faʿinda Allāhi maghānimu kathīratun kadhālika kuntum min qablu famanna Allāhu ʿalaykum fatabayyanū inna Allāha kāna bimā taʿmalūna khabīran
ayahs.4:95: lā yastawī l-qāʿidūna mina l-muʾminīna ghayru ulī l-ḍarari wal-mujāhidūna fī sabīli Allāhi bi-amwālihim wa-anfusihim faḍḍala Allāhu l-mujāhidīna bi-amwālihim wa-anfusihim ʿalā l-qāʿidīna darajatan wakullan waʿada Allāhu l-ḥusnā wafaḍḍala Allāhu l-mujāhidīna ʿalā l-qāʿidīna ajran ʿaẓīman
ayahs.4:96: darajātin minhu wamaghfiratan waraḥmatan wakāna Allāhu ghafūran raḥīman
ayahs.4:97: inna alladhīna tawaffāhumu l-malāikatu ẓālimī anfusihim qālū fīma kuntum qālū kunnā mustaḍʿafīna fī l-arḍi qālū alam takun arḍu Allāhi wāsiʿatan fatuhājirū fīhā fa-ulāika mawāhum jahannamu wasāʾat maṣīran
ayahs.4:98: illā l-mustaḍʿafīna mina l-rijāli wal-nisāi wal-wildāni lā yastaṭīʿūna ḥīlatan walā yahtadūna sabīlan
ayahs.4:99: fa-ulāika ʿasā Allāhu an yaʿfuwa ʿanhum wakāna Allāhu ʿafuwwan ghafūran
ayahs.4:100: waman yuhājir fī sabīli Allāhi yajid fī l-arḍi murāghaman kathīran wasaʿatan waman yakhruj min baytihi muhājiran ilā Allāhi warasūlihi thumma yudrikhu l-mawtu faqad waqaʿa ajruhu ʿalā Allāhi wakāna Allāhu ghafūran raḥīman
ayahs.4:101: wa-idhā ḍarabtum fī l-arḍi falaysa ʿalaykum junāḥun an taqṣurū mina l-ṣalati in khiftum an yaftinakumu alladhīna kafarū inna l-kāfirīna kānū lakum ʿaduwwan mubīnan
ayahs.4:102: wa-idhā kunta fīhim fa-aqamta lahumu l-ṣalata faltaqum ṭāifatun minhum maʿaka walyakhudhū asliḥatahum fa-idhā sajadū falyakūnū min warāikum waltati ṭāifatun ukhrā lam yuṣallū falyuṣallū maʿaka walyakhudhū ḥidhrahum wa-asliḥatahum wadda alladhīna kafarū law taghfulūna ʿan asliḥatikum wa-amtiʿatikum fayamīlūna ʿalaykum maylatan wāḥidatan walā junāḥa ʿalaykum in kāna bikum adhan min maṭarin aw kuntum marḍā an taḍaʿū asliḥatakum wakhudhū ḥidhrakum inna Allāha aʿadda lilkāfirīna ʿadhāban muhīnan
ayahs.4:103: fa-idhā qaḍaytumu l-ṣalata fa-udhkurū Allāha qiyāman waquʿūdan waʿalā junūbikum fa-idhā iṭmanantum fa-aqīmū l-ṣalata inna l-ṣalata kānat ʿalā l-muʾminīna kitāban mawqūtan
ayahs.4:104: walā tahinū fī ibtighāi l-qawmi in takūnū talamūna fa-innahum yalamūna kamā talamūna watarjūna mina Allāhi mā lā yarjūna wakāna Allāhu ʿalīman ḥakīman
ayahs.4:105: innā anzalnā ilayka l-kitāba bil-ḥaqi litaḥkuma bayna l-nāsi bimā arāka Allāhu walā takun lilkhāinīna khaṣīman
ayahs.4:106: wa-istaghfiri Allāha inna Allāha kāna ghafūran raḥīman
ayahs.4:107: walā tujādil ʿani alladhīna yakhtānūna anfusahum inna Allāha lā yuḥibbu man kāna khawwānan athīman
ayahs.4:108: yastakhfūna mina l-nāsi walā yastakhfūna mina Allāhi wahuwa maʿahum idh yubayyitūna mā lā yarḍā mina l-qawli wakāna Allāhu bimā yaʿmalūna muḥīṭan
ayahs.4:109: hāʾantum hāulāi jādaltum ʿanhum fī l-ḥayati l-dunyā faman yujādilu Allāha ʿanhum yawma l-qiyāmati am man yakūnu ʿalayhim wakīlan
ayahs.4:110: waman yaʿmal sūan aw yaẓlim nafsahu thumma yastaghfiri Allāha yajidi Allāha ghafūran raḥīman
ayahs.4:111: waman yaksib ithman fa-innamā yaksibuhu ʿalā nafsihi wakāna Allāhu ʿalīman ḥakīman
ayahs.4:112: waman yaksib khaṭīatan aw ithman thumma yarmi bihi barīan faqadi iḥtamala buhtānan wa-ithman mubīnan
ayahs.4:113: walawlā faḍlu Allāhi ʿalayka waraḥmatuhu lahammat ṭāifatun minhum an yuḍillūka wamā yuḍillūna illā anfusahum wamā yaḍurrūnaka min shayin wa-anzala Allāhu ʿalayka l-kitāba wal-ḥikmata waʿallamaka mā lam takun taʿlamu wakāna faḍlu Allāhi ʿalayka ʿaẓīman
ayahs.4:114: lā khayra fī kathīrin min najwāhum illā man amara biṣadaqatin aw maʿrūfin aw iṣlāḥin bayna l-nāsi waman yafʿal dhālika ibtighāʾa marḍāti Allāhi fasawfa nuʾtīhi ajran ʿaẓīman
ayahs.4:115: waman yushāqiqi l-rasūla min baʿdi mā tabayyana lahu l-hudā wayattabiʿ ghayra sabīli l-muʾminīna nuwallihi mā tawallā wanuṣlihi jahannama wasāʾat maṣīran
ayahs.4:116: inna Allāha lā yaghfiru an yushraka bihi wayaghfiru mā dūna dhālika liman yashāu waman yushrik billāhi faqad ḍalla ḍalālan baʿīdan
ayahs.4:117: in yadʿūna min dūnihi illā ināthan wa-in yadʿūna illā shayṭānan marīdan
ayahs.4:118: laʿanahu Allāhu waqāla la-attakhidhanna min ʿibādika naṣīban mafrūḍan
ayahs.4:119: wala-uḍillannahum wala-umanniyannahum walaʾāmurannahum falayubattikunna ādhāna l-anʿāmi walaʾāmurannahum falayughayyirunna khalqa Allāhi waman yattakhidhi l-shayṭāna waliyyan min dūni Allāhi faqad khasira khusrānan mubīnan
ayahs.4:120: yaʿiduhum wayumannīhim wamā yaʿiduhumu l-shayṭānu illā ghurūran
ayahs.4:121: ulāika mawāhum jahannamu walā yajidūna ʿanhā maḥīṣan
ayahs.4:122: wa-alladhīna āmanū waʿamilū l-ṣāliḥāti sanudkhiluhum jannātin tajrī min taḥtihā l-anhāru khālidīna fīhā abadan waʿda Allāhi ḥaqqan waman aṣdaqu mina Allāhi qīlan
ayahs.4:123: laysa bi-amāniyyikum walā amāniyyi ahli l-kitābi man yaʿmal sūan yujza bihi walā yajid lahu min dūni Allāhi waliyyan walā naṣīran
ayahs.4:124: waman yaʿmal mina l-ṣāliḥāti min dhakarin aw unthā wahuwa muʾminun fa-ulāika yadkhulūna l-janata walā yuẓlamūna naqīran
ayahs.4:125: waman aḥsanu dīnan mimman aslama wajhahu lillāhi wahuwa muḥsinun wa-ittabaʿa millata ibrāhīma ḥanīfan wa-ittakhadha Allāhu ibrāhīma khalīlan
ayahs.4:126: walillahi mā fī l-samāwāti wamā fī l-arḍi wakāna Allāhu bikulli shayin muḥīṭan
ayahs.4:127: wayastaftūnaka fī l-nisāi quli Allāhu yuftīkum fīhinna wamā yutlā ʿalaykum fī l-kitābi fī yatāmā l-nisāi allātī lā tuʾtūnahunna mā kutiba lahunna watarghabūna an tankiḥūhunna wal-mustaḍʿafīna mina l-wildāni wa-an taqūmū lilyatāmā bil-qisṭi wamā tafʿalū min khayrin fa-inna Allāha kāna bihi ʿalīman
ayahs.4:128: wa-ini imra-atun khāfat min baʿlihā nushūzan aw iʿrāḍan falā junāḥa ʿalayhimā an yuṣliḥā baynahumā ṣulḥan wal-ṣulḥu khayrun wa-uḥḍirati l-anfusu l-shuḥa wa-in tuḥsinū watattaqū fa-inna Allāha kāna bimā taʿmalūna khabīran
ayahs.4:129: walan tastaṭīʿū an taʿdilū bayna l-nisāi walaw ḥaraṣtum falā tamīlū kulla l-mayli fatadharūhā kal-muʿalaqati wa-in tuṣliḥū watattaqū fa-inna Allāha kāna ghafūran raḥīman
ayahs.4:130: wa-in yatafarraqā yughni Allāhu kullan min saʿatihi wakāna Allāhu wāsiʿan ḥakīman
ayahs.4:131: walillahi mā fī l-samāwāti wamā fī l-arḍi walaqad waṣṣaynā alladhīna ūtū l-kitāba min qablikum wa-iyyākum ani ittaqū Allāha wa-in takfurū fa-inna lillāhi mā fī l-samāwāti wamā fī l-arḍi wakāna Allāhu ghaniyyan ḥamīdan
ayahs.4:132: walillahi mā fī l-samāwāti wamā fī l-arḍi wakafā billāhi wakīlan
ayahs.4:133: in yasha yudhhibkum ayyuhā l-nāsu wayati biākharīna wakāna Allāhu ʿalā dhālika qadīran
ayahs.4:134: man kāna yurīdu thawāba l-dunyā faʿinda Allāhi thawābu l-dunyā wal-ākhirati wakāna Allāhu samīʿan baṣīran
ayahs.4:135: yāʾayyuhā alladhīna āmanū kūnū qawwāmīna bil-qisṭi shuhadāʾa lillāhi walaw ʿalā anfusikum awi l-wālidayni wal-aqrabīna in yakun ghaniyyan aw faqīran fallāhu awlā bihimā falā tattabiʿū l-hawā an taʿdilū wa-in talwū aw tuʿriḍū fa-inna Allāha kāna bimā taʿmalūna khabīran
ayahs.4:136: yāʾayyuhā alladhīna āmanū āminū billāhi warasūlihi wal-kitābi alladhī nazzala ʿalā rasūlihi wal-kitābi alladhī anzala min qablu waman yakfur billāhi wamalāikatihi wakutubihi warusulihi wal-yawmi l-ākhiri faqad ḍalla ḍalālan baʿīdan
ayahs.4:137: inna alladhīna āmanū thumma kafarū thumma āmanū thumma kafarū thumma izdādū kufran lam yakuni Allāhu liyaghfira lahum walā liyahdiyahum sabīlan
ayahs.4:138: bashiri l-munāfiqīna bi-anna lahum ʿadhāban alīman
ayahs.4:139: alladhīna yattakhidhūna l-kāfirīna awliyāʾa min dūni l-muʾminīna ayabtaghūna ʿindahumu l-ʿizata fa-inna l-ʿizata lillāhi jamīʿan
ayahs.4:140: waqad nazzala ʿalaykum fī l-kitābi an idhā samiʿtum āyāti Allāhi yukfaru bihā wayustahza-u bihā falā taqʿudū maʿahum ḥattā yakhūḍū fī ḥadīthin ghayrihi innakum idhan mithluhum inna Allāha jāmiʿu l-munāfiqīna wal-kāfirīna fī jahannama jamīʿan
ayahs.4:141: alladhīna yatarabbaṣūna bikum fa-in kāna lakum fatḥun mina Allāhi qālū alam nakun maʿakum wa-in kāna lilkāfirīna naṣībun qālū alam nastaḥwidh ʿalaykum wanamnaʿkum mina l-muʾminīna fallāhu yaḥkumu baynakum yawma l-qiyāmati walan yajʿala Allāhu lilkāfirīna ʿalā l-muʾminīna sabīlan
ayahs.4:142: inna l-munāfiqīna yukhādiʿūna Allāha wahuwa khādiʿuhum wa-idhā qāmū ilā l-ṣalati qāmū kusālā yurāūna l-nāsa walā yadhkurūna Allāha illā qalīlan
ayahs.4:143: mudhabdhabīna bayna dhālika lā ilā hāulāi walā ilā hāulāi waman yuḍlili Allāhu falan tajida lahu sabīlan
ayahs.4:144: yāʾayyuhā alladhīna āmanū lā tattakhidhū l-kāfirīna awliyāʾa min dūni l-muʾminīna aturīdūna an tajʿalū lillāhi ʿalaykum sulṭānan mubīnan
ayahs.4:145: inna l-munāfiqīna fī l-darki l-asfali mina l-nāri walan tajida lahum naṣīran
ayahs.4:146: illā alladhīna tābū wa-aṣlaḥū wa-iʿtaṣamū billāhi wa-akhlaṣū dīnahum lillāhi fa-ulāika maʿa l-muʾminīna wasawfa yuʾti Allāhu l-muʾminīna ajran ʿaẓīman
ayahs.4:147: mā yafʿalu Allāhu biʿadhābikum in shakartum waʾāmantum wakāna Allāhu shākiran ʿalīman
ayahs.4:148: lā yuḥibbu Allāhu l-jahra bil-sūi mina l-qawli illā man ẓulima wakāna Allāhu samīʿan ʿalīman
ayahs.4:149: in tubdū khayran aw tukhfūhu aw taʿfū ʿan sūin fa-inna Allāha kāna ʿafuwwan qadīran
ayahs.4:150: inna alladhīna yakfurūna billāhi warusulihi wayurīdūna an yufarriqū bayna Allāhi warusulihi wayaqūlūna nuʾminu bibaʿḍin wanakfuru bibaʿḍin wayurīdūna an yattakhidhū bayna dhālika sabīlan
ayahs.4:151: ulāika humu l-kāfirūna ḥaqqan wa-aʿtadnā lilkāfirīna ʿadhāban muhīnan
ayahs.4:152: wa-alladhīna āmanū billāhi warusulihi walam yufarriqū bayna aḥadin minhum ulāika sawfa yuʾtīhim ujūrahum wakāna Allāhu ghafūran raḥīman
ayahs.4:153: yasaluka ahlu l-kitābi an tunazzila ʿalayhim kitāban mina l-samāi faqad sa-alū mūsā akbara min dhālika faqālū arinā Allāha jahratan fa-akhadhathumu l-ṣāʿiqatu biẓulmihim thumma ittakhadhū l-ʿijla min baʿdi mā jāʾathumu l-bayinātu faʿafawnā ʿan dhālika waʾātaynā mūsā sulṭānan mubīnan
ayahs.4:154: warafaʿnā fawqahumu l-ṭūra bimīthāqihim waqulnā lahumu udkhulū l-bāba sujjadan waqulnā lahum lā taʿdū fī l-sabti wa-akhadhnā minhum mīthāqan ghalīẓan
ayahs.4:155: fabimā naqḍihim mīthāqahum wakufrihim biāyāti Allāhi waqatlihimu l-anbiyāʾa bighayri ḥaqqin waqawlihim qulūbunā ghulfun bal ṭabaʿa Allāhu ʿalayhā bikufrihim falā yuʾminūna illā qalīlan
ayahs.4:156: wabikufrihim waqawlihim ʿalā maryama buhtānan ʿaẓīman
ayahs.4:157: waqawlihim innā qatalnā l-masīḥa ʿīsā ibna maryama rasūla Allāhi wamā qatalūhu wamā ṣalabūhu walākin shubbiha lahum wa-inna alladhīna ikhtalafū fīhi lafī shakkin minhu mā lahum bihi min ʿilmin illā ittibāʿa l-ẓani wamā qatalūhu yaqīnan
ayahs.4:158: bal rafaʿahu Allāhu ilayhi wakāna Allāhu ʿazīzan ḥakīman
ayahs.4:159: wa-in min ahli l-kitābi illā layuʾminanna bihi qabla mawtihi wayawma l-qiyāmati yakūnu ʿalayhim shahīdan
ayahs.4:160: fabiẓulmin mina alladhīna hādū ḥarramnā ʿalayhim ṭayyibātin uḥillat lahum wabiṣaddihim ʿan sabīli Allāhi kathīran
ayahs.4:161: wa-akhdhihimu l-riba waqad nuhū ʿanhu wa-aklihim amwāla l-nāsi bil-bāṭili wa-aʿtadnā lilkāfirīna minhum ʿadhāban alīman
ayahs.4:162: lākini l-rāsikhūna fī l-ʿilmi minhum wal-muʾminūna yuʾminūna bimā unzila ilayka wamā unzila min qablika wal-muqīmīna l-ṣalata wal-muʾtūna l-zakata wal-muʾminūna billāhi wal-yawmi l-ākhiri ulāika sanuʾtīhim ajran ʿaẓīman
ayahs.4:163: innā awḥaynā ilayka kamā awḥaynā ilā nūḥin wal-nabiyīna min baʿdihi wa-awḥaynā ilā ibrāhīma wa-ismāʿīla wa-isḥāqa wayaʿqūba wal-asbāṭi waʿīsā wa-ayyūba wayūnusa wahārūna wasulaymāna waʾātaynā dāwūda zabūran
ayahs.4:164: warusulan qad qaṣaṣnāhum ʿalayka min qablu warusulan lam naqṣuṣhum ʿalayka wakallama Allāhu mūsā taklīman
ayahs.4:165: rusulan mubashirīna wamundhirīna li-allā yakūna lilnnāsi ʿalā Allāhi ḥujjatun baʿda l-rusuli wakāna Allāhu ʿazīzan ḥakīman
ayahs.4:166: lākini Allāhu yashhadu bimā anzala ilayka anzalahu biʿilmihi wal-malāikatu yashhadūna wakafā billāhi shahīdan
ayahs.4:167: inna alladhīna kafarū waṣaddū ʿan sabīli Allāhi qad ḍallū ḍalālan baʿīdan
ayahs.4:168: inna alladhīna kafarū waẓalamū lam yakuni Allāhu liyaghfira lahum walā liyahdiyahum ṭarīqan
ayahs.4:169: illā ṭarīqa jahannama khālidīna fīhā abadan wakāna dhālika ʿalā Allāhi yasīran
ayahs.4:170: yāʾayyuhā l-nāsu qad jāʾakumu l-rasūlu bil-ḥaqi min rabbikum faʾāminū khayran lakum wa-in takfurū fa-inna lillāhi mā fī l-samāwāti wal-arḍi wakāna Allāhu ʿalīman ḥakīman
ayahs.4:171: yāʾahla l-kitābi lā taghlū fī dīnikum walā taqūlū ʿalā Allāhi illā l-ḥaqa innamā l-masīḥu ʿīsā ubnu maryama rasūlu Allāhi wakalimatuhu alqāhā ilā maryama warūḥun minhu faʾāminū billāhi warusulihi walā taqūlū thalāthatun intahū khayran lakum innamā Allāhu ilāhun wāḥidun subḥānahu an yakūna lahu waladun lahu mā fī l-samāwāti wamā fī l-arḍi wakafā billāhi wakīlan
ayahs.4:172: lan yastankifa l-masīḥu an yakūna ʿabdan lillāhi walā l-malāikatu l-muqarabūna waman yastankif ʿan ʿibādatihi wayastakbir fasayaḥshuruhum ilayhi jamīʿan
ayahs.4:173: fa-ammā alladhīna āmanū waʿamilū l-ṣāliḥāti fayuwaffīhim ujūrahum wayazīduhum min faḍlihi wa-ammā alladhīna istankafū wa-istakbarū fayuʿadhibuhum ʿadhāban alīman walā yajidūna lahum min dūni Allāhi waliyyan walā naṣīran
ayahs.4:174: yāʾayyuhā l-nāsu qad jāʾakum burhānun min rabbikum wa-anzalnā ilaykum nūran mubīnan
ayahs.4:175: fa-ammā alladhīna āmanū billāhi wa-iʿtaṣamū bihi fasayudkhiluhum fī raḥmatin minhu wafaḍlin wayahdīhim ilayhi ṣirāṭan mustaqīman
ayahs.4:176: yastaftūnaka quli Allāhu yuftīkum fī l-kalālati ini imru-on halaka laysa lahu waladun walahu ukhtun falahā niṣfu mā taraka wahuwa yarithuhā in lam yakun lahā waladun fa-in kānatā ithnatayni falahumā l-thuluthāni mimmā taraka wa-in kānū ikhwatan rijālan wanisāʾan falildhakari mithlu ḥaẓẓi l-unthayayni yubayyinu Allāhu lakum an taḍillū wallāhu bikulli shayin ʿalīmun
ayahs.5:1: yāʾayyuhā alladhīna āmanū awfū bil-ʿuqūdi uḥillat lakum bahīmatu l-anʿāmi illā mā yutlā ʿalaykum ghayra muḥillī l-ṣaydi wa-antum ḥurumun inna Allāha yaḥkumu mā yurīdu
ayahs.5:2: yāʾayyuhā alladhīna āmanū lā tuḥillū shaʿāira Allāhi walā l-shahra l-ḥarāma walā l-hadya walā l-qalāida walā āmmīna l-bayta l-ḥarāma yabtaghūna faḍlan min rabbihim wariḍwānan wa-idhā ḥalaltum fa-iṣṭādū walā yajrimannakum shanaʾānu qawmin an ṣaddūkum ʿani l-masjidi l-ḥarāmi an taʿtadū wataʿāwanū ʿalā l-biri wal-taqwā walā taʿāwanū ʿalā l-ithmi wal-ʿudwāni wa-ittaqū Allāha inna Allāha shadīdu l-ʿiqābi
ayahs.5:3: ḥurrimat ʿalaykumu l-maytatu wal-damu walaḥmu l-khinzīri wamā uhilla lighayri Allāhi bihi wal-munkhaniqatu wal-mawqūdhatu wal-mutaradiyatu wal-naṭīḥatu wamā akala l-sabuʿu illā mā dhakkaytum wamā dhubiḥa ʿalā l-nuṣubi wa-an tastaqsimū bil-azlāmi dhālikum fisqun l-yawma ya-isa alladhīna kafarū min dīnikum falā takhshawhum wa-ikhshawni l-yawma akmaltu lakum dīnakum wa-atmamtu ʿalaykum niʿmatī waraḍītu lakumu l-islāma dīnan famani uḍṭurra fī makhmaṣatin ghayra mutajānifin li-ithmin fa-inna Allāha ghafūrun raḥīmun
ayahs.5:4: yasalūnaka mādhā uḥilla lahum qul uḥilla lakumu l-ṭayibātu wamā ʿallamtum mina l-jawāriḥi mukallibīna tuʿallimūnahunna mimmā ʿallamakumu Allāhu fakulū mimmā amsakna ʿalaykum wa-udhkurū isma Allāhi ʿalayhi wa-ittaqū Allāha inna Allāha sarīʿu l-ḥisābi
ayahs.5:5: al-yawma uḥilla lakumu l-ṭayibātu waṭaʿāmu alladhīna ūtū l-kitāba ḥillun lakum waṭaʿāmukum ḥillun lahum wal-muḥṣanātu mina l-muʾmināti wal-muḥṣanātu mina alladhīna ūtū l-kitāba min qablikum idhā ātaytumūhunna ujūrahunna muḥṣinīna ghayra musāfiḥīna walā muttakhidhī akhdānin waman yakfur bil-īmāni faqad ḥabiṭa ʿamaluhu wahuwa fī l-ākhirati mina l-khāsirīna
ayahs.5:6: yāʾayyuhā alladhīna āmanū idhā qumtum ilā l-ṣalati fa-ighsilū wujūhakum wa-aydiyakum ilā l-marāfiqi wa-imsaḥū biruʾūsikum wa-arjulakum ilā l-kaʿbayni wa-in kuntum junuban fa-iṭṭahharū wa-in kuntum marḍā aw ʿalā safarin aw jāʾa aḥadun minkum mina l-ghāiṭi aw lāmastumu l-nisāʾa falam tajidū māʾan fatayammamū ṣaʿīdan ṭayyiban fa-imsaḥū biwujūhikum wa-aydīkum minhu mā yurīdu Allāhu liyajʿala ʿalaykum min ḥarajin walākin yurīdu liyuṭahhirakum waliyutimma niʿmatahu ʿalaykum laʿallakum tashkurūna
ayahs.5:7: wa-udhkurū niʿmata Allāhi ʿalaykum wamīthāqahu alladhī wāthaqakum bihi idh qultum samiʿnā wa-aṭaʿnā wa-ittaqū Allāha inna Allāha ʿalīmun bidhāti l-ṣudūri
ayahs.5:8: yāʾayyuhā alladhīna āmanū kūnū qawwāmīna lillāhi shuhadāʾa bil-qisṭi walā yajrimannakum shanaʾānu qawmin ʿalā allā taʿdilū iʿdilū huwa aqrabu lilttaqwā wa-ittaqū Allāha inna Allāha khabīrun bimā taʿmalūna
ayahs.5:9: waʿada Allāhu alladhīna āmanū waʿamilū l-ṣāliḥāti lahum maghfiratun wa-ajrun ʿaẓīmun
ayahs.5:10: wa-alladhīna kafarū wakadhabū biāyātinā ulāika aṣḥābu l-jaḥīmi
ayahs.5:11: yāʾayyuhā alladhīna āmanū udhkurū niʿmata Allāhi ʿalaykum idh hamma qawmun an yabsuṭū ilaykum aydiyahum fakaffa aydiyahum ʿankum wa-ittaqū Allāha waʿalā Allāhi falyatawakkali l-muʾminūna
ayahs.5:12: walaqad akhadha Allāhu mīthāqa banī isrāīla wabaʿathnā minhumu ithnay ʿashara naqīban waqāla Allāhu innī maʿakum la-in aqamtumu l-ṣalata waʾātaytumu l-zakata waʾāmantum birusulī waʿazzartumūhum wa-aqraḍtumu Allāha qarḍan ḥasanan la-ukaffiranna ʿankum sayyiātikum wala-udkhilannakum jannātin tajrī min taḥtihā l-anhāru faman kafara baʿda dhālika minkum faqad ḍalla sawāʾa l-sabīli
ayahs.5:13: fabimā naqḍihim mīthāqahum laʿannāhum wajaʿalnā qulūbahum qāsiyatan yuḥarrifūna l-kalima ʿan mawāḍiʿihi wanasū ḥaẓẓan mimmā dhukkirū bihi walā tazālu taṭṭaliʿu ʿalā khāinatin minhum illā qalīlan minhum fa-uʿfu ʿanhum wa-iṣfaḥ inna Allāha yuḥibbu l-muḥsinīna
ayahs.5:14: wamina alladhīna qālū innā naṣārā akhadhnā mīthāqahum fanasū ḥaẓẓan mimmā dhukkirū bihi fa-aghraynā baynahumu l-ʿadāwata wal-baghḍāʾa ilā yawmi l-qiyāmati wasawfa yunabbi-uhumu Allāhu bimā kānū yaṣnaʿūna
ayahs.5:15: yāʾahla l-kitābi qad jāʾakum rasūlunā yubayyinu lakum kathīran mimmā kuntum tukhfūna mina l-kitābi wayaʿfū ʿan kathīrin qad jāʾakum mina Allāhi nūrun wakitābun mubīnun
ayahs.5:16: yahdī bihi Allāhu mani ittabaʿa riḍwānahu subula l-salāmi wayukhrijuhum mina l-ẓulumāti ilā l-nūri bi-idhnihi wayahdīhim ilā ṣirāṭin mustaqīmin
ayahs.5:17: laqad kafara alladhīna qālū inna Allāha huwa l-masīḥu ubnu maryama qul faman yamliku mina Allāhi shayan in arāda an yuhlika l-masīḥa ibna maryama wa-ummahu waman fī l-arḍi jamīʿan walillahi mulku l-samāwāti wal-arḍi wamā baynahumā yakhluqu mā yashāu wallāhu ʿalā kulli shayin qadīrun
ayahs.5:18: waqālati l-yahūdu wal-naṣārā naḥnu abnāu Allāhi wa-aḥibbāuhu qul falima yuʿadhibukum bidhunūbikum bal antum basharun mimman khalaqa yaghfiru liman yashāu wayuʿadhibu man yashāu walillahi mulku l-samāwāti wal-arḍi wamā baynahumā wa-ilayhi l-maṣīru
ayahs.5:19: yāʾahla l-kitābi qad jāʾakum rasūlunā yubayyinu lakum ʿalā fatratin mina l-rusuli an taqūlū mā jāʾanā min bashīrin walā nadhīrin faqad jāʾakum bashīrun wanadhīrun wallāhu ʿalā kulli shayin qadīrun
ayahs.5:20: wa-idh qāla mūsā liqawmihi yāqawmi udhkurū niʿmata Allāhi ʿalaykum idh jaʿala fīkum anbiyāʾa wajaʿalakum mulūkan waʾātākum mā lam yuʾti aḥadan mina l-ʿālamīna
ayahs.5:21: yāqawmi udkhulū l-arḍa l-muqadasata allatī kataba Allāhu lakum walā tartaddū ʿalā adbārikum fatanqalibū khāsirīna
ayahs.5:22: qālū yāmūsā inna fīhā qawman jabbārīna wa-innā lan nadkhulahā ḥattā yakhrujū minhā fa-in yakhrujū minhā fa-innā dākhilūna
ayahs.5:23: qāla rajulāni mina alladhīna yakhāfūna anʿama Allāhu ʿalayhimā udkhulū ʿalayhimu l-bāba fa-idhā dakhaltumūhu fa-innakum ghālibūna waʿalā Allāhi fatawakkalū in kuntum muʾminīna
ayahs.5:24: qālū yāmūsā innā lan nadkhulahā abadan mā dāmū fīhā fa-idhhab anta warabbuka faqātilā innā hāhunā qāʿidūna
ayahs.5:25: qāla rabbi innī lā amliku illā nafsī wa-akhī fa-ufruq baynanā wabayna l-qawmi l-fāsiqīna
ayahs.5:26: qāla fa-innahā muḥarramatun ʿalayhim arbaʿīna sanatan yatīhūna fī l-arḍi falā tasa ʿalā l-qawmi l-fāsiqīna
ayahs.5:27: wa-utlu ʿalayhim naba-a ibnay ādama bil-ḥaqi idh qarrabā qurbānan fatuqubbila min aḥadihimā walam yutaqabbal mina l-ākhari qāla la-aqtulannaka qāla innamā yataqabbalu Allāhu mina l-mutaqīna
ayahs.5:28: la-in basaṭta ilayya yadaka litaqtulanī mā anā bibāsiṭin yadiya ilayka li-aqtulaka innī akhāfu Allāha rabba l-ʿālamīna
ayahs.5:29: innī urīdu an tabūa bi-ithmī wa-ithmika fatakūna min aṣḥābi l-nāri wadhālika jazāu l-ẓālimīna
ayahs.5:30: faṭawwaʿat lahu nafsuhu qatla akhīhi faqatalahu fa-aṣbaḥa mina l-khāsirīna
ayahs.5:31: fabaʿatha Allāhu ghurāban yabḥathu fī l-arḍi liyuriyahu kayfa yuwārī sawata akhīhi qāla yāwaylatā aʿajaztu an akūna mithla hādhā l-ghurābi fa-uwāriya sawata akhī fa-aṣbaḥa mina l-nādimīna
ayahs.5:32: min ajli dhālika katabnā ʿalā banī isrāīla annahu man qatala nafsan bighayri nafsin aw fasādin fī l-arḍi faka-annamā qatala l-nāsa jamīʿan waman aḥyāhā faka-annamā aḥyā l-nāsa jamīʿan walaqad jāʾathum rusulunā bil-bayināti thumma inna kathīran minhum baʿda dhālika fī l-arḍi lamusrifūna
ayahs.5:33: innamā jazāu alladhīna yuḥāribūna Allāha warasūlahu wayasʿawna fī l-arḍi fasādan an yuqattalū aw yuṣallabū aw tuqaṭṭaʿa aydīhim wa-arjuluhum min khilāfin aw yunfaw mina l-arḍi dhālika lahum khizyun fī l-dunyā walahum fī l-ākhirati ʿadhābun ʿaẓīmun
ayahs.5:34: illā alladhīna tābū min qabli an taqdirū ʿalayhim fa-iʿlamū anna Allāha ghafūrun raḥīmun
ayahs.5:35: yāʾayyuhā alladhīna āmanū ittaqū Allāha wa-ibtaghū ilayhi l-wasīlata wajāhidū fī sabīlihi laʿallakum tufliḥūna
ayahs.5:36: inna alladhīna kafarū law anna lahum mā fī l-arḍi jamīʿan wamithlahu maʿahu liyaftadū bihi min ʿadhābi yawmi l-qiyāmati mā tuqubbila minhum walahum ʿadhābun alīmun
ayahs.5:37: yurīdūna an yakhrujū mina l-nāri wamā hum bikhārijīna minhā walahum ʿadhābun muqīmun
ayahs.5:38: wal-sāriqu wal-sāriqatu fa-iqṭaʿū aydiyahumā jazāʾan bimā kasabā nakālan mina Allāhi wallāhu ʿazīzun ḥakīmun
ayahs.5:39: faman tāba min baʿdi ẓulmihi wa-aṣlaḥa fa-inna Allāha yatūbu ʿalayhi inna Allāha ghafūrun raḥīmun
ayahs.5:40: alam taʿlam anna Allāha lahu mulku l-samāwāti wal-arḍi yuʿadhibu man yashāu wayaghfiru liman yashāu wallāhu ʿalā kulli shayin qadīrun
ayahs.5:41: yāʾayyuhā l-rasūlu lā yaḥzunka alladhīna yusāriʿūna fī l-kufri mina alladhīna qālū āmannā bi-afwāhihim walam tuʾmin qulūbuhum wamina alladhīna hādū sammāʿūna lilkadhibi sammāʿūna liqawmin ākharīna lam yatūka yuḥarrifūna l-kalima min baʿdi mawāḍiʿihi yaqūlūna in ūtītum hādhā fakhudhūhu wa-in lam tuʾtawhu fa-iḥdharū waman yuridi Allāhu fitnatahu falan tamlika lahu mina Allāhi shayan ulāika alladhīna lam yuridi Allāhu an yuṭahhira qulūbahum lahum fī l-dunyā khizyun walahum fī l-ākhirati ʿadhābun ʿaẓīmun
ayahs.5:42: sammāʿūna lilkadhibi akkālūna lilssuḥti fa-in jāūka fa-uḥkum baynahum aw aʿriḍ ʿanhum wa-in tuʿriḍ ʿanhum falan yaḍurrūka shayan wa-in ḥakamta fa-uḥkum baynahum bil-qisṭi inna Allāha yuḥibbu l-muqsiṭīna
ayahs.5:43: wakayfa yuḥakkimūnaka waʿindahumu l-tawrātu fīhā ḥukmu Allāhi thumma yatawallawna min baʿdi dhālika wamā ulāika bil-muʾminīna
ayahs.5:44: innā anzalnā l-tawrāta fīhā hudan wanūrun yaḥkumu bihā l-nabiyūna alladhīna aslamū lilladhīna hādū wal-rabāniyūna wal-aḥbāru bimā ustuḥfiẓū min kitābi Allāhi wakānū ʿalayhi shuhadāʾa falā takhshawū l-nāsa wa-ikhshawni walā tashtarū biāyātī thamanan qalīlan waman lam yaḥkum bimā anzala Allāhu fa-ulāika humu l-kāfirūna
ayahs.5:45: wakatabnā ʿalayhim fīhā anna l-nafsa bil-nafsi wal-ʿayna bil-ʿayni wal-anfa bil-anfi wal-udhuna bil-udhuni wal-sina bil-sini wal-jurūḥa qiṣāṣun faman taṣaddaqa bihi fahuwa kaffāratun lahu waman lam yaḥkum bimā anzala Allāhu fa-ulāika humu l-ẓālimūna
ayahs.5:46: waqaffaynā ʿalā āthārihim biʿīsā ibni maryama muṣaddiqan limā bayna yadayhi mina l-tawrāti waʾātaynāhu l-injīla fīhi hudan wanūrun wamuṣaddiqan limā bayna yadayhi mina l-tawrāti wahudan wamawʿiẓatan lilmuttaqīna
ayahs.5:47: walyaḥkum ahlu l-injīli bimā anzala Allāhu fīhi waman lam yaḥkum bimā anzala Allāhu fa-ulāika humu l-fāsiqūna
ayahs.5:48: wa-anzalnā ilayka l-kitāba bil-ḥaqi muṣaddiqan limā bayna yadayhi mina l-kitābi wamuhayminan ʿalayhi fa-uḥkum baynahum bimā anzala Allāhu walā tattabiʿ ahwāʾahum ʿammā jāʾaka mina l-ḥaqi likullin jaʿalnā minkum shirʿatan waminhājan walaw shāʾa Allāhu lajaʿalakum ummatan wāḥidatan walākin liyabluwakum fī mā ātākum fa-istabiqū l-khayrāti ilā Allāhi marjiʿukum jamīʿan fayunabbi-ukum bimā kuntum fīhi takhtalifūna
ayahs.5:49: wa-ani uḥkum baynahum bimā anzala Allāhu walā tattabiʿ ahwāʾahum wa-iḥdharhum an yaftinūka ʿan baʿḍi mā anzala Allāhu ilayka fa-in tawallaw fa-iʿlam annamā yurīdu Allāhu an yuṣībahum bibaʿḍi dhunūbihim wa-inna kathīran mina l-nāsi lafāsiqūna
ayahs.5:50: afaḥukma l-jāhiliyati yabghūna waman aḥsanu mina Allāhi ḥukman liqawmin yūqinūna
ayahs.5:51: yāʾayyuhā alladhīna āmanū lā tattakhidhū l-yahūda wal-naṣārā awliyāʾa baʿḍuhum awliyāu baʿḍin waman yatawallahum minkum fa-innahu minhum inna Allāha lā yahdī l-qawma l-ẓālimīna
ayahs.5:52: fatarā alladhīna fī qulūbihim maraḍun yusāriʿūna fīhim yaqūlūna nakhshā an tuṣībanā dāiratun faʿasā Allāhu an yatiya bil-fatḥi aw amrin min ʿindihi fayuṣbiḥū ʿalā mā asarrū fī anfusihim nādimīna
ayahs.5:53: wayaqūlu alladhīna āmanū ahāulāi alladhīna aqsamū billāhi jahda aymānihim innahum lamaʿakum ḥabiṭat aʿmāluhum fa-aṣbaḥū khāsirīna
ayahs.5:54: yāʾayyuhā alladhīna āmanū man yartadda minkum ʿan dīnihi fasawfa yatī Allāhu biqawmin yuḥibbuhum wayuḥibbūnahu adhillatin ʿalā l-muʾminīna aʿizzatin ʿalā l-kāfirīna yujāhidūna fī sabīli Allāhi walā yakhāfūna lawmata lāimin dhālika faḍlu Allāhi yuʾtīhi man yashāu wallāhu wāsiʿun ʿalīmun
ayahs.5:55: innamā waliyyukumu Allāhu warasūluhu wa-alladhīna āmanū alladhīna yuqīmūna l-ṣalata wayuʾtūna l-zakata wahum rākiʿūna
ayahs.5:56: waman yatawalla Allāha warasūlahu wa-alladhīna āmanū fa-inna ḥizba Allāhi humu l-ghālibūna
ayahs.5:57: yāʾayyuhā alladhīna āmanū lā tattakhidhū alladhīna ittakhadhū dīnakum huzuwan walaʿiban mina alladhīna ūtū l-kitāba min qablikum wal-kufāra awliyāʾa wa-ittaqū Allāha in kuntum muʾminīna
ayahs.5:58: wa-idhā nādaytum ilā l-ṣalati ittakhadhūhā huzuwan walaʿiban dhālika bi-annahum qawmun lā yaʿqilūna
ayahs.5:59: qul yāʾahla l-kitābi hal tanqimūna minnā illā an āmannā billāhi wamā unzila ilaynā wamā unzila min qablu wa-anna aktharakum fāsiqūna
ayahs.5:60: qul hal unabbi-ukum bisharrin min dhālika mathūbatan ʿinda Allāhi man laʿanahu Allāhu waghaḍiba ʿalayhi wajaʿala minhumu l-qiradata wal-khanāzīra waʿabada l-ṭāghūta ulāika sharrun makānan wa-aḍallu ʿan sawāi l-sabīli
ayahs.5:61: wa-idhā jāūkum qālū āmannā waqad dakhalū bil-kufri wahum qad kharajū bihi wallāhu aʿlamu bimā kānū yaktumūna
ayahs.5:62: watarā kathīran minhum yusāriʿūna fī l-ithmi wal-ʿudwāni wa-aklihimu l-suḥta labiʾsa mā kānū yaʿmalūna
ayahs.5:63: lawlā yanhāhumu l-rabāniyūna wal-aḥbāru ʿan qawlihimu l-ithma wa-aklihimu l-suḥta labiʾsa mā kānū yaṣnaʿūna
ayahs.5:64: waqālati l-yahūdu yadu Allāhi maghlūlatun ghullat aydīhim waluʿinū bimā qālū bal yadāhu mabsūṭatāni yunfiqu kayfa yashāu walayazīdanna kathīran minhum mā unzila ilayka min rabbika ṭughyānan wakufran wa-alqaynā baynahumu l-ʿadāwata wal-baghḍāʾa ilā yawmi l-qiyāmati kullamā awqadū nāran lilḥarbi aṭfa-ahā Allāhu wayasʿawna fī l-arḍi fasādan wallāhu lā yuḥibbu l-mufsidīna
ayahs.5:65: walaw anna ahla l-kitābi āmanū wa-ittaqaw lakaffarnā ʿanhum sayyiātihim wala-adkhalnāhum jannāti l-naʿīmi
ayahs.5:66: walaw annahum aqāmū l-tawrāta wal-injīla wamā unzila ilayhim min rabbihim la-akalū min fawqihim wamin taḥti arjulihim minhum ummatun muqtaṣidatun wakathīrun minhum sāʾa mā yaʿmalūna
ayahs.5:67: yāʾayyuhā l-rasūlu balligh mā unzila ilayka min rabbika wa-in lam tafʿal famā ballaghta risālatahu wallāhu yaʿṣimuka mina l-nāsi inna Allāha lā yahdī l-qawma l-kāfirīna
ayahs.5:68: qul yāʾahla l-kitābi lastum ʿalā shayin ḥattā tuqīmū l-tawrāta wal-injīla wamā unzila ilaykum min rabbikum walayazīdanna kathīran minhum mā unzila ilayka min rabbika ṭughyānan wakufran falā tasa ʿalā l-qawmi l-kāfirīna
ayahs.5:69: inna alladhīna āmanū wa-alladhīna hādū wal-ṣābiūna wal-naṣārā man āmana billāhi wal-yawmi l-ākhiri waʿamila ṣāliḥan falā khawfun ʿalayhim walā hum yaḥzanūna
ayahs.5:70: laqad akhadhnā mīthāqa banī isrāīla wa-arsalnā ilayhim rusulan kullamā jāʾahum rasūlun bimā lā tahwā anfusuhum farīqan kadhabū wafarīqan yaqtulūna
ayahs.5:71: waḥasibū allā takūna fitnatun faʿamū waṣammū thumma tāba Allāhu ʿalayhim thumma ʿamū waṣammū kathīrun minhum wallāhu baṣīrun bimā yaʿmalūna
ayahs.5:72: laqad kafara alladhīna qālū inna Allāha huwa l-masīḥu ubnu maryama waqāla l-masīḥu yābanī isrāīla uʿbudū Allāha rabbī warabbakum innahu man yushrik billāhi faqad ḥarrama Allāhu ʿalayhi l-janata wamawāhu l-nāru wamā lilẓẓālimīna min anṣārin
ayahs.5:73: laqad kafara alladhīna qālū inna Allāha thālithu thalāthatin wamā min ilāhin illā ilāhun wāḥidun wa-in lam yantahū ʿammā yaqūlūna layamassanna alladhīna kafarū minhum ʿadhābun alīmun
ayahs.5:74: afalā yatūbūna ilā Allāhi wayastaghfirūnahu wallāhu ghafūrun raḥīmun
ayahs.5:75: mā l-masīḥu ubnu maryama illā rasūlun qad khalat min qablihi l-rusulu wa-ummuhu ṣiddīqatun kānā yakulāni l-ṭaʿāma unẓur kayfa nubayyinu lahumu l-āyāti thumma unẓur annā yuʾfakūna
ayahs.5:76: qul ataʿbudūna min dūni Allāhi mā lā yamliku lakum ḍarran walā nafʿan wallāhu huwa l-samīʿu l-ʿalīmu
ayahs.5:77: qul yāʾahla l-kitābi lā taghlū fī dīnikum ghayra l-ḥaqi walā tattabiʿū ahwāʾa qawmin qad ḍallū min qablu wa-aḍallū kathīran waḍallū ʿan sawāi l-sabīli
ayahs.5:78: luʿina alladhīna kafarū min banī isrāīla ʿalā lisāni dāwūda waʿīsā ibni maryama dhālika bimā ʿaṣaw wakānū yaʿtadūna
ayahs.5:79: kānū lā yatanāhawna ʿan munkarin faʿalūhu labiʾsa mā kānū yafʿalūna
ayahs.5:80: tarā kathīran minhum yatawallawna alladhīna kafarū labiʾsa mā qaddamat lahum anfusuhum an sakhiṭa Allāhu ʿalayhim wafī l-ʿadhābi hum khālidūna
ayahs.5:81: walaw kānū yuʾminūna billāhi wal-nabiyi wamā unzila ilayhi mā ittakhadhūhum awliyāʾa walākinna kathīran minhum fāsiqūna
ayahs.5:82: latajidanna ashadda l-nāsi ʿadāwatan lilladhīna āmanū l-yahūda wa-alladhīna ashrakū walatajidanna aqrabahum mawaddatan lilladhīna āmanū alladhīna qālū innā naṣārā dhālika bi-anna minhum qissīsīna waruhbānan wa-annahum lā yastakbirūna
ayahs.5:83: wa-idhā samiʿū mā unzila ilā l-rasūli tarā aʿyunahum tafīḍu mina l-damʿi mimmā ʿarafū mina l-ḥaqi yaqūlūna rabbanā āmannā fa-uktubnā maʿa l-shāhidīna
ayahs.5:84: wamā lanā lā nuʾminu billāhi wamā jāʾanā mina l-ḥaqi wanaṭmaʿu an yudkhilanā rabbunā maʿa l-qawmi l-ṣāliḥīna
ayahs.5:85: fa-athābahumu Allāhu bimā qālū jannātin tajrī min taḥtihā l-anhāru khālidīna fīhā wadhālika jazāu l-muḥsinīna
ayahs.5:86: wa-alladhīna kafarū wakadhabū biāyātinā ulāika aṣḥābu l-jaḥīmi
ayahs.5:87: yāʾayyuhā alladhīna āmanū lā tuḥarrimū ṭayyibāti mā aḥalla Allāhu lakum walā taʿtadū inna Allāha lā yuḥibbu l-muʿtadīna
ayahs.5:88: wakulū mimmā razaqakumu Allāhu ḥalālan ṭayyiban wa-ittaqū Allāha alladhī antum bihi muʾminūna
ayahs.5:89: lā yuākhidhukumu Allāhu bil-laghwi fī aymānikum walākin yuākhidhukum bimā ʿaqqadttumu l-aymāna fakaffāratuhu iṭʿāmu ʿasharati masākīna min awsaṭi mā tuṭʿimūna ahlīkum aw kiswatuhum aw taḥrīru raqabatin faman lam yajid faṣiyāmu thalāthati ayyāmin dhālika kaffāratu aymānikum idhā ḥalaftum wa-iḥfaẓū aymānakum kadhālika yubayyinu Allāhu lakum āyātihi laʿallakum tashkurūna
ayahs.5:90: yāʾayyuhā alladhīna āmanū innamā l-khamru wal-maysiru wal-anṣābu wal-azlāmu rijsun min ʿamali l-shayṭāni fa-ijtanibūhu laʿallakum tufliḥūna
ayahs.5:91: innamā yurīdu l-shayṭānu an yūqiʿa baynakumu l-ʿadāwata wal-baghḍāʾa fī l-khamri wal-maysiri wayaṣuddakum ʿan dhikri Allāhi waʿani l-ṣalati fahal antum muntahūna
ayahs.5:92: wa-aṭīʿū Allāha wa-aṭīʿū l-rasūla wa-iḥdharū fa-in tawallaytum fa-iʿlamū annamā ʿalā rasūlinā l-balāghu l-mubīnu
ayahs.5:93: laysa ʿalā alladhīna āmanū waʿamilū l-ṣāliḥāti junāḥun fīmā ṭaʿimū idhā mā ittaqaw waʾāmanū waʿamilū l-ṣāliḥāti thumma ittaqaw waʾāmanū thumma ittaqaw wa-aḥsanū wallāhu yuḥibbu l-muḥsinīna
ayahs.5:94: yāʾayyuhā alladhīna āmanū layabluwannakumu Allāhu bishayin mina l-ṣaydi tanāluhu aydīkum warimāḥukum liyaʿlama Allāhu man yakhāfuhu bil-ghaybi famani iʿtadā baʿda dhālika falahu ʿadhābun alīmun
ayahs.5:95: yāʾayyuhā alladhīna āmanū lā taqtulū l-ṣayda wa-antum ḥurumun waman qatalahu minkum mutaʿammidan fajazāon mithlu mā qatala mina l-naʿami yaḥkumu bihi dhawā ʿadlin minkum hadyan bāligha l-kaʿbati aw kaffāratun ṭaʿāmu masākīna aw ʿadlu dhālika ṣiyāman liyadhūqa wabāla amrihi ʿafā Allāhu ʿammā salafa waman ʿāda fayantaqimu Allāhu minhu wallāhu ʿazīzun dhū intiqāmin
ayahs.5:96: uḥilla lakum ṣaydu l-baḥri waṭaʿāmuhu matāʿan lakum walilssayyārati waḥurrima ʿalaykum ṣaydu l-bari mā dumtum ḥuruman wa-ittaqū Allāha alladhī ilayhi tuḥsharūna
ayahs.5:97: jaʿala Allāhu l-kaʿbata l-bayta l-ḥarāma qiyāman lilnnāsi wal-shahra l-ḥarāma wal-hadya wal-qalāida dhālika litaʿlamū anna Allāha yaʿlamu mā fī l-samāwāti wamā fī l-arḍi wa-anna Allāha bikulli shayin ʿalīmun
ayahs.5:98: iʿlamū anna Allāha shadīdu l-ʿiqābi wa-anna Allāha ghafūrun raḥīmun
ayahs.5:99: mā ʿalā l-rasūli illā l-balāghu wallāhu yaʿlamu mā tubdūna wamā taktumūna
ayahs.5:100: qul lā yastawī l-khabīthu wal-ṭayibu walaw aʿjabaka kathratu l-khabīthi fa-ittaqū Allāha yāulī l-albābi laʿallakum tufliḥūna
ayahs.5:101: yāʾayyuhā alladhīna āmanū lā tasalū ʿan ashyāʾa in tubda lakum tasuʾkum wa-in tasalū ʿanhā ḥīna yunazzalu l-qurānu tubda lakum ʿafā Allāhu ʿanhā wallāhu ghafūrun ḥalīmun
ayahs.5:102: qad sa-alahā qawmun min qablikum thumma aṣbaḥū bihā kāfirīna
ayahs.5:103: mā jaʿala Allāhu min baḥīratin walā sāibatin walā waṣīlatin walā ḥāmin walākinna alladhīna kafarū yaftarūna ʿalā Allāhi l-kadhiba wa-aktharuhum lā yaʿqilūna
ayahs.5:104: wa-idhā qīla lahum taʿālaw ilā mā anzala Allāhu wa-ilā l-rasūli qālū ḥasbunā mā wajadnā ʿalayhi ābāʾanā awalaw kāna ābāuhum lā yaʿlamūna shayan walā yahtadūna
ayahs.5:105: yāʾayyuhā alladhīna āmanū ʿalaykum anfusakum lā yaḍurrukum man ḍalla idhā ihtadaytum ilā Allāhi marjiʿukum jamīʿan fayunabbi-ukum bimā kuntum taʿmalūna
ayahs.5:106: yāʾayyuhā alladhīna āmanū shahādatu baynikum idhā ḥaḍara aḥadakumu l-mawtu ḥīna l-waṣiyati ithnāni dhawā ʿadlin minkum aw ākharāni min ghayrikum in antum ḍarabtum fī l-arḍi fa-aṣābatkum muṣībatu l-mawti taḥbisūnahumā min baʿdi l-ṣalati fayuqsimāni billāhi ini irtabtum lā nashtarī bihi thamanan walaw kāna dhā qurbā walā naktumu shahādata Allāhi innā idhan lamina l-āthimīna
ayahs.5:107: fa-in ʿuthira ʿalā annahumā istaḥaqqā ithman faʾākharāni yaqūmāni maqāmahumā mina alladhīna istaḥaqqa ʿalayhimu l-awlayāni fayuqsimāni billāhi lashahādatunā aḥaqqu min shahādatihimā wamā iʿtadaynā innā idhan lamina l-ẓālimīna
ayahs.5:108: dhālika adnā an yatū bil-shahādati ʿalā wajhihā aw yakhāfū an turadda aymānun baʿda aymānihim wa-ittaqū Allāha wa-ismaʿū wallāhu lā yahdī l-qawma l-fāsiqīna
ayahs.5:109: yawma yajmaʿu Allāhu l-rusula fayaqūlu mādhā ujibtum qālū lā ʿilma lanā innaka anta ʿallāmu l-ghuyūbi
ayahs.5:110: idh qāla Allāhu yāʿīsā ibna maryama udhkur niʿmatī ʿalayka waʿalā wālidatika idh ayyadttuka birūḥi l-qudusi tukallimu l-nāsa fī l-mahdi wakahlan wa-idh ʿallamtuka l-kitāba wal-ḥikmata wal-tawrāta wal-injīla wa-idh takhluqu mina l-ṭīni kahayati l-ṭayri bi-idhnī fatanfukhu fīhā fatakūnu ṭayran bi-idhnī watubri-u l-akmaha wal-abraṣa bi-idhnī wa-idh tukhriju l-mawtā bi-idhnī wa-idh kafaftu banī isrāīla ʿanka idh jiʾtahum bil-bayināti faqāla alladhīna kafarū minhum in hādhā illā siḥrun mubīnun
ayahs.5:111: wa-idh awḥaytu ilā l-ḥawāriyīna an āminū bī wabirasūlī qālū āmannā wa-ishhad bi-annanā muslimūna
ayahs.5:112: idh qāla l-ḥawāriyūna yāʿīsā ibna maryama hal yastaṭīʿu rabbuka an yunazzila ʿalaynā māidatan mina l-samāi qāla ittaqū Allāha in kuntum muʾminīna
ayahs.5:113: qālū nurīdu an nakula minhā wataṭma-inna qulūbunā wanaʿlama an qad ṣadaqtanā wanakūna ʿalayhā mina l-shāhidīna
ayahs.5:114: qāla ʿīsā ubnu maryama Allāhumma rabbanā anzil ʿalaynā māidatan mina l-samāi takūnu lanā ʿīdan li-awwalinā waʾākhirinā waʾāyatan minka wa-urzuqnā wa-anta khayru l-rāziqīna
ayahs.5:115: qāla Allāhu innī munazziluhā ʿalaykum faman yakfur baʿdu minkum fa-innī uʿadhibuhu ʿadhāban lā uʿadhibuhu aḥadan mina l-ʿālamīna
ayahs.5:116: wa-idh qāla Allāhu yāʿīsā ibna maryama a-anta qulta lilnnāsi ittakhidhūnī wa-ummiya ilāhayni min dūni Allāhi qāla subḥānaka mā yakūnu lī an aqūla mā laysa lī biḥaqqin in kuntu qultuhu faqad ʿalimtahu taʿlamu mā fī nafsī walā aʿlamu mā fī nafsika innaka anta ʿallāmu l-ghuyūbi
ayahs.5:117: mā qultu lahum illā mā amartanī bihi ani uʿbudū Allāha rabbī warabbakum wakuntu ʿalayhim shahīdan mā dumtu fīhim falammā tawaffaytanī kunta anta l-raqība ʿalayhim wa-anta ʿalā kulli shayin shahīdun
ayahs.5:118: in tuʿadhibhum fa-innahum ʿibāduka wa-in taghfir lahum fa-innaka anta l-ʿazīzu l-ḥakīmu
ayahs.5:119: qāla Allāhu hādhā yawmu yanfaʿu l-ṣādiqīna ṣidquhum lahum jannātun tajrī min taḥtihā l-anhāru khālidīna fīhā abadan raḍiya Allāhu ʿanhum waraḍū ʿanhu dhālika l-fawzu l-ʿaẓīmu
ayahs.5:120: lillāhi mulku l-samāwāti wal-arḍi wamā fīhinna wahuwa ʿalā kulli shayin qadīrun
ayahs.6:1: al-ḥamdu lillāhi alladhī khalaqa l-samāwāti wal-arḍa wajaʿala l-ẓulumāti wal-nūra thumma alladhīna kafarū birabbihim yaʿdilūna
ayahs.6:2: huwa alladhī khalaqakum min ṭīnin thumma qaḍā ajalan wa-ajalun musamman ʿindahu thumma antum tamtarūna
ayahs.6:3: wahuwa Allāhu fī l-samāwāti wafī l-arḍi yaʿlamu sirrakum wajahrakum wayaʿlamu mā taksibūna
ayahs.6:4: wamā tatīhim min āyatin min āyāti rabbihim illā kānū ʿanhā muʿriḍīna
ayahs.6:5: faqad kadhabū bil-ḥaqi lammā jāʾahum fasawfa yatīhim anbāu mā kānū bihi yastahziūna
ayahs.6:6: alam yaraw kam ahlaknā min qablihim min qarnin makkannāhum fī l-arḍi mā lam numakkin lakum wa-arsalnā l-samāʾa ʿalayhim midrāran wajaʿalnā l-anhāra tajrī min taḥtihim fa-ahlaknāhum bidhunūbihim wa-anshanā min baʿdihim qarnan ākharīna
ayahs.6:7: walaw nazzalnā ʿalayka kitāban fī qirṭāsin falamasūhu bi-aydīhim laqāla alladhīna kafarū in hādhā illā siḥrun mubīnun
ayahs.6:8: waqālū lawlā unzila ʿalayhi malakun walaw anzalnā malakan laquḍiya l-amru thumma lā yunẓarūna
ayahs.6:9: walaw jaʿalnāhu malakan lajaʿalnāhu rajulan walalabasnā ʿalayhim mā yalbisūna
ayahs.6:10: walaqadi ustuhzi-a birusulin min qablika faḥāqa bi-alladhīna sakhirū minhum mā kānū bihi yastahziūna
ayahs.6:11: qul sīrū fī l-arḍi thumma unẓurū kayfa kāna ʿāqibatu l-mukadhibīna
ayahs.6:12: qul liman mā fī l-samāwāti wal-arḍi qul lillāhi kataba ʿalā nafsihi l-raḥmata layajmaʿannakum ilā yawmi l-qiyāmati lā rayba fīhi alladhīna khasirū anfusahum fahum lā yuʾminūna
ayahs.6:13: walahu mā sakana fī al-layli wal-nahāri wahuwa l-samīʿu l-ʿalīmu
ayahs.6:14: qul aghayra Allāhi attakhidhu waliyyan fāṭiri l-samāwāti wal-arḍi wahuwa yuṭʿimu walā yuṭʿamu qul innī umirtu an akūna awwala man aslama walā takūnanna mina l-mushrikīna
ayahs.6:15: qul innī akhāfu in ʿaṣaytu rabbī ʿadhāba yawmin ʿaẓīmin
ayahs.6:16: man yuṣraf ʿanhu yawma-idhin faqad raḥimahu wadhālika l-fawzu l-mubīnu
ayahs.6:17: wa-in yamsaska Allāhu biḍurrin falā kāshifa lahu illā huwa wa-in yamsaska bikhayrin fahuwa ʿalā kulli shayin qadīrun
ayahs.6:18: wahuwa l-qāhiru fawqa ʿibādihi wahuwa l-ḥakīmu l-khabīru
ayahs.6:19: qul ayyu shayin akbaru shahādatan quli Allāhu shahīdun baynī wabaynakum waūḥiya ilayya hādhā l-qurānu li-undhirakum bihi waman balagha a-innakum latashhadūna anna maʿa Allāhi ālihatan ukhrā qul lā ashhadu qul innamā huwa ilāhun wāḥidun wa-innanī barīon mimmā tushrikūna
ayahs.6:20: alladhīna ātaynāhumu l-kitāba yaʿrifūnahu kamā yaʿrifūna abnāʾahumu alladhīna khasirū anfusahum fahum lā yuʾminūna
ayahs.6:21: waman aẓlamu mimmani iftarā ʿalā Allāhi kadhiban aw kadhaba biāyātihi innahu lā yufliḥu l-ẓālimūna
ayahs.6:22: wayawma naḥshuruhum jamīʿan thumma naqūlu lilladhīna ashrakū ayna shurakāukumu alladhīna kuntum tazʿumūna
ayahs.6:23: thumma lam takun fitnatuhum illā an qālū wallāhi rabbinā mā kunnā mushrikīna
ayahs.6:24: unẓur kayfa kadhabū ʿalā anfusihim waḍalla ʿanhum mā kānū yaftarūna
ayahs.6:25: waminhum man yastamiʿu ilayka wajaʿalnā ʿalā qulūbihim akinnatan an yafqahūhu wafī ādhānihim waqran wa-in yaraw kulla āyatin lā yuʾminū bihā ḥattā idhā jāūka yujādilūnaka yaqūlu alladhīna kafarū in hādhā illā asāṭīru l-awalīna
ayahs.6:26: wahum yanhawna ʿanhu wayanawna ʿanhu wa-in yuhlikūna illā anfusahum wamā yashʿurūna
ayahs.6:27: walaw tarā idh wuqifū ʿalā l-nāri faqālū yālaytanā nuraddu walā nukadhiba biāyāti rabbinā wanakūna mina l-muʾminīna
ayahs.6:28: bal badā lahum mā kānū yukhfūna min qablu walaw ruddū laʿādū limā nuhū ʿanhu wa-innahum lakādhibūna
ayahs.6:29: waqālū in hiya illā ḥayātunā l-dunyā wamā naḥnu bimabʿūthīna
ayahs.6:30: walaw tarā idh wuqifū ʿalā rabbihim qāla alaysa hādhā bil-ḥaqi qālū balā warabbinā qāla fadhūqū l-ʿadhāba bimā kuntum takfurūna
ayahs.6:31: qad khasira alladhīna kadhabū biliqāi Allāhi ḥattā idhā jāʾathumu l-sāʿatu baghtatan qālū yāḥasratanā ʿalā mā farraṭnā fīhā wahum yaḥmilūna awzārahum ʿalā ẓuhūrihim alā sāʾa mā yazirūna
ayahs.6:32: wamā l-ḥayatu l-dunyā illā laʿibun walahwun walalddāru l-ākhiratu khayrun lilladhīna yattaqūna afalā taʿqilūna
ayahs.6:33: qad naʿlamu innahu layaḥzunuka alladhī yaqūlūna fa-innahum lā yukadhibūnaka walākinna l-ẓālimīna biāyāti Allāhi yajḥadūna
ayahs.6:34: walaqad kudhibat rusulun min qablika faṣabarū ʿalā mā kudhibū waūdhū ḥattā atāhum naṣrunā walā mubaddila likalimāti Allāhi walaqad jāʾaka min naba-i l-mursalīna
ayahs.6:35: wa-in kāna kabura ʿalayka iʿrāḍuhum fa-ini istaṭaʿta an tabtaghiya nafaqan fī l-arḍi aw sullaman fī l-samāi fatatiyahum biāyatin walaw shāʾa Allāhu lajamaʿahum ʿalā l-hudā falā takūnanna mina l-jāhilīna
ayahs.6:36: innamā yastajību alladhīna yasmaʿūna wal-mawtā yabʿathuhumu Allāhu thumma ilayhi yurjaʿūna
ayahs.6:37: waqālū lawlā nuzzila ʿalayhi āyatun min rabbihi qul inna Allāha qādirun ʿalā an yunazzila āyatan walākinna aktharahum lā yaʿlamūna
ayahs.6:38: wamā min dābbatin fī l-arḍi walā ṭāirin yaṭīru bijanāḥayhi illā umamun amthālukum mā farraṭnā fī l-kitābi min shayin thumma ilā rabbihim yuḥsharūna
ayahs.6:39: wa-alladhīna kadhabū biāyātinā ṣummun wabukmun fī l-ẓulumāti man yasha-i Allāhu yuḍlilhu waman yasha yajʿalhu ʿalā ṣirāṭin mustaqīmin
ayahs.6:40: qul ara-aytakum in atākum ʿadhābu Allāhi aw atatkumu l-sāʿatu aghayra Allāhi tadʿūna in kuntum ṣādiqīna
ayahs.6:41: bal iyyāhu tadʿūna fayakshifu mā tadʿūna ilayhi in shāʾa watansawna mā tushrikūna
ayahs.6:42: walaqad arsalnā ilā umamin min qablika fa-akhadhnāhum bil-basāi wal-ḍarāi laʿallahum yataḍarraʿūna
ayahs.6:43: falawlā idh jāʾahum basunā taḍarraʿū walākin qasat qulūbuhum wazayyana lahumu l-shayṭānu mā kānū yaʿmalūna
ayahs.6:44: falammā nasū mā dhukkirū bihi fataḥnā ʿalayhim abwāba kulli shayin ḥattā idhā fariḥū bimā ūtū akhadhnāhum baghtatan fa-idhā hum mublisūna
ayahs.6:45: faquṭiʿa dābiru l-qawmi alladhīna ẓalamū wal-ḥamdu lillāhi rabbi l-ʿālamīna
ayahs.6:46: qul ara-aytum in akhadha Allāhu samʿakum wa-abṣārakum wakhatama ʿalā qulūbikum man ilāhun ghayru Allāhi yatīkum bihi unẓur kayfa nuṣarrifu l-āyāti thumma hum yaṣdifūna
ayahs.6:47: qul ara-aytakum in atākum ʿadhābu Allāhi baghtatan aw jahratan hal yuhlaku illā l-qawmu l-ẓālimūna
ayahs.6:48: wamā nursilu l-mursalīna illā mubashirīna wamundhirīna faman āmana wa-aṣlaḥa falā khawfun ʿalayhim walā hum yaḥzanūna
ayahs.6:49: wa-alladhīna kadhabū biāyātinā yamassuhumu l-ʿadhābu bimā kānū yafsuqūna
ayahs.6:50: qul lā aqūlu lakum ʿindī khazāinu Allāhi walā aʿlamu l-ghayba walā aqūlu lakum innī malakun in attabiʿu illā mā yūḥā ilayya qul hal yastawī l-aʿmā wal-baṣīru afalā tatafakkarūna
ayahs.6:51: wa-andhir bihi alladhīna yakhāfūna an yuḥsharū ilā rabbihim laysa lahum min dūnihi waliyyun walā shafīʿun laʿallahum yattaqūna
ayahs.6:52: walā taṭrudi alladhīna yadʿūna rabbahum bil-ghadati wal-ʿashiyi yurīdūna wajhahu mā ʿalayka min ḥisābihim min shayin wamā min ḥisābika ʿalayhim min shayin fataṭrudahum fatakūna mina l-ẓālimīna
ayahs.6:53: wakadhālika fatannā baʿḍahum bibaʿḍin liyaqūlū ahāulāi manna Allāhu ʿalayhim min bayninā alaysa Allāhu bi-aʿlama bil-shākirīna
ayahs.6:54: wa-idhā jāʾaka alladhīna yuʾminūna biāyātinā faqul salāmun ʿalaykum kataba rabbukum ʿalā nafsihi l-raḥmata annahu man ʿamila minkum sūan bijahālatin thumma tāba min baʿdihi wa-aṣlaḥa fa-annahu ghafūrun raḥīmun
ayahs.6:55: wakadhālika nufaṣṣilu l-āyāti walitastabīna sabīlu l-mujrimīna
ayahs.6:56: qul innī nuhītu an aʿbuda alladhīna tadʿūna min dūni Allāhi qul lā attabiʿu ahwāʾakum qad ḍalaltu idhan wamā anā mina l-muhtadīna
ayahs.6:57: qul innī ʿalā bayyinatin min rabbī wakadhabtum bihi mā ʿindī mā tastaʿjilūna bihi ini l-ḥukmu illā lillāhi yaquṣṣu l-ḥaqa wahuwa khayru l-fāṣilīna
ayahs.6:58: qul law anna ʿindī mā tastaʿjilūna bihi laquḍiya l-amru baynī wabaynakum wallāhu aʿlamu bil-ẓālimīna
ayahs.6:59: waʿindahu mafātiḥu l-ghaybi lā yaʿlamuhā illā huwa wayaʿlamu mā fī l-bari wal-baḥri wamā tasquṭu min waraqatin illā yaʿlamuhā walā ḥabbatin fī ẓulumāti l-arḍi walā raṭbin walā yābisin illā fī kitābin mubīnin
ayahs.6:60: wahuwa alladhī yatawaffākum bi-al-layli wayaʿlamu mā jaraḥtum bil-nahāri thumma yabʿathukum fīhi liyuqḍā ajalun musamman thumma ilayhi marjiʿukum thumma yunabbi-ukum bimā kuntum taʿmalūna
ayahs.6:61: wahuwa l-qāhiru fawqa ʿibādihi wayursilu ʿalaykum ḥafaẓatan ḥattā idhā jāʾa aḥadakumu l-mawtu tawaffathu rusulunā wahum lā yufarriṭūna
ayahs.6:62: thumma ruddū ilā Allāhi mawlāhumu l-ḥaqi alā lahu l-ḥukmu wahuwa asraʿu l-ḥāsibīna
ayahs.6:63: qul man yunajjīkum min ẓulumāti l-bari wal-baḥri tadʿūnahu taḍarruʿan wakhufyatan la-in anjānā min hādhihi lanakūnanna mina l-shākirīna
ayahs.6:64: quli Allāhu yunajjīkum minhā wamin kulli karbin thumma antum tushrikūna
ayahs.6:65: qul huwa l-qādiru ʿalā an yabʿatha ʿalaykum ʿadhāban min fawqikum aw min taḥti arjulikum aw yalbisakum shiyaʿan wayudhīqa baʿḍakum basa baʿḍin unẓur kayfa nuṣarrifu l-āyāti laʿallahum yafqahūna
ayahs.6:66: wakadhaba bihi qawmuka wahuwa l-ḥaqu qul lastu ʿalaykum biwakīlin
ayahs.6:68: wa-idhā ra-ayta alladhīna yakhūḍūna fī āyātinā fa-aʿriḍ ʿanhum ḥattā yakhūḍū fī ḥadīthin ghayrihi wa-immā yunsiyannaka l-shayṭānu falā taqʿud baʿda l-dhikrā maʿa l-qawmi l-ẓālimīna
ayahs.6:69: wamā ʿalā alladhīna yattaqūna min ḥisābihim min shayin walākin dhikrā laʿallahum yattaqūna
ayahs.6:70: wadhari alladhīna ittakhadhū dīnahum laʿiban walahwan wagharrathumu l-ḥayatu l-dunyā wadhakkir bihi an tubsala nafsun bimā kasabat laysa lahā min dūni Allāhi waliyyun walā shafīʿun wa-in taʿdil kulla ʿadlin lā yuʾkhadh minhā ulāika alladhīna ubsilū bimā kasabū lahum sharābun min ḥamīmin waʿadhābun alīmun bimā kānū yakfurūna
ayahs.6:71: qul anadʿū min dūni Allāhi mā lā yanfaʿunā walā yaḍurrunā wanuraddu ʿalā aʿqābinā baʿda idh hadānā Allāhu ka-alladhī istahwathu l-shayāṭīnu fī l-arḍi ḥayrāna lahu aṣḥābun yadʿūnahu ilā l-hudā iʾtinā qul inna hudā Allāhi huwa l-hudā wa-umirnā linuslima lirabbi l-ʿālamīna
ayahs.6:72: wa-an aqīmū l-ṣalata wa-ittaqūhu wahuwa alladhī ilayhi tuḥsharūna
ayahs.6:73: wahuwa alladhī khalaqa l-samāwāti wal-arḍa bil-ḥaqi wayawma yaqūlu kun fayakūnu qawluhu l-ḥaqu walahu l-mulku yawma yunfakhu fī l-ṣūri ʿālimu l-ghaybi wal-shahādati wahuwa l-ḥakīmu l-khabīru
ayahs.6:74: wa-idh qāla ibrāhīmu li-abīhi āzara atattakhidhu aṣnāman ālihatan innī arāka waqawmaka fī ḍalālin mubīnin
ayahs.6:75: wakadhālika nurī ibrāhīma malakūta l-samāwāti wal-arḍi waliyakūna mina l-mūqinīna
ayahs.6:76: falammā janna ʿalayhi al-laylu raʾā kawkaban qāla hādhā rabbī falammā afala qāla lā uḥibbu l-āfilīna
ayahs.6:77: falammā raʾā l-qamara bāzighan qāla hādhā rabbī falammā afala qāla la-in lam yahdinī rabbī la-akūnanna mina l-qawmi l-ḍālīna
ayahs.6:78: falammā raʾā l-shamsa bāzighatan qāla hādhā rabbī hādhā akbaru falammā afalat qāla yāqawmi innī barīon mimmā tushrikūna
ayahs.6:79: innī wajjahtu wajhiya lilladhī faṭara l-samāwāti wal-arḍa ḥanīfan wamā anā mina l-mushrikīna
ayahs.6:80: waḥājjahu qawmuhu qāla atuḥājjūnnī fī Allāhi waqad hadāni walā akhāfu mā tushrikūna bihi illā an yashāʾa rabbī shayan wasiʿa rabbī kulla shayin ʿilman afalā tatadhakkarūna
ayahs.6:81: wakayfa akhāfu mā ashraktum walā takhāfūna annakum ashraktum billāhi mā lam yunazzil bihi ʿalaykum sulṭānan fa-ayyu l-farīqayni aḥaqqu bil-amni in kuntum taʿlamūna
ayahs.6:82: alladhīna āmanū walam yalbisū īmānahum biẓulmin ulāika lahumu l-amnu wahum muhtadūna
ayahs.6:83: watilka ḥujjatunā ātaynāhā ibrāhīma ʿalā qawmihi narfaʿu darajātin man nashāu inna rabbaka ḥakīmun ʿalīmun
ayahs.6:84: wawahabnā lahu isḥāqa wayaʿqūba kullan hadaynā wanūḥan hadaynā min qablu wamin dhurriyyatihi dāwūda wasulaymāna wa-ayyūba wayūsufa wamūsā wahārūna wakadhālika najzī l-muḥsinīna
ayahs.6:85: wazakariyyā wayaḥyā waʿīsā wa-ilyāsa kullun mina l-ṣāliḥīna
ayahs.6:86: wa-ismāʿīla wal-yasaʿa wayūnusa walūṭan wakullan faḍḍalnā ʿalā l-ʿālamīna
ayahs.6:87: wamin ābāihim wadhurriyyātihim wa-ikhwānihim wa-ijtabaynāhum wahadaynāhum ilā ṣirāṭin mustaqīmin
ayahs.6:88: dhālika hudā Allāhi yahdī bihi man yashāu min ʿibādihi walaw ashrakū laḥabiṭa ʿanhum mā kānū yaʿmalūna
ayahs.6:89: ulāika alladhīna ātaynāhumu l-kitāba wal-ḥukma wal-nubuwata fa-in yakfur bihā hāulāi faqad wakkalnā bihā qawman laysū bihā bikāfirīna
ayahs.6:90: ulāika alladhīna hadā Allāhu fabihudāhumu iqtadih qul lā asalukum ʿalayhi ajran in huwa illā dhikrā lilʿālamīna
ayahs.6:91: wamā qadarū Allāha ḥaqqa qadrihi idh qālū mā anzala Allāhu ʿalā basharin min shayin qul man anzala l-kitāba alladhī jāʾa bihi mūsā nūran wahudan lilnnāsi tajʿalūnahu qarāṭīsa tubdūnahā watukhfūna kathīran waʿullimtum mā lam taʿlamū antum walā ābāukum quli Allāhu thumma dharhum fī khawḍihim yalʿabūna
ayahs.6:92: wahādhā kitābun anzalnāhu mubārakun muṣaddiqu alladhī bayna yadayhi walitundhira umma l-qurā waman ḥawlahā wa-alladhīna yuʾminūna bil-ākhirati yuʾminūna bihi wahum ʿalā ṣalātihim yuḥāfiẓūna
ayahs.6:93: waman aẓlamu mimmani iftarā ʿalā Allāhi kadhiban aw qāla ūḥiya ilayya walam yūḥa ilayhi shayon waman qāla sa-unzilu mithla mā anzala Allāhu walaw tarā idhi l-ẓālimūna fī ghamarāti l-mawti wal-malāikatu bāsiṭū aydīhim akhrijū anfusakumu l-yawma tujzawna ʿadhāba l-hūni bimā kuntum taqūlūna ʿalā Allāhi ghayra l-ḥaqi wakuntum ʿan āyātihi tastakbirūna
ayahs.6:94: walaqad jiʾtumūnā furādā kamā khalaqnākum awwala marratin wataraktum mā khawwalnākum warāʾa ẓuhūrikum wamā narā maʿakum shufaʿāʾakumu alladhīna zaʿamtum annahum fīkum shurakāu laqad taqaṭṭaʿa baynakum waḍalla ʿankum mā kuntum tazʿumūna
ayahs.6:95: inna Allāha fāliqu l-ḥabi wal-nawā yukhriju l-ḥaya mina l-mayiti wamukhriju l-mayiti mina l-ḥayi dhālikumu Allāhu fa-annā tuʾfakūna
ayahs.6:96: fāliqu l-iṣbāḥi wajaʿala al-layla sakanan wal-shamsa wal-qamara ḥusbānan dhālika taqdīru l-ʿazīzi l-ʿalīmi
ayahs.6:97: wahuwa alladhī jaʿala lakumu l-nujūma litahtadū bihā fī ẓulumāti l-bari wal-baḥri qad faṣṣalnā l-āyāti liqawmin yaʿlamūna
ayahs.6:98: wahuwa alladhī ansha-akum min nafsin wāḥidatin famustaqarrun wamustawdaʿun qad faṣṣalnā l-āyāti liqawmin yafqahūna
ayahs.6:99: wahuwa alladhī anzala mina l-samāi māʾan fa-akhrajnā bihi nabāta kulli shayin fa-akhrajnā minhu khaḍiran nukhriju minhu ḥabban mutarākiban wamina l-nakhli min ṭalʿihā qinwānun dāniyatun wajannātin min aʿnābin wal-zaytūna wal-rumāna mushtabihan waghayra mutashābihin unẓurū ilā thamarihi idhā athmara wayanʿihi inna fī dhālikum laʾāyātin liqawmin yuʾminūna
ayahs.6:100: wajaʿalū lillāhi shurakāʾa l-jina wakhalaqahum wakharaqū lahu banīna wabanātin bighayri ʿilmin subḥānahu wataʿālā ʿammā yaṣifūna
ayahs.6:101: badīʿu l-samāwāti wal-arḍi annā yakūnu lahu waladun walam takun lahu ṣāḥibatun wakhalaqa kulla shayin wahuwa bikulli shayin ʿalīmun
ayahs.6:102: dhālikumu Allāhu rabbukum lā ilāha illā huwa khāliqu kulli shayin fa-uʿbudūhu wahuwa ʿalā kulli shayin wakīlun
ayahs.6:103: lā tudrikuhu l-abṣāru wahuwa yudriku l-abṣāra wahuwa l-laṭīfu l-khabīru
ayahs.6:104: qad jāʾakum baṣāiru min rabbikum faman abṣara falinafsihi waman ʿamiya faʿalayhā wamā anā ʿalaykum biḥafīẓin
ayahs.6:105: wakadhālika nuṣarrifu l-āyāti waliyaqūlū darasta walinubayyinahu liqawmin yaʿlamūna
ayahs.6:106: ittabiʿ mā ūḥiya ilayka min rabbika lā ilāha illā huwa wa-aʿriḍ ʿani l-mushrikīna
ayahs.6:107: walaw shāʾa Allāhu mā ashrakū wamā jaʿalnāka ʿalayhim ḥafīẓan wamā anta ʿalayhim biwakīlin
ayahs.6:108: walā tasubbū alladhīna yadʿūna min dūni Allāhi fayasubbū Allāha ʿadwan bighayri ʿilmin kadhālika zayyannā likulli ummatin ʿamalahum thumma ilā rabbihim marjiʿuhum fayunabbi-uhum bimā kānū yaʿmalūna
ayahs.6:109: wa-aqsamū billāhi jahda aymānihim la-in jāʾathum āyatun layuʾminunna bihā qul innamā l-āyātu ʿinda Allāhi wamā yushʿirukum annahā idhā jāʾat lā yuʾminūna
ayahs.6:110: wanuqallibu afidatahum wa-abṣārahum kamā lam yuʾminū bihi awwala marratin wanadharuhum fī ṭughyānihim yaʿmahūna
ayahs.6:111: walaw annanā nazzalnā ilayhimu l-malāikata wakallamahumu l-mawtā waḥasharnā ʿalayhim kulla shayin qubulan mā kānū liyuʾminū illā an yashāʾa Allāhu walākinna aktharahum yajhalūna
ayahs.6:112: wakadhālika jaʿalnā likulli nabiyyin ʿaduwwan shayāṭīna l-insi wal-jini yūḥī baʿḍuhum ilā baʿḍin zukhrufa l-qawli ghurūran walaw shāʾa rabbuka mā faʿalūhu fadharhum wamā yaftarūna
ayahs.6:113: walitaṣghā ilayhi afidatu alladhīna lā yuʾminūna bil-ākhirati waliyarḍawhu waliyaqtarifū mā hum muqtarifūna
ayahs.6:114: afaghayra Allāhi abtaghī ḥakaman wahuwa alladhī anzala ilaykumu l-kitāba mufaṣṣalan wa-alladhīna ātaynāhumu l-kitāba yaʿlamūna annahu munazzalun min rabbika bil-ḥaqi falā takūnanna mina l-mumtarīna
ayahs.6:115: watammat kalimatu rabbika ṣidqan waʿadlan lā mubaddila likalimātihi wahuwa l-samīʿu l-ʿalīmu
ayahs.6:116: wa-in tuṭiʿ akthara man fī l-arḍi yuḍillūka ʿan sabīli Allāhi in yattabiʿūna illā l-ẓana wa-in hum illā yakhruṣūna
ayahs.6:117: inna rabbaka huwa aʿlamu man yaḍillu ʿan sabīlihi wahuwa aʿlamu bil-muhtadīna
ayahs.6:118: fakulū mimmā dhukira usmu Allāhi ʿalayhi in kuntum biāyātihi muʾminīna
ayahs.6:119: wamā lakum allā takulū mimmā dhukira usmu Allāhi ʿalayhi waqad faṣṣala lakum mā ḥarrama ʿalaykum illā mā uḍṭurirtum ilayhi wa-inna kathīran layuḍillūna bi-ahwāihim bighayri ʿilmin inna rabbaka huwa aʿlamu bil-muʿtadīna
ayahs.6:120: wadharū ẓāhira l-ithmi wabāṭinahu inna alladhīna yaksibūna l-ithma sayujzawna bimā kānū yaqtarifūna
ayahs.6:121: walā takulū mimmā lam yudhkari usmu Allāhi ʿalayhi wa-innahu lafisqun wa-inna l-shayāṭīna layūḥūna ilā awliyāihim liyujādilūkum wa-in aṭaʿtumūhum innakum lamushrikūna
ayahs.6:122: awaman kāna maytan fa-aḥyaynāhu wajaʿalnā lahu nūran yamshī bihi fī l-nāsi kaman mathaluhu fī l-ẓulumāti laysa bikhārijin minhā kadhālika zuyyina lilkāfirīna mā kānū yaʿmalūna
ayahs.6:123: wakadhālika jaʿalnā fī kulli qaryatin akābira mujrimīhā liyamkurū fīhā wamā yamkurūna illā bi-anfusihim wamā yashʿurūna
ayahs.6:124: wa-idhā jāʾathum āyatun qālū lan nuʾmina ḥattā nuʾtā mithla mā ūtiya rusulu Allāhi Allāhu aʿlamu ḥaythu yajʿalu risālatahu sayuṣību alladhīna ajramū ṣaghārun ʿinda Allāhi waʿadhābun shadīdun bimā kānū yamkurūna
ayahs.6:125: faman yuridi Allāhu an yahdiyahu yashraḥ ṣadrahu lilislāmi waman yurid an yuḍillahu yajʿal ṣadrahu ḍayyiqan ḥarajan ka-annamā yaṣṣaʿʿadu fī l-samāi kadhālika yajʿalu Allāhu l-rijsa ʿalā alladhīna lā yuʾminūna
ayahs.6:126: wahādhā ṣirāṭu rabbika mustaqīman qad faṣṣalnā l-āyāti liqawmin yadhakkarūna
ayahs.6:127: lahum dāru l-salāmi ʿinda rabbihim wahuwa waliyyuhum bimā kānū yaʿmalūna
ayahs.6:128: wayawma yaḥshuruhum jamīʿan yāmaʿshara l-jini qadi istakthartum mina l-insi waqāla awliyāuhum mina l-insi rabbanā istamtaʿa baʿḍunā bibaʿḍin wabalaghnā ajalanā alladhī ajjalta lanā qāla l-nāru mathwākum khālidīna fīhā illā mā shāʾa Allāhu inna rabbaka ḥakīmun ʿalīmun
ayahs.6:129: wakadhālika nuwallī baʿḍa l-ẓālimīna baʿḍan bimā kānū yaksibūna
ayahs.6:130: yāmaʿshara l-jini wal-insi alam yatikum rusulun minkum yaquṣṣūna ʿalaykum āyātī wayundhirūnakum liqāʾa yawmikum hādhā qālū shahidnā ʿalā anfusinā wagharrathumu l-ḥayatu l-dunyā washahidū ʿalā anfusihim annahum kānū kāfirīna
ayahs.6:131: dhālika an lam yakun rabbuka muhlika l-qurā biẓulmin wa-ahluhā ghāfilūna
ayahs.6:132: walikullin darajātun mimmā ʿamilū wamā rabbuka bighāfilin ʿammā yaʿmalūna
ayahs.6:133: warabbuka l-ghaniyu dhū l-raḥmati in yasha yudhhibkum wayastakhlif min baʿdikum mā yashāu kamā ansha-akum min dhurriyyati qawmin ākharīna
ayahs.6:134: inna mā tūʿadūna laʾātin wamā antum bimuʿjizīna
ayahs.6:135: qul yāqawmi iʿmalū ʿalā makānatikum innī ʿāmilun fasawfa taʿlamūna man takūnu lahu ʿāqibatu l-dāri innahu lā yufliḥu l-ẓālimūna
ayahs.6:136: wajaʿalū lillāhi mimmā dhara-a mina l-ḥarthi wal-anʿāmi naṣīban faqālū hādhā lillāhi bizaʿmihim wahādhā lishurakāinā famā kāna lishurakāihim falā yaṣilu ilā Allāhi wamā kāna lillāhi fahuwa yaṣilu ilā shurakāihim sāʾa mā yaḥkumūna
ayahs.6:137: wakadhālika zayyana likathīrin mina l-mushrikīna qatla awlādihim shurakāuhum liyurdūhum waliyalbisū ʿalayhim dīnahum walaw shāʾa Allāhu mā faʿalūhu fadharhum wamā yaftarūna
ayahs.6:138: waqālū hādhihi anʿāmun waḥarthun ḥijrun lā yaṭʿamuhā illā man nashāu bizaʿmihim wa-anʿāmun ḥurrimat ẓuhūruhā wa-anʿāmun lā yadhkurūna isma Allāhi ʿalayhā iftirāʾan ʿalayhi sayajzīhim bimā kānū yaftarūna
ayahs.6:139: waqālū mā fī buṭūni hādhihi l-anʿāmi khāliṣatun lidhukūrinā wamuḥarramun ʿalā azwājinā wa-in yakun maytatan fahum fīhi shurakāu sayajzīhim waṣfahum innahu ḥakīmun ʿalīmun
ayahs.6:140: qad khasira alladhīna qatalū awlādahum safahan bighayri ʿilmin waḥarramū mā razaqahumu Allāhu iftirāʾan ʿalā Allāhi qad ḍallū wamā kānū muhtadīna
ayahs.6:141: wahuwa alladhī ansha-a jannātin maʿrūshātin waghayra maʿrūshātin wal-nakhla wal-zarʿa mukhtalifan ukuluhu wal-zaytūna wal-rumāna mutashābihan waghayra mutashābihin kulū min thamarihi idhā athmara waʾātū ḥaqqahu yawma ḥaṣādihi walā tusrifū innahu lā yuḥibbu l-musrifīna
ayahs.6:142: wamina l-anʿāmi ḥamūlatan wafarshan kulū mimmā razaqakumu Allāhu walā tattabiʿū khuṭuwāti l-shayṭāni innahu lakum ʿaduwwun mubīnun
ayahs.6:143: thamāniyata azwājin mina l-ḍani ithnayni wamina l-maʿzi ithnayni qul āldhakarayni ḥarrama ami l-unthayayni ammā ishtamalat ʿalayhi arḥāmu l-unthayayni nabbiūnī biʿilmin in kuntum ṣādiqīna
ayahs.6:144: wamina l-ibili ithnayni wamina l-baqari ithnayni qul āldhakarayni ḥarrama ami l-unthayayni ammā ishtamalat ʿalayhi arḥāmu l-unthayayni am kuntum shuhadāʾa idh waṣṣākumu Allāhu bihādhā faman aẓlamu mimmani iftarā ʿalā Allāhi kadhiban liyuḍilla l-nāsa bighayri ʿilmin inna Allāha lā yahdī l-qawma l-ẓālimīna
ayahs.6:145: qul lā ajidu fī mā ūḥiya ilayya muḥarraman ʿalā ṭāʿimin yaṭʿamuhu illā an yakūna maytatan aw daman masfūḥan aw laḥma khinzīrin fa-innahu rijsun aw fisqan uhilla lighayri Allāhi bihi famani uḍṭurra ghayra bāghin walā ʿādin fa-inna rabbaka ghafūrun raḥīmun
ayahs.6:146: waʿalā alladhīna hādū ḥarramnā kulla dhī ẓufurin wamina l-baqari wal-ghanami ḥarramnā ʿalayhim shuḥūmahumā illā mā ḥamalat ẓuhūruhumā awi l-ḥawāyā aw mā ikhtalaṭa biʿaẓmin dhālika jazaynāhum bibaghyihim wa-innā laṣādiqūna
ayahs.6:147: fa-in kadhabūka faqul rabbukum dhū raḥmatin wāsiʿatin walā yuraddu basuhu ʿani l-qawmi l-mujrimīna
ayahs.6:148: sayaqūlu alladhīna ashrakū law shāʾa Allāhu mā ashraknā walā ābāunā walā ḥarramnā min shayin kadhālika kadhaba alladhīna min qablihim ḥattā dhāqū basanā qul hal ʿindakum min ʿilmin fatukhrijūhu lanā in tattabiʿūna illā l-ẓana wa-in antum illā takhruṣūna
ayahs.6:149: qul falillahi l-ḥujatu l-bālighatu falaw shāʾa lahadākum ajmaʿīna
ayahs.6:150: qul halumma shuhadāʾakumu alladhīna yashhadūna anna Allāha ḥarrama hādhā fa-in shahidū falā tashhad maʿahum walā tattabiʿ ahwāʾa alladhīna kadhabū biāyātinā wa-alladhīna lā yuʾminūna bil-ākhirati wahum birabbihim yaʿdilūna
ayahs.6:151: qul taʿālaw atlu mā ḥarrama rabbukum ʿalaykum allā tushrikū bihi shayan wabil-wālidayni iḥsānan walā taqtulū awlādakum min imlāqin naḥnu narzuqukum wa-iyyāhum walā taqrabū l-fawāḥisha mā ẓahara minhā wamā baṭana walā taqtulū l-nafsa allatī ḥarrama Allāhu illā bil-ḥaqi dhālikum waṣṣākum bihi laʿallakum taʿqilūna
ayahs.6:152: walā taqrabū māla l-yatīmi illā bi-allatī hiya aḥsanu ḥattā yablugha ashuddahu wa-awfū l-kayla wal-mīzāna bil-qisṭi lā nukallifu nafsan illā wusʿahā wa-idhā qultum fa-iʿdilū walaw kāna dhā qurbā wabiʿahdi Allāhi awfū dhālikum waṣṣākum bihi laʿallakum tadhakkarūna
ayahs.6:153: wa-anna hādhā ṣirāṭī mustaqīman fa-ittabiʿūhu walā tattabiʿū l-subula fatafarraqa bikum ʿan sabīlihi dhālikum waṣṣākum bihi laʿallakum tattaqūna
ayahs.6:154: thumma ātaynā mūsā l-kitāba tamāman ʿalā alladhī aḥsana watafṣīlan likulli shayin wahudan waraḥmatan laʿallahum biliqāi rabbihim yuʾminūna
ayahs.6:155: wahādhā kitābun anzalnāhu mubārakun fa-ittabiʿūhu wa-ittaqū laʿallakum turḥamūna
ayahs.6:156: an taqūlū innamā unzila l-kitābu ʿalā ṭāifatayni min qablinā wa-in kunnā ʿan dirāsatihim laghāfilīna
ayahs.6:157: aw taqūlū law annā unzila ʿalaynā l-kitābu lakunnā ahdā minhum faqad jāʾakum bayyinatun min rabbikum wahudan waraḥmatun faman aẓlamu mimman kadhaba biāyāti Allāhi waṣadafa ʿanhā sanajzī alladhīna yaṣdifūna ʿan āyātinā sūa l-ʿadhābi bimā kānū yaṣdifūna
ayahs.6:158: hal yanẓurūna illā an tatiyahumu l-malāikatu aw yatiya rabbuka aw yatiya baʿḍu āyāti rabbika yawma yatī baʿḍu āyāti rabbika lā yanfaʿu nafsan īmānuhā lam takun āmanat min qablu aw kasabat fī īmānihā khayran quli intaẓirū innā muntaẓirūna
ayahs.6:159: inna alladhīna farraqū dīnahum wakānū shiyaʿan lasta minhum fī shayin innamā amruhum ilā Allāhi thumma yunabbi-uhum bimā kānū yafʿalūna
ayahs.6:160: man jāʾa bil-ḥasanati falahu ʿashru amthālihā waman jāʾa bil-sayi-ati falā yujzā illā mithlahā wahum lā yuẓlamūna
ayahs.6:161: qul innanī hadānī rabbī ilā ṣirāṭin mustaqīmin dīnan qiyaman millata ibrāhīma ḥanīfan wamā kāna mina l-mushrikīna
ayahs.6:162: qul inna ṣalātī wanusukī wamaḥyāya wamamātī lillāhi rabbi l-ʿālamīna
ayahs.6:163: lā sharīka lahu wabidhālika umirtu wa-anā awwalu l-muslimīna
ayahs.6:164: qul aghayra Allāhi abghī rabban wahuwa rabbu kulli shayin walā taksibu kullu nafsin illā ʿalayhā walā taziru wāziratun wizra ukhrā thumma ilā rabbikum marjiʿukum fayunabbi-ukum bimā kuntum fīhi takhtalifūna
ayahs.6:165: wahuwa alladhī jaʿalakum khalāifa l-arḍi warafaʿa baʿḍakum fawqa baʿḍin darajātin liyabluwakum fī mā ātākum inna rabbaka sarīʿu l-ʿiqābi wa-innahu laghafūrun raḥīmun
ayahs.7:2: kitābun unzila ilayka falā yakun fī ṣadrika ḥarajun minhu litundhira bihi wadhikrā lilmuʾminīna
ayahs.7:3: ittabiʿū mā unzila ilaykum min rabbikum walā tattabiʿū min dūnihi awliyāʾa qalīlan mā tadhakkarūna
ayahs.7:4: wakam min qaryatin ahlaknāhā fajāʾahā basunā bayātan aw hum qāilūna
ayahs.7:5: famā kāna daʿwāhum idh jāʾahum basunā illā an qālū innā kunnā ẓālimīna
ayahs.7:6: falanasalanna alladhīna ursila ilayhim walanasalanna l-mursalīna
ayahs.7:7: falanaquṣṣanna ʿalayhim biʿilmin wamā kunnā ghāibīna
ayahs.7:8: wal-waznu yawma-idhin l-ḥaqu faman thaqulat mawāzīnuhu fa-ulāika humu l-mufliḥūna
ayahs.7:9: waman khaffat mawāzīnuhu fa-ulāika alladhīna khasirū anfusahum bimā kānū biāyātinā yaẓlimūna
ayahs.7:10: walaqad makkannākum fī l-arḍi wajaʿalnā lakum fīhā maʿāyisha qalīlan mā tashkurūna
ayahs.7:11: walaqad khalaqnākum thumma ṣawwarnākum thumma qulnā lilmalāikati usjudū liādama fasajadū illā iblīsa lam yakun mina l-sājidīna
ayahs.7:12: qāla mā manaʿaka allā tasjuda idh amartuka qāla anā khayrun minhu khalaqtanī min nārin wakhalaqtahu min ṭīnin
ayahs.7:13: qāla fa-ihbiṭ minhā famā yakūnu laka an tatakabbara fīhā fa-ukhruj innaka mina l-ṣāghirīna
ayahs.7:16: qāla fabimā aghwaytanī la-aqʿudanna lahum ṣirāṭaka l-mustaqīma
ayahs.7:17: thumma laʾātiyannahum min bayni aydīhim wamin khalfihim waʿan aymānihim waʿan shamāilihim walā tajidu aktharahum shākirīna
ayahs.7:18: qāla ukhruj minhā madhūman madḥūran laman tabiʿaka minhum la-amla-anna jahannama minkum ajmaʿīna
ayahs.7:19: wayāādamu uskun anta wazawjuka l-janata fakulā min ḥaythu shiʾtumā walā taqrabā hādhihi l-shajarata fatakūnā mina l-ẓālimīna
