ayahs.11:59: watilka ʿādun jaḥadū biāyāti rabbihim waʿaṣaw rusulahu wa-ittabaʿū amra kulli jabbārin ʿanīdin
ayahs.11:60: wa-utbiʿū fī hādhihi l-dunyā laʿnatan wayawma l-qiyāmati alā inna ʿādan kafarū rabbahum alā buʿdan liʿādin qawmi hūdin
ayahs.11:61: wa-ilā thamūda akhāhum ṣāliḥan qāla yāqawmi uʿbudū Allāha mā lakum min ilāhin ghayruhu huwa ansha-akum mina l-arḍi wa-istaʿmarakum fīhā fa-istaghfirūhu thumma tūbū ilayhi inna rabbī qarībun mujībun
ayahs.11:62: qālū yāṣāliḥu qad kunta fīnā marjuwwan qabla hādhā atanhānā an naʿbuda mā yaʿbudu ābāunā wa-innanā lafī shakkin mimmā tadʿūnā ilayhi murībin
ayahs.11:63: qāla yāqawmi ara-aytum in kuntu ʿalā bayyinatin min rabbī waʾātānī minhu raḥmatan faman yanṣurunī mina Allāhi in ʿaṣaytuhu famā tazīdūnanī ghayra takhsīrin
ayahs.11:64: wayāqawmi hādhihi nāqatu Allāhi lakum āyatan fadharūhā takul fī arḍi Allāhi walā tamassūhā bisūin fayakhudhakum ʿadhābun qarībun
ayahs.11:65: faʿaqarūhā faqāla tamattaʿū fī dārikum thalāthata ayyāmin dhālika waʿdun ghayru makdhūbin
ayahs.11:66: falammā jāʾa amrunā najjaynā ṣāliḥan wa-alladhīna āmanū maʿahu biraḥmatin minnā wamin khizyi yawmi-idhin inna rabbaka huwa l-qawiyu l-ʿazīzu
ayahs.11:67: wa-akhadha alladhīna ẓalamū l-ṣayḥatu fa-aṣbaḥū fī diyārihim jāthimīna
ayahs.11:68: ka-an lam yaghnaw fīhā alā inna thamūdā kafarū rabbahum alā buʿdan lithamūda
ayahs.11:69: walaqad jāʾat rusulunā ibrāhīma bil-bushrā qālū salāman qāla salāmun famā labitha an jāʾa biʿijlin ḥanīdhin
ayahs.11:70: falammā raʾā aydiyahum lā taṣilu ilayhi nakirahum wa-awjasa minhum khīfatan qālū lā takhaf innā ursilnā ilā qawmi lūṭin
ayahs.11:71: wa-imra-atuhu qāimatun faḍaḥikat fabasharnāhā bi-isḥāqa wamin warāi isḥāqa yaʿqūba
ayahs.11:72: qālat yāwaylatā a-alidu wa-anā ʿajūzun wahādhā baʿlī shaykhan inna hādhā lashayon ʿajībun
ayahs.11:73: qālū ataʿjabīna min amri Allāhi raḥmatu Allāhi wabarakātuhu ʿalaykum ahla l-bayti innahu ḥamīdun majīdun
ayahs.11:74: falammā dhahaba ʿan ibrāhīma l-rawʿu wajāʾathu l-bushrā yujādilunā fī qawmi lūṭin
ayahs.11:76: yāibrāhīmu aʿriḍ ʿan hādhā innahu qad jāʾa amru rabbika wa-innahum ātīhim ʿadhābun ghayru mardūdin
ayahs.11:77: walammā jāʾat rusulunā lūṭan sīa bihim waḍāqa bihim dharʿan waqāla hādhā yawmun ʿaṣībun
ayahs.11:78: wajāʾahu qawmuhu yuhraʿūna ilayhi wamin qablu kānū yaʿmalūna l-sayiāti qāla yāqawmi hāulāi banātī hunna aṭharu lakum fa-ittaqū Allāha walā tukhzūni fī ḍayfī alaysa minkum rajulun rashīdun
ayahs.11:79: qālū laqad ʿalimta mā lanā fī banātika min ḥaqqin wa-innaka lataʿlamu mā nurīdu
ayahs.11:80: qāla law anna lī bikum quwwatan aw āwī ilā ruknin shadīdin
ayahs.11:81: qālū yālūṭu innā rusulu rabbika lan yaṣilū ilayka fa-asri bi-ahlika biqiṭʿin mina al-layli walā yaltafit minkum aḥadun illā imra-ataka innahu muṣībuhā mā aṣābahum inna mawʿidahumu l-ṣubḥu alaysa l-ṣubḥu biqarībin
ayahs.11:82: falammā jāʾa amrunā jaʿalnā ʿāliyahā sāfilahā wa-amṭarnā ʿalayhā ḥijāratan min sijjīlin manḍūdin
ayahs.11:83: musawwamatan ʿinda rabbika wamā hiya mina l-ẓālimīna bibaʿīdin
ayahs.11:84: wa-ilā madyana akhāhum shuʿayban qāla yāqawmi uʿbudū Allāha mā lakum min ilāhin ghayruhu walā tanquṣū l-mikyāla wal-mīzāna innī arākum bikhayrin wa-innī akhāfu ʿalaykum ʿadhāba yawmin muḥīṭin
ayahs.11:85: wayāqawmi awfū l-mikyāla wal-mīzāna bil-qisṭi walā tabkhasū l-nāsa ashyāʾahum walā taʿthaw fī l-arḍi mufsidīna
ayahs.11:86: baqiyyatu Allāhi khayrun lakum in kuntum muʾminīna wamā anā ʿalaykum biḥafīẓin
ayahs.11:87: qālū yāshuʿaybu aṣalatuka tamuruka an natruka mā yaʿbudu ābāunā aw an nafʿala fī amwālinā mā nashāu innaka la-anta l-ḥalīmu l-rashīdu
ayahs.11:88: qāla yāqawmi ara-aytum in kuntu ʿalā bayyinatin min rabbī warazaqanī minhu rizqan ḥasanan wamā urīdu an ukhālifakum ilā mā anhākum ʿanhu in urīdu illā l-iṣlāḥa mā istaṭaʿtu wamā tawfīqī illā billāhi ʿalayhi tawakkaltu wa-ilayhi unību
ayahs.11:89: wayāqawmi lā yajrimannakum shiqāqī an yuṣībakum mithlu mā aṣāba qawma nūḥin aw qawma hūdin aw qawma ṣāliḥin wamā qawmu lūṭin minkum bibaʿīdin
ayahs.11:90: wa-istaghfirū rabbakum thumma tūbū ilayhi inna rabbī raḥīmun wadūdun
ayahs.11:91: qālū yāshuʿaybu mā nafqahu kathīran mimmā taqūlu wa-innā lanarāka fīnā ḍaʿīfan walawlā rahṭuka larajamnāka wamā anta ʿalaynā biʿazīzin
ayahs.11:92: qāla yāqawmi arahṭī aʿazzu ʿalaykum mina Allāhi wa-ittakhadhtumūhu warāʾakum ẓihriyyan inna rabbī bimā taʿmalūna muḥīṭun
ayahs.11:93: wayāqawmi iʿmalū ʿalā makānatikum innī ʿāmilun sawfa taʿlamūna man yatīhi ʿadhābun yukhzīhi waman huwa kādhibun wa-irtaqibū innī maʿakum raqībun
ayahs.11:94: walammā jāʾa amrunā najjaynā shuʿayban wa-alladhīna āmanū maʿahu biraḥmatin minnā wa-akhadhati alladhīna ẓalamū l-ṣayḥatu fa-aṣbaḥū fī diyārihim jāthimīna
ayahs.11:95: ka-an lam yaghnaw fīhā alā buʿdan limadyana kamā baʿidat thamūdu
ayahs.11:96: walaqad arsalnā mūsā biāyātinā wasulṭānin mubīnin
ayahs.11:97: ilā firʿawna wamala-ihi fa-ittabaʿū amra firʿawna wamā amru firʿawna birashīdin
ayahs.11:98: yaqdumu qawmahu yawma l-qiyāmati fa-awradahumu l-nāra wabiʾsa l-wirdu l-mawrūdu
ayahs.11:99: wa-utbiʿū fī hādhihi laʿnatan wayawma l-qiyāmati biʾsa l-rifdu l-marfūdu
ayahs.11:100: dhālika min anbāi l-qurā naquṣṣuhu ʿalayka minhā qāimun waḥaṣīdun
ayahs.11:101: wamā ẓalamnāhum walākin ẓalamū anfusahum famā aghnat ʿanhum ālihatuhumu allatī yadʿūna min dūni Allāhi min shayin lammā jāʾa amru rabbika wamā zādūhum ghayra tatbībin
ayahs.11:102: wakadhālika akhdhu rabbika idhā akhadha l-qurā wahiya ẓālimatun inna akhdhahu alīmun shadīdun
ayahs.11:103: inna fī dhālika laʾāyatan liman khāfa ʿadhāba l-ākhirati dhālika yawmun majmūʿun lahu l-nāsu wadhālika yawmun mashhūdun
ayahs.11:105: yawma yati lā takallamu nafsun illā bi-idhnihi faminhum shaqiyyun wasaʿīdun
ayahs.11:106: fa-ammā alladhīna shaqū fafī l-nāri lahum fīhā zafīrun washahīqun
ayahs.11:107: khālidīna fīhā mā dāmati l-samāwātu wal-arḍu illā mā shāʾa rabbuka inna rabbaka faʿʿālun limā yurīdu
ayahs.11:108: wa-ammā alladhīna suʿidū fafī l-janati khālidīna fīhā mā dāmati l-samāwātu wal-arḍu illā mā shāʾa rabbuka ʿaṭāʾan ghayra majdhūdhin
ayahs.11:109: falā taku fī miryatin mimmā yaʿbudu hāulāi mā yaʿbudūna illā kamā yaʿbudu ābāuhum min qablu wa-innā lamuwaffūhum naṣībahum ghayra manqūṣin
ayahs.11:110: walaqad ātaynā mūsā l-kitāba fa-ukhtulifa fīhi walawlā kalimatun sabaqat min rabbika laquḍiya baynahum wa-innahum lafī shakkin minhu murībin
ayahs.11:111: wa-inna kullan lammā layuwaffiyannahum rabbuka aʿmālahum innahu bimā yaʿmalūna khabīrun
ayahs.11:112: fa-istaqim kamā umirta waman tāba maʿaka walā taṭghaw innahu bimā taʿmalūna baṣīrun
ayahs.11:113: walā tarkanū ilā alladhīna ẓalamū fatamassakumu l-nāru wamā lakum min dūni Allāhi min awliyāʾa thumma lā tunṣarūna
ayahs.11:114: wa-aqimi l-ṣalata ṭarafayi l-nahāri wazulafan mina al-layli inna l-ḥasanāti yudhhibna l-sayiāti dhālika dhikrā lildhākirīna
ayahs.11:115: wa-iṣbir fa-inna Allāha lā yuḍīʿu ajra l-muḥsinīna
ayahs.11:116: falawlā kāna mina l-qurūni min qablikum ulū baqiyyatin yanhawna ʿani l-fasādi fī l-arḍi illā qalīlan mimman anjaynā minhum wa-ittabaʿa alladhīna ẓalamū mā utrifū fīhi wakānū mujrimīna
ayahs.11:117: wamā kāna rabbuka liyuhlika l-qurā biẓulmin wa-ahluhā muṣliḥūna
ayahs.11:118: walaw shāʾa rabbuka lajaʿala l-nāsa ummatan wāḥidatan walā yazālūna mukhtalifīna
ayahs.11:119: illā man raḥima rabbuka walidhālika khalaqahum watammat kalimatu rabbika la-amla-anna jahannama mina l-jinati wal-nāsi ajmaʿīna
ayahs.11:120: wakullan naquṣṣu ʿalayka min anbāi l-rusuli mā nuthabbitu bihi fuādaka wajāʾaka fī hādhihi l-ḥaqu wamawʿiẓatun wadhikrā lilmuʾminīna
ayahs.11:121: waqul lilladhīna lā yuʾminūna iʿmalū ʿalā makānatikum innā ʿāmilūna
ayahs.11:123: walillahi ghaybu l-samāwāti wal-arḍi wa-ilayhi yurjaʿu l-amru kulluhu fa-uʿbudhu watawakkal ʿalayhi wamā rabbuka bighāfilin ʿammā taʿmalūna
ayahs.12:2: innā anzalnāhu qurānan ʿarabiyyan laʿallakum taʿqilūna
ayahs.12:3: naḥnu naquṣṣu ʿalayka aḥsana l-qaṣaṣi bimā awḥaynā ilayka hādhā l-qurāna wa-in kunta min qablihi lamina l-ghāfilīna
ayahs.12:4: idh qāla yūsufu li-abīhi yāʾabati innī ra-aytu aḥada ʿashara kawkaban wal-shamsa wal-qamara ra-aytuhum lī sājidīna
ayahs.12:5: qāla yābunayya lā taqṣuṣ ruʾyāka ʿalā ikhwatika fayakīdū laka kaydan inna l-shayṭāna lilinsāni ʿaduwwun mubīnun
ayahs.12:6: wakadhālika yajtabīka rabbuka wayuʿallimuka min tawīli l-aḥādīthi wayutimmu niʿmatahu ʿalayka waʿalā āli yaʿqūba kamā atammahā ʿalā abawayka min qablu ibrāhīma wa-isḥāqa inna rabbaka ʿalīmun ḥakīmun
ayahs.12:7: laqad kāna fī yūsufa wa-ikhwatihi āyātun lilssāilīna
ayahs.12:8: idh qālū layūsufu wa-akhūhu aḥabbu ilā abīnā minnā wanaḥnu ʿuṣbatun inna abānā lafī ḍalālin mubīnin
ayahs.12:9: uqtulū yūsufa awi iṭraḥūhu arḍan yakhlu lakum wajhu abīkum watakūnū min baʿdihi qawman ṣāliḥīna
ayahs.12:10: qāla qāilun minhum lā taqtulū yūsufa wa-alqūhu fī ghayābati l-jubi yaltaqiṭhu baʿḍu l-sayārati in kuntum fāʿilīna
ayahs.12:11: qālū yāʾabānā mā laka lā tamannā ʿalā yūsufa wa-innā lahu lanāṣiḥūna
ayahs.12:12: arsilhu maʿanā ghadan yartaʿ wayalʿab wa-innā lahu laḥāfiẓūna
ayahs.12:13: qāla innī layaḥzununī an tadhhabū bihi wa-akhāfu an yakulahu l-dhiʾbu wa-antum ʿanhu ghāfilūna
ayahs.12:14: qālū la-in akalahu l-dhiʾbu wanaḥnu ʿuṣbatun innā idhan lakhāsirūna
ayahs.12:15: falammā dhahabū bihi wa-ajmaʿū an yajʿalūhu fī ghayābati l-jubi wa-awḥaynā ilayhi latunabbi-annahum bi-amrihim hādhā wahum lā yashʿurūna
ayahs.12:17: qālū yāʾabānā innā dhahabnā nastabiqu wataraknā yūsufa ʿinda matāʿinā fa-akalahu l-dhiʾbu wamā anta bimuʾminin lanā walaw kunnā ṣādiqīna
ayahs.12:18: wajāū ʿalā qamīṣihi bidamin kadhibin qāla bal sawwalat lakum anfusukum amran faṣabrun jamīlun wallāhu l-mustaʿānu ʿalā mā taṣifūna
ayahs.12:19: wajāʾat sayyāratun fa-arsalū wāridahum fa-adlā dalwahu qāla yābushrā hādhā ghulāmun wa-asarrūhu biḍāʿatan wallāhu ʿalīmun bimā yaʿmalūna
ayahs.12:20: washarawhu bithamanin bakhsin darāhima maʿdūdatin wakānū fīhi mina l-zāhidīna
ayahs.12:21: waqāla alladhī ishtarāhu min miṣra li-imra-atihi akrimī mathwāhu ʿasā an yanfaʿanā aw nattakhidhahu waladan wakadhālika makkannā liyūsufa fī l-arḍi walinuʿallimahu min tawīli l-aḥādīthi wallāhu ghālibun ʿalā amrihi walākinna akthara l-nāsi lā yaʿlamūna
ayahs.12:22: walammā balagha ashuddahu ātaynāhu ḥukman waʿilman wakadhālika najzī l-muḥsinīna
ayahs.12:23: warāwadathu allatī huwa fī baytihā ʿan nafsihi waghallaqati l-abwāba waqālat hayta laka qāla maʿādha Allāhi innahu rabbī aḥsana mathwāya innahu lā yufliḥu l-ẓālimūna
ayahs.12:24: walaqad hammat bihi wahamma bihā lawlā an raʾā burhāna rabbihi kadhālika linaṣrifa ʿanhu l-sūa wal-faḥshāʾa innahu min ʿibādinā l-mukhlaṣīna
ayahs.12:25: wa-istabaqā l-bāba waqaddat qamīṣahu min duburin wa-alfayā sayyidahā ladā l-bābi qālat mā jazāu man arāda bi-ahlika sūan illā an yusjana aw ʿadhābun alīmun
ayahs.12:26: qāla hiya rāwadatnī ʿan nafsī washahida shāhidun min ahlihā in kāna qamīṣuhu qudda min qubulin faṣadaqat wahuwa mina l-kādhibīna
ayahs.12:27: wa-in kāna qamīṣuhu qudda min duburin fakadhabat wahuwa mina l-ṣādiqīna
ayahs.12:28: falammā raʾā qamīṣahu qudda min duburin qāla innahu min kaydikunna inna kaydakunna ʿaẓīmun
ayahs.12:29: yūsufu aʿriḍ ʿan hādhā wa-istaghfirī lidhanbiki innaki kunti mina l-khāṭiʾīna
ayahs.12:30: waqāla niswatun fī l-madīnati imra-atu l-ʿazīzi turāwidu fatāhā ʿan nafsihi qad shaghafahā ḥubban innā lanarāhā fī ḍalālin mubīnin
ayahs.12:31: falammā samiʿat bimakrihinna arsalat ilayhinna wa-aʿtadat lahunna muttaka-an waʾātat kulla wāḥidatin minhunna sikkīnan waqālati ukhruj ʿalayhinna falammā ra-aynahu akbarnahu waqaṭṭaʿna aydiyahunna waqulna ḥāsha lillāhi mā hādhā basharan in hādhā illā malakun karīmun
ayahs.12:32: qālat fadhālikunna alladhī lumtunnanī fīhi walaqad rāwadttuhu ʿan nafsihi fa-istaʿṣama wala-in lam yafʿal mā āmuruhu layusjananna walayakūnan mina l-ṣāghirīna
ayahs.12:33: qāla rabbi l-sijnu aḥabbu ilayya mimmā yadʿūnanī ilayhi wa-illā taṣrif ʿannī kaydahunna aṣbu ilayhinna wa-akun mina l-jāhilīna
ayahs.12:34: fa-istajāba lahu rabbuhu faṣarafa ʿanhu kaydahunna innahu huwa l-samīʿu l-ʿalīmu
ayahs.12:35: thumma badā lahum min baʿdi mā ra-awū l-āyāti layasjununnahu ḥattā ḥīnin
ayahs.12:36: wadakhala maʿahu l-sijna fatayāni qāla aḥaduhumā innī arānī aʿṣiru khamran waqāla l-ākharu innī arānī aḥmilu fawqa rasī khubzan takulu l-ṭayru minhu nabbiʾnā bitawīlihi innā narāka mina l-muḥsinīna
ayahs.12:37: qāla lā yatīkumā ṭaʿāmun turzaqānihi illā nabbatukumā bitawīlihi qabla an yatiyakumā dhālikumā mimmā ʿallamanī rabbī innī taraktu millata qawmin lā yuʾminūna billāhi wahum bil-ākhirati hum kāfirūna
ayahs.12:38: wa-ittabaʿtu millata ābāī ibrāhīma wa-isḥāqa wayaʿqūba mā kāna lanā an nushrika billāhi min shayin dhālika min faḍli Allāhi ʿalaynā waʿalā l-nāsi walākinna akthara l-nāsi lā yashkurūna
ayahs.12:39: yāṣāḥibayi l-sijni a-arbābun mutafarriqūna khayrun ami Allāhu l-wāḥidu l-qahāru
ayahs.12:40: mā taʿbudūna min dūnihi illā asmāʾan sammaytumūhā antum waʾābāukum mā anzala Allāhu bihā min sulṭānin ini l-ḥukmu illā lillāhi amara allā taʿbudū illā iyyāhu dhālika l-dīnu l-qayimu walākinna akthara l-nāsi lā yaʿlamūna
ayahs.12:41: yāṣāḥibayi l-sijni ammā aḥadukumā fayasqī rabbahu khamran wa-ammā l-ākharu fayuṣlabu fatakulu l-ṭayru min rasihi quḍiya l-amru alladhī fīhi tastaftiyāni
ayahs.12:42: waqāla lilladhī ẓanna annahu nājin minhumā udhkurnī ʿinda rabbika fa-ansāhu l-shayṭānu dhikra rabbihi falabitha fī l-sijni biḍʿa sinīna
ayahs.12:43: waqāla l-maliku innī arā sabʿa baqarātin simānin yakuluhunna sabʿun ʿijāfun wasabʿa sunbulātin khuḍrin wa-ukhara yābisātin yāʾayyuhā l-mala-u aftūnī fī ruʾyāya in kuntum lilrruʾyā taʿburūna
ayahs.12:44: qālū aḍghāthu aḥlāmin wamā naḥnu bitawīli l-aḥlāmi biʿālimīna
ayahs.12:45: waqāla alladhī najā minhumā wa-iddakara baʿda ummatin anā unabbi-ukum bitawīlihi fa-arsilūni
ayahs.12:46: yūsufu ayyuhā l-ṣidīqu aftinā fī sabʿi baqarātin simānin yakuluhunna sabʿun ʿijāfun wasabʿi sunbulātin khuḍrin wa-ukhara yābisātin laʿallī arjiʿu ilā l-nāsi laʿallahum yaʿlamūna
ayahs.12:47: qāla tazraʿūna sabʿa sinīna da-aban famā ḥaṣadttum fadharūhu fī sunbulihi illā qalīlan mimmā takulūna
ayahs.12:48: thumma yatī min baʿdi dhālika sabʿun shidādun yakulna mā qaddamtum lahunna illā qalīlan mimmā tuḥṣinūna
ayahs.12:49: thumma yatī min baʿdi dhālika ʿāmun fīhi yughāthu l-nāsu wafīhi yaʿṣirūna
ayahs.12:50: waqāla l-maliku iʾtūnī bihi falammā jāʾahu l-rasūlu qāla irjiʿ ilā rabbika fasalhu mā bālu l-niswati allātī qaṭṭaʿna aydiyahunna inna rabbī bikaydihinna ʿalīmun
ayahs.12:51: qāla mā khaṭbukunna idh rāwadttunna yūsufa ʿan nafsihi qulna ḥāsha lillāhi mā ʿalimnā ʿalayhi min sūin qālati imra-atu l-ʿazīzi l-āna ḥaṣḥaṣa l-ḥaqu anā rāwadttuhu ʿan nafsihi wa-innahu lamina l-ṣādiqīna
ayahs.12:52: dhālika liyaʿlama annī lam akhunhu bil-ghaybi wa-anna Allāha lā yahdī kayda l-khāinīna
ayahs.12:53: wamā ubarri-u nafsī inna l-nafsa la-ammāratun bil-sūi illā mā raḥima rabbī inna rabbī ghafūrun raḥīmun
ayahs.12:54: waqāla l-maliku iʾtūnī bihi astakhliṣhu linafsī falammā kallamahu qāla innaka l-yawma ladaynā makīnun amīnun
ayahs.12:55: qāla ijʿalnī ʿalā khazāini l-arḍi innī ḥafīẓun ʿalīmun
ayahs.12:56: wakadhālika makkannā liyūsufa fī l-arḍi yatabawwa-u minhā ḥaythu yashāu nuṣību biraḥmatinā man nashāu walā nuḍīʿu ajra l-muḥsinīna
ayahs.12:57: wala-ajru l-ākhirati khayrun lilladhīna āmanū wakānū yattaqūna
ayahs.12:58: wajāʾa ikhwatu yūsufa fadakhalū ʿalayhi faʿarafahum wahum lahu munkirūna
ayahs.12:59: walammā jahhazahum bijahāzihim qāla iʾtūnī bi-akhin lakum min abīkum alā tarawna annī ūfī l-kayla wa-anā khayru l-munzilīna
ayahs.12:60: fa-in lam tatūnī bihi falā kayla lakum ʿindī walā taqrabūni
ayahs.12:61: qālū sanurāwidu ʿanhu abāhu wa-innā lafāʿilūna
ayahs.12:62: waqāla lifityānihi ijʿalū biḍāʿatahum fī riḥālihim laʿallahum yaʿrifūnahā idhā inqalabū ilā ahlihim laʿallahum yarjiʿūna
ayahs.12:63: falammā rajaʿū ilā abīhim qālū yāʾabānā muniʿa minnā l-kaylu fa-arsil maʿanā akhānā naktal wa-innā lahu laḥāfiẓūna
ayahs.12:64: qāla hal āmanukum ʿalayhi illā kamā amintukum ʿalā akhīhi min qablu fallāhu khayrun ḥāfiẓan wahuwa arḥamu l-rāḥimīna
ayahs.12:65: walammā fataḥū matāʿahum wajadū biḍāʿatahum ruddat ilayhim qālū yāʾabānā mā nabghī hādhihi biḍāʿatunā ruddat ilaynā wanamīru ahlanā wanaḥfaẓu akhānā wanazdādu kayla baʿīrin dhālika kaylun yasīrun
ayahs.12:66: qāla lan ursilahu maʿakum ḥattā tuʾtūni mawthiqan mina Allāhi latatunnanī bihi illā an yuḥāṭa bikum falammā ātawhu mawthiqahum qāla Allāhu ʿalā mā naqūlu wakīlun
ayahs.12:67: waqāla yābaniyya lā tadkhulū min bābin wāḥidin wa-udkhulū min abwābin mutafarriqatin wamā ughnī ʿankum mina Allāhi min shayin ini l-ḥukmu illā lillāhi ʿalayhi tawakkaltu waʿalayhi falyatawakkali l-mutawakilūna
ayahs.12:68: walammā dakhalū min ḥaythu amarahum abūhum mā kāna yughnī ʿanhum mina Allāhi min shayin illā ḥājatan fī nafsi yaʿqūba qaḍāhā wa-innahu ladhū ʿilmin limā ʿallamnāhu walākinna akthara l-nāsi lā yaʿlamūna
ayahs.12:69: walammā dakhalū ʿalā yūsufa āwā ilayhi akhāhu qāla innī anā akhūka falā tabta-is bimā kānū yaʿmalūna
ayahs.12:70: falammā jahhazahum bijahāzihim jaʿala l-siqāyata fī raḥli akhīhi thumma adhana mu-adhinun ayyatuhā l-ʿīru innakum lasāriqūna
ayahs.12:72: qālū nafqidu ṣuwāʿa l-maliki waliman jāʾa bihi ḥimlu baʿīrin wa-anā bihi zaʿīmun
ayahs.12:73: qālū tallāhi laqad ʿalimtum mā jiʾnā linufsida fī l-arḍi wamā kunnā sāriqīna
ayahs.12:74: qālū famā jazāuhu in kuntum kādhibīna
ayahs.12:75: qālū jazāuhu man wujida fī raḥlihi fahuwa jazāuhu kadhālika najzī l-ẓālimīna
ayahs.12:76: fabada-a bi-awʿiyatihim qabla wiʿāi akhīhi thumma istakhrajahā min wiʿāi akhīhi kadhālika kidnā liyūsufa mā kāna liyakhudha akhāhu fī dīni l-maliki illā an yashāʾa Allāhu narfaʿu darajātin man nashāu wafawqa kulli dhī ʿilmin ʿalīmun
ayahs.12:77: qālū in yasriq faqad saraqa akhun lahu min qablu fa-asarrahā yūsufu fī nafsihi walam yubdihā lahum qāla antum sharrun makānan wallāhu aʿlamu bimā taṣifūna
ayahs.12:78: qālū yāʾayyuhā l-ʿazīzu inna lahu aban shaykhan kabīran fakhudh aḥadanā makānahu innā narāka mina l-muḥsinīna
ayahs.12:79: qāla maʿādha Allāhi an nakhudha illā man wajadnā matāʿanā ʿindahu innā idhan laẓālimūna
ayahs.12:80: falammā istayasū minhu khalaṣū najiyyan qāla kabīruhum alam taʿlamū anna abākum qad akhadha ʿalaykum mawthiqan mina Allāhi wamin qablu mā farraṭtum fī yūsufa falan abraḥa l-arḍa ḥattā yadhana lī abī aw yaḥkuma Allāhu lī wahuwa khayru l-ḥākimīna
ayahs.12:81: irjiʿū ilā abīkum faqūlū yāʾabānā inna ibnaka saraqa wamā shahidnā illā bimā ʿalimnā wamā kunnā lilghaybi ḥāfiẓīna
ayahs.12:82: wasali l-qaryata allatī kunnā fīhā wal-ʿīra allatī aqbalnā fīhā wa-innā laṣādiqūna
ayahs.12:83: qāla bal sawwalat lakum anfusukum amran faṣabrun jamīlun ʿasā Allāhu an yatiyanī bihim jamīʿan innahu huwa l-ʿalīmu l-ḥakīmu
ayahs.12:84: watawallā ʿanhum waqāla yāʾasafā ʿalā yūsufa wa-ibyaḍḍat ʿaynāhu mina l-ḥuzni fahuwa kaẓīmun
ayahs.12:85: qālū tallāhi tafta-u tadhkuru yūsufa ḥattā takūna ḥaraḍan aw takūna mina l-hālikīna
ayahs.12:86: qāla innamā ashkū bathī waḥuznī ilā Allāhi wa-aʿlamu mina Allāhi mā lā taʿlamūna
ayahs.12:87: yābaniyya idhhabū fataḥassasū min yūsufa wa-akhīhi walā tāyasū min rawḥi Allāhi innahu lā yāyasu min rawḥi Allāhi illā l-qawmu l-kāfirūna
ayahs.12:88: falammā dakhalū ʿalayhi qālū yāʾayyuhā l-ʿazīzu massanā wa-ahlanā l-ḍuru wajiʾnā bibiḍāʿatin muzjātin fa-awfi lanā l-kayla wataṣaddaq ʿalaynā inna Allāha yajzī l-mutaṣadiqīna
ayahs.12:89: qāla hal ʿalimtum mā faʿaltum biyūsufa wa-akhīhi idh antum jāhilūna
ayahs.12:90: qālū a-innaka la-anta yūsufu qāla anā yūsufu wahādhā akhī qad manna Allāhu ʿalaynā innahu man yattaqi wayaṣbir fa-inna Allāha lā yuḍīʿu ajra l-muḥsinīna
ayahs.12:91: qālū tallāhi laqad ātharaka Allāhu ʿalaynā wa-in kunnā lakhāṭiʾīna
ayahs.12:92: qāla lā tathrība ʿalaykumu l-yawma yaghfiru Allāhu lakum wahuwa arḥamu l-rāḥimīna
ayahs.12:93: idhhabū biqamīṣī hādhā fa-alqūhu ʿalā wajhi abī yati baṣīran watūnī bi-ahlikum ajmaʿīna
ayahs.12:94: walammā faṣalati l-ʿīru qāla abūhum innī la-ajidu rīḥa yūsufa lawlā an tufannidūni
ayahs.12:95: qālū tallāhi innaka lafī ḍalālika l-qadīmi
ayahs.12:96: falammā an jāʾa l-bashīru alqāhu ʿalā wajhihi fa-irtadda baṣīran qāla alam aqul lakum innī aʿlamu mina Allāhi mā lā taʿlamūna
ayahs.12:97: qālū yāʾabānā istaghfir lanā dhunūbanā innā kunnā khāṭiʾīna
ayahs.12:98: qāla sawfa astaghfiru lakum rabbī innahu huwa l-ghafūru l-raḥīmu
ayahs.12:99: falammā dakhalū ʿalā yūsufa āwā ilayhi abawayhi waqāla udkhulū miṣra in shāʾa Allāhu āminīna
ayahs.12:100: warafaʿa abawayhi ʿalā l-ʿarshi wakharrū lahu sujjadan waqāla yāʾabati hādhā tawīlu ruʾyāya min qablu qad jaʿalahā rabbī ḥaqqan waqad aḥsana bī idh akhrajanī mina l-sijni wajāʾa bikum mina l-badwi min baʿdi an nazagha l-shayṭānu baynī wabayna ikhwatī inna rabbī laṭīfun limā yashāu innahu huwa l-ʿalīmu l-ḥakīmu
ayahs.12:101: rabbi qad ātaytanī mina l-mulki waʿallamtanī min tawīli l-aḥādīthi fāṭira l-samāwāti wal-arḍi anta waliyyī fī l-dunyā wal-ākhirati tawaffanī musliman wa-alḥiqnī bil-ṣāliḥīna
ayahs.12:102: dhālika min anbāi l-ghaybi nūḥīhi ilayka wamā kunta ladayhim idh ajmaʿū amrahum wahum yamkurūna
ayahs.12:103: wamā aktharu l-nāsi walaw ḥaraṣta bimuʾminīna
ayahs.12:104: wamā tasaluhum ʿalayhi min ajrin in huwa illā dhikrun lilʿālamīna
ayahs.12:105: waka-ayyin min āyatin fī l-samāwāti wal-arḍi yamurrūna ʿalayhā wahum ʿanhā muʿriḍūna
ayahs.12:106: wamā yuʾminu aktharuhum billāhi illā wahum mushrikūna
ayahs.12:107: afa-aminū an tatiyahum ghāshiyatun min ʿadhābi Allāhi aw tatiyahumu l-sāʿatu baghtatan wahum lā yashʿurūna
ayahs.12:108: qul hādhihi sabīlī adʿū ilā Allāhi ʿalā baṣīratin anā wamani ittabaʿanī wasubḥāna Allāhi wamā anā mina l-mushrikīna
ayahs.12:109: wamā arsalnā min qablika illā rijālan nūḥī ilayhim min ahli l-qurā afalam yasīrū fī l-arḍi fayanẓurū kayfa kāna ʿāqibatu alladhīna min qablihim waladāru l-ākhirati khayrun lilladhīna ittaqaw afalā taʿqilūna
ayahs.12:110: ḥattā idhā istayasa l-rusulu waẓannū annahum qad kudhibū jāʾahum naṣrunā fanujjiya man nashāu walā yuraddu basunā ʿani l-qawmi l-mujrimīna
ayahs.12:111: laqad kāna fī qaṣaṣihim ʿibratun li-ulī l-albābi mā kāna ḥadīthan yuftarā walākin taṣdīqa alladhī bayna yadayhi watafṣīla kulli shayin wahudan waraḥmatan liqawmin yuʾminūna
ayahs.13:1: alif-lam-meem-ra tilka āyātu l-kitābi wa-alladhī unzila ilayka min rabbika l-ḥaqu walākinna akthara l-nāsi lā yuʾminūna
ayahs.13:2: Allāhu alladhī rafaʿa l-samāwāti bighayri ʿamadin tarawnahā thumma istawā ʿalā l-ʿarshi wasakhara l-shamsa wal-qamara kullun yajrī li-ajalin musamman yudabbiru l-amra yufaṣṣilu l-āyāti laʿallakum biliqāi rabbikum tūqinūna
ayahs.13:3: wahuwa alladhī madda l-arḍa wajaʿala fīhā rawāsiya wa-anhāran wamin kulli l-thamarāti jaʿala fīhā zawjayni ithnayni yughshī al-layla l-nahāra inna fī dhālika laʾāyātin liqawmin yatafakkarūna
ayahs.13:4: wafī l-arḍi qiṭaʿun mutajāwirātun wajannātun min aʿnābin wazarʿun wanakhīlun ṣinwānun waghayru ṣinwānin yusqā bimāin wāḥidin wanufaḍḍilu baʿḍahā ʿalā baʿḍin fī l-ukuli inna fī dhālika laʾāyātin liqawmin yaʿqilūna
ayahs.13:5: wa-in taʿjab faʿajabun qawluhum a-idhā kunnā turāban a-innā lafī khalqin jadīdin ulāika alladhīna kafarū birabbihim wa-ulāika l-aghlālu fī aʿnāqihim wa-ulāika aṣḥābu l-nāri hum fīhā khālidūna
ayahs.13:6: wayastaʿjilūnaka bil-sayi-ati qabla l-ḥasanati waqad khalat min qablihimu l-mathulātu wa-inna rabbaka ladhū maghfiratin lilnnāsi ʿalā ẓulmihim wa-inna rabbaka lashadīdu l-ʿiqābi
ayahs.13:7: wayaqūlu alladhīna kafarū lawlā unzila ʿalayhi āyatun min rabbihi innamā anta mundhirun walikulli qawmin hādin
ayahs.13:8: Allāhu yaʿlamu mā taḥmilu kullu unthā wamā taghīḍu l-arḥāmu wamā tazdādu wakullu shayin ʿindahu bimiqdārin
ayahs.13:10: sawāon minkum man asarra l-qawla waman jahara bihi waman huwa mustakhfin bi-al-layli wasāribun bil-nahāri
ayahs.13:11: lahu muʿaqqibātun min bayni yadayhi wamin khalfihi yaḥfaẓūnahu min amri Allāhi inna Allāha lā yughayyiru mā biqawmin ḥattā yughayyirū mā bi-anfusihim wa-idhā arāda Allāhu biqawmin sūan falā maradda lahu wamā lahum min dūnihi min wālin
ayahs.13:12: huwa alladhī yurīkumu l-barqa khawfan waṭamaʿan wayunshi-u l-saḥāba l-thiqāla
ayahs.13:13: wayusabbiḥu l-raʿdu biḥamdihi wal-malāikatu min khīfatihi wayursilu l-ṣawāʿiqa fayuṣību bihā man yashāu wahum yujādilūna fī Allāhi wahuwa shadīdu l-miḥāli
ayahs.13:14: lahu daʿwatu l-ḥaqi wa-alladhīna yadʿūna min dūnihi lā yastajībūna lahum bishayin illā kabāsiṭi kaffayhi ilā l-māi liyablugha fāhu wamā huwa bibālighihi wamā duʿāu l-kāfirīna illā fī ḍalālin
ayahs.13:15: walillahi yasjudu man fī l-samāwāti wal-arḍi ṭawʿan wakarhan waẓilāluhum bil-ghuduwi wal-āṣāli
ayahs.13:16: qul man rabbu l-samāwāti wal-arḍi quli Allāhu qul afa-ittakhadhtum min dūnihi awliyāʾa lā yamlikūna li-anfusihim nafʿan walā ḍarran qul hal yastawī l-aʿmā wal-baṣīru am hal tastawī l-ẓulumātu wal-nūru am jaʿalū lillāhi shurakāʾa khalaqū kakhalqihi fatashābaha l-khalqu ʿalayhim quli Allāhu khāliqu kulli shayin wahuwa l-wāḥidu l-qahāru
ayahs.13:17: anzala mina l-samāi māʾan fasālat awdiyatun biqadarihā fa-iḥtamala l-saylu zabadan rābiyan wamimmā yūqidūna ʿalayhi fī l-nāri ibtighāʾa ḥilyatin aw matāʿin zabadun mithluhu kadhālika yaḍribu Allāhu l-ḥaqa wal-bāṭila fa-ammā l-zabadu fayadhhabu jufāʾan wa-ammā mā yanfaʿu l-nāsa fayamkuthu fī l-arḍi kadhālika yaḍribu Allāhu l-amthāla
ayahs.13:18: lilladhīna istajābū lirabbihimu l-ḥusnā wa-alladhīna lam yastajībū lahu law anna lahum mā fī l-arḍi jamīʿan wamithlahu maʿahu la-iftadaw bihi ulāika lahum sūʾu l-ḥisābi wamawāhum jahannamu wabiʾsa l-mihādu
ayahs.13:19: afaman yaʿlamu annamā unzila ilayka min rabbika l-ḥaqu kaman huwa aʿmā innamā yatadhakkaru ulū l-albābi
ayahs.13:20: alladhīna yūfūna biʿahdi Allāhi walā yanquḍūna l-mīthāqa
ayahs.13:21: wa-alladhīna yaṣilūna mā amara Allāhu bihi an yūṣala wayakhshawna rabbahum wayakhāfūna sūa l-ḥisābi
ayahs.13:22: wa-alladhīna ṣabarū ibtighāʾa wajhi rabbihim wa-aqāmū l-ṣalata wa-anfaqū mimmā razaqnāhum sirran waʿalāniyatan wayadraūna bil-ḥasanati l-sayi-ata ulāika lahum ʿuqbā l-dāri
ayahs.13:23: jannātu ʿadnin yadkhulūnahā waman ṣalaḥa min ābāihim wa-azwājihim wadhurriyyātihim wal-malāikatu yadkhulūna ʿalayhim min kulli bābin
ayahs.13:24: salāmun ʿalaykum bimā ṣabartum faniʿma ʿuqbā l-dāri
ayahs.13:25: wa-alladhīna yanquḍūna ʿahda Allāhi min baʿdi mīthāqihi wayaqṭaʿūna mā amara Allāhu bihi an yūṣala wayufsidūna fī l-arḍi ulāika lahumu l-laʿnatu walahum sūʾu l-dāri
ayahs.13:26: Allāhu yabsuṭu l-rizqa liman yashāu wayaqdiru wafariḥū bil-ḥayati l-dunyā wamā l-ḥayatu l-dunyā fī l-ākhirati illā matāʿun
ayahs.13:27: wayaqūlu alladhīna kafarū lawlā unzila ʿalayhi āyatun min rabbihi qul inna Allāha yuḍillu man yashāu wayahdī ilayhi man anāba
ayahs.13:28: alladhīna āmanū wataṭma-innu qulūbuhum bidhikri Allāhi alā bidhikri Allāhi taṭma-innu l-qulūbu
ayahs.13:29: alladhīna āmanū waʿamilū l-ṣāliḥāti ṭūbā lahum waḥusnu maʾābin
ayahs.13:30: kadhālika arsalnāka fī ummatin qad khalat min qablihā umamun litatluwā ʿalayhimu alladhī awḥaynā ilayka wahum yakfurūna bil-raḥmāni qul huwa rabbī lā ilāha illā huwa ʿalayhi tawakkaltu wa-ilayhi matābi
ayahs.13:31: walaw anna qurānan suyyirat bihi l-jibālu aw quṭṭiʿat bihi l-arḍu aw kullima bihi l-mawtā bal lillāhi l-amru jamīʿan afalam yāyasi alladhīna āmanū an law yashāu Allāhu lahadā l-nāsa jamīʿan walā yazālu alladhīna kafarū tuṣībuhum bimā ṣanaʿū qāriʿatun aw taḥullu qarīban min dārihim ḥattā yatiya waʿdu Allāhi inna Allāha lā yukhlifu l-mīʿāda
ayahs.13:32: walaqadi ustuhzi-a birusulin min qablika fa-amlaytu lilladhīna kafarū thumma akhadhtuhum fakayfa kāna ʿiqābi
ayahs.13:33: afaman huwa qāimun ʿalā kulli nafsin bimā kasabat wajaʿalū lillāhi shurakāʾa qul sammūhum am tunabbiūnahu bimā lā yaʿlamu fī l-arḍi am biẓāhirin mina l-qawli bal zuyyina lilladhīna kafarū makruhum waṣuddū ʿani l-sabīli waman yuḍlili Allāhu famā lahu min hādin
ayahs.13:34: lahum ʿadhābun fī l-ḥayati l-dunyā walaʿadhābu l-ākhirati ashaqqu wamā lahum mina Allāhi min wāqin
ayahs.13:35: mathalu l-janati allatī wuʿida l-mutaqūna tajrī min taḥtihā l-anhāru ukuluhā dāimun waẓilluhā tilka ʿuqbā alladhīna ittaqaw waʿuqbā l-kāfirīna l-nāru
ayahs.13:36: wa-alladhīna ātaynāhumu l-kitāba yafraḥūna bimā unzila ilayka wamina l-aḥzābi man yunkiru baʿḍahu qul innamā umirtu an aʿbuda Allāha walā ushrika bihi ilayhi adʿū wa-ilayhi maʾābi
ayahs.13:37: wakadhālika anzalnāhu ḥukman ʿarabiyyan wala-ini ittabaʿta ahwāʾahum baʿdamā jāʾaka mina l-ʿilmi mā laka mina Allāhi min waliyyin walā wāqin
ayahs.13:38: walaqad arsalnā rusulan min qablika wajaʿalnā lahum azwājan wadhurriyyatan wamā kāna lirasūlin an yatiya biāyatin illā bi-idhni Allāhi likulli ajalin kitābun
ayahs.13:39: yamḥū Allāhu mā yashāu wayuthbitu waʿindahu ummu l-kitābi
ayahs.13:40: wa-in mā nuriyannaka baʿḍa alladhī naʿiduhum aw natawaffayannaka fa-innamā ʿalayka l-balāghu waʿalaynā l-ḥisābu
ayahs.13:41: awalam yaraw annā natī l-arḍa nanquṣuhā min aṭrāfihā wallāhu yaḥkumu lā muʿaqqiba liḥukmihi wahuwa sarīʿu l-ḥisābi
ayahs.13:42: waqad makara alladhīna min qablihim falillahi l-makru jamīʿan yaʿlamu mā taksibu kullu nafsin wasayaʿlamu l-kufāru liman ʿuqbā l-dāri
ayahs.13:43: wayaqūlu alladhīna kafarū lasta mursalan qul kafā billāhi shahīdan baynī wabaynakum waman ʿindahu ʿilmu l-kitābi
ayahs.14:1: alif-lam-ra kitābun anzalnāhu ilayka litukhrija l-nāsa mina l-ẓulumāti ilā l-nūri bi-idhni rabbihim ilā ṣirāṭi l-ʿazīzi l-ḥamīdi
ayahs.14:2: Allāhi alladhī lahu mā fī l-samāwāti wamā fī l-arḍi wawaylun lilkāfirīna min ʿadhābin shadīdin
ayahs.14:3: alladhīna yastaḥibbūna l-ḥayata l-dunyā ʿalā l-ākhirati wayaṣuddūna ʿan sabīli Allāhi wayabghūnahā ʿiwajan ulāika fī ḍalālin baʿīdin
ayahs.14:4: wamā arsalnā min rasūlin illā bilisāni qawmihi liyubayyina lahum fayuḍillu Allāhu man yashāu wayahdī man yashāu wahuwa l-ʿazīzu l-ḥakīmu
ayahs.14:5: walaqad arsalnā mūsā biāyātinā an akhrij qawmaka mina l-ẓulumāti ilā l-nūri wadhakkirhum bi-ayyāmi Allāhi inna fī dhālika laʾāyātin likulli ṣabbārin shakūrin
ayahs.14:6: wa-idh qāla mūsā liqawmihi udhkurū niʿmata Allāhi ʿalaykum idh anjākum min āli firʿawna yasūmūnakum sūa l-ʿadhābi wayudhabbiḥūna abnāʾakum wayastaḥyūna nisāʾakum wafī dhālikum balāon min rabbikum ʿaẓīmun
ayahs.14:7: wa-idh ta-adhana rabbukum la-in shakartum la-azīdannakum wala-in kafartum inna ʿadhābī lashadīdun
ayahs.14:8: waqāla mūsā in takfurū antum waman fī l-arḍi jamīʿan fa-inna Allāha laghaniyyun ḥamīdun
ayahs.14:9: alam yatikum naba-u alladhīna min qablikum qawmi nūḥin waʿādin wathamūda wa-alladhīna min baʿdihim lā yaʿlamuhum illā Allāhu jāʾathum rusuluhum bil-bayināti faraddū aydiyahum fī afwāhihim waqālū innā kafarnā bimā ursiltum bihi wa-innā lafī shakkin mimmā tadʿūnanā ilayhi murībin
ayahs.14:10: qālat rusuluhum afī Allāhi shakkun fāṭiri l-samāwāti wal-arḍi yadʿūkum liyaghfira lakum min dhunūbikum wayu-akhirakum ilā ajalin musamman qālū in antum illā basharun mithlunā turīdūna an taṣuddūnā ʿammā kāna yaʿbudu ābāunā fatūnā bisulṭānin mubīnin
ayahs.14:11: qālat lahum rusuluhum in naḥnu illā basharun mithlukum walākinna Allāha yamunnu ʿalā man yashāu min ʿibādihi wamā kāna lanā an natiyakum bisulṭānin illā bi-idhni Allāhi waʿalā Allāhi falyatawakkali l-muʾminūna
ayahs.14:12: wamā lanā allā natawakkala ʿalā Allāhi waqad hadānā subulanā walanaṣbiranna ʿalā mā ādhaytumūnā waʿalā Allāhi falyatawakkali l-mutawakilūna
ayahs.14:13: waqāla alladhīna kafarū lirusulihim lanukhrijannakum min arḍinā aw lataʿūdunna fī millatinā fa-awḥā ilayhim rabbuhum lanuhlikanna l-ẓālimīna
ayahs.14:14: walanuskinannakumu l-arḍa min baʿdihim dhālika liman khāfa maqāmī wakhāfa waʿīdi
ayahs.14:16: min warāihi jahannamu wayusqā min māin ṣadīdin
ayahs.14:17: yatajarraʿuhu walā yakādu yusīghuhu wayatīhi l-mawtu min kulli makānin wamā huwa bimayyitin wamin warāihi ʿadhābun ghalīẓun
ayahs.14:18: mathalu alladhīna kafarū birabbihim aʿmāluhum karamādin ishtaddat bihi l-rīḥu fī yawmin ʿāṣifin lā yaqdirūna mimmā kasabū ʿalā shayin dhālika huwa l-ḍalālu l-baʿīdu
ayahs.14:19: alam tara anna Allāha khalaqa l-samāwāti wal-arḍa bil-ḥaqi in yasha yudhhibkum wayati bikhalqin jadīdin
ayahs.14:21: wabarazū lillāhi jamīʿan faqāla l-ḍuʿafāu lilladhīna istakbarū innā kunnā lakum tabaʿan fahal antum mughnūna ʿannā min ʿadhābi Allāhi min shayin qālū law hadānā Allāhu lahadaynākum sawāon ʿalaynā ajaziʿnā am ṣabarnā mā lanā min maḥīṣin
ayahs.14:22: waqāla l-shayṭānu lammā quḍiya l-amru inna Allāha waʿadakum waʿda l-ḥaqi wawaʿadttukum fa-akhlaftukum wamā kāna liya ʿalaykum min sulṭānin illā an daʿawtukum fa-istajabtum lī falā talūmūnī walūmū anfusakum mā anā bimuṣrikhikum wamā antum bimuṣrikhiyya innī kafartu bimā ashraktumūni min qablu inna l-ẓālimīna lahum ʿadhābun alīmun
ayahs.14:23: wa-udkhila alladhīna āmanū waʿamilū l-ṣāliḥāti jannātin tajrī min taḥtihā l-anhāru khālidīna fīhā bi-idhni rabbihim taḥiyyatuhum fīhā salāmun
ayahs.14:24: alam tara kayfa ḍaraba Allāhu mathalan kalimatan ṭayyibatan kashajaratin ṭayyibatin aṣluhā thābitun wafarʿuhā fī l-samāi
ayahs.14:25: tuʾtī ukulahā kulla ḥīnin bi-idhni rabbihā wayaḍribu Allāhu l-amthāla lilnnāsi laʿallahum yatadhakkarūna
ayahs.14:26: wamathalu kalimatin khabīthatin kashajaratin khabīthatin ujtuthat min fawqi l-arḍi mā lahā min qarārin
ayahs.14:27: yuthabbitu Allāhu alladhīna āmanū bil-qawli l-thābiti fī l-ḥayati l-dunyā wafī l-ākhirati wayuḍillu Allāhu l-ẓālimīna wayafʿalu Allāhu mā yashāu
ayahs.14:28: alam tara ilā alladhīna baddalū niʿmata Allāhi kufran wa-aḥallū qawmahum dāra l-bawāri
ayahs.14:30: wajaʿalū lillāhi andādan liyuḍillū ʿan sabīlihi qul tamattaʿū fa-inna maṣīrakum ilā l-nāri
ayahs.14:31: qul liʿibādiya alladhīna āmanū yuqīmū l-ṣalata wayunfiqū mimmā razaqnāhum sirran waʿalāniyatan min qabli an yatiya yawmun lā bayʿun fīhi walā khilālun
ayahs.14:32: Allāhu alladhī khalaqa l-samāwāti wal-arḍa wa-anzala mina l-samāi māʾan fa-akhraja bihi mina l-thamarāti rizqan lakum wasakhara lakumu l-fulka litajriya fī l-baḥri bi-amrihi wasakhara lakumu l-anhāra
ayahs.14:33: wasakhara lakumu l-shamsa wal-qamara dāibayni wasakhara lakumu al-layla wal-nahāra
ayahs.14:34: waʾātākum min kulli mā sa-altumūhu wa-in taʿuddū niʿmata Allāhi lā tuḥṣūhā inna l-insāna laẓalūmun kaffārun
ayahs.14:35: wa-idh qāla ibrāhīmu rabbi ijʿal hādhā l-balada āminan wa-ujnubnī wabaniyya an naʿbuda l-aṣnāma
ayahs.14:36: rabbi innahunna aḍlalna kathīran mina l-nāsi faman tabiʿanī fa-innahu minnī waman ʿaṣānī fa-innaka ghafūrun raḥīmun
ayahs.14:37: rabbanā innī askantu min dhurriyyatī biwādin ghayri dhī zarʿin ʿinda baytika l-muḥarami rabbanā liyuqīmū l-ṣalata fa-ijʿal afidatan mina l-nāsi tahwī ilayhim wa-urzuqhum mina l-thamarāti laʿallahum yashkurūna
ayahs.14:38: rabbanā innaka taʿlamu mā nukhfī wamā nuʿlinu wamā yakhfā ʿalā Allāhi min shayin fī l-arḍi walā fī l-samāi
ayahs.14:39: al-ḥamdu lillāhi alladhī wahaba lī ʿalā l-kibari ismāʿīla wa-isḥāqa inna rabbī lasamīʿu l-duʿāi
ayahs.14:40: rabbi ijʿalnī muqīma l-ṣalati wamin dhurriyyatī rabbanā wataqabbal duʿāi
ayahs.14:41: rabbanā ighfir lī waliwālidayya walilmuʾminīna yawma yaqūmu l-ḥisābu
ayahs.14:42: walā taḥsabanna Allāha ghāfilan ʿammā yaʿmalu l-ẓālimūna innamā yu-akhiruhum liyawmin tashkhaṣu fīhi l-abṣāru
ayahs.14:43: muhṭiʿīna muqniʿī ruʾūsihim lā yartaddu ilayhim ṭarfuhum wa-afidatuhum hawāon
ayahs.14:44: wa-andhiri l-nāsa yawma yatīhimu l-ʿadhābu fayaqūlu alladhīna ẓalamū rabbanā akhirnā ilā ajalin qarībin nujib daʿwataka wanattabiʿi l-rusula awalam takūnū aqsamtum min qablu mā lakum min zawālin
ayahs.14:45: wasakantum fī masākini alladhīna ẓalamū anfusahum watabayyana lakum kayfa faʿalnā bihim waḍarabnā lakumu l-amthāla
ayahs.14:46: waqad makarū makrahum waʿinda Allāhi makruhum wa-in kāna makruhum litazūla minhu l-jibālu
ayahs.14:47: falā taḥsabanna Allāha mukhlifa waʿdihi rusulahu inna Allāha ʿazīzun dhū intiqāmin
ayahs.14:48: yawma tubaddalu l-arḍu ghayra l-arḍi wal-samāwātu wabarazū lillāhi l-wāḥidi l-qahāri
ayahs.14:49: watarā l-mujrimīna yawma-idhin muqarranīna fī l-aṣfādi
ayahs.14:50: sarābīluhum min qaṭirānin wataghshā wujūhahumu l-nāru
ayahs.14:51: liyajziya Allāhu kulla nafsin mā kasabat inna Allāha sarīʿu l-ḥisābi
ayahs.14:52: hādhā balāghun lilnnāsi waliyundharū bihi waliyaʿlamū annamā huwa ilāhun wāḥidun waliyadhakkara ulū l-albābi
ayahs.15:1: alif-lam-ra tilka āyātu l-kitābi waqurānin mubīnin
ayahs.15:2: rubamā yawaddu alladhīna kafarū law kānū muslimīna
ayahs.15:3: dharhum yakulū wayatamattaʿū wayulhihimu l-amalu fasawfa yaʿlamūna
ayahs.15:4: wamā ahlaknā min qaryatin illā walahā kitābun maʿlūmun
ayahs.15:5: mā tasbiqu min ummatin ajalahā wamā yastakhirūna
ayahs.15:6: waqālū yāʾayyuhā alladhī nuzzila ʿalayhi l-dhikru innaka lamajnūnun
ayahs.15:7: law mā tatīnā bil-malāikati in kunta mina l-ṣādiqīna
ayahs.15:8: mā nunazzilu l-malāikata illā bil-ḥaqi wamā kānū idhan munẓarīna
ayahs.15:9: innā naḥnu nazzalnā l-dhikra wa-innā lahu laḥāfiẓūna
ayahs.15:10: walaqad arsalnā min qablika fī shiyaʿi l-awalīna
ayahs.15:11: wamā yatīhim min rasūlin illā kānū bihi yastahziūna
ayahs.15:13: lā yuʾminūna bihi waqad khalat sunnatu l-awalīna
ayahs.15:14: walaw fataḥnā ʿalayhim bāban mina l-samāi faẓallū fīhi yaʿrujūna
ayahs.15:15: laqālū innamā sukkirat abṣārunā bal naḥnu qawmun masḥūrūna
ayahs.15:16: walaqad jaʿalnā fī l-samāi burūjan wazayyannāhā lilnnāẓirīna
ayahs.15:18: illā mani istaraqa l-samʿa fa-atbaʿahu shihābun mubīnun
ayahs.15:19: wal-arḍa madadnāhā wa-alqaynā fīhā rawāsiya wa-anbatnā fīhā min kulli shayin mawzūnin
ayahs.15:20: wajaʿalnā lakum fīhā maʿāyisha waman lastum lahu birāziqīna
ayahs.15:21: wa-in min shayin illā ʿindanā khazāinuhu wamā nunazziluhu illā biqadarin maʿlūmin
ayahs.15:22: wa-arsalnā l-riyāḥa lawāqiḥa fa-anzalnā mina l-samāi māʾan fa-asqaynākumūhu wamā antum lahu bikhāzinīna
ayahs.15:23: wa-innā lanaḥnu nuḥyī wanumītu wanaḥnu l-wārithūna
ayahs.15:24: walaqad ʿalimnā l-mustaqdimīna minkum walaqad ʿalimnā l-mustakhirīna
ayahs.15:25: wa-inna rabbaka huwa yaḥshuruhum innahu ḥakīmun ʿalīmun
ayahs.15:26: walaqad khalaqnā l-insāna min ṣalṣālin min ḥama-in masnūnin
ayahs.15:27: wal-jāna khalaqnāhu min qablu min nāri l-samūmi
ayahs.15:28: wa-idh qāla rabbuka lilmalāikati innī khāliqun basharan min ṣalṣālin min ḥama-in masnūnin
ayahs.15:29: fa-idhā sawwaytuhu wanafakhtu fīhi min rūḥī faqaʿū lahu sājidīna
ayahs.15:31: illā iblīsa abā an yakūna maʿa l-sājidīna
ayahs.15:32: qāla yāiblīsu mā laka allā takūna maʿa l-sājidīna
ayahs.15:33: qāla lam akun li-asjuda libasharin khalaqtahu min ṣalṣālin min ḥama-in masnūnin
ayahs.15:35: wa-inna ʿalayka l-laʿnata ilā yawmi l-dīni
ayahs.15:36: qāla rabbi fa-anẓirnī ilā yawmi yubʿathūna
ayahs.15:39: qāla rabbi bimā aghwaytanī la-uzayyinanna lahum fī l-arḍi wala-ughwiyannahum ajmaʿīna
ayahs.15:42: inna ʿibādī laysa laka ʿalayhim sulṭānun illā mani ittabaʿaka mina l-ghāwīna
ayahs.15:44: lahā sabʿatu abwābin likulli bābin minhum juzon maqsūmun
ayahs.15:47: wanazaʿnā mā fī ṣudūrihim min ghillin ikhwānan ʿalā sururin mutaqābilīna
ayahs.15:48: lā yamassuhum fīhā naṣabun wamā hum minhā bimukhrajīna
ayahs.15:49: nabbi ʿibādī annī anā l-ghafūru l-raḥīmu
ayahs.15:52: idh dakhalū ʿalayhi faqālū salāman qāla innā minkum wajilūna
ayahs.15:53: qālū lā tawjal innā nubashiruka bighulāmin ʿalīmin
ayahs.15:54: qāla abashartumūnī ʿalā an massaniya l-kibaru fabima tubashirūna
ayahs.15:55: qālū basharnāka bil-ḥaqi falā takun mina l-qāniṭīna
ayahs.15:56: qāla waman yaqnaṭu min raḥmati rabbihi illā l-ḍālūna
ayahs.15:58: qālū innā ursilnā ilā qawmin mujrimīna
ayahs.15:59: illā āla lūṭin innā lamunajjūhum ajmaʿīna
ayahs.15:60: illā imra-atahu qaddarnā innahā lamina l-ghābirīna
ayahs.15:63: qālū bal jiʾnāka bimā kānū fīhi yamtarūna
ayahs.15:65: fa-asri bi-ahlika biqiṭʿin mina al-layli wa-ittabiʿ adbārahum walā yaltafit minkum aḥadun wa-imḍū ḥaythu tuʾmarūna
ayahs.15:66: waqaḍaynā ilayhi dhālika l-amra anna dābira hāulāi maqṭūʿun muṣbiḥīna
ayahs.15:68: qāla inna hāulāi ḍayfī falā tafḍaḥūni
ayahs.15:71: qāla hāulāi banātī in kuntum fāʿilīna
ayahs.15:74: fajaʿalnā ʿāliyahā sāfilahā wa-amṭarnā ʿalayhim ḥijāratan min sijjīlin
ayahs.15:82: wakānū yanḥitūna mina l-jibāli buyūtan āminīna
ayahs.15:84: famā aghnā ʿanhum mā kānū yaksibūna
ayahs.15:85: wamā khalaqnā l-samāwāti wal-arḍa wamā baynahumā illā bil-ḥaqi wa-inna l-sāʿata laʾātiyatun fa-iṣfaḥi l-ṣafḥa l-jamīla
ayahs.15:87: walaqad ātaynāka sabʿan mina l-mathānī wal-qurāna l-ʿaẓīma
ayahs.15:88: lā tamuddanna ʿaynayka ilā mā mattaʿnā bihi azwājan minhum walā taḥzan ʿalayhim wa-ikhfiḍ janāḥaka lilmuʾminīna
ayahs.15:94: fa-iṣdaʿ bimā tuʾmaru wa-aʿriḍ ʿani l-mushrikīna
ayahs.15:96: alladhīna yajʿalūna maʿa Allāhi ilāhan ākhara fasawfa yaʿlamūna
ayahs.15:97: walaqad naʿlamu annaka yaḍīqu ṣadruka bimā yaqūlūna
ayahs.15:98: fasabbiḥ biḥamdi rabbika wakun mina l-sājidīna
ayahs.16:1: atā amru Allāhi falā tastaʿjilūhu subḥānahu wataʿālā ʿammā yushrikūna
ayahs.16:2: yunazzilu l-malāikata bil-rūḥi min amrihi ʿalā man yashāu min ʿibādihi an andhirū annahu lā ilāha illā anā fa-ittaqūni
ayahs.16:3: khalaqa l-samāwāti wal-arḍa bil-ḥaqi taʿālā ʿammā yushrikūna
ayahs.16:4: khalaqa l-insāna min nuṭfatin fa-idhā huwa khaṣīmun mubīnun
ayahs.16:5: wal-anʿāma khalaqahā lakum fīhā difon wamanāfiʿu waminhā takulūna
ayahs.16:6: walakum fīhā jamālun ḥīna turīḥūna waḥīna tasraḥūna
ayahs.16:7: wataḥmilu athqālakum ilā baladin lam takūnū bālighīhi illā bishiqqi l-anfusi inna rabbakum laraūfun raḥīmun
ayahs.16:8: wal-khayla wal-bighāla wal-ḥamīra litarkabūhā wazīnatan wayakhluqu mā lā taʿlamūna
ayahs.16:9: waʿalā Allāhi qaṣdu l-sabīli waminhā jāirun walaw shāʾa lahadākum ajmaʿīna
ayahs.16:10: huwa alladhī anzala mina l-samāi māʾan lakum minhu sharābun waminhu shajarun fīhi tusīmūna
ayahs.16:11: yunbitu lakum bihi l-zarʿa wal-zaytūna wal-nakhīla wal-aʿnāba wamin kulli l-thamarāti inna fī dhālika laʾāyatan liqawmin yatafakkarūna
ayahs.16:12: wasakhara lakumu al-layla wal-nahāra wal-shamsa wal-qamara wal-nujūmu musakharātun bi-amrihi inna fī dhālika laʾāyātin liqawmin yaʿqilūna
ayahs.16:13: wamā dhara-a lakum fī l-arḍi mukhtalifan alwānuhu inna fī dhālika laʾāyatan liqawmin yadhakkarūna
ayahs.16:14: wahuwa alladhī sakhara l-baḥra litakulū minhu laḥman ṭariyyan watastakhrijū minhu ḥilyatan talbasūnahā watarā l-fulka mawākhira fīhi walitabtaghū min faḍlihi walaʿallakum tashkurūna
ayahs.16:15: wa-alqā fī l-arḍi rawāsiya an tamīda bikum wa-anhāran wasubulan laʿallakum tahtadūna
ayahs.16:17: afaman yakhluqu kaman lā yakhluqu afalā tadhakkarūna
ayahs.16:18: wa-in taʿuddū niʿmata Allāhi lā tuḥṣūhā inna Allāha laghafūrun raḥīmun
ayahs.16:19: wallāhu yaʿlamu mā tusirrūna wamā tuʿlinūna
ayahs.16:20: wa-alladhīna yadʿūna min dūni Allāhi lā yakhluqūna shayan wahum yukhlaqūna
ayahs.16:21: amwātun ghayru aḥyāin wamā yashʿurūna ayyāna yubʿathūna
ayahs.16:22: ilāhukum ilāhun wāḥidun fa-alladhīna lā yuʾminūna bil-ākhirati qulūbuhum munkiratun wahum mustakbirūna
ayahs.16:23: lā jarama anna Allāha yaʿlamu mā yusirrūna wamā yuʿlinūna innahu lā yuḥibbu l-mustakbirīna
ayahs.16:24: wa-idhā qīla lahum mādhā anzala rabbukum qālū asāṭīru l-awalīna
ayahs.16:25: liyaḥmilū awzārahum kāmilatan yawma l-qiyāmati wamin awzāri alladhīna yuḍillūnahum bighayri ʿilmin alā sāʾa mā yazirūna
ayahs.16:26: qad makara alladhīna min qablihim fa-atā Allāhu bunyānahum mina l-qawāʿidi fakharra ʿalayhimu l-saqfu min fawqihim wa-atāhumu l-ʿadhābu min ḥaythu lā yashʿurūna
ayahs.16:27: thumma yawma l-qiyāmati yukhzīhim wayaqūlu ayna shurakāiya alladhīna kuntum tushāqqūna fīhim qāla alladhīna ūtū l-ʿilma inna l-khizya l-yawma wal-sūa ʿalā l-kāfirīna
ayahs.16:28: alladhīna tatawaffāhumu l-malāikatu ẓālimī anfusihim fa-alqawū l-salama mā kunnā naʿmalu min sūin balā inna Allāha ʿalīmun bimā kuntum taʿmalūna
ayahs.16:29: fa-udkhulū abwāba jahannama khālidīna fīhā falabiʾsa mathwā l-mutakabirīna
ayahs.16:30: waqīla lilladhīna ittaqaw mādhā anzala rabbukum qālū khayran lilladhīna aḥsanū fī hādhihi l-dunyā ḥasanatun waladāru l-ākhirati khayrun walaniʿma dāru l-mutaqīna
ayahs.16:31: jannātu ʿadnin yadkhulūnahā tajrī min taḥtihā l-anhāru lahum fīhā mā yashāūna kadhālika yajzī Allāhu l-mutaqīna
ayahs.16:32: alladhīna tatawaffāhumu l-malāikatu ṭayyibīna yaqūlūna salāmun ʿalaykumu udkhulū l-janata bimā kuntum taʿmalūna
ayahs.16:33: hal yanẓurūna illā an tatiyahumu l-malāikatu aw yatiya amru rabbika kadhālika faʿala alladhīna min qablihim wamā ẓalamahumu Allāhu walākin kānū anfusahum yaẓlimūna
ayahs.16:34: fa-aṣābahum sayyiātu mā ʿamilū waḥāqa bihim mā kānū bihi yastahziūna
ayahs.16:35: waqāla alladhīna ashrakū law shāʾa Allāhu mā ʿabadnā min dūnihi min shayin naḥnu walā ābāunā walā ḥarramnā min dūnihi min shayin kadhālika faʿala alladhīna min qablihim fahal ʿalā l-rusuli illā l-balāghu l-mubīnu
ayahs.16:36: walaqad baʿathnā fī kulli ummatin rasūlan ani uʿbudū Allāha wa-ijtanibū l-ṭāghūta faminhum man hadā Allāhu waminhum man ḥaqqat ʿalayhi l-ḍalālatu fasīrū fī l-arḍi fa-unẓurū kayfa kāna ʿāqibatu l-mukadhibīna
ayahs.16:37: in taḥriṣ ʿalā hudāhum fa-inna Allāha lā yahdī man yuḍillu wamā lahum min nāṣirīna
ayahs.16:38: wa-aqsamū billāhi jahda aymānihim lā yabʿathu Allāhu man yamūtu balā waʿdan ʿalayhi ḥaqqan walākinna akthara l-nāsi lā yaʿlamūna
ayahs.16:39: liyubayyina lahumu alladhī yakhtalifūna fīhi waliyaʿlama alladhīna kafarū annahum kānū kādhibīna
ayahs.16:40: innamā qawlunā lishayin idhā aradnāhu an naqūla lahu kun fayakūnu
ayahs.16:41: wa-alladhīna hājarū fī Allāhi min baʿdi mā ẓulimū lanubawwi-annahum fī l-dunyā ḥasanatan wala-ajru l-ākhirati akbaru law kānū yaʿlamūna
ayahs.16:43: wamā arsalnā min qablika illā rijālan nūḥī ilayhim fasalū ahla l-dhikri in kuntum lā taʿlamūna
ayahs.16:44: bil-bayināti wal-zuburi wa-anzalnā ilayka l-dhikra litubayyina lilnnāsi mā nuzzila ilayhim walaʿallahum yatafakkarūna
ayahs.16:45: afa-amina alladhīna makarū l-sayiāti an yakhsifa Allāhu bihimu l-arḍa aw yatiyahumu l-ʿadhābu min ḥaythu lā yashʿurūna
ayahs.16:46: aw yakhudhahum fī taqallubihim famā hum bimuʿjizīna
ayahs.16:47: aw yakhudhahum ʿalā takhawwufin fa-inna rabbakum laraūfun raḥīmun
ayahs.16:48: awalam yaraw ilā mā khalaqa Allāhu min shayin yatafayya-u ẓilāluhu ʿani l-yamīni wal-shamāili sujjadan lillāhi wahum dākhirūna
ayahs.16:49: walillahi yasjudu mā fī l-samāwāti wamā fī l-arḍi min dābbatin wal-malāikatu wahum lā yastakbirūna
ayahs.16:50: yakhāfūna rabbahum min fawqihim wayafʿalūna mā yuʾmarūna
ayahs.16:51: waqāla Allāhu lā tattakhidhū ilāhayni ithnayni innamā huwa ilāhun wāḥidun fa-iyyāya fa-irhabūni
ayahs.16:52: walahu mā fī l-samāwāti wal-arḍi walahu l-dīnu wāṣiban afaghayra Allāhi tattaqūna
ayahs.16:53: wamā bikum min niʿmatin famina Allāhi thumma idhā massakumu l-ḍuru fa-ilayhi tajarūna
ayahs.16:54: thumma idhā kashafa l-ḍura ʿankum idhā farīqun minkum birabbihim yushrikūna
ayahs.16:55: liyakfurū bimā ātaynāhum fatamattaʿū fasawfa taʿlamūna
ayahs.16:56: wayajʿalūna limā lā yaʿlamūna naṣīban mimmā razaqnāhum tallāhi latusalunna ʿammā kuntum taftarūna
ayahs.16:57: wayajʿalūna lillāhi l-banāti subḥānahu walahum mā yashtahūna
ayahs.16:58: wa-idhā bushira aḥaduhum bil-unthā ẓalla wajhuhu muswaddan wahuwa kaẓīmun
ayahs.16:59: yatawārā mina l-qawmi min sūi mā bushira bihi ayumsikuhu ʿalā hūnin am yadussuhu fī l-turābi alā sāʾa mā yaḥkumūna
ayahs.16:60: lilladhīna lā yuʾminūna bil-ākhirati mathalu l-sawi walillahi l-mathalu l-aʿlā wahuwa l-ʿazīzu l-ḥakīmu
ayahs.16:61: walaw yuākhidhu Allāhu l-nāsa biẓulmihim mā taraka ʿalayhā min dābbatin walākin yu-akhiruhum ilā ajalin musamman fa-idhā jāʾa ajaluhum lā yastakhirūna sāʿatan walā yastaqdimūna
ayahs.16:62: wayajʿalūna lillāhi mā yakrahūna wataṣifu alsinatuhumu l-kadhiba anna lahumu l-ḥusnā lā jarama anna lahumu l-nāra wa-annahum mufraṭūna
ayahs.16:63: tallāhi laqad arsalnā ilā umamin min qablika fazayyana lahumu l-shayṭānu aʿmālahum fahuwa waliyyuhumu l-yawma walahum ʿadhābun alīmun
ayahs.16:64: wamā anzalnā ʿalayka l-kitāba illā litubayyina lahumu alladhī ikhtalafū fīhi wahudan waraḥmatan liqawmin yuʾminūna
ayahs.16:65: wallāhu anzala mina l-samāi māʾan fa-aḥyā bihi l-arḍa baʿda mawtihā inna fī dhālika laʾāyatan liqawmin yasmaʿūna
ayahs.16:66: wa-inna lakum fī l-anʿāmi laʿibratan nusqīkum mimmā fī buṭūnihi min bayni farthin wadamin labanan khāliṣan sāighan lilshāribīna
ayahs.16:67: wamin thamarāti l-nakhīli wal-aʿnābi tattakhidhūna minhu sakaran warizqan ḥasanan inna fī dhālika laʾāyatan liqawmin yaʿqilūna
ayahs.16:68: wa-awḥā rabbuka ilā l-naḥli ani ittakhidhī mina l-jibāli buyūtan wamina l-shajari wamimmā yaʿrishūna
ayahs.16:69: thumma kulī min kulli l-thamarāti fa-uslukī subula rabbiki dhululan yakhruju min buṭūnihā sharābun mukhtalifun alwānuhu fīhi shifāon lilnnāsi inna fī dhālika laʾāyatan liqawmin yatafakkarūna
ayahs.16:70: wallāhu khalaqakum thumma yatawaffākum waminkum man yuraddu ilā ardhali l-ʿumuri likay lā yaʿlama baʿda ʿilmin shayan inna Allāha ʿalīmun qadīrun
ayahs.16:71: wallāhu faḍḍala baʿḍakum ʿalā baʿḍin fī l-rizqi famā alladhīna fuḍḍilū birāddī rizqihim ʿalā mā malakat aymānuhum fahum fīhi sawāon afabiniʿmati Allāhi yajḥadūna
ayahs.16:72: wallāhu jaʿala lakum min anfusikum azwājan wajaʿala lakum min azwājikum banīna waḥafadatan warazaqakum mina l-ṭayibāti afabil-bāṭili yuʾminūna wabiniʿmati Allāhi hum yakfurūna
ayahs.16:73: wayaʿbudūna min dūni Allāhi mā lā yamliku lahum rizqan mina l-samāwāti wal-arḍi shayan walā yastaṭīʿūna
ayahs.16:74: falā taḍribū lillāhi l-amthāla inna Allāha yaʿlamu wa-antum lā taʿlamūna
ayahs.16:75: ḍaraba Allāhu mathalan ʿabdan mamlūkan lā yaqdiru ʿalā shayin waman razaqnāhu minnā rizqan ḥasanan fahuwa yunfiqu minhu sirran wajahran hal yastawūna l-ḥamdu lillāhi bal aktharuhum lā yaʿlamūna
ayahs.16:76: waḍaraba Allāhu mathalan rajulayni aḥaduhumā abkamu lā yaqdiru ʿalā shayin wahuwa kallun ʿalā mawlāhu aynamā yuwajjihhu lā yati bikhayrin hal yastawī huwa waman yamuru bil-ʿadli wahuwa ʿalā ṣirāṭin mustaqīmin
ayahs.16:77: walillahi ghaybu l-samāwāti wal-arḍi wamā amru l-sāʿati illā kalamḥi l-baṣari aw huwa aqrabu inna Allāha ʿalā kulli shayin qadīrun
ayahs.16:78: wallāhu akhrajakum min buṭūni ummahātikum lā taʿlamūna shayan wajaʿala lakumu l-samʿa wal-abṣāra wal-afidata laʿallakum tashkurūna
ayahs.16:79: alam yaraw ilā l-ṭayri musakharātin fī jawwi l-samāi mā yumsikuhunna illā Allāhu inna fī dhālika laʾāyātin liqawmin yuʾminūna
ayahs.16:80: wallāhu jaʿala lakum min buyūtikum sakanan wajaʿala lakum min julūdi l-anʿāmi buyūtan tastakhiffūnahā yawma ẓaʿnikum wayawma iqāmatikum wamin aṣwāfihā wa-awbārihā wa-ashʿārihā athāthan wamatāʿan ilā ḥīnin
ayahs.16:81: wallāhu jaʿala lakum mimmā khalaqa ẓilālan wajaʿala lakum mina l-jibāli aknānan wajaʿala lakum sarābīla taqīkumu l-ḥara wasarābīla taqīkum basakum kadhālika yutimmu niʿmatahu ʿalaykum laʿallakum tuslimūna
ayahs.16:82: fa-in tawallaw fa-innamā ʿalayka l-balāghu l-mubīnu
ayahs.16:83: yaʿrifūna niʿmata Allāhi thumma yunkirūnahā wa-aktharuhumu l-kāfirūna
ayahs.16:84: wayawma nabʿathu min kulli ummatin shahīdan thumma lā yuʾdhanu lilladhīna kafarū walā hum yustaʿtabūna
ayahs.16:85: wa-idhā raʾā alladhīna ẓalamū l-ʿadhāba falā yukhaffafu ʿanhum walā hum yunẓarūna
ayahs.16:86: wa-idhā raʾā alladhīna ashrakū shurakāʾahum qālū rabbanā hāulāi shurakāunā alladhīna kunnā nadʿū min dūnika fa-alqaw ilayhimu l-qawla innakum lakādhibūna
ayahs.16:87: wa-alqaw ilā Allāhi yawma-idhin l-salama waḍalla ʿanhum mā kānū yaftarūna
ayahs.16:88: alladhīna kafarū waṣaddū ʿan sabīli Allāhi zidnāhum ʿadhāban fawqa l-ʿadhābi bimā kānū yufsidūna
ayahs.16:89: wayawma nabʿathu fī kulli ummatin shahīdan ʿalayhim min anfusihim wajiʾnā bika shahīdan ʿalā hāulāi wanazzalnā ʿalayka l-kitāba tibyānan likulli shayin wahudan waraḥmatan wabushrā lilmuslimīna
ayahs.16:90: inna Allāha yamuru bil-ʿadli wal-iḥsāni waītāi dhī l-qurbā wayanhā ʿani l-faḥshāi wal-munkari wal-baghyi yaʿiẓukum laʿallakum tadhakkarūna
ayahs.16:91: wa-awfū biʿahdi Allāhi idhā ʿāhadttum walā tanquḍū l-aymāna baʿda tawkīdihā waqad jaʿaltumu Allāha ʿalaykum kafīlan inna Allāha yaʿlamu mā tafʿalūna
ayahs.16:92: walā takūnū ka-allatī naqaḍat ghazlahā min baʿdi quwwatin ankāthan tattakhidhūna aymānakum dakhalan baynakum an takūna ummatun hiya arbā min ummatin innamā yablūkumu Allāhu bihi walayubayyinanna lakum yawma l-qiyāmati mā kuntum fīhi takhtalifūna
ayahs.16:93: walaw shāʾa Allāhu lajaʿalakum ummatan wāḥidatan walākin yuḍillu man yashāu wayahdī man yashāu walatusalunna ʿammā kuntum taʿmalūna
ayahs.16:94: walā tattakhidhū aymānakum dakhalan baynakum fatazilla qadamun baʿda thubūtihā watadhūqū l-sūa bimā ṣadadttum ʿan sabīli Allāhi walakum ʿadhābun ʿaẓīmun
ayahs.16:95: walā tashtarū biʿahdi Allāhi thamanan qalīlan innamā ʿinda Allāhi huwa khayrun lakum in kuntum taʿlamūna
ayahs.16:96: mā ʿindakum yanfadu wamā ʿinda Allāhi bāqin walanajziyanna alladhīna ṣabarū ajrahum bi-aḥsani mā kānū yaʿmalūna
ayahs.16:97: man ʿamila ṣāliḥan min dhakarin aw unthā wahuwa muʾminun falanuḥyiyannahu ḥayatan ṭayyibatan walanajziyannahum ajrahum bi-aḥsani mā kānū yaʿmalūna
ayahs.16:98: fa-idhā qarata l-qurāna fa-istaʿidh billāhi mina l-shayṭāni l-rajīmi
ayahs.16:99: innahu laysa lahu sulṭānun ʿalā alladhīna āmanū waʿalā rabbihim yatawakkalūna
ayahs.16:100: innamā sulṭānuhu ʿalā alladhīna yatawallawnahu wa-alladhīna hum bihi mushrikūna
ayahs.16:101: wa-idhā baddalnā āyatan makāna āyatin wallāhu aʿlamu bimā yunazzilu qālū innamā anta muftarin bal aktharuhum lā yaʿlamūna
ayahs.16:102: qul nazzalahu rūḥu l-qudusi min rabbika bil-ḥaqi liyuthabbita alladhīna āmanū wahudan wabushrā lilmuslimīna
ayahs.16:103: walaqad naʿlamu annahum yaqūlūna innamā yuʿallimuhu basharun lisānu alladhī yulḥidūna ilayhi aʿjamiyyun wahādhā lisānun ʿarabiyyun mubīnun
ayahs.16:104: inna alladhīna lā yuʾminūna biāyāti Allāhi lā yahdīhimu Allāhu walahum ʿadhābun alīmun
ayahs.16:105: innamā yaftarī l-kadhiba alladhīna lā yuʾminūna biāyāti Allāhi wa-ulāika humu l-kādhibūna
ayahs.16:106: man kafara billāhi min baʿdi īmānihi illā man ukriha waqalbuhu muṭma-innun bil-īmāni walākin man sharaḥa bil-kufri ṣadran faʿalayhim ghaḍabun mina Allāhi walahum ʿadhābun ʿaẓīmun
ayahs.16:107: dhālika bi-annahumu istaḥabbū l-ḥayata l-dunyā ʿalā l-ākhirati wa-anna Allāha lā yahdī l-qawma l-kāfirīna
ayahs.16:108: ulāika alladhīna ṭabaʿa Allāhu ʿalā qulūbihim wasamʿihim wa-abṣārihim wa-ulāika humu l-ghāfilūna
ayahs.16:109: lā jarama annahum fī l-ākhirati humu l-khāsirūna
ayahs.16:110: thumma inna rabbaka lilladhīna hājarū min baʿdi mā futinū thumma jāhadū waṣabarū inna rabbaka min baʿdihā laghafūrun raḥīmun
ayahs.16:111: yawma tatī kullu nafsin tujādilu ʿan nafsihā watuwaffā kullu nafsin mā ʿamilat wahum lā yuẓlamūna
ayahs.16:112: waḍaraba Allāhu mathalan qaryatan kānat āminatan muṭma-innatan yatīhā rizquhā raghadan min kulli makānin fakafarat bi-anʿumi Allāhi fa-adhāqahā Allāhu libāsa l-jūʿi wal-khawfi bimā kānū yaṣnaʿūna
ayahs.16:113: walaqad jāʾahum rasūlun minhum fakadhabūhu fa-akhadhahumu l-ʿadhābu wahum ẓālimūna
ayahs.16:114: fakulū mimmā razaqakumu Allāhu ḥalālan ṭayyiban wa-ushkurū niʿmata Allāhi in kuntum iyyāhu taʿbudūna
ayahs.16:115: innamā ḥarrama ʿalaykumu l-maytata wal-dama walaḥma l-khinzīri wamā uhilla lighayri Allāhi bihi famani uḍṭurra ghayra bāghin walā ʿādin fa-inna Allāha ghafūrun raḥīmun
ayahs.16:116: walā taqūlū limā taṣifu alsinatukumu l-kadhiba hādhā ḥalālun wahādhā ḥarāmun litaftarū ʿalā Allāhi l-kadhiba inna alladhīna yaftarūna ʿalā Allāhi l-kadhiba lā yufliḥūna
ayahs.16:118: waʿalā alladhīna hādū ḥarramnā mā qaṣaṣnā ʿalayka min qablu wamā ẓalamnāhum walākin kānū anfusahum yaẓlimūna
ayahs.16:119: thumma inna rabbaka lilladhīna ʿamilū l-sūa bijahālatin thumma tābū min baʿdi dhālika wa-aṣlaḥū inna rabbaka min baʿdihā laghafūrun raḥīmun
ayahs.16:120: inna ibrāhīma kāna ummatan qānitan lillāhi ḥanīfan walam yaku mina l-mushrikīna
ayahs.16:121: shākiran li-anʿumihi ijtabāhu wahadāhu ilā ṣirāṭin mustaqīmin
ayahs.16:122: waʾātaynāhu fī l-dunyā ḥasanatan wa-innahu fī l-ākhirati lamina l-ṣāliḥīna
ayahs.16:123: thumma awḥaynā ilayka ani ittabiʿ millata ibrāhīma ḥanīfan wamā kāna mina l-mushrikīna
ayahs.16:124: innamā juʿila l-sabtu ʿalā alladhīna ikhtalafū fīhi wa-inna rabbaka layaḥkumu baynahum yawma l-qiyāmati fīmā kānū fīhi yakhtalifūna
ayahs.16:125: udʿu ilā sabīli rabbika bil-ḥikmati wal-mawʿiẓati l-ḥasanati wajādilhum bi-allatī hiya aḥsanu inna rabbaka huwa aʿlamu biman ḍalla ʿan sabīlihi wahuwa aʿlamu bil-muhtadīna
ayahs.16:126: wa-in ʿāqabtum faʿāqibū bimithli mā ʿūqibtum bihi wala-in ṣabartum lahuwa khayrun lilṣṣābirīna
ayahs.16:127: wa-iṣbir wamā ṣabruka illā billāhi walā taḥzan ʿalayhim walā taku fī ḍayqin mimmā yamkurūna
ayahs.16:128: inna Allāha maʿa alladhīna ittaqaw wa-alladhīna hum muḥsinūna
ayahs.17:1: subḥāna alladhī asrā biʿabdihi laylan mina l-masjidi l-ḥarāmi ilā l-masjidi l-aqṣā alladhī bāraknā ḥawlahu linuriyahu min āyātinā innahu huwa l-samīʿu l-baṣīru
ayahs.17:2: waʾātaynā mūsā l-kitāba wajaʿalnāhu hudan libanī isrāīla allā tattakhidhū min dūnī wakīlan
ayahs.17:3: dhurriyyata man ḥamalnā maʿa nūḥin innahu kāna ʿabdan shakūran
ayahs.17:4: waqaḍaynā ilā banī isrāīla fī l-kitābi latufsidunna fī l-arḍi marratayni walataʿlunna ʿuluwwan kabīran
ayahs.17:5: fa-idhā jāʾa waʿdu ūlāhumā baʿathnā ʿalaykum ʿibādan lanā ulī basin shadīdin fajāsū khilāla l-diyāri wakāna waʿdan mafʿūlan
ayahs.17:6: thumma radadnā lakumu l-karata ʿalayhim wa-amdadnākum bi-amwālin wabanīna wajaʿalnākum akthara nafīran
ayahs.17:7: in aḥsantum aḥsantum li-anfusikum wa-in asatum falahā fa-idhā jāʾa waʿdu l-ākhirati liyasūū wujūhakum waliyadkhulū l-masjida kamā dakhalūhu awwala marratin waliyutabbirū mā ʿalaw tatbīran
ayahs.17:8: ʿasā rabbukum an yarḥamakum wa-in ʿudttum ʿudnā wajaʿalnā jahannama lilkāfirīna ḥaṣīran
ayahs.17:9: inna hādhā l-qurāna yahdī lillatī hiya aqwamu wayubashiru l-muʾminīna alladhīna yaʿmalūna l-ṣāliḥāti anna lahum ajran kabīran
ayahs.17:10: wa-anna alladhīna lā yuʾminūna bil-ākhirati aʿtadnā lahum ʿadhāban alīman
ayahs.17:11: wayadʿu l-insānu bil-shari duʿāʾahu bil-khayri wakāna l-insānu ʿajūlan
ayahs.17:12: wajaʿalnā al-layla wal-nahāra āyatayni famaḥawnā āyata al-layli wajaʿalnā āyata l-nahāri mubṣiratan litabtaghū faḍlan min rabbikum walitaʿlamū ʿadada l-sinīna wal-ḥisāba wakulla shayin faṣṣalnāhu tafṣīlan
ayahs.17:13: wakulla insānin alzamnāhu ṭāirahu fī ʿunuqihi wanukhriju lahu yawma l-qiyāmati kitāban yalqāhu manshūran
ayahs.17:14: iqra kitābaka kafā binafsika l-yawma ʿalayka ḥasīban
ayahs.17:15: mani ihtadā fa-innamā yahtadī linafsihi waman ḍalla fa-innamā yaḍillu ʿalayhā walā taziru wāziratun wizra ukhrā wamā kunnā muʿadhibīna ḥattā nabʿatha rasūlan
ayahs.17:16: wa-idhā aradnā an nuhlika qaryatan amarnā mutrafīhā fafasaqū fīhā faḥaqqa ʿalayhā l-qawlu fadammarnāhā tadmīran
ayahs.17:17: wakam ahlaknā mina l-qurūni min baʿdi nūḥin wakafā birabbika bidhunūbi ʿibādihi khabīran baṣīran
ayahs.17:18: man kāna yurīdu l-ʿājilata ʿajjalnā lahu fīhā mā nashāu liman nurīdu thumma jaʿalnā lahu jahannama yaṣlāhā madhmūman madḥūran
ayahs.17:19: waman arāda l-ākhirata wasaʿā lahā saʿyahā wahuwa muʾminun fa-ulāika kāna saʿyuhum mashkūran
ayahs.17:20: kullan numiddu hāulāi wahāulāi min ʿaṭāi rabbika wamā kāna ʿaṭāu rabbika maḥẓūran
ayahs.17:21: unẓur kayfa faḍḍalnā baʿḍahum ʿalā baʿḍin walalākhiratu akbaru darajātin wa-akbaru tafḍīlan
ayahs.17:22: lā tajʿal maʿa Allāhi ilāhan ākhara fataqʿuda madhmūman makhdhūlan
ayahs.17:23: waqaḍā rabbuka allā taʿbudū illā iyyāhu wabil-wālidayni iḥsānan immā yablughanna ʿindaka l-kibara aḥaduhumā aw kilāhumā falā taqul lahumā uffin walā tanharhumā waqul lahumā qawlan karīman
ayahs.17:24: wa-ikhfiḍ lahumā janāḥa l-dhuli mina l-raḥmati waqul rabbi irḥamhumā kamā rabbayānī ṣaghīran
ayahs.17:25: rabbukum aʿlamu bimā fī nufūsikum in takūnū ṣāliḥīna fa-innahu kāna lilawwābīna ghafūran
ayahs.17:26: waʾāti dhā l-qurbā ḥaqqahu wal-miskīna wa-ibna l-sabīli walā tubadhir tabdhīran
ayahs.17:27: inna l-mubadhirīna kānū ikhwāna l-shayāṭīni wakāna l-shayṭānu lirabbihi kafūran
ayahs.17:28: wa-immā tuʿriḍanna ʿanhumu ibtighāʾa raḥmatin min rabbika tarjūhā faqul lahum qawlan maysūran
ayahs.17:29: walā tajʿal yadaka maghlūlatan ilā ʿunuqika walā tabsuṭhā kulla l-basṭi fataqʿuda malūman maḥsūran
ayahs.17:30: inna rabbaka yabsuṭu l-rizqa liman yashāu wayaqdiru innahu kāna biʿibādihi khabīran baṣīran
ayahs.17:31: walā taqtulū awlādakum khashyata imlāqin naḥnu narzuquhum wa-iyyākum inna qatlahum kāna khiṭan kabīran
ayahs.17:32: walā taqrabū l-zinā innahu kāna fāḥishatan wasāʾa sabīlan
ayahs.17:33: walā taqtulū l-nafsa allatī ḥarrama Allāhu illā bil-ḥaqi waman qutila maẓlūman faqad jaʿalnā liwaliyyihi sulṭānan falā yusrif fī l-qatli innahu kāna manṣūran
ayahs.17:34: walā taqrabū māla l-yatīmi illā bi-allatī hiya aḥsanu ḥattā yablugha ashuddahu wa-awfū bil-ʿahdi inna l-ʿahda kāna masūlan
ayahs.17:35: wa-awfū l-kayla idhā kiltum wazinū bil-qisṭāsi l-mustaqīmi dhālika khayrun wa-aḥsanu tawīlan
ayahs.17:36: walā taqfu mā laysa laka bihi ʿilmun inna l-samʿa wal-baṣara wal-fuāda kullu ulāika kāna ʿanhu masūlan
ayahs.17:37: walā tamshi fī l-arḍi maraḥan innaka lan takhriqa l-arḍa walan tablugha l-jibāla ṭūlan
ayahs.17:38: kullu dhālika kāna sayyi-uhu ʿinda rabbika makrūhan
ayahs.17:39: dhālika mimmā awḥā ilayka rabbuka mina l-ḥikmati walā tajʿal maʿa Allāhi ilāhan ākhara fatulqā fī jahannama malūman madḥūran
ayahs.17:40: afa-aṣfākum rabbukum bil-banīna wa-ittakhadha mina l-malāikati ināthan innakum lataqūlūna qawlan ʿaẓīman
ayahs.17:41: walaqad ṣarrafnā fī hādhā l-qurāni liyadhakkarū wamā yazīduhum illā nufūran
ayahs.17:42: qul law kāna maʿahu ālihatun kamā yaqūlūna idhan la-ibtaghaw ilā dhī l-ʿarshi sabīlan
ayahs.17:43: subḥānahu wataʿālā ʿammā yaqūlūna ʿuluwwan kabīran
ayahs.17:44: tusabbiḥu lahu l-samāwātu l-sabʿu wal-arḍu waman fīhinna wa-in min shayin illā yusabbiḥu biḥamdihi walākin lā tafqahūna tasbīḥahum innahu kāna ḥalīman ghafūran
ayahs.17:45: wa-idhā qarata l-qurāna jaʿalnā baynaka wabayna alladhīna lā yuʾminūna bil-ākhirati ḥijāban mastūran
ayahs.17:46: wajaʿalnā ʿalā qulūbihim akinnatan an yafqahūhu wafī ādhānihim waqran wa-idhā dhakarta rabbaka fī l-qurāni waḥdahu wallaw ʿalā adbārihim nufūran
ayahs.17:47: naḥnu aʿlamu bimā yastamiʿūna bihi idh yastamiʿūna ilayka wa-idh hum najwā idh yaqūlu l-ẓālimūna in tattabiʿūna illā rajulan masḥūran
ayahs.17:48: unẓur kayfa ḍarabū laka l-amthāla faḍallū falā yastaṭīʿūna sabīlan
ayahs.17:49: waqālū a-idhā kunnā ʿiẓāman warufātan a-innā lamabʿūthūna khalqan jadīdan
ayahs.17:51: aw khalqan mimmā yakburu fī ṣudūrikum fasayaqūlūna man yuʿīdunā quli alladhī faṭarakum awwala marratin fasayunghiḍūna ilayka ruʾūsahum wayaqūlūna matā huwa qul ʿasā an yakūna qarīban
ayahs.17:52: yawma yadʿūkum fatastajībūna biḥamdihi wataẓunnūna in labithtum illā qalīlan
ayahs.17:53: waqul liʿibādī yaqūlū allatī hiya aḥsanu inna l-shayṭāna yanzaghu baynahum inna l-shayṭāna kāna lilinsāni ʿaduwwan mubīnan
ayahs.17:54: rabbukum aʿlamu bikum in yasha yarḥamkum aw in yasha yuʿadhibkum wamā arsalnāka ʿalayhim wakīlan
ayahs.17:55: warabbuka aʿlamu biman fī l-samāwāti wal-arḍi walaqad faḍḍalnā baʿḍa l-nabiyīna ʿalā baʿḍin waʾātaynā dāwūda zabūran
ayahs.17:56: quli idʿū alladhīna zaʿamtum min dūnihi falā yamlikūna kashfa l-ḍuri ʿankum walā taḥwīlan
ayahs.17:57: ulāika alladhīna yadʿūna yabtaghūna ilā rabbihimu l-wasīlata ayyuhum aqrabu wayarjūna raḥmatahu wayakhāfūna ʿadhābahu inna ʿadhāba rabbika kāna maḥdhūran
ayahs.17:58: wa-in min qaryatin illā naḥnu muhlikūhā qabla yawmi l-qiyāmati aw muʿadhibūhā ʿadhāban shadīdan kāna dhālika fī l-kitābi masṭūran
ayahs.17:59: wamā manaʿanā an nursila bil-āyāti illā an kadhaba bihā l-awalūna waʾātaynā thamūda l-nāqata mubṣiratan faẓalamū bihā wamā nursilu bil-āyāti illā takhwīfan
ayahs.17:60: wa-idh qulnā laka inna rabbaka aḥāṭa bil-nāsi wamā jaʿalnā l-ruʾyā allatī araynāka illā fitnatan lilnnāsi wal-shajarata l-malʿūnata fī l-qurāni wanukhawwifuhum famā yazīduhum illā ṭughyānan kabīran
ayahs.17:61: wa-idh qulnā lilmalāikati usjudū liādama fasajadū illā iblīsa qāla a-asjudu liman khalaqta ṭīnan
ayahs.17:62: qāla ara-aytaka hādhā alladhī karramta ʿalayya la-in akhartani ilā yawmi l-qiyāmati la-aḥtanikanna dhurriyyatahu illā qalīlan
ayahs.17:63: qāla idhhab faman tabiʿaka minhum fa-inna jahannama jazāukum jazāʾan mawfūran
ayahs.17:64: wa-istafziz mani istaṭaʿta minhum biṣawtika wa-ajlib ʿalayhim bikhaylika warajilika washārikhum fī l-amwāli wal-awlādi waʿidhum wamā yaʿiduhumu l-shayṭānu illā ghurūran
ayahs.17:65: inna ʿibādī laysa laka ʿalayhim sulṭānun wakafā birabbika wakīlan
ayahs.17:66: rabbukumu alladhī yuzjī lakumu l-fulka fī l-baḥri litabtaghū min faḍlihi innahu kāna bikum raḥīman
ayahs.17:67: wa-idhā massakumu l-ḍuru fī l-baḥri ḍalla man tadʿūna illā iyyāhu falammā najjākum ilā l-bari aʿraḍtum wakāna l-insānu kafūran
ayahs.17:68: afa-amintum an yakhsifa bikum jāniba l-bari aw yursila ʿalaykum ḥāṣiban thumma lā tajidū lakum wakīlan
ayahs.17:69: am amintum an yuʿīdakum fīhi tāratan ukhrā fayursila ʿalaykum qāṣifan mina l-rīḥi fayughriqakum bimā kafartum thumma lā tajidū lakum ʿalaynā bihi tabīʿan
ayahs.17:70: walaqad karramnā banī ādama waḥamalnāhum fī l-bari wal-baḥri warazaqnāhum mina l-ṭayibāti wafaḍḍalnāhum ʿalā kathīrin mimman khalaqnā tafḍīlan
ayahs.17:71: yawma nadʿū kulla unāsin bi-imāmihim faman ūtiya kitābahu biyamīnihi fa-ulāika yaqraūna kitābahum walā yuẓlamūna fatīlan
ayahs.17:72: waman kāna fī hādhihi aʿmā fahuwa fī l-ākhirati aʿmā wa-aḍallu sabīlan
ayahs.17:73: wa-in kādū layaftinūnaka ʿani alladhī awḥaynā ilayka litaftariya ʿalaynā ghayrahu wa-idhan la-ittakhadhūka khalīlan
ayahs.17:74: walawlā an thabbatnāka laqad kidtta tarkanu ilayhim shayan qalīlan
ayahs.17:75: idhan la-adhaqnāka ḍiʿfa l-ḥayati waḍiʿfa l-mamāti thumma lā tajidu laka ʿalaynā naṣīran
ayahs.17:76: wa-in kādū layastafizzūnaka mina l-arḍi liyukhrijūka minhā wa-idhan lā yalbathūna khilāfaka illā qalīlan
ayahs.17:77: sunnata man qad arsalnā qablaka min rusulinā walā tajidu lisunnatinā taḥwīlan
ayahs.17:78: aqimi l-ṣalata lidulūki l-shamsi ilā ghasaqi al-layli waqurāna l-fajri inna qurāna l-fajri kāna mashhūdan
ayahs.17:79: wamina al-layli fatahajjad bihi nāfilatan laka ʿasā an yabʿathaka rabbuka maqāman maḥmūdan
ayahs.17:80: waqul rabbi adkhilnī mudkhala ṣidqin wa-akhrijnī mukhraja ṣidqin wa-ijʿal lī min ladunka sulṭānan naṣīran
ayahs.17:81: waqul jāʾa l-ḥaqu wazahaqa l-bāṭilu inna l-bāṭila kāna zahūqan
ayahs.17:82: wanunazzilu mina l-qurāni mā huwa shifāon waraḥmatun lilmuʾminīna walā yazīdu l-ẓālimīna illā khasāran
ayahs.17:83: wa-idhā anʿamnā ʿalā l-insāni aʿraḍa wanaʾā bijānibihi wa-idhā massahu l-sharu kāna yaūsan
ayahs.17:84: qul kullun yaʿmalu ʿalā shākilatihi farabbukum aʿlamu biman huwa ahdā sabīlan
ayahs.17:85: wayasalūnaka ʿani l-rūḥi quli l-rūḥu min amri rabbī wamā ūtītum mina l-ʿilmi illā qalīlan
ayahs.17:86: wala-in shiʾnā lanadhhabanna bi-alladhī awḥaynā ilayka thumma lā tajidu laka bihi ʿalaynā wakīlan
ayahs.17:87: illā raḥmatan min rabbika inna faḍlahu kāna ʿalayka kabīran
ayahs.17:88: qul la-ini ijtamaʿati l-insu wal-jinu ʿalā an yatū bimithli hādhā l-qurāni lā yatūna bimithlihi walaw kāna baʿḍuhum libaʿḍin ẓahīran
ayahs.17:89: walaqad ṣarrafnā lilnnāsi fī hādhā l-qurāni min kulli mathalin fa-abā aktharu l-nāsi illā kufūran
ayahs.17:90: waqālū lan nuʾmina laka ḥattā tafjura lanā mina l-arḍi yanbūʿan
ayahs.17:91: aw takūna laka jannatun min nakhīlin waʿinabin fatufajjira l-anhāra khilālahā tafjīran
ayahs.17:92: aw tusqiṭa l-samāʾa kamā zaʿamta ʿalaynā kisafan aw tatiya billāhi wal-malāikati qabīlan
ayahs.17:93: aw yakūna laka baytun min zukhrufin aw tarqā fī l-samāi walan nuʾmina liruqiyyika ḥattā tunazzila ʿalaynā kitāban naqra-uhu qul subḥāna rabbī hal kuntu illā basharan rasūlan
ayahs.17:94: wamā manaʿa l-nāsa an yuʾminū idh jāʾahumu l-hudā illā an qālū abaʿatha Allāhu basharan rasūlan
ayahs.17:95: qul law kāna fī l-arḍi malāikatun yamshūna muṭma-innīna lanazzalnā ʿalayhim mina l-samāi malakan rasūlan
ayahs.17:96: qul kafā billāhi shahīdan baynī wabaynakum innahu kāna biʿibādihi khabīran baṣīran
ayahs.17:97: waman yahdi Allāhu fahuwa l-muhtadi waman yuḍlil falan tajida lahum awliyāʾa min dūnihi wanaḥshuruhum yawma l-qiyāmati ʿalā wujūhihim ʿumyan wabukman waṣumman mawāhum jahannamu kullamā khabat zidnāhum saʿīran
ayahs.17:98: dhālika jazāuhum bi-annahum kafarū biāyātinā waqālū a-idhā kunnā ʿiẓāman warufātan a-innā lamabʿūthūna khalqan jadīdan
ayahs.17:99: awalam yaraw anna Allāha alladhī khalaqa l-samāwāti wal-arḍa qādirun ʿalā an yakhluqa mithlahum wajaʿala lahum ajalan lā rayba fīhi fa-abā l-ẓālimūna illā kufūran
ayahs.17:100: qul law antum tamlikūna khazāina raḥmati rabbī idhan la-amsaktum khashyata l-infāqi wakāna l-insānu qatūran
ayahs.17:101: walaqad ātaynā mūsā tisʿa āyātin bayyinātin fasal banī isrāīla idh jāʾahum faqāla lahu firʿawnu innī la-aẓunnuka yāmūsā masḥūran
ayahs.17:102: qāla laqad ʿalimta mā anzala hāulāi illā rabbu l-samāwāti wal-arḍi baṣāira wa-innī la-aẓunnuka yāfirʿawnu mathbūran
ayahs.17:103: fa-arāda an yastafizzahum mina l-arḍi fa-aghraqnāhu waman maʿahu jamīʿan
ayahs.17:104: waqulnā min baʿdihi libanī isrāīla uskunū l-arḍa fa-idhā jāʾa waʿdu l-ākhirati jiʾnā bikum lafīfan
ayahs.17:105: wabil-ḥaqi anzalnāhu wabil-ḥaqi nazala wamā arsalnāka illā mubashiran wanadhīran
ayahs.17:106: waqurānan faraqnāhu litaqra-ahu ʿalā l-nāsi ʿalā mukthin wanazzalnāhu tanzīlan
ayahs.17:107: qul āminū bihi aw lā tuʾminū inna alladhīna ūtū l-ʿilma min qablihi idhā yutlā ʿalayhim yakhirrūna liladhqāni sujjadan
ayahs.17:108: wayaqūlūna subḥāna rabbinā in kāna waʿdu rabbinā lamafʿūlan
ayahs.17:110: quli idʿū Allāha awi idʿū l-raḥmāna ayyan mā tadʿū falahu l-asmāu l-ḥusnā walā tajhar biṣalātika walā tukhāfit bihā wa-ibtaghi bayna dhālika sabīlan
ayahs.17:111: waquli l-ḥamdu lillāhi alladhī lam yattakhidh waladan walam yakun lahu sharīkun fī l-mulki walam yakun lahu waliyyun mina l-dhuli wakabbirhu takbīran
ayahs.18:1: al-ḥamdu lillāhi alladhī anzala ʿalā ʿabdihi l-kitāba walam yajʿal lahu ʿiwajā
ayahs.18:2: qayyiman liyundhira basan shadīdan min ladunhu wayubashira l-muʾminīna alladhīna yaʿmalūna l-ṣāliḥāti anna lahum ajran ḥasanan
ayahs.18:4: wayundhira alladhīna qālū ittakhadha Allāhu waladan
ayahs.18:5: mā lahum bihi min ʿilmin walā liābāihim kaburat kalimatan takhruju min afwāhihim in yaqūlūna illā kadhiban
ayahs.18:6: falaʿallaka bākhiʿun nafsaka ʿalā āthārihim in lam yuʾminū bihādhā l-ḥadīthi asafan
ayahs.18:7: innā jaʿalnā mā ʿalā l-arḍi zīnatan lahā linabluwahum ayyuhum aḥsanu ʿamalan
ayahs.18:8: wa-innā lajāʿilūna mā ʿalayhā ṣaʿīdan juruzan
ayahs.18:9: am ḥasibta anna aṣḥāba l-kahfi wal-raqīmi kānū min āyātinā ʿajaban
ayahs.18:10: idh awā l-fityatu ilā l-kahfi faqālū rabbanā ātinā min ladunka raḥmatan wahayyi lanā min amrinā rashadan
ayahs.18:11: faḍarabnā ʿalā ādhānihim fī l-kahfi sinīna ʿadadan
ayahs.18:12: thumma baʿathnāhum linaʿlama ayyu l-ḥizbayni aḥṣā limā labithū amadan
ayahs.18:13: naḥnu naquṣṣu ʿalayka naba-ahum bil-ḥaqi innahum fityatun āmanū birabbihim wazidnāhum hudan
ayahs.18:14: warabaṭnā ʿalā qulūbihim idh qāmū faqālū rabbunā rabbu l-samāwāti wal-arḍi lan nadʿuwā min dūnihi ilāhan laqad qulnā idhan shaṭaṭan
ayahs.18:15: hāulāi qawmunā ittakhadhū min dūnihi ālihatan lawlā yatūna ʿalayhim bisulṭānin bayyinin faman aẓlamu mimmani iftarā ʿalā Allāhi kadhiban
ayahs.18:16: wa-idhi iʿtazaltumūhum wamā yaʿbudūna illā Allāha fawū ilā l-kahfi yanshur lakum rabbukum min raḥmatihi wayuhayyi lakum min amrikum mirfaqan
ayahs.18:17: watarā l-shamsa idhā ṭalaʿat tazāwaru ʿan kahfihim dhāta l-yamīni wa-idhā gharabat taqriḍuhum dhāta l-shimāli wahum fī fajwatin minhu dhālika min āyāti Allāhi man yahdi Allāhu fahuwa l-muhtadi waman yuḍlil falan tajida lahu waliyyan murshidan
ayahs.18:18: wataḥsabuhum ayqāẓan wahum ruqūdun wanuqallibuhum dhāta l-yamīni wadhāta l-shimāli wakalbuhum bāsiṭun dhirāʿayhi bil-waṣīdi lawi iṭṭalaʿta ʿalayhim lawallayta minhum firāran walamuliʾta minhum ruʿban
ayahs.18:19: wakadhālika baʿathnāhum liyatasāʾalū baynahum qāla qāilun minhum kam labithtum qālū labithnā yawman aw baʿḍa yawmin qālū rabbukum aʿlamu bimā labithtum fa-ibʿathū aḥadakum biwariqikum hādhihi ilā l-madīnati falyanẓur ayyuhā azkā ṭaʿāman falyatikum birizqin minhu walyatalaṭṭaf walā yushʿiranna bikum aḥadan
ayahs.18:20: innahum in yaẓharū ʿalaykum yarjumūkum aw yuʿīdūkum fī millatihim walan tufliḥū idhan abadan
ayahs.18:21: wakadhālika aʿtharnā ʿalayhim liyaʿlamū anna waʿda Allāhi ḥaqqun wa-anna l-sāʿata lā rayba fīhā idh yatanāzaʿūna baynahum amrahum faqālū ibnū ʿalayhim bunyānan rabbuhum aʿlamu bihim qāla alladhīna ghalabū ʿalā amrihim lanattakhidhanna ʿalayhim masjidan
ayahs.18:22: sayaqūlūna thalāthatun rābiʿuhum kalbuhum wayaqūlūna khamsatun sādisuhum kalbuhum rajman bil-ghaybi wayaqūlūna sabʿatun wathāminuhum kalbuhum qul rabbī aʿlamu biʿiddatihim mā yaʿlamuhum illā qalīlun falā tumāri fīhim illā mirāʾan ẓāhiran walā tastafti fīhim minhum aḥadan
ayahs.18:23: walā taqūlanna lishāyin innī fāʿilun dhālika ghadan
ayahs.18:24: illā an yashāʾa Allāhu wa-udhkur rabbaka idhā nasīta waqul ʿasā an yahdiyani rabbī li-aqraba min hādhā rashadan
ayahs.18:25: walabithū fī kahfihim thalātha mi-atin sinīna wa-izdādū tisʿan
ayahs.18:26: quli Allāhu aʿlamu bimā labithū lahu ghaybu l-samāwāti wal-arḍi abṣir bihi wa-asmiʿ mā lahum min dūnihi min waliyyin walā yushriku fī ḥukmihi aḥadan
ayahs.18:27: wa-utlu mā ūḥiya ilayka min kitābi rabbika lā mubaddila likalimātihi walan tajida min dūnihi multaḥadan
ayahs.18:28: wa-iṣbir nafsaka maʿa alladhīna yadʿūna rabbahum bil-ghadati wal-ʿashiyi yurīdūna wajhahu walā taʿdu ʿaynāka ʿanhum turīdu zīnata l-ḥayati l-dunyā walā tuṭiʿ man aghfalnā qalbahu ʿan dhikrinā wa-ittabaʿa hawāhu wakāna amruhu furuṭan
ayahs.18:29: waquli l-ḥaqu min rabbikum faman shāʾa falyuʾmin waman shāʾa falyakfur innā aʿtadnā lilẓẓālimīna nāran aḥāṭa bihim surādiquhā wa-in yastaghīthū yughāthū bimāin kal-muhli yashwī l-wujūha biʾsa l-sharābu wasāʾat murtafaqan
ayahs.18:30: inna alladhīna āmanū waʿamilū l-ṣāliḥāti innā lā nuḍīʿu ajra man aḥsana ʿamalan
ayahs.18:31: ulāika lahum jannātu ʿadnin tajrī min taḥtihimu l-anhāru yuḥallawna fīhā min asāwira min dhahabin wayalbasūna thiyāban khuḍran min sundusin wa-istabraqin muttakiʾīna fīhā ʿalā l-arāiki niʿma l-thawābu waḥasunat murtafaqan
ayahs.18:32: wa-iḍrib lahum mathalan rajulayni jaʿalnā li-aḥadihimā jannatayni min aʿnābin waḥafafnāhumā binakhlin wajaʿalnā baynahumā zarʿan
ayahs.18:33: kiltā l-janatayni ātat ukulahā walam taẓlim minhu shayan wafajjarnā khilālahumā naharan
ayahs.18:34: wakāna lahu thamarun faqāla liṣāḥibihi wahuwa yuḥāwiruhu anā aktharu minka mālan wa-aʿazzu nafaran
ayahs.18:35: wadakhala jannatahu wahuwa ẓālimun linafsihi qāla mā aẓunnu an tabīda hādhihi abadan
ayahs.18:36: wamā aẓunnu l-sāʿata qāimatan wala-in rudidttu ilā rabbī la-ajidanna khayran minhā munqalaban
ayahs.18:37: qāla lahu ṣāḥibuhu wahuwa yuḥāwiruhu akafarta bi-alladhī khalaqaka min turābin thumma min nuṭfatin thumma sawwāka rajulan
ayahs.18:38: lākinnā huwa Allāhu rabbī walā ushriku birabbī aḥadan
ayahs.18:39: walawlā idh dakhalta jannataka qulta mā shāʾa Allāhu lā quwwata illā billāhi in tarani anā aqalla minka mālan wawaladan
ayahs.18:40: faʿasā rabbī an yuʾtiyani khayran min jannatika wayursila ʿalayhā ḥusbānan mina l-samāi fatuṣbiḥa ṣaʿīdan zalaqan
ayahs.18:41: aw yuṣbiḥa māuhā ghawran falan tastaṭīʿa lahu ṭalaban
ayahs.18:42: wa-uḥīṭa bithamarihi fa-aṣbaḥa yuqallibu kaffayhi ʿalā mā anfaqa fīhā wahiya khāwiyatun ʿalā ʿurūshihā wayaqūlu yālaytanī lam ushrik birabbī aḥadan
ayahs.18:43: walam takun lahu fi-atun yanṣurūnahu min dūni Allāhi wamā kāna muntaṣiran
ayahs.18:44: hunālika l-walāyatu lillāhi l-ḥaqi huwa khayrun thawāban wakhayrun ʿuqban
ayahs.18:45: wa-iḍrib lahum mathala l-ḥayati l-dunyā kamāin anzalnāhu mina l-samāi fa-ikhtalaṭa bihi nabātu l-arḍi fa-aṣbaḥa hashīman tadhrūhu l-riyāḥu wakāna Allāhu ʿalā kulli shayin muqtadiran
ayahs.18:46: al-mālu wal-banūna zīnatu l-ḥayati l-dunyā wal-bāqiyātu l-ṣāliḥātu khayrun ʿinda rabbika thawāban wakhayrun amalan
ayahs.18:47: wayawma nusayyiru l-jibāla watarā l-arḍa bārizatan waḥasharnāhum falam nughādir minhum aḥadan
ayahs.18:48: waʿuriḍū ʿalā rabbika ṣaffan laqad jiʾtumūnā kamā khalaqnākum awwala marratin bal zaʿamtum allan najʿala lakum mawʿidan
ayahs.18:49: wawuḍiʿa l-kitābu fatarā l-mujrimīna mushfiqīna mimmā fīhi wayaqūlūna yāwaylatanā māli hādhā l-kitābi lā yughādiru ṣaghīratan walā kabīratan illā aḥṣāhā wawajadū mā ʿamilū ḥāḍiran walā yaẓlimu rabbuka aḥadan
ayahs.18:50: wa-idh qulnā lilmalāikati usjudū liādama fasajadū illā iblīsa kāna mina l-jini fafasaqa ʿan amri rabbihi afatattakhidhūnahu wadhurriyyatahu awliyāʾa min dūnī wahum lakum ʿaduwwun biʾsa lilẓẓālimīna badalan
ayahs.18:51: mā ashhadttuhum khalqa l-samāwāti wal-arḍi walā khalqa anfusihim wamā kuntu muttakhidha l-muḍilīna ʿaḍudan
ayahs.18:52: wayawma yaqūlu nādū shurakāiya alladhīna zaʿamtum fadaʿawhum falam yastajībū lahum wajaʿalnā baynahum mawbiqan
ayahs.18:53: waraʾā l-mujrimūna l-nāra faẓannū annahum muwāqiʿūhā walam yajidū ʿanhā maṣrifan
ayahs.18:54: walaqad ṣarrafnā fī hādhā l-qurāni lilnnāsi min kulli mathalin wakāna l-insānu akthara shayin jadalan
ayahs.18:55: wamā manaʿa l-nāsa an yuʾminū idh jāʾahumu l-hudā wayastaghfirū rabbahum illā an tatiyahum sunnatu l-awalīna aw yatiyahumu l-ʿadhābu qubulan
ayahs.18:56: wamā nursilu l-mursalīna illā mubashirīna wamundhirīna wayujādilu alladhīna kafarū bil-bāṭili liyudḥiḍū bihi l-ḥaqa wa-ittakhadhū āyātī wamā undhirū huzuwan
ayahs.18:57: waman aẓlamu mimman dhukkira biāyāti rabbihi fa-aʿraḍa ʿanhā wanasiya mā qaddamat yadāhu innā jaʿalnā ʿalā qulūbihim akinnatan an yafqahūhu wafī ādhānihim waqran wa-in tadʿuhum ilā l-hudā falan yahtadū idhan abadan
ayahs.18:58: warabbuka l-ghafūru dhū l-raḥmati law yuākhidhuhum bimā kasabū laʿajjala lahumu l-ʿadhāba bal lahum mawʿidun lan yajidū min dūnihi mawilan
ayahs.18:59: watilka l-qurā ahlaknāhum lammā ẓalamū wajaʿalnā limahlikihim mawʿidan
ayahs.18:60: wa-idh qāla mūsā lifatāhu lā abraḥu ḥattā ablugha majmaʿa l-baḥrayni aw amḍiya ḥuquban
ayahs.18:61: falammā balaghā majmaʿa baynihimā nasiyā ḥūtahumā fa-ittakhadha sabīlahu fī l-baḥri saraban
ayahs.18:62: falammā jāwazā qāla lifatāhu ātinā ghadāʾanā laqad laqīnā min safarinā hādhā naṣaban
ayahs.18:63: qāla ara-ayta idh awaynā ilā l-ṣakhrati fa-innī nasītu l-ḥūta wamā ansānīhu illā l-shayṭānu an adhkurahu wa-ittakhadha sabīlahu fī l-baḥri ʿajaban
ayahs.18:64: qāla dhālika mā kunnā nabghi fa-irtaddā ʿalā āthārihimā qaṣaṣan
ayahs.18:65: fawajadā ʿabdan min ʿibādinā ātaynāhu raḥmatan min ʿindinā waʿallamnāhu min ladunnā ʿilman
ayahs.18:66: qāla lahu mūsā hal attabiʿuka ʿalā an tuʿallimani mimmā ʿullimta rushdan
ayahs.18:67: qāla innaka lan tastaṭīʿa maʿiya ṣabran
ayahs.18:68: wakayfa taṣbiru ʿalā mā lam tuḥiṭ bihi khubran
ayahs.18:69: qāla satajidunī in shāʾa Allāhu ṣābiran walā aʿṣī laka amran
ayahs.18:70: qāla fa-ini ittabaʿtanī falā tasalnī ʿan shayin ḥattā uḥditha laka minhu dhikran
ayahs.18:71: fa-inṭalaqā ḥattā idhā rakibā fī l-safīnati kharaqahā qāla akharaqtahā litughriqa ahlahā laqad jiʾta shayan imran
ayahs.18:72: qāla alam aqul innaka lan tastaṭīʿa maʿiya ṣabran
ayahs.18:73: qāla lā tuākhidhnī bimā nasītu walā turhiqnī min amrī ʿusran
ayahs.18:74: fa-inṭalaqā ḥattā idhā laqiyā ghulāman faqatalahu qāla aqatalta nafsan zakiyyatan bighayri nafsin laqad jiʾta shayan nukran
ayahs.18:75: qāla alam aqul laka innaka lan tastaṭīʿa maʿiya ṣabran
ayahs.18:76: qāla in sa-altuka ʿan shayin baʿdahā falā tuṣāḥibnī qad balaghta min ladunnī ʿudhran
ayahs.18:77: fa-inṭalaqā ḥattā idhā atayā ahla qaryatin istaṭʿamā ahlahā fa-abaw an yuḍayyifūhumā fawajadā fīhā jidāran yurīdu an yanqaḍḍa fa-aqāmahu qāla law shiʾta lattakhadhta ʿalayhi ajran
ayahs.18:78: qāla hādhā firāqu baynī wabaynika sa-unabbi-uka bitawīli mā lam tastaṭiʿ ʿalayhi ṣabran
ayahs.18:79: ammā l-safīnatu fakānat limasākīna yaʿmalūna fī l-baḥri fa-aradttu an aʿībahā wakāna warāʾahum malikun yakhudhu kulla safīnatin ghaṣban
ayahs.18:80: wa-ammā l-ghulāmu fakāna abawāhu muʾminayni fakhashīnā an yurhiqahumā ṭughyānan wakufran
ayahs.18:81: fa-aradnā an yubdilahumā rabbuhumā khayran minhu zakatan wa-aqraba ruḥman
ayahs.18:82: wa-ammā l-jidāru fakāna lighulāmayni yatīmayni fī l-madīnati wakāna taḥtahu kanzun lahumā wakāna abūhumā ṣāliḥan fa-arāda rabbuka an yablughā ashuddahumā wayastakhrijā kanzahumā raḥmatan min rabbika wamā faʿaltuhu ʿan amrī dhālika tawīlu mā lam tasṭiʿ ʿalayhi ṣabran
ayahs.18:83: wayasalūnaka ʿan dhī l-qarnayni qul sa-atlū ʿalaykum minhu dhikran
ayahs.18:84: innā makkannā lahu fī l-arḍi waʾātaynāhu min kulli shayin sababan
