ayahs.18:86: ḥattā idhā balagha maghriba l-shamsi wajadahā taghrubu fī ʿaynin ḥami-atin wawajada ʿindahā qawman qulnā yādhā l-qarnayni immā an tuʿadhiba wa-immā an tattakhidha fīhim ḥusnan
ayahs.18:87: qāla ammā man ẓalama fasawfa nuʿadhibuhu thumma yuraddu ilā rabbihi fayuʿadhibuhu ʿadhāban nukran
ayahs.18:88: wa-ammā man āmana waʿamila ṣāliḥan falahu jazāʾan l-ḥusnā wasanaqūlu lahu min amrinā yusran
ayahs.18:90: ḥattā idhā balagha maṭliʿa l-shamsi wajadahā taṭluʿu ʿalā qawmin lam najʿal lahum min dūnihā sitran
ayahs.18:91: kadhālika waqad aḥaṭnā bimā ladayhi khubran
ayahs.18:93: ḥattā idhā balagha bayna l-sadayni wajada min dūnihimā qawman lā yakādūna yafqahūna qawlan
ayahs.18:94: qālū yādhā l-qarnayni inna yajūja wamajūja mufsidūna fī l-arḍi fahal najʿalu laka kharjan ʿalā an tajʿala baynanā wabaynahum saddan
ayahs.18:95: qāla mā makkannī fīhi rabbī khayrun fa-aʿīnūnī biquwwatin ajʿal baynakum wabaynahum radman
ayahs.18:96: ātūnī zubara l-ḥadīdi ḥattā idhā sāwā bayna l-ṣadafayni qāla unfukhū ḥattā idhā jaʿalahu nāran qāla ātūnī ufrigh ʿalayhi qiṭran
ayahs.18:97: famā isṭāʿū an yaẓharūhu wamā istaṭāʿū lahu naqban
ayahs.18:98: qāla hādhā raḥmatun min rabbī fa-idhā jāʾa waʿdu rabbī jaʿalahu dakkāʾa wakāna waʿdu rabbī ḥaqqan
ayahs.18:99: wataraknā baʿḍahum yawma-idhin yamūju fī baʿḍin wanufikha fī l-ṣūri fajamaʿnāhum jamʿan
ayahs.18:101: alladhīna kānat aʿyunuhum fī ghiṭāin ʿan dhikrī wakānū lā yastaṭīʿūna samʿan
ayahs.18:102: afaḥasiba alladhīna kafarū an yattakhidhū ʿibādī min dūnī awliyāʾa innā aʿtadnā jahannama lilkāfirīna nuzulan
ayahs.18:104: alladhīna ḍalla saʿyuhum fī l-ḥayati l-dunyā wahum yaḥsabūna annahum yuḥsinūna ṣunʿan
ayahs.18:105: ulāika alladhīna kafarū biāyāti rabbihim waliqāihi faḥabiṭat aʿmāluhum falā nuqīmu lahum yawma l-qiyāmati waznan
ayahs.18:106: dhālika jazāuhum jahannamu bimā kafarū wa-ittakhadhū āyātī warusulī huzuwan
ayahs.18:107: inna alladhīna āmanū waʿamilū l-ṣāliḥāti kānat lahum jannātu l-firdawsi nuzulan
ayahs.18:108: khālidīna fīhā lā yabghūna ʿanhā ḥiwalan
ayahs.18:109: qul law kāna l-baḥru midādan likalimāti rabbī lanafida l-baḥru qabla an tanfada kalimātu rabbī walaw jiʾnā bimithlihi madadan
ayahs.18:110: qul innamā anā basharun mithlukum yūḥā ilayya annamā ilāhukum ilāhun wāḥidun faman kāna yarjū liqāʾa rabbihi falyaʿmal ʿamalan ṣāliḥan walā yushrik biʿibādati rabbihi aḥadan
ayahs.19:4: qāla rabbi innī wahana l-ʿaẓmu minnī wa-ishtaʿala l-rasu shayban walam akun biduʿāika rabbi shaqiyyan
ayahs.19:5: wa-innī khiftu l-mawāliya min warāī wakānati imra-atī ʿāqiran fahab lī min ladunka waliyyan
ayahs.19:6: yarithunī wayarithu min āli yaʿqūba wa-ijʿalhu rabbi raḍiyyan
ayahs.19:7: yāzakariyyā innā nubashiruka bighulāmin usmuhu yaḥyā lam najʿal lahu min qablu samiyyan
ayahs.19:8: qāla rabbi annā yakūnu lī ghulāmun wakānati imra-atī ʿāqiran waqad balaghtu mina l-kibari ʿitiyyan
ayahs.19:9: qāla kadhālika qāla rabbuka huwa ʿalayya hayyinun waqad khalaqtuka min qablu walam taku shayan
ayahs.19:10: qāla rabbi ijʿal lī āyatan qāla āyatuka allā tukallima l-nāsa thalātha layālin sawiyyan
ayahs.19:11: fakharaja ʿalā qawmihi mina l-miḥrābi fa-awḥā ilayhim an sabbiḥū bukratan waʿashiyyan
ayahs.19:12: yāyaḥyā khudhi l-kitāba biquwwatin waʾātaynāhu l-ḥukma ṣabiyyan
ayahs.19:13: waḥanānan min ladunnā wazakatan wakāna taqiyyan
ayahs.19:14: wabarran biwālidayhi walam yakun jabbāran ʿaṣiyyan
ayahs.19:15: wasalāmun ʿalayhi yawma wulida wayawma yamūtu wayawma yubʿathu ḥayyan
ayahs.19:16: wa-udhkur fī l-kitābi maryama idhi intabadhat min ahlihā makānan sharqiyyan
ayahs.19:17: fa-ittakhadhat min dūnihim ḥijāban fa-arsalnā ilayhā rūḥanā fatamathala lahā basharan sawiyyan
ayahs.19:18: qālat innī aʿūdhu bil-raḥmāni minka in kunta taqiyyan
ayahs.19:19: qāla innamā anā rasūlu rabbiki li-ahaba laki ghulāman zakiyyan
ayahs.19:20: qālat annā yakūnu lī ghulāmun walam yamsasnī basharun walam aku baghiyyan
ayahs.19:21: qāla kadhāliki qāla rabbuki huwa ʿalayya hayyinun walinajʿalahu āyatan lilnnāsi waraḥmatan minnā wakāna amran maqḍiyyan
ayahs.19:23: fa-ajāʾahā l-makhāḍu ilā jidhʿi l-nakhlati qālat yālaytanī mittu qabla hādhā wakuntu nasyan mansiyyan
ayahs.19:24: fanādāhā min taḥtihā allā taḥzanī qad jaʿala rabbuki taḥtaki sariyyan
ayahs.19:25: wahuzzī ilayki bijidhʿi l-nakhlati tusāqiṭ ʿalayki ruṭaban janiyyan
ayahs.19:26: fakulī wa-ishrabī waqarrī ʿaynan fa-immā tarayinna mina l-bashari aḥadan faqūlī innī nadhartu lilrraḥmāni ṣawman falan ukallima l-yawma insiyyan
ayahs.19:27: fa-atat bihi qawmahā taḥmiluhu qālū yāmaryamu laqad jiʾti shayan fariyyan
ayahs.19:28: yāukhta hārūna mā kāna abūki imra-a sawin wamā kānat ummuki baghiyyan
ayahs.19:29: fa-ashārat ilayhi qālū kayfa nukallimu man kāna fī l-mahdi ṣabiyyan
ayahs.19:30: qāla innī ʿabdu Allāhi ātāniya l-kitāba wajaʿalanī nabiyyan
ayahs.19:31: wajaʿalanī mubārakan ayna mā kuntu wa-awṣānī bil-ṣalati wal-zakati mā dumtu ḥayyan
ayahs.19:32: wabarran biwālidatī walam yajʿalnī jabbāran shaqiyyan
ayahs.19:33: wal-salāmu ʿalayya yawma wulidttu wayawma amūtu wayawma ubʿathu ḥayyan
ayahs.19:34: dhālika ʿīsā ubnu maryama qawla l-ḥaqi alladhī fīhi yamtarūna
ayahs.19:35: mā kāna lillāhi an yattakhidha min waladin subḥānahu idhā qaḍā amran fa-innamā yaqūlu lahu kun fayakūnu
ayahs.19:36: wa-inna Allāha rabbī warabbukum fa-uʿbudūhu hādhā ṣirāṭun mustaqīmun
ayahs.19:37: fa-ikhtalafa l-aḥzābu min baynihim fawaylun lilladhīna kafarū min mashhadi yawmin ʿaẓīmin
ayahs.19:38: asmiʿ bihim wa-abṣir yawma yatūnanā lākini l-ẓālimūna l-yawma fī ḍalālin mubīnin
ayahs.19:39: wa-andhirhum yawma l-ḥasrati idh quḍiya l-amru wahum fī ghaflatin wahum lā yuʾminūna
ayahs.19:40: innā naḥnu narithu l-arḍa waman ʿalayhā wa-ilaynā yurjaʿūna
ayahs.19:41: wa-udhkur fī l-kitābi ibrāhīma innahu kāna ṣiddīqan nabiyyan
ayahs.19:42: idh qāla li-abīhi yāʾabati lima taʿbudu mā lā yasmaʿu walā yubṣiru walā yughnī ʿanka shayan
ayahs.19:43: yāʾabati innī qad jāʾanī mina l-ʿilmi mā lam yatika fa-ittabiʿnī ahdika ṣirāṭan sawiyyan
ayahs.19:44: yāʾabati lā taʿbudi l-shayṭāna inna l-shayṭāna kāna lilrraḥmāni ʿaṣiyyan
ayahs.19:45: yāʾabati innī akhāfu an yamassaka ʿadhābun mina l-raḥmāni fatakūna lilshayṭāni waliyyan
ayahs.19:46: qāla arāghibun anta ʿan ālihatī yāibrāhīmu la-in lam tantahi la-arjumannaka wa-uhjurnī maliyyan
ayahs.19:47: qāla salāmun ʿalayka sa-astaghfiru laka rabbī innahu kāna bī ḥafiyyan
ayahs.19:48: wa-aʿtazilukum wamā tadʿūna min dūni Allāhi wa-adʿū rabbī ʿasā allā akūna biduʿāi rabbī shaqiyyan
ayahs.19:49: falammā iʿtazalahum wamā yaʿbudūna min dūni Allāhi wahabnā lahu isḥāqa wayaʿqūba wakullan jaʿalnā nabiyyan
ayahs.19:50: wawahabnā lahum min raḥmatinā wajaʿalnā lahum lisāna ṣidqin ʿaliyyan
ayahs.19:51: wa-udhkur fī l-kitābi mūsā innahu kāna mukhlaṣan wakāna rasūlan nabiyyan
ayahs.19:52: wanādaynāhu min jānibi l-ṭūri l-aymani waqarrabnāhu najiyyan
ayahs.19:53: wawahabnā lahu min raḥmatinā akhāhu hārūna nabiyyan
ayahs.19:54: wa-udhkur fī l-kitābi ismāʿīla innahu kāna ṣādiqa l-waʿdi wakāna rasūlan nabiyyan
ayahs.19:55: wakāna yamuru ahlahu bil-ṣalati wal-zakati wakāna ʿinda rabbihi marḍiyyan
ayahs.19:56: wa-udhkur fī l-kitābi idrīsa innahu kāna ṣiddīqan nabiyyan
ayahs.19:58: ulāika alladhīna anʿama Allāhu ʿalayhim mina l-nabiyīna min dhurriyyati ādama wamimman ḥamalnā maʿa nūḥin wamin dhurriyyati ibrāhīma wa-isrāīla wamimman hadaynā wa-ijtabaynā idhā tutlā ʿalayhim āyātu l-raḥmāni kharrū sujjadan wabukiyyan
ayahs.19:59: fakhalafa min baʿdihim khalfun aḍāʿū l-ṣalata wa-ittabaʿū l-shahawāti fasawfa yalqawna ghayyan
ayahs.19:60: illā man tāba waʾāmana waʿamila ṣāliḥan fa-ulāika yadkhulūna l-janata walā yuẓlamūna shayan
ayahs.19:61: jannāti ʿadnin allatī waʿada l-raḥmānu ʿibādahu bil-ghaybi innahu kāna waʿduhu matiyyan
ayahs.19:62: lā yasmaʿūna fīhā laghwan illā salāman walahum rizquhum fīhā bukratan waʿashiyyan
ayahs.19:63: tilka l-janatu allatī nūrithu min ʿibādinā man kāna taqiyyan
ayahs.19:64: wamā natanazzalu illā bi-amri rabbika lahu mā bayna aydīnā wamā khalfanā wamā bayna dhālika wamā kāna rabbuka nasiyyan
ayahs.19:65: rabbu l-samāwāti wal-arḍi wamā baynahumā fa-uʿbudhu wa-iṣṭabir liʿibādatihi hal taʿlamu lahu samiyyan
ayahs.19:66: wayaqūlu l-insānu a-idhā mā mittu lasawfa ukhraju ḥayyan
ayahs.19:67: awalā yadhkuru l-insānu annā khalaqnāhu min qablu walam yaku shayan
ayahs.19:68: fawarabbika lanaḥshurannahum wal-shayāṭīna thumma lanuḥḍirannahum ḥawla jahannama jithiyyan
ayahs.19:69: thumma lananziʿanna min kulli shīʿatin ayyuhum ashaddu ʿalā l-raḥmāni ʿitiyyan
ayahs.19:70: thumma lanaḥnu aʿlamu bi-alladhīna hum awlā bihā ṣiliyyan
ayahs.19:71: wa-in minkum illā wāriduhā kāna ʿalā rabbika ḥatman maqḍiyyan
ayahs.19:72: thumma nunajjī alladhīna ittaqaw wanadharu l-ẓālimīna fīhā jithiyyan
ayahs.19:73: wa-idhā tutlā ʿalayhim āyātunā bayyinātin qāla alladhīna kafarū lilladhīna āmanū ayyu l-farīqayni khayrun maqāman wa-aḥsanu nadiyyan
ayahs.19:74: wakam ahlaknā qablahum min qarnin hum aḥsanu athāthan wariʾyan
ayahs.19:75: qul man kāna fī l-ḍalālati falyamdud lahu l-raḥmānu maddan ḥattā idhā ra-aw mā yūʿadūna immā l-ʿadhāba wa-immā l-sāʿata fasayaʿlamūna man huwa sharrun makānan wa-aḍʿafu jundan
ayahs.19:76: wayazīdu Allāhu alladhīna ihtadaw hudan wal-bāqiyātu l-ṣāliḥātu khayrun ʿinda rabbika thawāban wakhayrun maraddan
ayahs.19:77: afara-ayta alladhī kafara biāyātinā waqāla laūtayanna mālan wawaladan
ayahs.19:78: aṭṭalaʿa l-ghayba ami ittakhadha ʿinda l-raḥmāni ʿahdan
ayahs.19:79: kallā sanaktubu mā yaqūlu wanamuddu lahu mina l-ʿadhābi maddan
ayahs.19:81: wa-ittakhadhū min dūni Allāhi ālihatan liyakūnū lahum ʿizzan
ayahs.19:82: kallā sayakfurūna biʿibādatihim wayakūnūna ʿalayhim ḍiddan
ayahs.19:83: alam tara annā arsalnā l-shayāṭīna ʿalā l-kāfirīna ta-uzzuhum azzan
ayahs.19:84: falā taʿjal ʿalayhim innamā naʿuddu lahum ʿaddan
ayahs.19:85: yawma naḥshuru l-mutaqīna ilā l-raḥmāni wafdan
ayahs.19:87: lā yamlikūna l-shafāʿata illā mani ittakhadha ʿinda l-raḥmāni ʿahdan
ayahs.19:90: takādu l-samāwātu yatafaṭṭarna minhu watanshaqqu l-arḍu watakhirru l-jibālu haddan
ayahs.19:92: wamā yanbaghī lilrraḥmāni an yattakhidha waladan
ayahs.19:93: in kullu man fī l-samāwāti wal-arḍi illā ātī l-raḥmāni ʿabdan
ayahs.19:96: inna alladhīna āmanū waʿamilū l-ṣāliḥāti sayajʿalu lahumu l-raḥmānu wuddan
ayahs.19:97: fa-innamā yassarnāhu bilisānika litubashira bihi l-mutaqīna watundhira bihi qawman luddan
ayahs.19:98: wakam ahlaknā qablahum min qarnin hal tuḥissu minhum min aḥadin aw tasmaʿu lahum rikzan
ayahs.20:4: tanzīlan mimman khalaqa l-arḍa wal-samāwāti l-ʿulā
ayahs.20:6: lahu mā fī l-samāwāti wamā fī l-arḍi wamā baynahumā wamā taḥta l-tharā
ayahs.20:7: wa-in tajhar bil-qawli fa-innahu yaʿlamu l-sira wa-akhfā
ayahs.20:8: Allāhu lā ilāha illā huwa lahu l-asmāu l-ḥusnā
ayahs.20:10: idh raʾā nāran faqāla li-ahlihi umkuthū innī ānastu nāran laʿallī ātīkum minhā biqabasin aw ajidu ʿalā l-nāri hudan
ayahs.20:12: innī anā rabbuka fa-ikhlaʿ naʿlayka innaka bil-wādi l-muqadasi ṭuwan
ayahs.20:14: innanī anā Allāhu lā ilāha illā anā fa-uʿbudnī wa-aqimi l-ṣalata lidhikrī
ayahs.20:15: inna l-sāʿata ātiyatun akādu ukhfīhā litujzā kullu nafsin bimā tasʿā
ayahs.20:16: falā yaṣuddannaka ʿanhā man lā yuʾminu bihā wa-ittabaʿa hawāhu fatardā
ayahs.20:18: qāla hiya ʿaṣāya atawakka-u ʿalayhā wa-ahushu bihā ʿalā ghanamī waliya fīhā maʾāribu ukhrā
ayahs.20:21: qāla khudhhā walā takhaf sanuʿīduhā sīratahā l-ūlā
ayahs.20:22: wa-uḍmum yadaka ilā janāḥika takhruj bayḍāʾa min ghayri sūin āyatan ukhrā
ayahs.20:38: idh awḥaynā ilā ummika mā yūḥā
ayahs.20:39: ani iqdhifīhi fī l-tābūti fa-iqdhifīhi fī l-yami falyulqihi l-yamu bil-sāḥili yakhudhhu ʿaduwwun lī waʿaduwwun lahu wa-alqaytu ʿalayka maḥabbatan minnī walituṣnaʿa ʿalā ʿaynī
ayahs.20:40: idh tamshī ukhtuka fataqūlu hal adullukum ʿalā man yakfuluhu farajaʿnāka ilā ummika kay taqarra ʿaynuhā walā taḥzana waqatalta nafsan fanajjaynāka mina l-ghami wafatannāka futūnan falabithta sinīna fī ahli madyana thumma jiʾta ʿalā qadarin yāmūsā
ayahs.20:42: idhhab anta wa-akhūka biāyātī walā taniyā fī dhikrī
ayahs.20:44: faqūlā lahu qawlan layyinan laʿallahu yatadhakkaru aw yakhshā
ayahs.20:45: qālā rabbanā innanā nakhāfu an yafruṭa ʿalaynā aw an yaṭghā
ayahs.20:46: qāla lā takhāfā innanī maʿakumā asmaʿu wa-arā
ayahs.20:47: fatiyāhu faqūlā innā rasūlā rabbika fa-arsil maʿanā banī isrāīla walā tuʿadhibhum qad jiʾnāka biāyatin min rabbika wal-salāmu ʿalā mani ittabaʿa l-hudā
ayahs.20:48: innā qad ūḥiya ilaynā anna l-ʿadhāba ʿalā man kadhaba watawallā
ayahs.20:50: qāla rabbunā alladhī aʿṭā kulla shayin khalqahu thumma hadā
ayahs.20:52: qāla ʿilmuhā ʿinda rabbī fī kitābin lā yaḍillu rabbī walā yansā
ayahs.20:53: alladhī jaʿala lakumu l-arḍa mahdan wasalaka lakum fīhā subulan wa-anzala mina l-samāi māʾan fa-akhrajnā bihi azwājan min nabātin shattā
ayahs.20:54: kulū wa-irʿaw anʿāmakum inna fī dhālika laʾāyātin li-ulī l-nuhā
ayahs.20:55: minhā khalaqnākum wafīhā nuʿīdukum waminhā nukhrijukum tāratan ukhrā
ayahs.20:56: walaqad araynāhu āyātinā kullahā fakadhaba wa-abā
ayahs.20:57: qāla ajiʾtanā litukhrijanā min arḍinā bisiḥrika yāmūsā
ayahs.20:58: falanatiyannaka bisiḥrin mithlihi fa-ijʿal baynanā wabaynaka mawʿidan lā nukhlifuhu naḥnu walā anta makānan suwan
ayahs.20:59: qāla mawʿidukum yawmu l-zīnati wa-an yuḥshara l-nāsu ḍuḥan
ayahs.20:60: fatawallā firʿawnu fajamaʿa kaydahu thumma atā
ayahs.20:61: qāla lahum mūsā waylakum lā taftarū ʿalā Allāhi kadhiban fayusḥitakum biʿadhābin waqad khāba mani iftarā
ayahs.20:63: qālū in hādhāni lasāḥirāni yurīdāni an yukhrijākum min arḍikum bisiḥrihimā wayadhhabā biṭarīqatikumu l-muthlā
ayahs.20:64: fa-ajmiʿū kaydakum thumma iʾtū ṣaffan waqad aflaḥa l-yawma mani istaʿlā
ayahs.20:65: qālū yāmūsā immā an tulqiya wa-immā an nakūna awwala man alqā
ayahs.20:66: qāla bal alqū fa-idhā ḥibāluhum waʿiṣiyyuhum yukhayyalu ilayhi min siḥrihim annahā tasʿā
ayahs.20:68: qulnā lā takhaf innaka anta l-aʿlā
ayahs.20:69: wa-alqi mā fī yamīnika talqaf mā ṣanaʿū innamā ṣanaʿū kaydu sāḥirin walā yufliḥu l-sāḥiru ḥaythu atā
ayahs.20:70: fa-ulqiya l-saḥaratu sujjadan qālū āmannā birabbi hārūna wamūsā
ayahs.20:71: qāla āmantum lahu qabla an ādhana lakum innahu lakabīrukumu alladhī ʿallamakumu l-siḥra fala-uqaṭṭiʿanna aydiyakum wa-arjulakum min khilāfin wala-uṣallibannakum fī judhūʿi l-nakhli walataʿlamunna ayyunā ashaddu ʿadhāban wa-abqā
ayahs.20:72: qālū lan nuʾthiraka ʿalā mā jāʾanā mina l-bayināti wa-alladhī faṭaranā fa-iqḍi mā anta qāḍin innamā taqḍī hādhihi l-ḥayata l-dunyā
ayahs.20:73: innā āmannā birabbinā liyaghfira lanā khaṭāyānā wamā akrahtanā ʿalayhi mina l-siḥri wallāhu khayrun wa-abqā
ayahs.20:74: innahu man yati rabbahu mujriman fa-inna lahu jahannama lā yamūtu fīhā walā yaḥyā
ayahs.20:75: waman yatihi muʾminan qad ʿamila l-ṣāliḥāti fa-ulāika lahumu l-darajātu l-ʿulā
ayahs.20:76: jannātu ʿadnin tajrī min taḥtihā l-anhāru khālidīna fīhā wadhālika jazāu man tazakkā
ayahs.20:77: walaqad awḥaynā ilā mūsā an asri biʿibādī fa-iḍrib lahum ṭarīqan fī l-baḥri yabasan lā takhāfu darakan walā takhshā
ayahs.20:78: fa-atbaʿahum firʿawnu bijunūdihi faghashiyahum mina l-yami mā ghashiyahum
ayahs.20:80: yābanī isrāīla qad anjaynākum min ʿaduwwikum wawāʿadnākum jāniba l-ṭūri l-aymana wanazzalnā ʿalaykumu l-mana wal-salwā
ayahs.20:81: kulū min ṭayyibāti mā razaqnākum walā taṭghaw fīhi fayaḥilla ʿalaykum ghaḍabī waman yaḥlil ʿalayhi ghaḍabī faqad hawā
ayahs.20:82: wa-innī laghaffārun liman tāba waʾāmana waʿamila ṣāliḥan thumma ihtadā
ayahs.20:84: qāla hum ulāi ʿalā atharī waʿajiltu ilayka rabbi litarḍā
ayahs.20:85: qāla fa-innā qad fatannā qawmaka min baʿdika wa-aḍallahumu l-sāmiriyu
ayahs.20:86: farajaʿa mūsā ilā qawmihi ghaḍbāna asifan qāla yāqawmi alam yaʿidkum rabbukum waʿdan ḥasanan afaṭāla ʿalaykumu l-ʿahdu am aradttum an yaḥilla ʿalaykum ghaḍabun min rabbikum fa-akhlaftum mawʿidī
ayahs.20:87: qālū mā akhlafnā mawʿidaka bimalkinā walākinnā ḥummilnā awzāran min zīnati l-qawmi faqadhafnāhā fakadhālika alqā l-sāmiriyu
ayahs.20:88: fa-akhraja lahum ʿijlan jasadan lahu khuwārun faqālū hādhā ilāhukum wa-ilāhu mūsā fanasiya
ayahs.20:89: afalā yarawna allā yarjiʿu ilayhim qawlan walā yamliku lahum ḍarran walā nafʿan
ayahs.20:90: walaqad qāla lahum hārūnu min qablu yāqawmi innamā futintum bihi wa-inna rabbakumu l-raḥmānu fa-ittabiʿūnī wa-aṭīʿū amrī
ayahs.20:91: qālū lan nabraḥa ʿalayhi ʿākifīna ḥattā yarjiʿa ilaynā mūsā
ayahs.20:92: qāla yāhārūnu mā manaʿaka idh ra-aytahum ḍallū
ayahs.20:94: qāla yabna-umma lā takhudh biliḥyatī walā birasī innī khashītu an taqūla farraqta bayna banī isrāīla walam tarqub qawlī
ayahs.20:96: qāla baṣurtu bimā lam yabṣurū bihi faqabaḍtu qabḍatan min athari l-rasūli fanabadhtuhā wakadhālika sawwalat lī nafsī
ayahs.20:97: qāla fa-idhhab fa-inna laka fī l-ḥayati an taqūla lā misāsa wa-inna laka mawʿidan lan tukhlafahu wa-unẓur ilā ilāhika alladhī ẓalta ʿalayhi ʿākifan lanuḥarriqannahu thumma lanansifannahu fī l-yami nasfan
ayahs.20:98: innamā ilāhukumu Allāhu alladhī lā ilāha illā huwa wasiʿa kulla shayin ʿilman
ayahs.20:99: kadhālika naquṣṣu ʿalayka min anbāi mā qad sabaqa waqad ātaynāka min ladunnā dhikran
ayahs.20:100: man aʿraḍa ʿanhu fa-innahu yaḥmilu yawma l-qiyāmati wizran
ayahs.20:101: khālidīna fīhi wasāʾa lahum yawma l-qiyāmati ḥimlan
ayahs.20:102: yawma yunfakhu fī l-ṣūri wanaḥshuru l-mujrimīna yawma-idhin zurqan
ayahs.20:103: yatakhāfatūna baynahum in labithtum illā ʿashran
ayahs.20:104: naḥnu aʿlamu bimā yaqūlūna idh yaqūlu amthaluhum ṭarīqatan in labithtum illā yawman
ayahs.20:105: wayasalūnaka ʿani l-jibāli faqul yansifuhā rabbī nasfan
ayahs.20:107: lā tarā fīhā ʿiwajan walā amtan
ayahs.20:108: yawma-idhin yattabiʿūna l-dāʿiya lā ʿiwaja lahu wakhashaʿati l-aṣwātu lilrraḥmāni falā tasmaʿu illā hamsan
ayahs.20:109: yawma-idhin lā tanfaʿu l-shafāʿatu illā man adhina lahu l-raḥmānu waraḍiya lahu qawlan
ayahs.20:110: yaʿlamu mā bayna aydīhim wamā khalfahum walā yuḥīṭūna bihi ʿilman
ayahs.20:111: waʿanati l-wujūhu lilḥayyi l-qayūmi waqad khāba man ḥamala ẓulman
ayahs.20:112: waman yaʿmal mina l-ṣāliḥāti wahuwa muʾminun falā yakhāfu ẓulman walā haḍman
ayahs.20:113: wakadhālika anzalnāhu qurānan ʿarabiyyan waṣarrafnā fīhi mina l-waʿīdi laʿallahum yattaqūna aw yuḥdithu lahum dhikran
ayahs.20:114: fataʿālā Allāhu l-maliku l-ḥaqu walā taʿjal bil-qurāni min qabli an yuqḍā ilayka waḥyuhu waqul rabbi zidnī ʿilman
ayahs.20:115: walaqad ʿahidnā ilā ādama min qablu fanasiya walam najid lahu ʿazman
ayahs.20:116: wa-idh qulnā lilmalāikati usjudū liādama fasajadū illā iblīsa abā
ayahs.20:117: faqulnā yāādamu inna hādhā ʿaduwwun laka walizawjika falā yukhrijannakumā mina l-janati fatashqā
ayahs.20:118: inna laka allā tajūʿa fīhā walā taʿrā
ayahs.20:119: wa-annaka lā taẓma-u fīhā walā taḍḥā
ayahs.20:120: fawaswasa ilayhi l-shayṭānu qāla yāādamu hal adulluka ʿalā shajarati l-khuldi wamulkin lā yablā
ayahs.20:121: fa-akalā minhā fabadat lahumā sawātuhumā waṭafiqā yakhṣifāni ʿalayhimā min waraqi l-janati waʿaṣā ādamu rabbahu faghawā
ayahs.20:122: thumma ijtabāhu rabbuhu fatāba ʿalayhi wahadā
ayahs.20:123: qāla ihbiṭā minhā jamīʿan baʿḍukum libaʿḍin ʿaduwwun fa-immā yatiyannakum minnī hudan famani ittabaʿa hudāya falā yaḍillu walā yashqā
ayahs.20:124: waman aʿraḍa ʿan dhikrī fa-inna lahu maʿīshatan ḍankan wanaḥshuruhu yawma l-qiyāmati aʿmā
ayahs.20:125: qāla rabbi lima ḥashartanī aʿmā waqad kuntu baṣīran
ayahs.20:126: qāla kadhālika atatka āyātunā fanasītahā wakadhālika l-yawma tunsā
ayahs.20:127: wakadhālika najzī man asrafa walam yuʾmin biāyāti rabbihi walaʿadhābu l-ākhirati ashaddu wa-abqā
ayahs.20:128: afalam yahdi lahum kam ahlaknā qablahum mina l-qurūni yamshūna fī masākinihim inna fī dhālika laʾāyātin li-ulī l-nuhā
ayahs.20:129: walawlā kalimatun sabaqat min rabbika lakāna lizāman wa-ajalun musamman
ayahs.20:130: fa-iṣbir ʿalā mā yaqūlūna wasabbiḥ biḥamdi rabbika qabla ṭulūʿi l-shamsi waqabla ghurūbihā wamin ānāi al-layli fasabbiḥ wa-aṭrāfa l-nahāri laʿallaka tarḍā
ayahs.20:131: walā tamuddanna ʿaynayka ilā mā mattaʿnā bihi azwājan minhum zahrata l-ḥayati l-dunyā linaftinahum fīhi warizqu rabbika khayrun wa-abqā
ayahs.20:132: wamur ahlaka bil-ṣalati wa-iṣṭabir ʿalayhā lā nasaluka rizqan naḥnu narzuquka wal-ʿāqibatu lilttaqwā
ayahs.20:133: waqālū lawlā yatīnā biāyatin min rabbihi awalam tatihim bayyinatu mā fī l-ṣuḥufi l-ūlā
ayahs.20:134: walaw annā ahlaknāhum biʿadhābin min qablihi laqālū rabbanā lawlā arsalta ilaynā rasūlan fanattabiʿa āyātika min qabli an nadhilla wanakhzā
ayahs.20:135: qul kullun mutarabbiṣun fatarabbaṣū fasataʿlamūna man aṣḥābu l-ṣirāṭi l-sawiyi wamani ihtadā
ayahs.21:1: iqtaraba lilnnāsi ḥisābuhum wahum fī ghaflatin muʿriḍūna
ayahs.21:2: mā yatīhim min dhikrin min rabbihim muḥdathin illā istamaʿūhu wahum yalʿabūna
ayahs.21:3: lāhiyatan qulūbuhum wa-asarrū l-najwā alladhīna ẓalamū hal hādhā illā basharun mithlukum afatatūna l-siḥra wa-antum tubṣirūna
ayahs.21:4: qāla rabbī yaʿlamu l-qawla fī l-samāi wal-arḍi wahuwa l-samīʿu l-ʿalīmu
ayahs.21:5: bal qālū aḍghāthu aḥlāmin bali iftarāhu bal huwa shāʿirun falyatinā biāyatin kamā ursila l-awalūna
ayahs.21:6: mā āmanat qablahum min qaryatin ahlaknāhā afahum yuʾminūna
ayahs.21:7: wamā arsalnā qablaka illā rijālan nūḥī ilayhim fasalū ahla l-dhikri in kuntum lā taʿlamūna
ayahs.21:8: wamā jaʿalnāhum jasadan lā yakulūna l-ṭaʿāma wamā kānū khālidīna
ayahs.21:9: thumma ṣadaqnāhumu l-waʿda fa-anjaynāhum waman nashāu wa-ahlaknā l-musrifīna
ayahs.21:10: laqad anzalnā ilaykum kitāban fīhi dhikrukum afalā taʿqilūna
ayahs.21:11: wakam qaṣamnā min qaryatin kānat ẓālimatan wa-anshanā baʿdahā qawman ākharīna
ayahs.21:12: falammā aḥassū basanā idhā hum minhā yarkuḍūna
ayahs.21:13: lā tarkuḍū wa-irjiʿū ilā mā utriftum fīhi wamasākinikum laʿallakum tusalūna
ayahs.21:15: famā zālat tilka daʿwāhum ḥattā jaʿalnāhum ḥaṣīdan khāmidīna
ayahs.21:16: wamā khalaqnā l-samāʾa wal-arḍa wamā baynahumā lāʿibīna
ayahs.21:17: law aradnā an nattakhidha lahwan la-ittakhadhnāhu min ladunnā in kunnā fāʿilīna
ayahs.21:18: bal naqdhifu bil-ḥaqi ʿalā l-bāṭili fayadmaghuhu fa-idhā huwa zāhiqun walakumu l-waylu mimmā taṣifūna
ayahs.21:19: walahu man fī l-samāwāti wal-arḍi waman ʿindahu lā yastakbirūna ʿan ʿibādatihi walā yastaḥsirūna
ayahs.21:21: ami ittakhadhū ālihatan mina l-arḍi hum yunshirūna
ayahs.21:22: law kāna fīhimā ālihatun illā Allāhu lafasadatā fasubḥāna Allāhi rabbi l-ʿarshi ʿammā yaṣifūna
ayahs.21:23: lā yusalu ʿammā yafʿalu wahum yusalūna
ayahs.21:24: ami ittakhadhū min dūnihi ālihatan qul hātū burhānakum hādhā dhikru man maʿiya wadhikru man qablī bal aktharuhum lā yaʿlamūna l-ḥaqa fahum muʿriḍūna
ayahs.21:25: wamā arsalnā min qablika min rasūlin illā nūḥī ilayhi annahu lā ilāha illā anā fa-uʿbudūni
ayahs.21:26: waqālū ittakhadha l-raḥmānu waladan subḥānahu bal ʿibādun mukramūna
ayahs.21:27: lā yasbiqūnahu bil-qawli wahum bi-amrihi yaʿmalūna
ayahs.21:28: yaʿlamu mā bayna aydīhim wamā khalfahum walā yashfaʿūna illā limani irtaḍā wahum min khashyatihi mushfiqūna
ayahs.21:29: waman yaqul minhum innī ilāhun min dūnihi fadhālika najzīhi jahannama kadhālika najzī l-ẓālimīna
ayahs.21:30: awalam yara alladhīna kafarū anna l-samāwāti wal-arḍa kānatā ratqan fafataqnāhumā wajaʿalnā mina l-māi kulla shayin ḥayyin afalā yuʾminūna
ayahs.21:31: wajaʿalnā fī l-arḍi rawāsiya an tamīda bihim wajaʿalnā fīhā fijājan subulan laʿallahum yahtadūna
ayahs.21:32: wajaʿalnā l-samāʾa saqfan maḥfūẓan wahum ʿan āyātihā muʿriḍūna
ayahs.21:33: wahuwa alladhī khalaqa al-layla wal-nahāra wal-shamsa wal-qamara kullun fī falakin yasbaḥūna
ayahs.21:34: wamā jaʿalnā libasharin min qablika l-khulda afa-in mitta fahumu l-khālidūna
ayahs.21:35: kullu nafsin dhāiqatu l-mawti wanablūkum bil-shari wal-khayri fitnatan wa-ilaynā turjaʿūna
ayahs.21:36: wa-idhā raʾāka alladhīna kafarū in yattakhidhūnaka illā huzuwan ahādhā alladhī yadhkuru ālihatakum wahum bidhikri l-raḥmāni hum kāfirūna
ayahs.21:37: khuliqa l-insānu min ʿajalin sa-urīkum āyātī falā tastaʿjilūni
ayahs.21:38: wayaqūlūna matā hādhā l-waʿdu in kuntum ṣādiqīna
ayahs.21:39: law yaʿlamu alladhīna kafarū ḥīna lā yakuffūna ʿan wujūhihimu l-nāra walā ʿan ẓuhūrihim walā hum yunṣarūna
ayahs.21:40: bal tatīhim baghtatan fatabhatuhum falā yastaṭīʿūna raddahā walā hum yunẓarūna
ayahs.21:41: walaqadi ustuhzi-a birusulin min qablika faḥāqa bi-alladhīna sakhirū minhum mā kānū bihi yastahziūna
ayahs.21:42: qul man yakla-ukum bi-al-layli wal-nahāri mina l-raḥmāni bal hum ʿan dhikri rabbihim muʿriḍūna
ayahs.21:43: am lahum ālihatun tamnaʿuhum min dūninā lā yastaṭīʿūna naṣra anfusihim walā hum minnā yuṣḥabūna
ayahs.21:44: bal mattaʿnā hāulāi waʾābāʾahum ḥattā ṭāla ʿalayhimu l-ʿumuru afalā yarawna annā natī l-arḍa nanquṣuhā min aṭrāfihā afahumu l-ghālibūna
ayahs.21:45: qul innamā undhirukum bil-waḥyi walā yasmaʿu l-ṣumu l-duʿāʾa idhā mā yundharūna
ayahs.21:46: wala-in massathum nafḥatun min ʿadhābi rabbika layaqūlunna yāwaylanā innā kunnā ẓālimīna
ayahs.21:47: wanaḍaʿu l-mawāzīna l-qisṭa liyawmi l-qiyāmati falā tuẓlamu nafsun shayan wa-in kāna mithqāla ḥabbatin min khardalin ataynā bihā wakafā binā ḥāsibīna
ayahs.21:48: walaqad ātaynā mūsā wahārūna l-furqāna waḍiyāʾan wadhikran lilmuttaqīna
ayahs.21:49: alladhīna yakhshawna rabbahum bil-ghaybi wahum mina l-sāʿati mushfiqūna
ayahs.21:50: wahādhā dhikrun mubārakun anzalnāhu afa-antum lahu munkirūna
ayahs.21:51: walaqad ātaynā ibrāhīma rushdahu min qablu wakunnā bihi ʿālimīna
ayahs.21:52: idh qāla li-abīhi waqawmihi mā hādhihi l-tamāthīlu allatī antum lahā ʿākifūna
ayahs.21:54: qāla laqad kuntum antum waʾābāukum fī ḍalālin mubīnin
ayahs.21:55: qālū ajiʾtanā bil-ḥaqi am anta mina l-lāʿibīna
ayahs.21:56: qāla bal rabbukum rabbu l-samāwāti wal-arḍi alladhī faṭarahunna wa-anā ʿalā dhālikum mina l-shāhidīna
ayahs.21:57: watallāhi la-akīdanna aṣnāmakum baʿda an tuwallū mudbirīna
ayahs.21:58: fajaʿalahum judhādhan illā kabīran lahum laʿallahum ilayhi yarjiʿūna
ayahs.21:59: qālū man faʿala hādhā biālihatinā innahu lamina l-ẓālimīna
ayahs.21:60: qālū samiʿnā fatan yadhkuruhum yuqālu lahu ibrāhīmu
ayahs.21:61: qālū fatū bihi ʿalā aʿyuni l-nāsi laʿallahum yashhadūna
ayahs.21:62: qālū a-anta faʿalta hādhā biālihatinā yāibrāhīmu
ayahs.21:63: qāla bal faʿalahu kabīruhum hādhā fasalūhum in kānū yanṭiqūna
ayahs.21:64: farajaʿū ilā anfusihim faqālū innakum antumu l-ẓālimūna
ayahs.21:65: thumma nukisū ʿalā ruʾūsihim laqad ʿalimta mā hāulāi yanṭiqūna
ayahs.21:66: qāla afataʿbudūna min dūni Allāhi mā lā yanfaʿukum shayan walā yaḍurrukum
ayahs.21:67: uffin lakum walimā taʿbudūna min dūni Allāhi afalā taʿqilūna
ayahs.21:68: qālū ḥarriqūhu wa-unṣurū ālihatakum in kuntum fāʿilīna
ayahs.21:69: qulnā yānāru kūnī bardan wasalāman ʿalā ibrāhīma
ayahs.21:71: wanajjaynāhu walūṭan ilā l-arḍi allatī bāraknā fīhā lilʿālamīna
ayahs.21:72: wawahabnā lahu isḥāqa wayaʿqūba nāfilatan wakullan jaʿalnā ṣāliḥīna
ayahs.21:73: wajaʿalnāhum a-immatan yahdūna bi-amrinā wa-awḥaynā ilayhim fiʿla l-khayrāti wa-iqāma l-ṣalati waītāʾa l-zakati wakānū lanā ʿābidīna
ayahs.21:74: walūṭan ātaynāhu ḥukman waʿilman wanajjaynāhu mina l-qaryati allatī kānat taʿmalu l-khabāitha innahum kānū qawma sawin fāsiqīna
ayahs.21:75: wa-adkhalnāhu fī raḥmatinā innahu mina l-ṣāliḥīna
ayahs.21:76: wanūḥan idh nādā min qablu fa-istajabnā lahu fanajjaynāhu wa-ahlahu mina l-karbi l-ʿaẓīmi
ayahs.21:77: wanaṣarnāhu mina l-qawmi alladhīna kadhabū biāyātinā innahum kānū qawma sawin fa-aghraqnāhum ajmaʿīna
ayahs.21:78: wadāwūda wasulaymāna idh yaḥkumāni fī l-ḥarthi idh nafashat fīhi ghanamu l-qawmi wakunnā liḥukmihim shāhidīna
ayahs.21:79: fafahhamnāhā sulaymāna wakullan ātaynā ḥukman waʿilman wasakharnā maʿa dāwūda l-jibāla yusabbiḥna wal-ṭayra wakunnā fāʿilīna
ayahs.21:80: waʿallamnāhu ṣanʿata labūsin lakum lituḥṣinakum min basikum fahal antum shākirūna
ayahs.21:81: walisulaymāna l-rīḥa ʿāṣifatan tajrī bi-amrihi ilā l-arḍi allatī bāraknā fīhā wakunnā bikulli shayin ʿālimīna
ayahs.21:82: wamina l-shayāṭīni man yaghūṣūna lahu wayaʿmalūna ʿamalan dūna dhālika wakunnā lahum ḥāfiẓīna
ayahs.21:83: wa-ayyūba idh nādā rabbahu annī massaniya l-ḍuru wa-anta arḥamu l-rāḥimīna
ayahs.21:84: fa-istajabnā lahu fakashafnā mā bihi min ḍurrin waʾātaynāhu ahlahu wamithlahum maʿahum raḥmatan min ʿindinā wadhikrā lilʿābidīna
ayahs.21:85: wa-ismāʿīla wa-idrīsa wadhā l-kifli kullun mina l-ṣābirīna
ayahs.21:86: wa-adkhalnāhum fī raḥmatinā innahum mina l-ṣāliḥīna
ayahs.21:87: wadhā l-nūni idh dhahaba mughāḍiban faẓanna an lan naqdira ʿalayhi fanādā fī l-ẓulumāti an lā ilāha illā anta subḥānaka innī kuntu mina l-ẓālimīna
ayahs.21:88: fa-istajabnā lahu wanajjaynāhu mina l-ghami wakadhālika nunjī l-muʾminīna
ayahs.21:89: wazakariyyā idh nādā rabbahu rabbi lā tadharnī fardan wa-anta khayru l-wārithīna
ayahs.21:90: fa-istajabnā lahu wawahabnā lahu yaḥyā wa-aṣlaḥnā lahu zawjahu innahum kānū yusāriʿūna fī l-khayrāti wayadʿūnanā raghaban warahaban wakānū lanā khāshiʿīna
ayahs.21:91: wa-allatī aḥṣanat farjahā fanafakhnā fīhā min rūḥinā wajaʿalnāhā wa-ibnahā āyatan lilʿālamīna
ayahs.21:92: inna hādhihi ummatukum ummatan wāḥidatan wa-anā rabbukum fa-uʿbudūni
ayahs.21:93: wataqaṭṭaʿū amrahum baynahum kullun ilaynā rājiʿūna
ayahs.21:94: faman yaʿmal mina l-ṣāliḥāti wahuwa muʾminun falā kufrāna lisaʿyihi wa-innā lahu kātibūna
ayahs.21:95: waḥarāmun ʿalā qaryatin ahlaknāhā annahum lā yarjiʿūna
ayahs.21:96: ḥattā idhā futiḥat yajūju wamajūju wahum min kulli ḥadabin yansilūna
ayahs.21:97: wa-iqtaraba l-waʿdu l-ḥaqu fa-idhā hiya shākhiṣatun abṣāru alladhīna kafarū yāwaylanā qad kunnā fī ghaflatin min hādhā bal kunnā ẓālimīna
ayahs.21:98: innakum wamā taʿbudūna min dūni Allāhi ḥaṣabu jahannama antum lahā wāridūna
ayahs.21:99: law kāna hāulāi ālihatan mā waradūhā wakullun fīhā khālidūna
ayahs.21:100: lahum fīhā zafīrun wahum fīhā lā yasmaʿūna
ayahs.21:101: inna alladhīna sabaqat lahum minnā l-ḥusnā ulāika ʿanhā mubʿadūna
ayahs.21:102: lā yasmaʿūna ḥasīsahā wahum fī mā ishtahat anfusuhum khālidūna
ayahs.21:103: lā yaḥzunuhumu l-fazaʿu l-akbaru watatalaqqāhumu l-malāikatu hādhā yawmukumu alladhī kuntum tūʿadūna
ayahs.21:104: yawma naṭwī l-samāʾa kaṭayyi l-sijili lilkutubi kamā badanā awwala khalqin nuʿīduhu waʿdan ʿalaynā innā kunnā fāʿilīna
ayahs.21:105: walaqad katabnā fī l-zabūri min baʿdi l-dhikri anna l-arḍa yarithuhā ʿibādiya l-ṣāliḥūna
ayahs.21:106: inna fī hādhā labalāghan liqawmin ʿābidīna
ayahs.21:108: qul innamā yūḥā ilayya annamā ilāhukum ilāhun wāḥidun fahal antum muslimūna
ayahs.21:109: fa-in tawallaw faqul ādhantukum ʿalā sawāin wa-in adrī aqarībun am baʿīdun mā tūʿadūna
ayahs.21:110: innahu yaʿlamu l-jahra mina l-qawli wayaʿlamu mā taktumūna
ayahs.21:111: wa-in adrī laʿallahu fitnatun lakum wamatāʿun ilā ḥīnin
ayahs.21:112: qāla rabbi uḥkum bil-ḥaqi warabbunā l-raḥmānu l-mustaʿānu ʿalā mā taṣifūna
ayahs.22:1: yāʾayyuhā l-nāsu ittaqū rabbakum inna zalzalata l-sāʿati shayon ʿaẓīmun
ayahs.22:2: yawma tarawnahā tadhhalu kullu murḍiʿatin ʿammā arḍaʿat wataḍaʿu kullu dhāti ḥamlin ḥamlahā watarā l-nāsa sukārā wamā hum bisukārā walākinna ʿadhāba Allāhi shadīdun
ayahs.22:3: wamina l-nāsi man yujādilu fī Allāhi bighayri ʿilmin wayattabiʿu kulla shayṭānin marīdin
ayahs.22:4: kutiba ʿalayhi annahu man tawallāhu fa-annahu yuḍilluhu wayahdīhi ilā ʿadhābi l-saʿīri
ayahs.22:5: yāʾayyuhā l-nāsu in kuntum fī raybin mina l-baʿthi fa-innā khalaqnākum min turābin thumma min nuṭfatin thumma min ʿalaqatin thumma min muḍghatin mukhallaqatin waghayri mukhallaqatin linubayyina lakum wanuqirru fī l-arḥāmi mā nashāu ilā ajalin musamman thumma nukhrijukum ṭiflan thumma litablughū ashuddakum waminkum man yutawaffā waminkum man yuraddu ilā ardhali l-ʿumuri likaylā yaʿlama min baʿdi ʿilmin shayan watarā l-arḍa hāmidatan fa-idhā anzalnā ʿalayhā l-māʾa ihtazzat warabat wa-anbatat min kulli zawjin bahījin
ayahs.22:6: dhālika bi-anna Allāha huwa l-ḥaqu wa-annahu yuḥyī l-mawtā wa-annahu ʿalā kulli shayin qadīrun
ayahs.22:7: wa-anna l-sāʿata ātiyatun lā rayba fīhā wa-anna Allāha yabʿathu man fī l-qubūri
ayahs.22:8: wamina l-nāsi man yujādilu fī Allāhi bighayri ʿilmin walā hudan walā kitābin munīrin
ayahs.22:9: thāniya ʿiṭfihi liyuḍilla ʿan sabīli Allāhi lahu fī l-dunyā khizyun wanudhīquhu yawma l-qiyāmati ʿadhāba l-ḥarīqi
ayahs.22:10: dhālika bimā qaddamat yadāka wa-anna Allāha laysa biẓallāmin lilʿabīdi
ayahs.22:11: wamina l-nāsi man yaʿbudu Allāha ʿalā ḥarfin fa-in aṣābahu khayrun iṭma-anna bihi wa-in aṣābathu fitnatun inqalaba ʿalā wajhihi khasira l-dunyā wal-ākhirata dhālika huwa l-khusrānu l-mubīnu
ayahs.22:12: yadʿū min dūni Allāhi mā lā yaḍurruhu wamā lā yanfaʿuhu dhālika huwa l-ḍalālu l-baʿīdu
ayahs.22:13: yadʿū laman ḍarruhu aqrabu min nafʿihi labiʾsa l-mawlā walabiʾsa l-ʿashīru
ayahs.22:14: inna Allāha yudkhilu alladhīna āmanū waʿamilū l-ṣāliḥāti jannātin tajrī min taḥtihā l-anhāru inna Allāha yafʿalu mā yurīdu
ayahs.22:15: man kāna yaẓunnu an lan yanṣurahu Allāhu fī l-dunyā wal-ākhirati falyamdud bisababin ilā l-samāi thumma lyaqṭaʿ falyanẓur hal yudhhibanna kayduhu mā yaghīẓu
ayahs.22:16: wakadhālika anzalnāhu āyātin bayyinātin wa-anna Allāha yahdī man yurīdu
ayahs.22:17: inna alladhīna āmanū wa-alladhīna hādū wal-ṣābiʾīna wal-naṣārā wal-majūsa wa-alladhīna ashrakū inna Allāha yafṣilu baynahum yawma l-qiyāmati inna Allāha ʿalā kulli shayin shahīdun
ayahs.22:18: alam tara anna Allāha yasjudu lahu man fī l-samāwāti waman fī l-arḍi wal-shamsu wal-qamaru wal-nujūmu wal-jibālu wal-shajaru wal-dawābu wakathīrun mina l-nāsi wakathīrun ḥaqqa ʿalayhi l-ʿadhābu waman yuhini Allāhu famā lahu min mukrimin inna Allāha yafʿalu mā yashāu
ayahs.22:19: hādhāni khaṣmāni ikhtaṣamū fī rabbihim fa-alladhīna kafarū quṭṭiʿat lahum thiyābun min nārin yuṣabbu min fawqi ruʾūsihimu l-ḥamīmu
ayahs.22:20: yuṣharu bihi mā fī buṭūnihim wal-julūdu
ayahs.22:22: kullamā arādū an yakhrujū minhā min ghammin uʿīdū fīhā wadhūqū ʿadhāba l-ḥarīqi
ayahs.22:23: inna Allāha yudkhilu alladhīna āmanū waʿamilū l-ṣāliḥāti jannātin tajrī min taḥtihā l-anhāru yuḥallawna fīhā min asāwira min dhahabin waluʾlu-an walibāsuhum fīhā ḥarīrun
ayahs.22:24: wahudū ilā l-ṭayibi mina l-qawli wahudū ilā ṣirāṭi l-ḥamīdi
ayahs.22:25: inna alladhīna kafarū wayaṣuddūna ʿan sabīli Allāhi wal-masjidi l-ḥarāmi alladhī jaʿalnāhu lilnnāsi sawāʾan l-ʿākifu fīhi wal-bādi waman yurid fīhi bi-ilḥādin biẓulmin nudhiqhu min ʿadhābin alīmin
ayahs.22:26: wa-idh bawwanā li-ibrāhīma makāna l-bayti an lā tushrik bī shayan waṭahhir baytiya lilṭṭāifīna wal-qāimīna wal-rukaʿi l-sujūdi
ayahs.22:27: wa-adhin fī l-nāsi bil-ḥaji yatūka rijālan waʿalā kulli ḍāmirin yatīna min kulli fajjin ʿamīqin
ayahs.22:28: liyashhadū manāfiʿa lahum wayadhkurū isma Allāhi fī ayyāmin maʿlūmātin ʿalā mā razaqahum min bahīmati l-anʿāmi fakulū minhā wa-aṭʿimū l-bāisa l-faqīra
ayahs.22:29: thumma lyaqḍū tafathahum walyūfū nudhūrahum walyaṭṭawwafū bil-bayti l-ʿatīqi
ayahs.22:30: dhālika waman yuʿaẓẓim ḥurumāti Allāhi fahuwa khayrun lahu ʿinda rabbihi wa-uḥillat lakumu l-anʿāmu illā mā yutlā ʿalaykum fa-ijtanibū l-rijsa mina l-awthāni wa-ijtanibū qawla l-zūri
ayahs.22:31: ḥunafāʾa lillāhi ghayra mushrikīna bihi waman yushrik billāhi faka-annamā kharra mina l-samāi fatakhṭafuhu l-ṭayru aw tahwī bihi l-rīḥu fī makānin saḥīqin
ayahs.22:32: dhālika waman yuʿaẓẓim shaʿāira Allāhi fa-innahā min taqwā l-qulūbi
ayahs.22:33: lakum fīhā manāfiʿu ilā ajalin musamman thumma maḥilluhā ilā l-bayti l-ʿatīqi
ayahs.22:34: walikulli ummatin jaʿalnā mansakan liyadhkurū isma Allāhi ʿalā mā razaqahum min bahīmati l-anʿāmi fa-ilāhukum ilāhun wāḥidun falahu aslimū wabashiri l-mukhbitīna
ayahs.22:35: alladhīna idhā dhukira Allāhu wajilat qulūbuhum wal-ṣābirīna ʿalā mā aṣābahum wal-muqīmī l-ṣalati wamimmā razaqnāhum yunfiqūna
ayahs.22:36: wal-budna jaʿalnāhā lakum min shaʿāiri Allāhi lakum fīhā khayrun fa-udhkurū isma Allāhi ʿalayhā ṣawāffa fa-idhā wajabat junūbuhā fakulū minhā wa-aṭʿimū l-qāniʿa wal-muʿtara kadhālika sakharnāhā lakum laʿallakum tashkurūna
ayahs.22:37: lan yanāla Allāha luḥūmuhā walā dimāuhā walākin yanāluhu l-taqwā minkum kadhālika sakharahā lakum litukabbirū Allāha ʿalā mā hadākum wabashiri l-muḥsinīna
ayahs.22:38: inna Allāha yudāfiʿu ʿani alladhīna āmanū inna Allāha lā yuḥibbu kulla khawwānin kafūrin
ayahs.22:39: udhina lilladhīna yuqātalūna bi-annahum ẓulimū wa-inna Allāha ʿalā naṣrihim laqadīrun
ayahs.22:40: alladhīna ukhrijū min diyārihim bighayri ḥaqqin illā an yaqūlū rabbunā Allāhu walawlā dafʿu Allāhi l-nāsa baʿḍahum bibaʿḍin lahuddimat ṣawāmiʿu wabiyaʿun waṣalawātun wamasājidu yudhkaru fīhā usmu Allāhi kathīran walayanṣuranna Allāhu man yanṣuruhu inna Allāha laqawiyyun ʿazīzun
ayahs.22:41: alladhīna in makkannāhum fī l-arḍi aqāmū l-ṣalata waʾātawū l-zakata wa-amarū bil-maʿrūfi wanahaw ʿani l-munkari walillahi ʿāqibatu l-umūri
ayahs.22:42: wa-in yukadhibūka faqad kadhabat qablahum qawmu nūḥin waʿādun wathamūdu
ayahs.22:44: wa-aṣḥābu madyana wakudhiba mūsā fa-amlaytu lilkāfirīna thumma akhadhtuhum fakayfa kāna nakīri
ayahs.22:45: faka-ayyin min qaryatin ahlaknāhā wahiya ẓālimatun fahiya khāwiyatun ʿalā ʿurūshihā wabiʾrin muʿaṭṭalatin waqaṣrin mashīdin
ayahs.22:46: afalam yasīrū fī l-arḍi fatakūna lahum qulūbun yaʿqilūna bihā aw ādhānun yasmaʿūna bihā fa-innahā lā taʿmā l-abṣāru walākin taʿmā l-qulūbu allatī fī l-ṣudūri
ayahs.22:47: wayastaʿjilūnaka bil-ʿadhābi walan yukhlifa Allāhu waʿdahu wa-inna yawman ʿinda rabbika ka-alfi sanatin mimmā taʿuddūna
ayahs.22:48: waka-ayyin min qaryatin amlaytu lahā wahiya ẓālimatun thumma akhadhtuhā wa-ilayya l-maṣīru
ayahs.22:49: qul yāʾayyuhā l-nāsu innamā anā lakum nadhīrun mubīnun
ayahs.22:50: fa-alladhīna āmanū waʿamilū l-ṣāliḥāti lahum maghfiratun warizqun karīmun
ayahs.22:51: wa-alladhīna saʿaw fī āyātinā muʿājizīna ulāika aṣḥābu l-jaḥīmi
ayahs.22:52: wamā arsalnā min qablika min rasūlin walā nabiyyin illā idhā tamannā alqā l-shayṭānu fī umniyyatihi fayansakhu Allāhu mā yulqī l-shayṭānu thumma yuḥkimu Allāhu āyātihi wallāhu ʿalīmun ḥakīmun
ayahs.22:53: liyajʿala mā yulqī l-shayṭānu fitnatan lilladhīna fī qulūbihim maraḍun wal-qāsiyati qulūbuhum wa-inna l-ẓālimīna lafī shiqāqin baʿīdin
ayahs.22:54: waliyaʿlama alladhīna ūtū l-ʿilma annahu l-ḥaqu min rabbika fayuʾminū bihi fatukhbita lahu qulūbuhum wa-inna Allāha lahādi alladhīna āmanū ilā ṣirāṭin mustaqīmin
ayahs.22:55: walā yazālu alladhīna kafarū fī miryatin minhu ḥattā tatiyahumu l-sāʿatu baghtatan aw yatiyahum ʿadhābu yawmin ʿaqīmin
ayahs.22:56: al-mulku yawma-idhin lillāhi yaḥkumu baynahum fa-alladhīna āmanū waʿamilū l-ṣāliḥāti fī jannāti l-naʿīmi
ayahs.22:57: wa-alladhīna kafarū wakadhabū biāyātinā fa-ulāika lahum ʿadhābun muhīnun
ayahs.22:58: wa-alladhīna hājarū fī sabīli Allāhi thumma qutilū aw mātū layarzuqannahumu Allāhu rizqan ḥasanan wa-inna Allāha lahuwa khayru l-rāziqīna
ayahs.22:59: layudkhilannahum mudkhalan yarḍawnahu wa-inna Allāha laʿalīmun ḥalīmun
ayahs.22:60: dhālika waman ʿāqaba bimithli mā ʿūqiba bihi thumma bughiya ʿalayhi layanṣurannahu Allāhu inna Allāha laʿafuwwun ghafūrun
ayahs.22:61: dhālika bi-anna Allāha yūliju al-layla fī l-nahāri wayūliju l-nahāra fī al-layli wa-anna Allāha samīʿun baṣīrun
ayahs.22:62: dhālika bi-anna Allāha huwa l-ḥaqu wa-anna mā yadʿūna min dūnihi huwa l-bāṭilu wa-anna Allāha huwa l-ʿaliyu l-kabīru
ayahs.22:63: alam tara anna Allāha anzala mina l-samāi māʾan fatuṣbiḥu l-arḍu mukhḍarratan inna Allāha laṭīfun khabīrun
ayahs.22:64: lahu mā fī l-samāwāti wamā fī l-arḍi wa-inna Allāha lahuwa l-ghaniyu l-ḥamīdu
ayahs.22:65: alam tara anna Allāha sakhara lakum mā fī l-arḍi wal-fulka tajrī fī l-baḥri bi-amrihi wayumsiku l-samāʾa an taqaʿa ʿalā l-arḍi illā bi-idhnihi inna Allāha bil-nāsi laraūfun raḥīmun
ayahs.22:66: wahuwa alladhī aḥyākum thumma yumītukum thumma yuḥyīkum inna l-insāna lakafūrun
ayahs.22:67: likulli ummatin jaʿalnā mansakan hum nāsikūhu falā yunāziʿunnaka fī l-amri wa-udʿu ilā rabbika innaka laʿalā hudan mustaqīmin
ayahs.22:68: wa-in jādalūka faquli Allāhu aʿlamu bimā taʿmalūna
ayahs.22:69: Allāhu yaḥkumu baynakum yawma l-qiyāmati fīmā kuntum fīhi takhtalifūna
ayahs.22:70: alam taʿlam anna Allāha yaʿlamu mā fī l-samāi wal-arḍi inna dhālika fī kitābin inna dhālika ʿalā Allāhi yasīrun
ayahs.22:71: wayaʿbudūna min dūni Allāhi mā lam yunazzil bihi sulṭānan wamā laysa lahum bihi ʿilmun wamā lilẓẓālimīna min naṣīrin
ayahs.22:72: wa-idhā tutlā ʿalayhim āyātunā bayyinātin taʿrifu fī wujūhi alladhīna kafarū l-munkara yakādūna yasṭūna bi-alladhīna yatlūna ʿalayhim āyātinā qul afa-unabbi-ukum bisharrin min dhālikumu l-nāru waʿadahā Allāhu alladhīna kafarū wabiʾsa l-maṣīru
ayahs.22:73: yāʾayyuhā l-nāsu ḍuriba mathalun fa-istamiʿū lahu inna alladhīna tadʿūna min dūni Allāhi lan yakhluqū dhubāban walawi ijtamaʿū lahu wa-in yaslubhumu l-dhubābu shayan lā yastanqidhūhu minhu ḍaʿufa l-ṭālibu wal-maṭlūbu
ayahs.22:74: mā qadarū Allāha ḥaqqa qadrihi inna Allāha laqawiyyun ʿazīzun
ayahs.22:75: Allāhu yaṣṭafī mina l-malāikati rusulan wamina l-nāsi inna Allāha samīʿun baṣīrun
ayahs.22:76: yaʿlamu mā bayna aydīhim wamā khalfahum wa-ilā Allāhi turjaʿu l-umūru
ayahs.22:77: yāʾayyuhā alladhīna āmanū irkaʿū wa-usjudū wa-uʿbudū rabbakum wa-ifʿalū l-khayra laʿallakum tufliḥūna
ayahs.22:78: wajāhidū fī Allāhi ḥaqqa jihādihi huwa ijtabākum wamā jaʿala ʿalaykum fī l-dīni min ḥarajin millata abīkum ibrāhīma huwa sammākumu l-muslimīna min qablu wafī hādhā liyakūna l-rasūlu shahīdan ʿalaykum watakūnū shuhadāʾa ʿalā l-nāsi fa-aqīmū l-ṣalata waʾātū l-zakata wa-iʿtaṣimū billāhi huwa mawlākum faniʿma l-mawlā waniʿma l-naṣīru
ayahs.23:6: illā ʿalā azwājihim aw mā malakat aymānuhum fa-innahum ghayru malūmīna
ayahs.23:7: famani ibtaghā warāʾa dhālika fa-ulāika humu l-ʿādūna
ayahs.23:11: alladhīna yarithūna l-firdawsa hum fīhā khālidūna
ayahs.23:12: walaqad khalaqnā l-insāna min sulālatin min ṭīnin
ayahs.23:13: thumma jaʿalnāhu nuṭfatan fī qarārin makīnin
ayahs.23:14: thumma khalaqnā l-nuṭfata ʿalaqatan fakhalaqnā l-ʿalaqata muḍghatan fakhalaqnā l-muḍghata ʿiẓāman fakasawnā l-ʿiẓāma laḥman thumma anshanāhu khalqan ākhara fatabāraka Allāhu aḥsanu l-khāliqīna
ayahs.23:17: walaqad khalaqnā fawqakum sabʿa ṭarāiqa wamā kunnā ʿani l-khalqi ghāfilīna
ayahs.23:18: wa-anzalnā mina l-samāi māʾan biqadarin fa-askannāhu fī l-arḍi wa-innā ʿalā dhahābin bihi laqādirūna
ayahs.23:19: fa-anshanā lakum bihi jannātin min nakhīlin wa-aʿnābin lakum fīhā fawākihu kathīratun waminhā takulūna
ayahs.23:20: washajaratan takhruju min ṭūri saynāʾa tanbutu bil-duhni waṣibghin lilākilīna
ayahs.23:21: wa-inna lakum fī l-anʿāmi laʿibratan nusqīkum mimmā fī buṭūnihā walakum fīhā manāfiʿu kathīratun waminhā takulūna
ayahs.23:23: walaqad arsalnā nūḥan ilā qawmihi faqāla yāqawmi uʿbudū Allāha mā lakum min ilāhin ghayruhu afalā tattaqūna
ayahs.23:24: faqāla l-mala-u alladhīna kafarū min qawmihi mā hādhā illā basharun mithlukum yurīdu an yatafaḍḍala ʿalaykum walaw shāʾa Allāhu la-anzala malāikatan mā samiʿnā bihādhā fī ābāinā l-awalīna
ayahs.23:25: in huwa illā rajulun bihi jinnatun fatarabbaṣū bihi ḥattā ḥīnin
ayahs.23:27: fa-awḥaynā ilayhi ani iṣnaʿi l-fulka bi-aʿyuninā wawaḥyinā fa-idhā jāʾa amrunā wafāra l-tanūru fa-usluk fīhā min kullin zawjayni ithnayni wa-ahlaka illā man sabaqa ʿalayhi l-qawlu minhum walā tukhāṭibnī fī alladhīna ẓalamū innahum mughraqūna
ayahs.23:28: fa-idhā istawayta anta waman maʿaka ʿalā l-fulki faquli l-ḥamdu lillāhi alladhī najjānā mina l-qawmi l-ẓālimīna
ayahs.23:29: waqul rabbi anzilnī munzalan mubārakan wa-anta khayru l-munzilīna
ayahs.23:30: inna fī dhālika laʾāyātin wa-in kunnā lamubtalīna
ayahs.23:31: thumma anshanā min baʿdihim qarnan ākharīna
ayahs.23:32: fa-arsalnā fīhim rasūlan minhum ani uʿbudū Allāha mā lakum min ilāhin ghayruhu afalā tattaqūna
ayahs.23:33: waqāla l-mala-u min qawmihi alladhīna kafarū wakadhabū biliqāi l-ākhirati wa-atrafnāhum fī l-ḥayati l-dunyā mā hādhā illā basharun mithlukum yakulu mimmā takulūna minhu wayashrabu mimmā tashrabūna
ayahs.23:34: wala-in aṭaʿtum basharan mithlakum innakum idhan lakhāsirūna
ayahs.23:35: ayaʿidukum annakum idhā mittum wakuntum turāban waʿiẓāman annakum mukhrajūna
ayahs.23:37: in hiya illā ḥayātunā l-dunyā namūtu wanaḥyā wamā naḥnu bimabʿūthīna
ayahs.23:38: in huwa illā rajulun iftarā ʿalā Allāhi kadhiban wamā naḥnu lahu bimuʾminīna
ayahs.23:41: fa-akhadhathumu l-ṣayḥatu bil-ḥaqi fajaʿalnāhum ghuthāʾan fabuʿdan lilqawmi l-ẓālimīna
ayahs.23:42: thumma anshanā min baʿdihim qurūnan ākharīna
ayahs.23:43: mā tasbiqu min ummatin ajalahā wamā yastakhirūna
ayahs.23:44: thumma arsalnā rusulanā tatrā kulla mā jāʾa ummatan rasūluhā kadhabūhu fa-atbaʿnā baʿḍahum baʿḍan wajaʿalnāhum aḥādītha fabuʿdan liqawmin lā yuʾminūna
ayahs.23:45: thumma arsalnā mūsā wa-akhāhu hārūna biāyātinā wasulṭānin mubīnin
ayahs.23:46: ilā firʿawna wamala-ihi fa-istakbarū wakānū qawman ʿālīna
ayahs.23:47: faqālū anuʾminu libasharayni mithlinā waqawmuhumā lanā ʿābidūna
ayahs.23:49: walaqad ātaynā mūsā l-kitāba laʿallahum yahtadūna
ayahs.23:50: wajaʿalnā ibna maryama wa-ummahu āyatan waʾāwaynāhumā ilā rabwatin dhāti qarārin wamaʿīnin
ayahs.23:51: yāʾayyuhā l-rusulu kulū mina l-ṭayibāti wa-iʿmalū ṣāliḥan innī bimā taʿmalūna ʿalīmun
ayahs.23:52: wa-inna hādhihi ummatukum ummatan wāḥidatan wa-anā rabbukum fa-ittaqūni
ayahs.23:53: fataqaṭṭaʿū amrahum baynahum zuburan kullu ḥizbin bimā ladayhim fariḥūna
ayahs.23:55: ayaḥsabūna annamā numidduhum bihi min mālin wabanīna
ayahs.23:56: nusāriʿu lahum fī l-khayrāti bal lā yashʿurūna
ayahs.23:57: inna alladhīna hum min khashyati rabbihim mushfiqūna
ayahs.23:60: wa-alladhīna yuʾtūna mā ātaw waqulūbuhum wajilatun annahum ilā rabbihim rājiʿūna
ayahs.23:61: ulāika yusāriʿūna fī l-khayrāti wahum lahā sābiqūna
ayahs.23:62: walā nukallifu nafsan illā wusʿahā waladaynā kitābun yanṭiqu bil-ḥaqi wahum lā yuẓlamūna
ayahs.23:63: bal qulūbuhum fī ghamratin min hādhā walahum aʿmālun min dūni dhālika hum lahā ʿāmilūna
ayahs.23:64: ḥattā idhā akhadhnā mutrafīhim bil-ʿadhābi idhā hum yajarūna
ayahs.23:65: lā tajarū l-yawma innakum minnā lā tunṣarūna
ayahs.23:66: qad kānat āyātī tutlā ʿalaykum fakuntum ʿalā aʿqābikum tankiṣūna
ayahs.23:68: afalam yaddabbarū l-qawla am jāʾahum mā lam yati ābāʾahumu l-awalīna
ayahs.23:69: am lam yaʿrifū rasūlahum fahum lahu munkirūna
ayahs.23:70: am yaqūlūna bihi jinnatun bal jāʾahum bil-ḥaqi wa-aktharuhum lilḥaqqi kārihūna
ayahs.23:71: walawi ittabaʿa l-ḥaqu ahwāʾahum lafasadati l-samāwātu wal-arḍu waman fīhinna bal ataynāhum bidhikrihim fahum ʿan dhikrihim muʿriḍūna
ayahs.23:72: am tasaluhum kharjan fakharāju rabbika khayrun wahuwa khayru l-rāziqīna
ayahs.23:74: wa-inna alladhīna lā yuʾminūna bil-ākhirati ʿani l-ṣirāṭi lanākibūna
ayahs.23:75: walaw raḥimnāhum wakashafnā mā bihim min ḍurrin lalajjū fī ṭughyānihim yaʿmahūna
ayahs.23:76: walaqad akhadhnāhum bil-ʿadhābi famā istakānū lirabbihim wamā yataḍarraʿūna
ayahs.23:77: ḥattā idhā fataḥnā ʿalayhim bāban dhā ʿadhābin shadīdin idhā hum fīhi mublisūna
ayahs.23:78: wahuwa alladhī ansha-a lakumu l-samʿa wal-abṣāra wal-afidata qalīlan mā tashkurūna
ayahs.23:79: wahuwa alladhī dhara-akum fī l-arḍi wa-ilayhi tuḥsharūna
ayahs.23:80: wahuwa alladhī yuḥyī wayumītu walahu ikhtilāfu al-layli wal-nahāri afalā taʿqilūna
ayahs.23:81: bal qālū mithla mā qāla l-awalūna
ayahs.23:82: qālū a-idhā mitnā wakunnā turāban waʿiẓāman a-innā lamabʿūthūna
ayahs.23:83: laqad wuʿidnā naḥnu waʾābāunā hādhā min qablu in hādhā illā asāṭīru l-awalīna
ayahs.23:84: qul limani l-arḍu waman fīhā in kuntum taʿlamūna
ayahs.23:86: qul man rabbu l-samāwāti l-sabʿi warabbu l-ʿarshi l-ʿaẓīmi
ayahs.23:88: qul man biyadihi malakūtu kulli shayin wahuwa yujīru walā yujāru ʿalayhi in kuntum taʿlamūna
ayahs.23:91: mā ittakhadha Allāhu min waladin wamā kāna maʿahu min ilāhin idhan ladhahaba kullu ilāhin bimā khalaqa walaʿalā baʿḍuhum ʿalā baʿḍin subḥāna Allāhi ʿammā yaṣifūna
ayahs.23:92: ʿālimi l-ghaybi wal-shahādati fataʿālā ʿammā yushrikūna
ayahs.23:93: qul rabbi immā turiyannī mā yūʿadūna
ayahs.23:94: rabbi falā tajʿalnī fī l-qawmi l-ẓālimīna
ayahs.23:95: wa-innā ʿalā an nuriyaka mā naʿiduhum laqādirūna
ayahs.23:96: idfaʿ bi-allatī hiya aḥsanu l-sayi-ata naḥnu aʿlamu bimā yaṣifūna
ayahs.23:97: waqul rabbi aʿūdhu bika min hamazāti l-shayāṭīni
ayahs.23:99: ḥattā idhā jāʾa aḥadahumu l-mawtu qāla rabbi irjiʿūni
ayahs.23:100: laʿallī aʿmalu ṣāliḥan fīmā taraktu kallā innahā kalimatun huwa qāiluhā wamin warāihim barzakhun ilā yawmi yubʿathūna
ayahs.23:101: fa-idhā nufikha fī l-ṣūri falā ansāba baynahum yawma-idhin walā yatasāʾalūna
ayahs.23:102: faman thaqulat mawāzīnuhu fa-ulāika humu l-mufliḥūna
ayahs.23:103: waman khaffat mawāzīnuhu fa-ulāika alladhīna khasirū anfusahum fī jahannama khālidūna
ayahs.23:104: talfaḥu wujūhahumu l-nāru wahum fīhā kāliḥūna
ayahs.23:105: alam takun āyātī tutlā ʿalaykum fakuntum bihā tukadhibūna
ayahs.23:106: qālū rabbanā ghalabat ʿalaynā shiqwatunā wakunnā qawman ḍāllīna
ayahs.23:107: rabbanā akhrijnā minhā fa-in ʿudnā fa-innā ẓālimūna
ayahs.23:109: innahu kāna farīqun min ʿibādī yaqūlūna rabbanā āmannā fa-ighfir lanā wa-irḥamnā wa-anta khayru l-rāḥimīna
ayahs.23:110: fa-ittakhadhtumūhum sikhriyyan ḥattā ansawkum dhikrī wakuntum minhum taḍḥakūna
ayahs.23:111: innī jazaytuhumu l-yawma bimā ṣabarū annahum humu l-fāizūna
ayahs.23:112: qāla kam labithtum fī l-arḍi ʿadada sinīna
ayahs.23:113: qālū labithnā yawman aw baʿḍa yawmin fasali l-ʿādīna
ayahs.23:114: qāla in labithtum illā qalīlan law annakum kuntum taʿlamūna
ayahs.23:115: afaḥasibtum annamā khalaqnākum ʿabathan wa-annakum ilaynā lā turjaʿūna
ayahs.23:116: fataʿālā Allāhu l-maliku l-ḥaqu lā ilāha illā huwa rabbu l-ʿarshi l-karīmi
ayahs.23:117: waman yadʿu maʿa Allāhi ilāhan ākhara lā burhāna lahu bihi fa-innamā ḥisābuhu ʿinda rabbihi innahu lā yufliḥu l-kāfirūna
ayahs.23:118: waqul rabbi ighfir wa-irḥam wa-anta khayru l-rāḥimīna
ayahs.24:1: sūratun anzalnāhā wafaraḍnāhā wa-anzalnā fīhā āyātin bayyinātin laʿallakum tadhakkarūna
ayahs.24:2: al-zāniyatu wal-zānī fa-ijlidū kulla wāḥidin minhumā mi-ata jaldatin walā takhudhkum bihimā rafatun fī dīni Allāhi in kuntum tuʾminūna billāhi wal-yawmi l-ākhiri walyashhad ʿadhābahumā ṭāifatun mina l-muʾminīna
ayahs.24:3: al-zānī lā yankiḥu illā zāniyatan aw mushrikatan wal-zāniyatu lā yankiḥuhā illā zānin aw mushrikun waḥurrima dhālika ʿalā l-muʾminīna
ayahs.24:4: wa-alladhīna yarmūna l-muḥṣanāti thumma lam yatū bi-arbaʿati shuhadāʾa fa-ijlidūhum thamānīna jaldatan walā taqbalū lahum shahādatan abadan wa-ulāika humu l-fāsiqūna
ayahs.24:5: illā alladhīna tābū min baʿdi dhālika wa-aṣlaḥū fa-inna Allāha ghafūrun raḥīmun
ayahs.24:6: wa-alladhīna yarmūna azwājahum walam yakun lahum shuhadāu illā anfusuhum fashahādatu aḥadihim arbaʿu shahādātin billāhi innahu lamina l-ṣādiqīna
ayahs.24:7: wal-khāmisatu anna laʿnata Allāhi ʿalayhi in kāna mina l-kādhibīna
ayahs.24:8: wayadra-u ʿanhā l-ʿadhāba an tashhada arbaʿa shahādātin billāhi innahu lamina l-kādhibīna
ayahs.24:9: wal-khāmisata anna ghaḍaba Allāhi ʿalayhā in kāna mina l-ṣādiqīna
ayahs.24:10: walawlā faḍlu Allāhi ʿalaykum waraḥmatuhu wa-anna Allāha tawwābun ḥakīmun
ayahs.24:11: inna alladhīna jāū bil-ifki ʿuṣbatun minkum lā taḥsabūhu sharran lakum bal huwa khayrun lakum likulli imri-in minhum mā iktasaba mina l-ithmi wa-alladhī tawallā kibrahu minhum lahu ʿadhābun ʿaẓīmun
ayahs.24:12: lawlā idh samiʿtumūhu ẓanna l-muʾminūna wal-muʾminātu bi-anfusihim khayran waqālū hādhā ifkun mubīnun
ayahs.24:13: lawlā jāū ʿalayhi bi-arbaʿati shuhadāʾa fa-idh lam yatū bil-shuhadāi fa-ulāika ʿinda Allāhi humu l-kādhibūna
ayahs.24:14: walawlā faḍlu Allāhi ʿalaykum waraḥmatuhu fī l-dunyā wal-ākhirati lamassakum fī mā afaḍtum fīhi ʿadhābun ʿaẓīmun
ayahs.24:15: idh talaqqawnahu bi-alsinatikum wataqūlūna bi-afwāhikum mā laysa lakum bihi ʿilmun wataḥsabūnahu hayyinan wahuwa ʿinda Allāhi ʿaẓīmun
ayahs.24:16: walawlā idh samiʿtumūhu qultum mā yakūnu lanā an natakallama bihādhā subḥānaka hādhā buhtānun ʿaẓīmun
ayahs.24:17: yaʿiẓukumu Allāhu an taʿūdū limithlihi abadan in kuntum muʾminīna
ayahs.24:18: wayubayyinu Allāhu lakumu l-āyāti wallāhu ʿalīmun ḥakīmun
ayahs.24:19: inna alladhīna yuḥibbūna an tashīʿa l-fāḥishatu fī alladhīna āmanū lahum ʿadhābun alīmun fī l-dunyā wal-ākhirati wallāhu yaʿlamu wa-antum lā taʿlamūna
ayahs.24:20: walawlā faḍlu Allāhi ʿalaykum waraḥmatuhu wa-anna Allāha raūfun raḥīmun
ayahs.24:21: yāʾayyuhā alladhīna āmanū lā tattabiʿū khuṭuwāti l-shayṭāni waman yattabiʿ khuṭuwāti l-shayṭāni fa-innahu yamuru bil-faḥshāi wal-munkari walawlā faḍlu Allāhi ʿalaykum waraḥmatuhu mā zakā minkum min aḥadin abadan walākinna Allāha yuzakkī man yashāu wallāhu samīʿun ʿalīmun
ayahs.24:22: walā yatali ulū l-faḍli minkum wal-saʿati an yuʾtū ulī l-qurbā wal-masākīna wal-muhājirīna fī sabīli Allāhi walyaʿfū walyaṣfaḥū alā tuḥibbūna an yaghfira Allāhu lakum wallāhu ghafūrun raḥīmun
ayahs.24:23: inna alladhīna yarmūna l-muḥṣanāti l-ghāfilāti l-muʾmināti luʿinū fī l-dunyā wal-ākhirati walahum ʿadhābun ʿaẓīmun
ayahs.24:24: yawma tashhadu ʿalayhim alsinatuhum wa-aydīhim wa-arjuluhum bimā kānū yaʿmalūna
ayahs.24:25: yawma-idhin yuwaffīhimu Allāhu dīnahumu l-ḥaqa wayaʿlamūna anna Allāha huwa l-ḥaqu l-mubīnu
ayahs.24:26: al-khabīthātu lilkhabīthīna wal-khabīthūna lilkhabīthāti wal-ṭayibātu lilṭṭayyibīna wal-ṭayibūna lilṭṭayyibāti ulāika mubarraūna mimmā yaqūlūna lahum maghfiratun warizqun karīmun
ayahs.24:27: yāʾayyuhā alladhīna āmanū lā tadkhulū buyūtan ghayra buyūtikum ḥattā tastanisū watusallimū ʿalā ahlihā dhālikum khayrun lakum laʿallakum tadhakkarūna
ayahs.24:28: fa-in lam tajidū fīhā aḥadan falā tadkhulūhā ḥattā yuʾdhana lakum wa-in qīla lakumu irjiʿū fa-irjiʿū huwa azkā lakum wallāhu bimā taʿmalūna ʿalīmun
ayahs.24:29: laysa ʿalaykum junāḥun an tadkhulū buyūtan ghayra maskūnatin fīhā matāʿun lakum wallāhu yaʿlamu mā tubdūna wamā taktumūna
ayahs.24:30: qul lilmuʾminīna yaghuḍḍū min abṣārihim wayaḥfaẓū furūjahum dhālika azkā lahum inna Allāha khabīrun bimā yaṣnaʿūna
ayahs.24:31: waqul lilmuʾmināti yaghḍuḍna min abṣārihinna wayaḥfaẓna furūjahunna walā yubdīna zīnatahunna illā mā ẓahara minhā walyaḍribna bikhumurihinna ʿalā juyūbihinna walā yubdīna zīnatahunna illā libuʿūlatihinna aw ābāihinna aw ābāi buʿūlatihinna aw abnāihinna aw abnāi buʿūlatihinna aw ikhwānihinna aw banī ikhwānihinna aw banī akhawātihinna aw nisāihinna aw mā malakat aymānuhunna awi l-tābiʿīna ghayri ulī l-irbati mina l-rijāli awi l-ṭifli alladhīna lam yaẓharū ʿalā ʿawrāti l-nisāi walā yaḍribna bi-arjulihinna liyuʿlama mā yukhfīna min zīnatihinna watūbū ilā Allāhi jamīʿan ayyuha l-muʾminūna laʿallakum tufliḥūna
ayahs.24:32: wa-ankiḥū l-ayāmā minkum wal-ṣāliḥīna min ʿibādikum wa-imāikum in yakūnū fuqarāʾa yughnihimu Allāhu min faḍlihi wallāhu wāsiʿun ʿalīmun
ayahs.24:33: walyastaʿfifi alladhīna lā yajidūna nikāḥan ḥattā yughniyahumu Allāhu min faḍlihi wa-alladhīna yabtaghūna l-kitāba mimmā malakat aymānukum fakātibūhum in ʿalimtum fīhim khayran waʾātūhum min māli Allāhi alladhī ātākum walā tukrihū fatayātikum ʿalā l-bighāi in aradna taḥaṣṣunan litabtaghū ʿaraḍa l-ḥayati l-dunyā waman yukrihhunna fa-inna Allāha min baʿdi ikrāhihinna ghafūrun raḥīmun
ayahs.24:34: walaqad anzalnā ilaykum āyātin mubayyinātin wamathalan mina alladhīna khalaw min qablikum wamawʿiẓatan lilmuttaqīna
ayahs.24:35: Allāhu nūru l-samāwāti wal-arḍi mathalu nūrihi kamishkatin fīhā miṣbāḥun l-miṣbāḥu fī zujājatin l-zujājatu ka-annahā kawkabun durriyyun yūqadu min shajaratin mubārakatin zaytūnatin lā sharqiyyatin walā gharbiyyatin yakādu zaytuhā yuḍīu walaw lam tamsashu nārun nūrun ʿalā nūrin yahdī Allāhu linūrihi man yashāu wayaḍribu Allāhu l-amthāla lilnnāsi wallāhu bikulli shayin ʿalīmun
ayahs.24:36: fī buyūtin adhina Allāhu an turfaʿa wayudhkara fīhā usmuhu yusabbiḥu lahu fīhā bil-ghuduwi wal-āṣāli
ayahs.24:37: rijālun lā tulhīhim tijāratun walā bayʿun ʿan dhikri Allāhi wa-iqāmi l-ṣalati waītāi l-zakati yakhāfūna yawman tataqallabu fīhi l-qulūbu wal-abṣāru
ayahs.24:38: liyajziyahumu Allāhu aḥsana mā ʿamilū wayazīdahum min faḍlihi wallāhu yarzuqu man yashāu bighayri ḥisābin
ayahs.24:39: wa-alladhīna kafarū aʿmāluhum kasarābin biqīʿatin yaḥsabuhu l-ẓamānu māʾan ḥattā idhā jāʾahu lam yajidhu shayan wawajada Allāha ʿindahu fawaffāhu ḥisābahu wallāhu sarīʿu l-ḥisābi
ayahs.24:40: aw kaẓulumātin fī baḥrin lujjiyyin yaghshāhu mawjun min fawqihi mawjun min fawqihi saḥābun ẓulumātun baʿḍuhā fawqa baʿḍin idhā akhraja yadahu lam yakad yarāhā waman lam yajʿali Allāhu lahu nūran famā lahu min nūrin
ayahs.24:41: alam tara anna Allāha yusabbiḥu lahu man fī l-samāwāti wal-arḍi wal-ṭayru ṣāffātin kullun qad ʿalima ṣalātahu watasbīḥahu wallāhu ʿalīmun bimā yafʿalūna
ayahs.24:42: walillahi mulku l-samāwāti wal-arḍi wa-ilā Allāhi l-maṣīru
ayahs.24:43: alam tara anna Allāha yuzjī saḥāban thumma yu-allifu baynahu thumma yajʿaluhu rukāman fatarā l-wadqa yakhruju min khilālihi wayunazzilu mina l-samāi min jibālin fīhā min baradin fayuṣību bihi man yashāu wayaṣrifuhu ʿan man yashāu yakādu sanā barqihi yadhhabu bil-abṣāri
ayahs.24:44: yuqallibu Allāhu al-layla wal-nahāra inna fī dhālika laʿibratan li-ulī l-abṣāri
ayahs.24:45: wallāhu khalaqa kulla dābbatin min māin faminhum man yamshī ʿalā baṭnihi waminhum man yamshī ʿalā rijlayni waminhum man yamshī ʿalā arbaʿin yakhluqu Allāhu mā yashāu inna Allāha ʿalā kulli shayin qadīrun
ayahs.24:46: laqad anzalnā āyātin mubayyinātin wallāhu yahdī man yashāu ilā ṣirāṭin mustaqīmin
ayahs.24:47: wayaqūlūna āmannā billāhi wabil-rasūli wa-aṭaʿnā thumma yatawallā farīqun minhum min baʿdi dhālika wamā ulāika bil-muʾminīna
ayahs.24:48: wa-idhā duʿū ilā Allāhi warasūlihi liyaḥkuma baynahum idhā farīqun minhum muʿriḍūna
ayahs.24:49: wa-in yakun lahumu l-ḥaqu yatū ilayhi mudhʿinīna
ayahs.24:50: afī qulūbihim maraḍun ami irtābū am yakhāfūna an yaḥīfa Allāhu ʿalayhim warasūluhu bal ulāika humu l-ẓālimūna
ayahs.24:51: innamā kāna qawla l-muʾminīna idhā duʿū ilā Allāhi warasūlihi liyaḥkuma baynahum an yaqūlū samiʿnā wa-aṭaʿnā wa-ulāika humu l-mufliḥūna
ayahs.24:52: waman yuṭiʿi Allāha warasūlahu wayakhsha Allāha wayattaqhi fa-ulāika humu l-fāizūna
ayahs.24:53: wa-aqsamū billāhi jahda aymānihim la-in amartahum layakhrujunna qul lā tuqsimū ṭāʿatun maʿrūfatun inna Allāha khabīrun bimā taʿmalūna
ayahs.24:54: qul aṭīʿū Allāha wa-aṭīʿū l-rasūla fa-in tawallaw fa-innamā ʿalayhi mā ḥummila waʿalaykum mā ḥummiltum wa-in tuṭīʿūhu tahtadū wamā ʿalā l-rasūli illā l-balāghu l-mubīnu
ayahs.24:55: waʿada Allāhu alladhīna āmanū minkum waʿamilū l-ṣāliḥāti layastakhlifannahum fī l-arḍi kamā istakhlafa alladhīna min qablihim walayumakkinanna lahum dīnahumu alladhī irtaḍā lahum walayubaddilannahum min baʿdi khawfihim amnan yaʿbudūnanī lā yushrikūna bī shayan waman kafara baʿda dhālika fa-ulāika humu l-fāsiqūna
ayahs.24:56: wa-aqīmū l-ṣalata waʾātū l-zakata wa-aṭīʿū l-rasūla laʿallakum turḥamūna
ayahs.24:57: lā taḥsabanna alladhīna kafarū muʿjizīna fī l-arḍi wamawāhumu l-nāru walabiʾsa l-maṣīru
ayahs.24:58: yāʾayyuhā alladhīna āmanū liyastadhinkumu alladhīna malakat aymānukum wa-alladhīna lam yablughū l-ḥuluma minkum thalātha marrātin min qabli ṣalati l-fajri waḥīna taḍaʿūna thiyābakum mina l-ẓahīrati wamin baʿdi ṣalati l-ʿishāi thalāthu ʿawrātin lakum laysa ʿalaykum walā ʿalayhim junāḥun baʿdahunna ṭawwāfūna ʿalaykum baʿḍukum ʿalā baʿḍin kadhālika yubayyinu Allāhu lakumu l-āyāti wallāhu ʿalīmun ḥakīmun
ayahs.24:59: wa-idhā balagha l-aṭfālu minkumu l-ḥuluma falyastadhinū kamā istadhana alladhīna min qablihim kadhālika yubayyinu Allāhu lakum āyātihi wallāhu ʿalīmun ḥakīmun
ayahs.24:60: wal-qawāʿidu mina l-nisāi allātī lā yarjūna nikāḥan falaysa ʿalayhinna junāḥun an yaḍaʿna thiyābahunna ghayra mutabarrijātin bizīnatin wa-an yastaʿfifna khayrun lahunna wallāhu samīʿun ʿalīmun
ayahs.24:61: laysa ʿalā l-aʿmā ḥarajun walā ʿalā l-aʿraji ḥarajun walā ʿalā l-marīḍi ḥarajun walā ʿalā anfusikum an takulū min buyūtikum aw buyūti ābāikum aw buyūti ummahātikum aw buyūti ikhwānikum aw buyūti akhawātikum aw buyūti aʿmāmikum aw buyūti ʿammātikum aw buyūti akhwālikum aw buyūti khālātikum aw mā malaktum mafātiḥahu aw ṣadīqikum laysa ʿalaykum junāḥun an takulū jamīʿan aw ashtātan fa-idhā dakhaltum buyūtan fasallimū ʿalā anfusikum taḥiyyatan min ʿindi Allāhi mubārakatan ṭayyibatan kadhālika yubayyinu Allāhu lakumu l-āyāti laʿallakum taʿqilūna
ayahs.24:62: innamā l-muʾminūna alladhīna āmanū billāhi warasūlihi wa-idhā kānū maʿahu ʿalā amrin jāmiʿin lam yadhhabū ḥattā yastadhinūhu inna alladhīna yastadhinūnaka ulāika alladhīna yuʾminūna billāhi warasūlihi fa-idhā istadhanūka libaʿḍi shanihim fadhan liman shiʾta minhum wa-istaghfir lahumu Allāha inna Allāha ghafūrun raḥīmun
ayahs.24:63: lā tajʿalū duʿāʾa l-rasūli baynakum kaduʿāi baʿḍikum baʿḍan qad yaʿlamu Allāhu alladhīna yatasallalūna minkum liwādhan falyaḥdhari alladhīna yukhālifūna ʿan amrihi an tuṣībahum fitnatun aw yuṣībahum ʿadhābun alīmun
ayahs.24:64: alā inna lillāhi mā fī l-samāwāti wal-arḍi qad yaʿlamu mā antum ʿalayhi wayawma yurjaʿūna ilayhi fayunabbi-uhum bimā ʿamilū wallāhu bikulli shayin ʿalīmun
ayahs.25:1: tabāraka alladhī nazzala l-furqāna ʿalā ʿabdihi liyakūna lilʿālamīna nadhīran
ayahs.25:2: alladhī lahu mulku l-samāwāti wal-arḍi walam yattakhidh waladan walam yakun lahu sharīkun fī l-mulki wakhalaqa kulla shayin faqaddarahu taqdīran
ayahs.25:3: wa-ittakhadhū min dūnihi ālihatan lā yakhluqūna shayan wahum yukhlaqūna walā yamlikūna li-anfusihim ḍarran walā nafʿan walā yamlikūna mawtan walā ḥayatan walā nushūran
ayahs.25:4: waqāla alladhīna kafarū in hādhā illā ifkun iftarāhu wa-aʿānahu ʿalayhi qawmun ākharūna faqad jāū ẓulman wazūran
ayahs.25:5: waqālū asāṭīru l-awalīna iktatabahā fahiya tumlā ʿalayhi bukratan wa-aṣīlan
ayahs.25:6: qul anzalahu alladhī yaʿlamu l-sira fī l-samāwāti wal-arḍi innahu kāna ghafūran raḥīman
ayahs.25:7: waqālū māli hādhā l-rasūli yakulu l-ṭaʿāma wayamshī fī l-aswāqi lawlā unzila ilayhi malakun fayakūna maʿahu nadhīran
ayahs.25:8: aw yulqā ilayhi kanzun aw takūnu lahu jannatun yakulu minhā waqāla l-ẓālimūna in tattabiʿūna illā rajulan masḥūran
ayahs.25:9: unẓur kayfa ḍarabū laka l-amthāla faḍallū falā yastaṭīʿūna sabīlan
ayahs.25:10: tabāraka alladhī in shāʾa jaʿala laka khayran min dhālika jannātin tajrī min taḥtihā l-anhāru wayajʿal laka quṣūran
ayahs.25:11: bal kadhabū bil-sāʿati wa-aʿtadnā liman kadhaba bil-sāʿati saʿīran
ayahs.25:12: idhā ra-athum min makānin baʿīdin samiʿū lahā taghayyuẓan wazafīran
ayahs.25:13: wa-idhā ulqū minhā makānan ḍayyiqan muqarranīna daʿaw hunālika thubūran
ayahs.25:14: lā tadʿū l-yawma thubūran wāḥidan wa-idʿū thubūran kathīran
ayahs.25:15: qul adhālika khayrun am jannatu l-khuldi allatī wuʿida l-mutaqūna kānat lahum jazāʾan wamaṣīran
ayahs.25:16: lahum fīhā mā yashāūna khālidīna kāna ʿalā rabbika waʿdan masūlan
ayahs.25:17: wayawma yaḥshuruhum wamā yaʿbudūna min dūni Allāhi fayaqūlu a-antum aḍlaltum ʿibādī hāulāi am hum ḍallū l-sabīla
ayahs.25:18: qālū subḥānaka mā kāna yanbaghī lanā an nattakhidha min dūnika min awliyāʾa walākin mattaʿtahum waʾābāʾahum ḥattā nasū l-dhikra wakānū qawman būran
ayahs.25:19: faqad kadhabūkum bimā taqūlūna famā tastaṭīʿūna ṣarfan walā naṣran waman yaẓlim minkum nudhiqhu ʿadhāban kabīran
ayahs.25:20: wamā arsalnā qablaka mina l-mursalīna illā innahum layakulūna l-ṭaʿāma wayamshūna fī l-aswāqi wajaʿalnā baʿḍakum libaʿḍin fitnatan ataṣbirūna wakāna rabbuka baṣīran
ayahs.25:21: waqāla alladhīna lā yarjūna liqāʾanā lawlā unzila ʿalaynā l-malāikatu aw narā rabbanā laqadi istakbarū fī anfusihim waʿataw ʿutuwwan kabīran
ayahs.25:22: yawma yarawna l-malāikata lā bushrā yawma-idhin lilmujrimīna wayaqūlūna ḥijran maḥjūran
ayahs.25:23: waqadimnā ilā mā ʿamilū min ʿamalin fajaʿalnāhu habāʾan manthūran
ayahs.25:24: aṣḥābu l-janati yawma-idhin khayrun mustaqarran wa-aḥsanu maqīlan
ayahs.25:25: wayawma tashaqqaqu l-samāu bil-ghamāmi wanuzzila l-malāikatu tanzīlan
ayahs.25:26: al-mulku yawma-idhin l-ḥaqu lilrraḥmāni wakāna yawman ʿalā l-kāfirīna ʿasīran
ayahs.25:27: wayawma yaʿaḍḍu l-ẓālimu ʿalā yadayhi yaqūlu yālaytanī ittakhadhtu maʿa l-rasūli sabīlan
ayahs.25:28: yāwaylatā laytanī lam attakhidh fulānan khalīlan
ayahs.25:29: laqad aḍallanī ʿani l-dhikri baʿda idh jāʾanī wakāna l-shayṭānu lilinsāni khadhūlan
ayahs.25:30: waqāla l-rasūlu yārabbi inna qawmī ittakhadhū hādhā l-qurāna mahjūran
ayahs.25:31: wakadhālika jaʿalnā likulli nabiyyin ʿaduwwan mina l-mujrimīna wakafā birabbika hādiyan wanaṣīran
ayahs.25:32: waqāla alladhīna kafarū lawlā nuzzila ʿalayhi l-qurānu jumlatan wāḥidatan kadhālika linuthabbita bihi fuādaka warattalnāhu tartīlan
ayahs.25:33: walā yatūnaka bimathalin illā jiʾnāka bil-ḥaqi wa-aḥsana tafsīran
ayahs.25:34: alladhīna yuḥsharūna ʿalā wujūhihim ilā jahannama ulāika sharrun makānan wa-aḍallu sabīlan
ayahs.25:35: walaqad ātaynā mūsā l-kitāba wajaʿalnā maʿahu akhāhu hārūna wazīran
ayahs.25:36: faqulnā idhhabā ilā l-qawmi alladhīna kadhabū biāyātinā fadammarnāhum tadmīran
ayahs.25:37: waqawma nūḥin lammā kadhabū l-rusula aghraqnāhum wajaʿalnāhum lilnnāsi āyatan wa-aʿtadnā lilẓẓālimīna ʿadhāban alīman
ayahs.25:38: waʿādan wathamūdā wa-aṣḥāba l-rasi waqurūnan bayna dhālika kathīran
ayahs.25:39: wakullan ḍarabnā lahu l-amthāla wakullan tabbarnā tatbīran
ayahs.25:40: walaqad ataw ʿalā l-qaryati allatī umṭirat maṭara l-sawi afalam yakūnū yarawnahā bal kānū lā yarjūna nushūran
ayahs.25:41: wa-idhā ra-awka in yattakhidhūnaka illā huzuwan ahādhā alladhī baʿatha Allāhu rasūlan
ayahs.25:42: in kāda layuḍillunā ʿan ālihatinā lawlā an ṣabarnā ʿalayhā wasawfa yaʿlamūna ḥīna yarawna l-ʿadhāba man aḍallu sabīlan
ayahs.25:43: ara-ayta mani ittakhadha ilāhahu hawāhu afa-anta takūnu ʿalayhi wakīlan
ayahs.25:44: am taḥsabu anna aktharahum yasmaʿūna aw yaʿqilūna in hum illā kal-anʿāmi bal hum aḍallu sabīlan
ayahs.25:45: alam tara ilā rabbika kayfa madda l-ẓila walaw shāʾa lajaʿalahu sākinan thumma jaʿalnā l-shamsa ʿalayhi dalīlan
ayahs.25:47: wahuwa alladhī jaʿala lakumu al-layla libāsan wal-nawma subātan wajaʿala l-nahāra nushūran
ayahs.25:48: wahuwa alladhī arsala l-riyāḥa bushran bayna yaday raḥmatihi wa-anzalnā mina l-samāi māʾan ṭahūran
ayahs.25:49: linuḥyiya bihi baldatan maytan wanusqiyahu mimmā khalaqnā anʿāman wa-anāsiyya kathīran
ayahs.25:50: walaqad ṣarrafnāhu baynahum liyadhakkarū fa-abā aktharu l-nāsi illā kufūran
ayahs.25:51: walaw shiʾnā labaʿathnā fī kulli qaryatin nadhīran
ayahs.25:52: falā tuṭiʿi l-kāfirīna wajāhidhum bihi jihādan kabīran
ayahs.25:53: wahuwa alladhī maraja l-baḥrayni hādhā ʿadhbun furātun wahādhā milḥun ujājun wajaʿala baynahumā barzakhan waḥijran maḥjūran
ayahs.25:54: wahuwa alladhī khalaqa mina l-māi basharan fajaʿalahu nasaban waṣihran wakāna rabbuka qadīran
ayahs.25:55: wayaʿbudūna min dūni Allāhi mā lā yanfaʿuhum walā yaḍurruhum wakāna l-kāfiru ʿalā rabbihi ẓahīran
ayahs.25:57: qul mā asalukum ʿalayhi min ajrin illā man shāʾa an yattakhidha ilā rabbihi sabīlan
ayahs.25:58: watawakkal ʿalā l-ḥayi alladhī lā yamūtu wasabbiḥ biḥamdihi wakafā bihi bidhunūbi ʿibādihi khabīran
ayahs.25:59: alladhī khalaqa l-samāwāti wal-arḍa wamā baynahumā fī sittati ayyāmin thumma istawā ʿalā l-ʿarshi l-raḥmānu fasal bihi khabīran
ayahs.25:60: wa-idhā qīla lahumu usjudū lilrraḥmāni qālū wamā l-raḥmānu anasjudu limā tamurunā wazādahum nufūran
ayahs.25:61: tabāraka alladhī jaʿala fī l-samāi burūjan wajaʿala fīhā sirājan waqamaran munīran
ayahs.25:62: wahuwa alladhī jaʿala al-layla wal-nahāra khilfatan liman arāda an yadhakkara aw arāda shukūran
ayahs.25:63: waʿibādu l-raḥmāni alladhīna yamshūna ʿalā l-arḍi hawnan wa-idhā khāṭabahumu l-jāhilūna qālū salāman
ayahs.25:65: wa-alladhīna yaqūlūna rabbanā iṣrif ʿannā ʿadhāba jahannama inna ʿadhābahā kāna gharāman
ayahs.25:67: wa-alladhīna idhā anfaqū lam yusrifū walam yaqturū wakāna bayna dhālika qawāman
ayahs.25:68: wa-alladhīna lā yadʿūna maʿa Allāhi ilāhan ākhara walā yaqtulūna l-nafsa allatī ḥarrama Allāhu illā bil-ḥaqi walā yaznūna waman yafʿal dhālika yalqa athāman
ayahs.25:69: yuḍāʿaf lahu l-ʿadhābu yawma l-qiyāmati wayakhlud fīhi muhānan
ayahs.25:70: illā man tāba waʾāmana waʿamila ʿamalan ṣāliḥan fa-ulāika yubaddilu Allāhu sayyiātihim ḥasanātin wakāna Allāhu ghafūran raḥīman
ayahs.25:71: waman tāba waʿamila ṣāliḥan fa-innahu yatūbu ilā Allāhi matāban
ayahs.25:72: wa-alladhīna lā yashhadūna l-zūra wa-idhā marrū bil-laghwi marrū kirāman
ayahs.25:73: wa-alladhīna idhā dhukkirū biāyāti rabbihim lam yakhirrū ʿalayhā ṣumman waʿumyānan
ayahs.25:74: wa-alladhīna yaqūlūna rabbanā hab lanā min azwājinā wadhurriyyātinā qurrata aʿyunin wa-ijʿalnā lilmuttaqīna imāman
ayahs.25:75: ulāika yujzawna l-ghurfata bimā ṣabarū wayulaqqawna fīhā taḥiyyatan wasalāman
ayahs.25:77: qul mā yaʿba-u bikum rabbī lawlā duʿāukum faqad kadhabtum fasawfa yakūnu lizāman
ayahs.26:3: laʿallaka bākhiʿun nafsaka allā yakūnū muʾminīna
ayahs.26:4: in nasha nunazzil ʿalayhim mina l-samāi āyatan faẓallat aʿnāquhum lahā khāḍiʿīna
ayahs.26:5: wamā yatīhim min dhikrin mina l-raḥmāni muḥdathin illā kānū ʿanhu muʿriḍīna
ayahs.26:6: faqad kadhabū fasayatīhim anbāu mā kānū bihi yastahziūna
ayahs.26:7: awalam yaraw ilā l-arḍi kam anbatnā fīhā min kulli zawjin karīmin
ayahs.26:8: inna fī dhālika laʾāyatan wamā kāna aktharuhum muʾminīna
ayahs.26:10: wa-idh nādā rabbuka mūsā ani iʾti l-qawma l-ẓālimīna
ayahs.26:12: qāla rabbi innī akhāfu an yukadhibūni
ayahs.26:13: wayaḍīqu ṣadrī walā yanṭaliqu lisānī fa-arsil ilā hārūna
ayahs.26:14: walahum ʿalayya dhanbun fa-akhāfu an yaqtulūni
ayahs.26:15: qāla kallā fa-idhhabā biāyātinā innā maʿakum mustamiʿūna
ayahs.26:16: fatiyā firʿawna faqūlā innā rasūlu rabbi l-ʿālamīna
ayahs.26:18: qāla alam nurabbika fīnā walīdan walabithta fīnā min ʿumurika sinīna
ayahs.26:19: wafaʿalta faʿlataka allatī faʿalta wa-anta mina l-kāfirīna
ayahs.26:20: qāla faʿaltuhā idhan wa-anā mina l-ḍālīna
ayahs.26:21: fafarartu minkum lammā khiftukum fawahaba lī rabbī ḥukman wajaʿalanī mina l-mursalīna
ayahs.26:22: watilka niʿmatun tamunnuhā ʿalayya an ʿabbadtta banī isrāīla
ayahs.26:24: qāla rabbu l-samāwāti wal-arḍi wamā baynahumā in kuntum mūqinīna
ayahs.26:27: qāla inna rasūlakumu alladhī ursila ilaykum lamajnūnun
ayahs.26:28: qāla rabbu l-mashriqi wal-maghribi wamā baynahumā in kuntum taʿqilūna
ayahs.26:29: qāla la-ini ittakhadhta ilāhan ghayrī la-ajʿalannaka mina l-masjūnīna
ayahs.26:31: qāla fati bihi in kunta mina l-ṣādiqīna
ayahs.26:32: fa-alqā ʿaṣāhu fa-idhā hiya thuʿbānun mubīnun
ayahs.26:33: wanazaʿa yadahu fa-idhā hiya bayḍāu lilnnāẓirīna
ayahs.26:34: qāla lilmala-i ḥawlahu inna hādhā lasāḥirun ʿalīmun
ayahs.26:35: yurīdu an yukhrijakum min arḍikum bisiḥrihi famādhā tamurūna
ayahs.26:36: qālū arjih wa-akhāhu wa-ibʿath fī l-madāini ḥāshirīna
ayahs.26:40: laʿallanā nattabiʿu l-saḥarata in kānū humu l-ghālibīna
ayahs.26:41: falammā jāʾa l-saḥaratu qālū lifirʿawna a-inna lanā la-ajran in kunnā naḥnu l-ghālibīna
ayahs.26:42: qāla naʿam wa-innakum idhan lamina l-muqarabīna
ayahs.26:43: qāla lahum mūsā alqū mā antum mulqūna
ayahs.26:44: fa-alqaw ḥibālahum waʿiṣiyyahum waqālū biʿizzati firʿawna innā lanaḥnu l-ghālibūna
ayahs.26:45: fa-alqā mūsā ʿaṣāhu fa-idhā hiya talqafu mā yafikūna
ayahs.26:49: qāla āmantum lahu qabla an ādhana lakum innahu lakabīrukumu alladhī ʿallamakumu l-siḥra falasawfa taʿlamūna la-uqaṭṭiʿanna aydiyakum wa-arjulakum min khilāfin wala-uṣallibannakum ajmaʿīna
ayahs.26:50: qālū lā ḍayra innā ilā rabbinā munqalibūna
ayahs.26:51: innā naṭmaʿu an yaghfira lanā rabbunā khaṭāyānā an kunnā awwala l-muʾminīna
ayahs.26:52: wa-awḥaynā ilā mūsā an asri biʿibādī innakum muttabaʿūna
ayahs.26:61: falammā tarāā l-jamʿāni qāla aṣḥābu mūsā innā lamudrakūna
ayahs.26:62: qāla kallā inna maʿiya rabbī sayahdīni
ayahs.26:63: fa-awḥaynā ilā mūsā ani iḍrib biʿaṣāka l-baḥra fa-infalaqa fakāna kullu firqin kal-ṭawdi l-ʿaẓīmi
ayahs.26:67: inna fī dhālika laʾāyatan wamā kāna aktharuhum muʾminīna
ayahs.26:70: idh qāla li-abīhi waqawmihi mā taʿbudūna
ayahs.26:71: qālū naʿbudu aṣnāman fanaẓallu lahā ʿākifīna
ayahs.26:74: qālū bal wajadnā ābāʾanā kadhālika yafʿalūna
ayahs.26:77: fa-innahum ʿaduwwun lī illā rabba l-ʿālamīna
ayahs.26:82: wa-alladhī aṭmaʿu an yaghfira lī khaṭīatī yawma l-dīni
ayahs.26:83: rabbi hab lī ḥukman wa-alḥiqnī bil-ṣāliḥīna
ayahs.26:84: wa-ijʿal lī lisāna ṣidqin fī l-ākhirīna
ayahs.26:86: wa-ighfir li-abī innahu kāna mina l-ḍālīna
ayahs.26:88: yawma lā yanfaʿu mālun walā banūna
ayahs.26:89: illā man atā Allāha biqalbin salīmin
ayahs.26:92: waqīla lahum ayna mā kuntum taʿbudūna
ayahs.26:93: min dūni Allāhi hal yanṣurūnakum aw yantaṣirūna
ayahs.26:97: tallāhi in kunnā lafī ḍalālin mubīnin
ayahs.26:102: falaw anna lanā karratan fanakūna mina l-muʾminīna
ayahs.26:103: inna fī dhālika laʾāyatan wamā kāna aktharuhum muʾminīna
ayahs.26:106: idh qāla lahum akhūhum nūḥun alā tattaqūna
ayahs.26:109: wamā asalukum ʿalayhi min ajrin in ajriya illā ʿalā rabbi l-ʿālamīna
ayahs.26:112: qāla wamā ʿilmī bimā kānū yaʿmalūna
ayahs.26:113: in ḥisābuhum illā ʿalā rabbī law tashʿurūna
ayahs.26:116: qālū la-in lam tantahi yānūḥu latakūnanna mina l-marjūmīna
ayahs.26:118: fa-iftaḥ baynī wabaynahum fatḥan wanajjinī waman maʿiya mina l-muʾminīna
ayahs.26:119: fa-anjaynāhu waman maʿahu fī l-fulki l-mashḥūni
ayahs.26:121: inna fī dhālika laʾāyatan wamā kāna aktharuhum muʾminīna
ayahs.26:124: idh qāla lahum akhūhum hūdun alā tattaqūna
ayahs.26:127: wamā asalukum ʿalayhi min ajrin in ajriya illā ʿalā rabbi l-ʿālamīna
ayahs.26:135: innī akhāfu ʿalaykum ʿadhāba yawmin ʿaẓīmin
ayahs.26:136: qālū sawāon ʿalaynā awaʿaẓta am lam takun mina l-wāʿiẓīna
ayahs.26:139: fakadhabūhu fa-ahlaknāhum inna fī dhālika laʾāyatan wamā kāna aktharuhum muʾminīna
ayahs.26:142: idh qāla lahum akhūhum ṣāliḥun alā tattaqūna
ayahs.26:145: wamā asalukum ʿalayhi min ajrin in ajriya illā ʿalā rabbi l-ʿālamīna
ayahs.26:152: alladhīna yufsidūna fī l-arḍi walā yuṣliḥūna
ayahs.26:154: mā anta illā basharun mithlunā fati biāyatin in kunta mina l-ṣādiqīna
ayahs.26:155: qāla hādhihi nāqatun lahā shirbun walakum shirbu yawmin maʿlūmin
ayahs.26:156: walā tamassūhā bisūin fayakhudhakum ʿadhābu yawmin ʿaẓīmin
ayahs.26:158: fa-akhadhahumu l-ʿadhābu inna fī dhālika laʾāyatan wamā kāna aktharuhum muʾminīna
ayahs.26:161: idh qāla lahum akhūhum lūṭun alā tattaqūna
ayahs.26:164: wamā asalukum ʿalayhi min ajrin in ajriya illā ʿalā rabbi l-ʿālamīna
ayahs.26:166: watadharūna mā khalaqa lakum rabbukum min azwājikum bal antum qawmun ʿādūna
ayahs.26:167: qālū la-in lam tantahi yālūṭu latakūnanna mina l-mukhrajīna
ayahs.26:173: wa-amṭarnā ʿalayhim maṭaran fasāʾa maṭaru l-mundharīna
ayahs.26:174: inna fī dhālika laʾāyatan wamā kāna aktharuhum muʾminīna
ayahs.26:177: idh qāla lahum shuʿaybun alā tattaqūna
ayahs.26:180: wamā asalukum ʿalayhi min ajrin in ajriya illā ʿalā rabbi l-ʿālamīna
ayahs.26:181: awfū l-kayla walā takūnū mina l-mukhsirīna
ayahs.26:183: walā tabkhasū l-nāsa ashyāʾahum walā taʿthaw fī l-arḍi mufsidīna
ayahs.26:186: wamā anta illā basharun mithlunā wa-in naẓunnuka lamina l-kādhibīna
ayahs.26:187: fa-asqiṭ ʿalaynā kisafan mina l-samāi in kunta mina l-ṣādiqīna
ayahs.26:189: fakadhabūhu fa-akhadhahum ʿadhābu yawmi l-ẓulati innahu kāna ʿadhāba yawmin ʿaẓīmin
ayahs.26:190: inna fī dhālika laʾāyatan wamā kāna aktharuhum muʾminīna
ayahs.26:197: awalam yakun lahum āyatan an yaʿlamahu ʿulamāu banī isrāīla
ayahs.26:199: faqara-ahu ʿalayhim mā kānū bihi muʾminīna
ayahs.26:201: lā yuʾminūna bihi ḥattā yarawū l-ʿadhāba l-alīma
ayahs.26:207: mā aghnā ʿanhum mā kānū yumattaʿūna
ayahs.26:208: wamā ahlaknā min qaryatin illā lahā mundhirūna
ayahs.26:213: falā tadʿu maʿa Allāhi ilāhan ākhara fatakūna mina l-muʿadhabīna
ayahs.26:215: wa-ikhfiḍ janāḥaka limani ittabaʿaka mina l-muʾminīna
ayahs.26:216: fa-in ʿaṣawka faqul innī barīon mimmā taʿmalūna
ayahs.26:221: hal unabbi-ukum ʿalā man tanazzalu l-shayāṭīnu
ayahs.26:225: alam tara annahum fī kulli wādin yahīmūna
ayahs.26:227: illā alladhīna āmanū waʿamilū l-ṣāliḥāti wadhakarū Allāha kathīran wa-intaṣarū min baʿdi mā ẓulimū wasayaʿlamu alladhīna ẓalamū ayya munqalabin yanqalibūna
ayahs.27:1: tta-seen tilka āyātu l-qurāni wakitābin mubīnin
ayahs.27:3: alladhīna yuqīmūna l-ṣalata wayuʾtūna l-zakata wahum bil-ākhirati hum yūqinūna
ayahs.27:4: inna alladhīna lā yuʾminūna bil-ākhirati zayyannā lahum aʿmālahum fahum yaʿmahūna
ayahs.27:5: ulāika alladhīna lahum sūʾu l-ʿadhābi wahum fī l-ākhirati humu l-akhsarūna
ayahs.27:6: wa-innaka latulaqqā l-qurāna min ladun ḥakīmin ʿalīmin
ayahs.27:7: idh qāla mūsā li-ahlihi innī ānastu nāran saʾātīkum minhā bikhabarin aw ātīkum bishihābin qabasin laʿallakum taṣṭalūna
ayahs.27:8: falammā jāʾahā nūdiya an būrika man fī l-nāri waman ḥawlahā wasubḥāna Allāhi rabbi l-ʿālamīna
ayahs.27:9: yāmūsā innahu anā Allāhu l-ʿazīzu l-ḥakīmu
ayahs.27:10: wa-alqi ʿaṣāka falammā raʾāhā tahtazzu ka-annahā jānnun wallā mudbiran walam yuʿaqqib yāmūsā lā takhaf innī lā yakhāfu ladayya l-mursalūna
ayahs.27:11: illā man ẓalama thumma baddala ḥusnan baʿda sūin fa-innī ghafūrun raḥīmun
ayahs.27:12: wa-adkhil yadaka fī jaybika takhruj bayḍāʾa min ghayri sūin fī tisʿi āyātin ilā firʿawna waqawmihi innahum kānū qawman fāsiqīna
ayahs.27:13: falammā jāʾathum āyātunā mubṣiratan qālū hādhā siḥrun mubīnun
ayahs.27:14: wajaḥadū bihā wa-istayqanathā anfusuhum ẓulman waʿuluwwan fa-unẓur kayfa kāna ʿāqibatu l-mufsidīna
ayahs.27:15: walaqad ātaynā dāwūda wasulaymāna ʿilman waqālā l-ḥamdu lillāhi alladhī faḍḍalanā ʿalā kathīrin min ʿibādihi l-muʾminīna
ayahs.27:16: wawaritha sulaymānu dāwūda waqāla yāʾayyuhā l-nāsu ʿullimnā manṭiqa l-ṭayri waūtīnā min kulli shayin inna hādhā lahuwa l-faḍlu l-mubīnu
ayahs.27:17: waḥushira lisulaymāna junūduhu mina l-jini wal-insi wal-ṭayri fahum yūzaʿūna
ayahs.27:18: ḥattā idhā ataw ʿalā wādi l-namli qālat namlatun yāʾayyuhā l-namlu udkhulū masākinakum lā yaḥṭimannakum sulaymānu wajunūduhu wahum lā yashʿurūna
ayahs.27:19: fatabassama ḍāḥikan min qawlihā waqāla rabbi awziʿnī an ashkura niʿmataka allatī anʿamta ʿalayya waʿalā wālidayya wa-an aʿmala ṣāliḥan tarḍāhu wa-adkhilnī biraḥmatika fī ʿibādika l-ṣāliḥīna
ayahs.27:20: watafaqqada l-ṭayra faqāla mā liya lā arā l-hudhuda am kāna mina l-ghāibīna
ayahs.27:21: la-uʿadhibannahu ʿadhāban shadīdan aw laʾādhbaḥannahu aw layatiyannī bisulṭānin mubīnin
ayahs.27:22: famakatha ghayra baʿīdin faqāla aḥaṭtu bimā lam tuḥiṭ bihi wajiʾtuka min saba-in binaba-in yaqīnin
ayahs.27:23: innī wajadttu imra-atan tamlikuhum waūtiyat min kulli shayin walahā ʿarshun ʿaẓīmun
ayahs.27:24: wajadttuhā waqawmahā yasjudūna lilshamsi min dūni Allāhi wazayyana lahumu l-shayṭānu aʿmālahum faṣaddahum ʿani l-sabīli fahum lā yahtadūna
ayahs.27:25: allā yasjudū lillāhi alladhī yukhriju l-khaba-a fī l-samāwāti wal-arḍi wayaʿlamu mā tukhfūna wamā tuʿlinūna
ayahs.27:26: Allāhu lā ilāha illā huwa rabbu l-ʿarshi l-ʿaẓīmi
ayahs.27:27: qāla sananẓuru aṣadaqta am kunta mina l-kādhibīna
ayahs.27:28: idhhab bikitābī hādhā fa-alqih ilayhim thumma tawalla ʿanhum fa-unẓur mādhā yarjiʿūna
ayahs.27:29: qālat yāʾayyuhā l-mala-u innī ulqiya ilayya kitābun karīmun
ayahs.27:30: innahu min sulaymāna wa-innahu bismi Allāhi l-raḥmāni l-raḥīmi
ayahs.27:32: qālat yāʾayyuhā l-mala-u aftūnī fī amrī mā kuntu qāṭiʿatan amran ḥattā tashhadūni
ayahs.27:33: qālū naḥnu ulū quwwatin wa-ulū basin shadīdin wal-amru ilayki fa-unẓurī mādhā tamurīna
ayahs.27:34: qālat inna l-mulūka idhā dakhalū qaryatan afsadūhā wajaʿalū aʿizzata ahlihā adhillatan wakadhālika yafʿalūna
ayahs.27:35: wa-innī mursilatun ilayhim bihadiyyatin fanāẓiratun bima yarjiʿu l-mursalūna
ayahs.27:36: falammā jāʾa sulaymāna qāla atumiddūnani bimālin famā ātāniya Allāhu khayrun mimmā ātākum bal antum bihadiyyatikum tafraḥūna
ayahs.27:37: irjiʿ ilayhim falanatiyannahum bijunūdin lā qibala lahum bihā walanukhrijannahum minhā adhillatan wahum ṣāghirūna
ayahs.27:38: qāla yāʾayyuhā l-mala-u ayyukum yatīnī biʿarshihā qabla an yatūnī muslimīna
ayahs.27:39: qāla ʿifrītun mina l-jini anā ātīka bihi qabla an taqūma min maqāmika wa-innī ʿalayhi laqawiyyun amīnun
ayahs.27:40: qāla alladhī ʿindahu ʿilmun mina l-kitābi anā ātīka bihi qabla an yartadda ilayka ṭarfuka falammā raʾāhu mustaqirran ʿindahu qāla hādhā min faḍli rabbī liyabluwanī a-ashkuru am akfuru waman shakara fa-innamā yashkuru linafsihi waman kafara fa-inna rabbī ghaniyyun karīmun
ayahs.27:41: qāla nakkirū lahā ʿarshahā nanẓur atahtadī am takūnu mina alladhīna lā yahtadūna
ayahs.27:42: falammā jāʾat qīla ahākadhā ʿarshuki qālat ka-annahu huwa waūtīnā l-ʿilma min qablihā wakunnā muslimīna
ayahs.27:43: waṣaddahā mā kānat taʿbudu min dūni Allāhi innahā kānat min qawmin kāfirīna
ayahs.27:44: qīla lahā udkhulī l-ṣarḥa falammā ra-athu ḥasibathu lujjatan wakashafat ʿan sāqayhā qāla innahu ṣarḥun mumarradun min qawārīra qālat rabbi innī ẓalamtu nafsī wa-aslamtu maʿa sulaymāna lillāhi rabbi l-ʿālamīna
