ayahs.39:15: fa-uʿbudū mā shiʾtum min dūnihi qul inna l-khāsirīna alladhīna khasirū anfusahum wa-ahlīhim yawma l-qiyāmati alā dhālika huwa l-khusrānu l-mubīnu
ayahs.39:16: lahum min fawqihim ẓulalun mina l-nāri wamin taḥtihim ẓulalun dhālika yukhawwifu Allāhu bihi ʿibādahu yāʿibādi fa-ittaqūni
ayahs.39:17: wa-alladhīna ijtanabū l-ṭāghūta an yaʿbudūhā wa-anābū ilā Allāhi lahumu l-bushrā fabashir ʿibādi
ayahs.39:18: alladhīna yastamiʿūna l-qawla fayattabiʿūna aḥsanahu ulāika alladhīna hadāhumu Allāhu wa-ulāika hum ulū l-albābi
ayahs.39:19: afaman ḥaqqa ʿalayhi kalimatu l-ʿadhābi afa-anta tunqidhu man fī l-nāri
ayahs.39:20: lākini alladhīna ittaqaw rabbahum lahum ghurafun min fawqihā ghurafun mabniyyatun tajrī min taḥtihā l-anhāru waʿda Allāhi lā yukhlifu Allāhu l-mīʿāda
ayahs.39:21: alam tara anna Allāha anzala mina l-samāi māʾan fasalakahu yanābīʿa fī l-arḍi thumma yukhriju bihi zarʿan mukhtalifan alwānuhu thumma yahīju fatarāhu muṣfarran thumma yajʿaluhu ḥuṭāman inna fī dhālika ladhikrā li-ulī l-albābi
ayahs.39:22: afaman sharaḥa Allāhu ṣadrahu lilislāmi fahuwa ʿalā nūrin min rabbihi fawaylun lilqāsiyati qulūbuhum min dhikri Allāhi ulāika fī ḍalālin mubīnin
ayahs.39:23: Allāhu nazzala aḥsana l-ḥadīthi kitāban mutashābihan mathāniya taqshaʿirru minhu julūdu alladhīna yakhshawna rabbahum thumma talīnu julūduhum waqulūbuhum ilā dhikri Allāhi dhālika hudā Allāhi yahdī bihi man yashāu waman yuḍlili Allāhu famā lahu min hādin
ayahs.39:24: afaman yattaqī biwajhihi sūa l-ʿadhābi yawma l-qiyāmati waqīla lilẓẓālimīna dhūqū mā kuntum taksibūna
ayahs.39:25: kadhaba alladhīna min qablihim fa-atāhumu l-ʿadhābu min ḥaythu lā yashʿurūna
ayahs.39:26: fa-adhāqahumu Allāhu l-khizya fī l-ḥayati l-dunyā walaʿadhābu l-ākhirati akbaru law kānū yaʿlamūna
ayahs.39:27: walaqad ḍarabnā lilnnāsi fī hādhā l-qurāni min kulli mathalin laʿallahum yatadhakkarūna
ayahs.39:28: qurānan ʿarabiyyan ghayra dhī ʿiwajin laʿallahum yattaqūna
ayahs.39:29: ḍaraba Allāhu mathalan rajulan fīhi shurakāu mutashākisūna warajulan salaman lirajulin hal yastawiyāni mathalan l-ḥamdu lillāhi bal aktharuhum lā yaʿlamūna
ayahs.39:31: thumma innakum yawma l-qiyāmati ʿinda rabbikum takhtaṣimūna
ayahs.39:32: faman aẓlamu mimman kadhaba ʿalā Allāhi wakadhaba bil-ṣidqi idh jāʾahu alaysa fī jahannama mathwan lilkāfirīna
ayahs.39:33: wa-alladhī jāʾa bil-ṣidqi waṣaddaqa bihi ulāika humu l-mutaqūna
ayahs.39:34: lahum mā yashāūna ʿinda rabbihim dhālika jazāu l-muḥsinīna
ayahs.39:35: liyukaffira Allāhu ʿanhum aswa-a alladhī ʿamilū wayajziyahum ajrahum bi-aḥsani alladhī kānū yaʿmalūna
ayahs.39:36: alaysa Allāhu bikāfin ʿabdahu wayukhawwifūnaka bi-alladhīna min dūnihi waman yuḍlili Allāhu famā lahu min hādin
ayahs.39:37: waman yahdi Allāhu famā lahu min muḍillin alaysa Allāhu biʿazīzin dhī intiqāmin
ayahs.39:38: wala-in sa-altahum man khalaqa l-samāwāti wal-arḍa layaqūlunna Allāhu qul afara-aytum mā tadʿūna min dūni Allāhi in arādaniya Allāhu biḍurrin hal hunna kāshifātu ḍurrihi aw arādanī biraḥmatin hal hunna mumsikātu raḥmatihi qul ḥasbiya Allāhu ʿalayhi yatawakkalu l-mutawakilūna
ayahs.39:39: qul yāqawmi iʿmalū ʿalā makānatikum innī ʿāmilun fasawfa taʿlamūna
ayahs.39:40: man yatīhi ʿadhābun yukhzīhi wayaḥillu ʿalayhi ʿadhābun muqīmun
ayahs.39:41: innā anzalnā ʿalayka l-kitāba lilnnāsi bil-ḥaqi famani ihtadā falinafsihi waman ḍalla fa-innamā yaḍillu ʿalayhā wamā anta ʿalayhim biwakīlin
ayahs.39:42: Allāhu yatawaffā l-anfusa ḥīna mawtihā wa-allatī lam tamut fī manāmihā fayumsiku allatī qaḍā ʿalayhā l-mawta wayursilu l-ukhrā ilā ajalin musamman inna fī dhālika laʾāyātin liqawmin yatafakkarūna
ayahs.39:43: ami ittakhadhū min dūni Allāhi shufaʿāʾa qul awalaw kānū lā yamlikūna shayan walā yaʿqilūna
ayahs.39:44: qul lillāhi l-shafāʿatu jamīʿan lahu mulku l-samāwāti wal-arḍi thumma ilayhi turjaʿūna
ayahs.39:45: wa-idhā dhukira Allāhu waḥdahu ishma-azzat qulūbu alladhīna lā yuʾminūna bil-ākhirati wa-idhā dhukira alladhīna min dūnihi idhā hum yastabshirūna
ayahs.39:46: quli Allāhumma fāṭira l-samāwāti wal-arḍi ʿālima l-ghaybi wal-shahādati anta taḥkumu bayna ʿibādika fī mā kānū fīhi yakhtalifūna
ayahs.39:47: walaw anna lilladhīna ẓalamū mā fī l-arḍi jamīʿan wamithlahu maʿahu la-iftadaw bihi min sūi l-ʿadhābi yawma l-qiyāmati wabadā lahum mina Allāhi mā lam yakūnū yaḥtasibūna
ayahs.39:48: wabadā lahum sayyiātu mā kasabū waḥāqa bihim mā kānū bihi yastahziūna
ayahs.39:49: fa-idhā massa l-insāna ḍurrun daʿānā thumma idhā khawwalnāhu niʿmatan minnā qāla innamā ūtītuhu ʿalā ʿilmin bal hiya fitnatun walākinna aktharahum lā yaʿlamūna
ayahs.39:50: qad qālahā alladhīna min qablihim famā aghnā ʿanhum mā kānū yaksibūna
ayahs.39:51: fa-aṣābahum sayyiātu mā kasabū wa-alladhīna ẓalamū min hāulāi sayuṣībuhum sayyiātu mā kasabū wamā hum bimuʿjizīna
ayahs.39:52: awalam yaʿlamū anna Allāha yabsuṭu l-rizqa liman yashāu wayaqdiru inna fī dhālika laʾāyātin liqawmin yuʾminūna
ayahs.39:53: qul yāʿibādiya alladhīna asrafū ʿalā anfusihim lā taqnaṭū min raḥmati Allāhi inna Allāha yaghfiru l-dhunūba jamīʿan innahu huwa l-ghafūru l-raḥīmu
ayahs.39:54: wa-anībū ilā rabbikum wa-aslimū lahu min qabli an yatiyakumu l-ʿadhābu thumma lā tunṣarūna
ayahs.39:55: wa-ittabiʿū aḥsana mā unzila ilaykum min rabbikum min qabli an yatiyakumu l-ʿadhābu baghtatan wa-antum lā tashʿurūna
ayahs.39:56: an taqūla nafsun yāḥasratā ʿalā mā farraṭtu fī janbi Allāhi wa-in kuntu lamina l-sākhirīna
ayahs.39:57: aw taqūla law anna Allāha hadānī lakuntu mina l-mutaqīna
ayahs.39:58: aw taqūla ḥīna tarā l-ʿadhāba law anna lī karratan fa-akūna mina l-muḥsinīna
ayahs.39:59: balā qad jāʾatka āyātī fakadhabta bihā wa-istakbarta wakunta mina l-kāfirīna
ayahs.39:60: wayawma l-qiyāmati tarā alladhīna kadhabū ʿalā Allāhi wujūhuhum muswaddatun alaysa fī jahannama mathwan lilmutakabbirīna
ayahs.39:61: wayunajjī Allāhu alladhīna ittaqaw bimafāzatihim lā yamassuhumu l-sūʾu walā hum yaḥzanūna
ayahs.39:62: Allāhu khāliqu kulli shayin wahuwa ʿalā kulli shayin wakīlun
ayahs.39:63: lahu maqālīdu l-samāwāti wal-arḍi wa-alladhīna kafarū biāyāti Allāhi ulāika humu l-khāsirūna
ayahs.39:64: qul afaghayra Allāhi tamurūnnī aʿbudu ayyuhā l-jāhilūna
ayahs.39:65: walaqad ūḥiya ilayka wa-ilā alladhīna min qablika la-in ashrakta layaḥbaṭanna ʿamaluka walatakūnanna mina l-khāsirīna
ayahs.39:66: bali Allāha fa-uʿbud wakun mina l-shākirīna
ayahs.39:67: wamā qadarū Allāha ḥaqqa qadrihi wal-arḍu jamīʿan qabḍatuhu yawma l-qiyāmati wal-samāwātu maṭwiyyātun biyamīnihi subḥānahu wataʿālā ʿammā yushrikūna
ayahs.39:68: wanufikha fī l-ṣūri faṣaʿiqa man fī l-samāwāti waman fī l-arḍi illā man shāʾa Allāhu thumma nufikha fīhi ukhrā fa-idhā hum qiyāmun yanẓurūna
ayahs.39:69: wa-ashraqati l-arḍu binūri rabbihā wawuḍiʿa l-kitābu wajīa bil-nabiyīna wal-shuhadāi waquḍiya baynahum bil-ḥaqi wahum lā yuẓlamūna
ayahs.39:70: wawuffiyat kullu nafsin mā ʿamilat wahuwa aʿlamu bimā yafʿalūna
ayahs.39:71: wasīqa alladhīna kafarū ilā jahannama zumaran ḥattā idhā jāūhā futiḥat abwābuhā waqāla lahum khazanatuhā alam yatikum rusulun minkum yatlūna ʿalaykum āyāti rabbikum wayundhirūnakum liqāʾa yawmikum hādhā qālū balā walākin ḥaqqat kalimatu l-ʿadhābi ʿalā l-kāfirīna
ayahs.39:72: qīla udkhulū abwāba jahannama khālidīna fīhā fabiʾsa mathwā l-mutakabirīna
ayahs.39:73: wasīqa alladhīna ittaqaw rabbahum ilā l-janati zumaran ḥattā idhā jāūhā wafutiḥat abwābuhā waqāla lahum khazanatuhā salāmun ʿalaykum ṭibtum fa-udkhulūhā khālidīna
ayahs.39:74: waqālū l-ḥamdu lillāhi alladhī ṣadaqanā waʿdahu wa-awrathanā l-arḍa natabawwa-u mina l-janati ḥaythu nashāu faniʿma ajru l-ʿāmilīna
ayahs.39:75: watarā l-malāikata ḥāffīna min ḥawli l-ʿarshi yusabbiḥūna biḥamdi rabbihim waquḍiya baynahum bil-ḥaqi waqīla l-ḥamdu lillāhi rabbi l-ʿālamīna
ayahs.40:2: tanzīlu l-kitābi mina Allāhi l-ʿazīzi l-ʿalīmi
ayahs.40:3: ghāfiri l-dhanbi waqābili l-tawbi shadīdi l-ʿiqābi dhī l-ṭawli lā ilāha illā huwa ilayhi l-maṣīru
ayahs.40:4: mā yujādilu fī āyāti Allāhi illā alladhīna kafarū falā yaghrurka taqallubuhum fī l-bilādi
ayahs.40:5: kadhabat qablahum qawmu nūḥin wal-aḥzābu min baʿdihim wahammat kullu ummatin birasūlihim liyakhudhūhu wajādalū bil-bāṭili liyudḥiḍū bihi l-ḥaqa fa-akhadhtuhum fakayfa kāna ʿiqābi
ayahs.40:6: wakadhālika ḥaqqat kalimatu rabbika ʿalā alladhīna kafarū annahum aṣḥābu l-nāri
ayahs.40:7: alladhīna yaḥmilūna l-ʿarsha waman ḥawlahu yusabbiḥūna biḥamdi rabbihim wayuʾminūna bihi wayastaghfirūna lilladhīna āmanū rabbanā wasiʿta kulla shayin raḥmatan waʿilman fa-ighfir lilladhīna tābū wa-ittabaʿū sabīlaka waqihim ʿadhāba l-jaḥīmi
ayahs.40:8: rabbanā wa-adkhilhum jannāti ʿadnin allatī waʿadttahum waman ṣalaḥa min ābāihim wa-azwājihim wadhurriyyātihim innaka anta l-ʿazīzu l-ḥakīmu
ayahs.40:9: waqihimu l-sayiāti waman taqi l-sayiāti yawma-idhin faqad raḥimtahu wadhālika huwa l-fawzu l-ʿaẓīmu
ayahs.40:10: inna alladhīna kafarū yunādawna lamaqtu Allāhi akbaru min maqtikum anfusakum idh tudʿawna ilā l-īmāni fatakfurūna
ayahs.40:11: qālū rabbanā amattanā ithnatayni wa-aḥyaytanā ithnatayni fa-iʿtarafnā bidhunūbinā fahal ilā khurūjin min sabīlin
ayahs.40:12: dhālikum bi-annahu idhā duʿiya Allāhu waḥdahu kafartum wa-in yushrak bihi tuʾminū fal-ḥukmu lillāhi l-ʿaliyi l-kabīri
ayahs.40:13: huwa alladhī yurīkum āyātihi wayunazzilu lakum mina l-samāi rizqan wamā yatadhakkaru illā man yunību
ayahs.40:14: fa-idʿū Allāha mukhliṣīna lahu l-dīna walaw kariha l-kāfirūna
ayahs.40:15: rafīʿu l-darajāti dhū l-ʿarshi yulqī l-rūḥa min amrihi ʿalā man yashāu min ʿibādihi liyundhira yawma l-talāqi
ayahs.40:16: yawma hum bārizūna lā yakhfā ʿalā Allāhi minhum shayon limani l-mulku l-yawma lillāhi l-wāḥidi l-qahāri
ayahs.40:17: al-yawma tujzā kullu nafsin bimā kasabat lā ẓulma l-yawma inna Allāha sarīʿu l-ḥisābi
ayahs.40:18: wa-andhirhum yawma l-āzifati idhi l-qulūbu ladā l-ḥanājiri kāẓimīna mā lilẓẓālimīna min ḥamīmin walā shafīʿin yuṭāʿu
ayahs.40:19: yaʿlamu khāinata l-aʿyuni wamā tukhfī l-ṣudūru
ayahs.40:20: wallāhu yaqḍī bil-ḥaqi wa-alladhīna yadʿūna min dūnihi lā yaqḍūna bishayin inna Allāha huwa l-samīʿu l-baṣīru
ayahs.40:21: awalam yasīrū fī l-arḍi fayanẓurū kayfa kāna ʿāqibatu alladhīna kānū min qablihim kānū hum ashadda minhum quwwatan waʾāthāran fī l-arḍi fa-akhadhahumu Allāhu bidhunūbihim wamā kāna lahum mina Allāhi min wāqin
ayahs.40:22: dhālika bi-annahum kānat tatīhim rusuluhum bil-bayināti fakafarū fa-akhadhahumu Allāhu innahu qawiyyun shadīdu l-ʿiqābi
ayahs.40:23: walaqad arsalnā mūsā biāyātinā wasulṭānin mubīnin
ayahs.40:24: ilā firʿawna wahāmāna waqārūna faqālū sāḥirun kadhābun
ayahs.40:25: falammā jāʾahum bil-ḥaqi min ʿindinā qālū uqtulū abnāʾa alladhīna āmanū maʿahu wa-istaḥyū nisāʾahum wamā kaydu l-kāfirīna illā fī ḍalālin
ayahs.40:26: waqāla firʿawnu dharūnī aqtul mūsā walyadʿu rabbahu innī akhāfu an yubaddila dīnakum aw an yuẓhira fī l-arḍi l-fasāda
ayahs.40:27: waqāla mūsā innī ʿudhtu birabbī warabbikum min kulli mutakabbirin lā yuʾminu biyawmi l-ḥisābi
ayahs.40:28: waqāla rajulun muʾminun min āli firʿawna yaktumu īmānahu ataqtulūna rajulan an yaqūla rabbiya Allāhu waqad jāʾakum bil-bayināti min rabbikum wa-in yaku kādhiban faʿalayhi kadhibuhu wa-in yaku ṣādiqan yuṣibkum baʿḍu alladhī yaʿidukum inna Allāha lā yahdī man huwa musrifun kadhābun
ayahs.40:29: yāqawmi lakumu l-mulku l-yawma ẓāhirīna fī l-arḍi faman yanṣurunā min basi Allāhi in jāʾanā qāla firʿawnu mā urīkum illā mā arā wamā ahdīkum illā sabīla l-rashādi
ayahs.40:30: waqāla alladhī āmana yāqawmi innī akhāfu ʿalaykum mithla yawmi l-aḥzābi
ayahs.40:31: mithla dabi qawmi nūḥin waʿādin wathamūda wa-alladhīna min baʿdihim wamā Allāhu yurīdu ẓulman lilʿibādi
ayahs.40:32: wayāqawmi innī akhāfu ʿalaykum yawma l-tanādi
ayahs.40:33: yawma tuwallūna mudbirīna mā lakum mina Allāhi min ʿāṣimin waman yuḍlili Allāhu famā lahu min hādin
ayahs.40:34: walaqad jāʾakum yūsufu min qablu bil-bayināti famā ziltum fī shakkin mimmā jāʾakum bihi ḥattā idhā halaka qultum lan yabʿatha Allāhu min baʿdihi rasūlan kadhālika yuḍillu Allāhu man huwa musrifun murtābun
ayahs.40:35: alladhīna yujādilūna fī āyāti Allāhi bighayri sulṭānin atāhum kabura maqtan ʿinda Allāhi waʿinda alladhīna āmanū kadhālika yaṭbaʿu Allāhu ʿalā kulli qalbi mutakabbirin jabbārin
ayahs.40:36: waqāla firʿawnu yāhāmānu ibni lī ṣarḥan laʿallī ablughu l-asbāba
ayahs.40:37: asbāba l-samāwāti fa-aṭṭaliʿa ilā ilāhi mūsā wa-innī la-aẓunnuhu kādhiban wakadhālika zuyyina lifirʿawna sūʾu ʿamalihi waṣudda ʿani l-sabīli wamā kaydu firʿawna illā fī tabābin
ayahs.40:38: waqāla alladhī āmana yāqawmi ittabiʿūni ahdikum sabīla l-rashādi
ayahs.40:39: yāqawmi innamā hādhihi l-ḥayatu l-dunyā matāʿun wa-inna l-ākhirata hiya dāru l-qarāri
ayahs.40:40: man ʿamila sayyi-atan falā yujzā illā mithlahā waman ʿamila ṣāliḥan min dhakarin aw unthā wahuwa muʾminun fa-ulāika yadkhulūna l-janata yurzaqūna fīhā bighayri ḥisābin
ayahs.40:41: wayāqawmi mā lī adʿūkum ilā l-najati watadʿūnanī ilā l-nāri
ayahs.40:42: tadʿūnanī li-akfura billāhi wa-ushrika bihi mā laysa lī bihi ʿilmun wa-anā adʿūkum ilā l-ʿazīzi l-ghafāri
ayahs.40:43: lā jarama annamā tadʿūnanī ilayhi laysa lahu daʿwatun fī l-dunyā walā fī l-ākhirati wa-anna maraddanā ilā Allāhi wa-anna l-musrifīna hum aṣḥābu l-nāri
ayahs.40:44: fasatadhkurūna mā aqūlu lakum wa-ufawwiḍu amrī ilā Allāhi inna Allāha baṣīrun bil-ʿibādi
ayahs.40:45: fawaqāhu Allāhu sayyiāti mā makarū waḥāqa biāli firʿawna sūʾu l-ʿadhābi
ayahs.40:46: al-nāru yuʿraḍūna ʿalayhā ghuduwwan waʿashiyyan wayawma taqūmu l-sāʿatu adkhilū āla firʿawna ashadda l-ʿadhābi
ayahs.40:47: wa-idh yataḥājjūna fī l-nāri fayaqūlu l-ḍuʿafāu lilladhīna istakbarū innā kunnā lakum tabaʿan fahal antum mughnūna ʿannā naṣīban mina l-nāri
ayahs.40:48: qāla alladhīna istakbarū innā kullun fīhā inna Allāha qad ḥakama bayna l-ʿibādi
ayahs.40:49: waqāla alladhīna fī l-nāri likhazanati jahannama idʿū rabbakum yukhaffif ʿannā yawman mina l-ʿadhābi
ayahs.40:50: qālū awalam taku tatīkum rusulukum bil-bayināti qālū balā qālū fa-idʿū wamā duʿāu l-kāfirīna illā fī ḍalālin
ayahs.40:51: innā lananṣuru rusulanā wa-alladhīna āmanū fī l-ḥayati l-dunyā wayawma yaqūmu l-ashhādu
ayahs.40:52: yawma lā yanfaʿu l-ẓālimīna maʿdhiratuhum walahumu l-laʿnatu walahum sūʾu l-dāri
ayahs.40:53: walaqad ātaynā mūsā l-hudā wa-awrathnā banī isrāīla l-kitāba
ayahs.40:55: fa-iṣbir inna waʿda Allāhi ḥaqqun wa-istaghfir lidhanbika wasabbiḥ biḥamdi rabbika bil-ʿashiyi wal-ibkāri
ayahs.40:56: inna alladhīna yujādilūna fī āyāti Allāhi bighayri sulṭānin atāhum in fī ṣudūrihim illā kibrun mā hum bibālighīhi fa-istaʿidh billāhi innahu huwa l-samīʿu l-baṣīru
ayahs.40:57: lakhalqu l-samāwāti wal-arḍi akbaru min khalqi l-nāsi walākinna akthara l-nāsi lā yaʿlamūna
ayahs.40:58: wamā yastawī l-aʿmā wal-baṣīru wa-alladhīna āmanū waʿamilū l-ṣāliḥāti walā l-musīu qalīlan mā tatadhakkarūna
ayahs.40:59: inna l-sāʿata laʾātiyatun lā rayba fīhā walākinna akthara l-nāsi lā yuʾminūna
ayahs.40:60: waqāla rabbukumu idʿūnī astajib lakum inna alladhīna yastakbirūna ʿan ʿibādatī sayadkhulūna jahannama dākhirīna
ayahs.40:61: Allāhu alladhī jaʿala lakumu al-layla litaskunū fīhi wal-nahāra mubṣiran inna Allāha ladhū faḍlin ʿalā l-nāsi walākinna akthara l-nāsi lā yashkurūna
ayahs.40:62: dhālikumu Allāhu rabbukum khāliqu kulli shayin lā ilāha illā huwa fa-annā tuʾfakūna
ayahs.40:63: kadhālika yuʾfaku alladhīna kānū biāyāti Allāhi yajḥadūna
ayahs.40:64: Allāhu alladhī jaʿala lakumu l-arḍa qarāran wal-samāʾa bināʾan waṣawwarakum fa-aḥsana ṣuwarakum warazaqakum mina l-ṭayibāti dhālikumu Allāhu rabbukum fatabāraka Allāhu rabbu l-ʿālamīna
ayahs.40:65: huwa l-ḥayu lā ilāha illā huwa fa-idʿūhu mukhliṣīna lahu l-dīna l-ḥamdu lillāhi rabbi l-ʿālamīna
ayahs.40:66: qul innī nuhītu an aʿbuda alladhīna tadʿūna min dūni Allāhi lammā jāʾaniya l-bayinātu min rabbī wa-umirtu an uslima lirabbi l-ʿālamīna
ayahs.40:67: huwa alladhī khalaqakum min turābin thumma min nuṭfatin thumma min ʿalaqatin thumma yukhrijukum ṭiflan thumma litablughū ashuddakum thumma litakūnū shuyūkhan waminkum man yutawaffā min qablu walitablughū ajalan musamman walaʿallakum taʿqilūna
ayahs.40:68: huwa alladhī yuḥyī wayumītu fa-idhā qaḍā amran fa-innamā yaqūlu lahu kun fayakūnu
ayahs.40:69: alam tara ilā alladhīna yujādilūna fī āyāti Allāhi annā yuṣrafūna
ayahs.40:70: alladhīna kadhabū bil-kitābi wabimā arsalnā bihi rusulanā fasawfa yaʿlamūna
ayahs.40:71: idhi l-aghlālu fī aʿnāqihim wal-salāsilu yusḥabūna
ayahs.40:72: fī l-ḥamīmi thumma fī l-nāri yusjarūna
ayahs.40:73: thumma qīla lahum ayna mā kuntum tushrikūna
ayahs.40:74: min dūni Allāhi qālū ḍallū ʿannā bal lam nakun nadʿū min qablu shayan kadhālika yuḍillu Allāhu l-kāfirīna
ayahs.40:75: dhālikum bimā kuntum tafraḥūna fī l-arḍi bighayri l-ḥaqi wabimā kuntum tamraḥūna
ayahs.40:76: udkhulū abwāba jahannama khālidīna fīhā fabiʾsa mathwā l-mutakabirīna
ayahs.40:77: fa-iṣbir inna waʿda Allāhi ḥaqqun fa-immā nuriyannaka baʿḍa alladhī naʿiduhum aw natawaffayannaka fa-ilaynā yurjaʿūna
ayahs.40:78: walaqad arsalnā rusulan min qablika minhum man qaṣaṣnā ʿalayka waminhum man lam naqṣuṣ ʿalayka wamā kāna lirasūlin an yatiya biāyatin illā bi-idhni Allāhi fa-idhā jāʾa amru Allāhi quḍiya bil-ḥaqi wakhasira hunālika l-mubṭilūna
ayahs.40:79: Allāhu alladhī jaʿala lakumu l-anʿāma litarkabū minhā waminhā takulūna
ayahs.40:80: walakum fīhā manāfiʿu walitablughū ʿalayhā ḥājatan fī ṣudūrikum waʿalayhā waʿalā l-fulki tuḥmalūna
ayahs.40:81: wayurīkum āyātihi fa-ayya āyāti Allāhi tunkirūna
ayahs.40:82: afalam yasīrū fī l-arḍi fayanẓurū kayfa kāna ʿāqibatu alladhīna min qablihim kānū akthara minhum wa-ashadda quwwatan waʾāthāran fī l-arḍi famā aghnā ʿanhum mā kānū yaksibūna
ayahs.40:83: falammā jāʾathum rusuluhum bil-bayināti fariḥū bimā ʿindahum mina l-ʿilmi waḥāqa bihim mā kānū bihi yastahziūna
ayahs.40:84: falammā ra-aw basanā qālū āmannā billāhi waḥdahu wakafarnā bimā kunnā bihi mushrikīna
ayahs.40:85: falam yaku yanfaʿuhum īmānuhum lammā ra-aw basanā sunnata Allāhi allatī qad khalat fī ʿibādihi wakhasira hunālika l-kāfirūna
ayahs.41:3: kitābun fuṣṣilat āyātuhu qurānan ʿarabiyyan liqawmin yaʿlamūna
ayahs.41:4: bashīran wanadhīran fa-aʿraḍa aktharuhum fahum lā yasmaʿūna
ayahs.41:5: waqālū qulūbunā fī akinnatin mimmā tadʿūnā ilayhi wafī ādhāninā waqrun wamin bayninā wabaynika ḥijābun fa-iʿmal innanā ʿāmilūna
ayahs.41:6: qul innamā anā basharun mithlukum yūḥā ilayya annamā ilāhukum ilāhun wāḥidun fa-istaqīmū ilayhi wa-istaghfirūhu wawaylun lilmushrikīna
ayahs.41:7: alladhīna lā yuʾtūna l-zakata wahum bil-ākhirati hum kāfirūna
ayahs.41:8: inna alladhīna āmanū waʿamilū l-ṣāliḥāti lahum ajrun ghayru mamnūnin
ayahs.41:9: qul a-innakum latakfurūna bi-alladhī khalaqa l-arḍa fī yawmayni watajʿalūna lahu andādan dhālika rabbu l-ʿālamīna
ayahs.41:10: wajaʿala fīhā rawāsiya min fawqihā wabāraka fīhā waqaddara fīhā aqwātahā fī arbaʿati ayyāmin sawāʾan lilssāilīna
ayahs.41:11: thumma istawā ilā l-samāi wahiya dukhānun faqāla lahā walilarḍi iʾtiyā ṭawʿan aw karhan qālatā ataynā ṭāiʿīna
ayahs.41:12: faqaḍāhunna sabʿa samāwātin fī yawmayni wa-awḥā fī kulli samāin amrahā wazayyannā l-samāʾa l-dunyā bimaṣābīḥa waḥifẓan dhālika taqdīru l-ʿazīzi l-ʿalīmi
ayahs.41:13: fa-in aʿraḍū faqul andhartukum ṣāʿiqatan mithla ṣāʿiqati ʿādin wathamūda
ayahs.41:14: idh jāʾathumu l-rusulu min bayni aydīhim wamin khalfihim allā taʿbudū illā Allāha qālū law shāʾa rabbunā la-anzala malāikatan fa-innā bimā ursiltum bihi kāfirūna
ayahs.41:15: fa-ammā ʿādun fa-istakbarū fī l-arḍi bighayri l-ḥaqi waqālū man ashaddu minnā quwwatan awalam yaraw anna Allāha alladhī khalaqahum huwa ashaddu minhum quwwatan wakānū biāyātinā yajḥadūna
ayahs.41:16: fa-arsalnā ʿalayhim rīḥan ṣarṣaran fī ayyāmin naḥisātin linudhīqahum ʿadhāba l-khizyi fī l-ḥayati l-dunyā walaʿadhābu l-ākhirati akhzā wahum lā yunṣarūna
ayahs.41:17: wa-ammā thamūdu fahadaynāhum fa-istaḥabbū l-ʿamā ʿalā l-hudā fa-akhadhathum ṣāʿiqatu l-ʿadhābi l-hūni bimā kānū yaksibūna
ayahs.41:19: wayawma yuḥsharu aʿdāu Allāhi ilā l-nāri fahum yūzaʿūna
ayahs.41:20: ḥattā idhā mā jāūhā shahida ʿalayhim samʿuhum wa-abṣāruhum wajulūduhum bimā kānū yaʿmalūna
ayahs.41:21: waqālū lijulūdihim lima shahidttum ʿalaynā qālū anṭaqanā Allāhu alladhī anṭaqa kulla shayin wahuwa khalaqakum awwala marratin wa-ilayhi turjaʿūna
ayahs.41:22: wamā kuntum tastatirūna an yashhada ʿalaykum samʿukum walā abṣārukum walā julūdukum walākin ẓanantum anna Allāha lā yaʿlamu kathīran mimmā taʿmalūna
ayahs.41:23: wadhālikum ẓannukumu alladhī ẓanantum birabbikum ardākum fa-aṣbaḥtum mina l-khāsirīna
ayahs.41:24: fa-in yaṣbirū fal-nāru mathwan lahum wa-in yastaʿtibū famā hum mina l-muʿtabīna
ayahs.41:25: waqayyaḍnā lahum quranāʾa fazayyanū lahum mā bayna aydīhim wamā khalfahum waḥaqqa ʿalayhimu l-qawlu fī umamin qad khalat min qablihim mina l-jini wal-insi innahum kānū khāsirīna
ayahs.41:26: waqāla alladhīna kafarū lā tasmaʿū lihādhā l-qurāni wal-ghaw fīhi laʿallakum taghlibūna
ayahs.41:27: falanudhīqanna alladhīna kafarū ʿadhāban shadīdan walanajziyannahum aswa-a alladhī kānū yaʿmalūna
ayahs.41:28: dhālika jazāu aʿdāi Allāhi l-nāru lahum fīhā dāru l-khuldi jazāʾan bimā kānū biāyātinā yajḥadūna
ayahs.41:29: waqāla alladhīna kafarū rabbanā arinā alladhayni aḍallānā mina l-jini wal-insi najʿalhumā taḥta aqdāminā liyakūnā mina l-asfalīna
ayahs.41:30: inna alladhīna qālū rabbunā Allāhu thumma istaqāmū tatanazzalu ʿalayhimu l-malāikatu allā takhāfū walā taḥzanū wa-abshirū bil-janati allatī kuntum tūʿadūna
ayahs.41:31: naḥnu awliyāukum fī l-ḥayati l-dunyā wafī l-ākhirati walakum fīhā mā tashtahī anfusukum walakum fīhā mā taddaʿūna
ayahs.41:33: waman aḥsanu qawlan mimman daʿā ilā Allāhi waʿamila ṣāliḥan waqāla innanī mina l-muslimīna
ayahs.41:34: walā tastawī l-ḥasanatu walā l-sayi-atu idfaʿ bi-allatī hiya aḥsanu fa-idhā alladhī baynaka wabaynahu ʿadāwatun ka-annahu waliyyun ḥamīmun
ayahs.41:35: wamā yulaqqāhā illā alladhīna ṣabarū wamā yulaqqāhā illā dhū ḥaẓẓin ʿaẓīmin
ayahs.41:36: wa-immā yanzaghannaka mina l-shayṭāni nazghun fa-istaʿidh billāhi innahu huwa l-samīʿu l-ʿalīmu
ayahs.41:37: wamin āyātihi al-laylu wal-nahāru wal-shamsu wal-qamaru lā tasjudū lilshamsi walā lilqamari wa-usjudū lillāhi alladhī khalaqahunna in kuntum iyyāhu taʿbudūna
ayahs.41:38: fa-ini istakbarū fa-alladhīna ʿinda rabbika yusabbiḥūna lahu bi-al-layli wal-nahāri wahum lā yasamūna
ayahs.41:39: wamin āyātihi annaka tarā l-arḍa khāshiʿatan fa-idhā anzalnā ʿalayhā l-māʾa ihtazzat warabat inna alladhī aḥyāhā lamuḥyī l-mawtā innahu ʿalā kulli shayin qadīrun
ayahs.41:40: inna alladhīna yulḥidūna fī āyātinā lā yakhfawna ʿalaynā afaman yulqā fī l-nāri khayrun am man yatī āminan yawma l-qiyāmati iʿmalū mā shiʾtum innahu bimā taʿmalūna baṣīrun
ayahs.41:41: inna alladhīna kafarū bil-dhikri lammā jāʾahum wa-innahu lakitābun ʿazīzun
ayahs.41:42: lā yatīhi l-bāṭilu min bayni yadayhi walā min khalfihi tanzīlun min ḥakīmin ḥamīdin
ayahs.41:43: mā yuqālu laka illā mā qad qīla lilrrusuli min qablika inna rabbaka ladhū maghfiratin wadhū ʿiqābin alīmin
ayahs.41:44: walaw jaʿalnāhu qurānan aʿjamiyyan laqālū lawlā fuṣṣilat āyātuhu āʿjamiyyun waʿarabiyyun qul huwa lilladhīna āmanū hudan washifāon wa-alladhīna lā yuʾminūna fī ādhānihim waqrun wahuwa ʿalayhim ʿaman ulāika yunādawna min makānin baʿīdin
ayahs.41:45: walaqad ātaynā mūsā l-kitāba fa-ukhtulifa fīhi walawlā kalimatun sabaqat min rabbika laquḍiya baynahum wa-innahum lafī shakkin minhu murībin
ayahs.41:46: man ʿamila ṣāliḥan falinafsihi waman asāʾa faʿalayhā wamā rabbuka biẓallāmin lilʿabīdi
ayahs.41:47: ilayhi yuraddu ʿilmu l-sāʿati wamā takhruju min thamarātin min akmāmihā wamā taḥmilu min unthā walā taḍaʿu illā biʿilmihi wayawma yunādīhim ayna shurakāī qālū ādhannāka mā minnā min shahīdin
ayahs.41:48: waḍalla ʿanhum mā kānū yadʿūna min qablu waẓannū mā lahum min maḥīṣin
ayahs.41:49: lā yasamu l-insānu min duʿāi l-khayri wa-in massahu l-sharu fayaūsun qanūṭun
ayahs.41:50: wala-in adhaqnāhu raḥmatan minnā min baʿdi ḍarrāʾa massathu layaqūlanna hādhā lī wamā aẓunnu l-sāʿata qāimatan wala-in rujiʿtu ilā rabbī inna lī ʿindahu lalḥusnā falanunabbi-anna alladhīna kafarū bimā ʿamilū walanudhīqannahum min ʿadhābin ghalīẓin
ayahs.41:51: wa-idhā anʿamnā ʿalā l-insāni aʿraḍa wanaʾā bijānibihi wa-idhā massahu l-sharu fadhū duʿāin ʿarīḍin
ayahs.41:52: qul ara-aytum in kāna min ʿindi Allāhi thumma kafartum bihi man aḍallu mimman huwa fī shiqāqin baʿīdin
ayahs.41:53: sanurīhim āyātinā fī l-āfāqi wafī anfusihim ḥattā yatabayyana lahum annahu l-ḥaqu awalam yakfi birabbika annahu ʿalā kulli shayin shahīdun
ayahs.41:54: alā innahum fī miryatin min liqāi rabbihim alā innahu bikulli shayin muḥīṭun
ayahs.42:3: kadhālika yūḥī ilayka wa-ilā alladhīna min qablika Allāhu l-ʿazīzu l-ḥakīmu
ayahs.42:4: lahu mā fī l-samāwāti wamā fī l-arḍi wahuwa l-ʿaliyu l-ʿaẓīmu
ayahs.42:5: takādu l-samāwātu yatafaṭṭarna min fawqihinna wal-malāikatu yusabbiḥūna biḥamdi rabbihim wayastaghfirūna liman fī l-arḍi alā inna Allāha huwa l-ghafūru l-raḥīmu
ayahs.42:6: wa-alladhīna ittakhadhū min dūnihi awliyāʾa Allāhu ḥafīẓun ʿalayhim wamā anta ʿalayhim biwakīlin
ayahs.42:7: wakadhālika awḥaynā ilayka qurānan ʿarabiyyan litundhira umma l-qurā waman ḥawlahā watundhira yawma l-jamʿi lā rayba fīhi farīqun fī l-janati wafarīqun fī l-saʿīri
ayahs.42:8: walaw shāʾa Allāhu lajaʿalahum ummatan wāḥidatan walākin yudkhilu man yashāu fī raḥmatihi wal-ẓālimūna mā lahum min waliyyin walā naṣīrin
ayahs.42:9: ami ittakhadhū min dūnihi awliyāʾa fallāhu huwa l-waliyu wahuwa yuḥyī l-mawtā wahuwa ʿalā kulli shayin qadīrun
ayahs.42:10: wamā ikhtalaftum fīhi min shayin faḥukmuhu ilā Allāhi dhālikumu Allāhu rabbī ʿalayhi tawakkaltu wa-ilayhi unību
ayahs.42:11: fāṭiru l-samāwāti wal-arḍi jaʿala lakum min anfusikum azwājan wamina l-anʿāmi azwājan yadhra-ukum fīhi laysa kamithlihi shayon wahuwa l-samīʿu l-baṣīru
ayahs.42:12: lahu maqālīdu l-samāwāti wal-arḍi yabsuṭu l-rizqa liman yashāu wayaqdiru innahu bikulli shayin ʿalīmun
ayahs.42:13: sharaʿa lakum mina l-dīni mā waṣṣā bihi nūḥan wa-alladhī awḥaynā ilayka wamā waṣṣaynā bihi ibrāhīma wamūsā waʿīsā an aqīmū l-dīna walā tatafarraqū fīhi kabura ʿalā l-mushrikīna mā tadʿūhum ilayhi Allāhu yajtabī ilayhi man yashāu wayahdī ilayhi man yunību
ayahs.42:14: wamā tafarraqū illā min baʿdi mā jāʾahumu l-ʿilmu baghyan baynahum walawlā kalimatun sabaqat min rabbika ilā ajalin musamman laquḍiya baynahum wa-inna alladhīna ūrithū l-kitāba min baʿdihim lafī shakkin minhu murībin
ayahs.42:15: falidhālika fa-udʿu wa-istaqim kamā umirta walā tattabiʿ ahwāʾahum waqul āmantu bimā anzala Allāhu min kitābin wa-umirtu li-aʿdila baynakumu Allāhu rabbunā warabbukum lanā aʿmālunā walakum aʿmālukum lā ḥujjata baynanā wabaynakumu Allāhu yajmaʿu baynanā wa-ilayhi l-maṣīru
ayahs.42:16: wa-alladhīna yuḥājjūna fī Allāhi min baʿdi mā ustujība lahu ḥujjatuhum dāḥiḍatun ʿinda rabbihim waʿalayhim ghaḍabun walahum ʿadhābun shadīdun
ayahs.42:17: Allāhu alladhī anzala l-kitāba bil-ḥaqi wal-mīzāna wamā yudrīka laʿalla l-sāʿata qarībun
ayahs.42:18: yastaʿjilu bihā alladhīna lā yuʾminūna bihā wa-alladhīna āmanū mushfiqūna minhā wayaʿlamūna annahā l-ḥaqu alā inna alladhīna yumārūna fī l-sāʿati lafī ḍalālin baʿīdin
ayahs.42:19: Allāhu laṭīfun biʿibādihi yarzuqu man yashāu wahuwa l-qawiyu l-ʿazīzu
ayahs.42:20: man kāna yurīdu ḥartha l-ākhirati nazid lahu fī ḥarthihi waman kāna yurīdu ḥartha l-dunyā nuʾtihi minhā wamā lahu fī l-ākhirati min naṣībin
ayahs.42:21: am lahum shurakāu sharaʿū lahum mina l-dīni mā lam yadhan bihi Allāhu walawlā kalimatu l-faṣli laquḍiya baynahum wa-inna l-ẓālimīna lahum ʿadhābun alīmun
ayahs.42:22: tarā l-ẓālimīna mushfiqīna mimmā kasabū wahuwa wāqiʿun bihim wa-alladhīna āmanū waʿamilū l-ṣāliḥāti fī rawḍāti l-janāti lahum mā yashāūna ʿinda rabbihim dhālika huwa l-faḍlu l-kabīru
ayahs.42:23: dhālika alladhī yubashiru Allāhu ʿibādahu alladhīna āmanū waʿamilū l-ṣāliḥāti qul lā asalukum ʿalayhi ajran illā l-mawadata fī l-qurbā waman yaqtarif ḥasanatan nazid lahu fīhā ḥusnan inna Allāha ghafūrun shakūrun
ayahs.42:24: am yaqūlūna iftarā ʿalā Allāhi kadhiban fa-in yasha-i Allāhu yakhtim ʿalā qalbika wayamḥu Allāhu l-bāṭila wayuḥiqqu l-ḥaqa bikalimātihi innahu ʿalīmun bidhāti l-ṣudūri
ayahs.42:25: wahuwa alladhī yaqbalu l-tawbata ʿan ʿibādihi wayaʿfū ʿani l-sayiāti wayaʿlamu mā tafʿalūna
ayahs.42:26: wayastajību alladhīna āmanū waʿamilū l-ṣāliḥāti wayazīduhum min faḍlihi wal-kāfirūna lahum ʿadhābun shadīdun
ayahs.42:27: walaw basaṭa Allāhu l-rizqa liʿibādihi labaghaw fī l-arḍi walākin yunazzilu biqadarin mā yashāu innahu biʿibādihi khabīrun baṣīrun
ayahs.42:28: wahuwa alladhī yunazzilu l-ghaytha min baʿdi mā qanaṭū wayanshuru raḥmatahu wahuwa l-waliyu l-ḥamīdu
ayahs.42:29: wamin āyātihi khalqu l-samāwāti wal-arḍi wamā batha fīhimā min dābbatin wahuwa ʿalā jamʿihim idhā yashāu qadīrun
ayahs.42:30: wamā aṣābakum min muṣībatin fabimā kasabat aydīkum wayaʿfū ʿan kathīrin
ayahs.42:31: wamā antum bimuʿjizīna fī l-arḍi wamā lakum min dūni Allāhi min waliyyin walā naṣīrin
ayahs.42:32: wamin āyātihi l-jawāri fī l-baḥri kal-aʿlāmi
ayahs.42:33: in yasha yuskini l-rīḥa fayaẓlalna rawākida ʿalā ẓahrihi inna fī dhālika laʾāyātin likulli ṣabbārin shakūrin
ayahs.42:34: aw yūbiqhunna bimā kasabū wayaʿfu ʿan kathīrin
ayahs.42:35: wayaʿlama alladhīna yujādilūna fī āyātinā mā lahum min maḥīṣin
ayahs.42:36: famā ūtītum min shayin famatāʿu l-ḥayati l-dunyā wamā ʿinda Allāhi khayrun wa-abqā lilladhīna āmanū waʿalā rabbihim yatawakkalūna
ayahs.42:37: wa-alladhīna yajtanibūna kabāira l-ithmi wal-fawāḥisha wa-idhā mā ghaḍibū hum yaghfirūna
ayahs.42:38: wa-alladhīna istajābū lirabbihim wa-aqāmū l-ṣalata wa-amruhum shūrā baynahum wamimmā razaqnāhum yunfiqūna
ayahs.42:39: wa-alladhīna idhā aṣābahumu l-baghyu hum yantaṣirūna
ayahs.42:40: wajazāu sayyi-atin sayyi-atun mithluhā faman ʿafā wa-aṣlaḥa fa-ajruhu ʿalā Allāhi innahu lā yuḥibbu l-ẓālimīna
ayahs.42:41: walamani intaṣara baʿda ẓulmihi fa-ulāika mā ʿalayhim min sabīlin
ayahs.42:42: innamā l-sabīlu ʿalā alladhīna yaẓlimūna l-nāsa wayabghūna fī l-arḍi bighayri l-ḥaqi ulāika lahum ʿadhābun alīmun
ayahs.42:43: walaman ṣabara waghafara inna dhālika lamin ʿazmi l-umūri
ayahs.42:44: waman yuḍlili Allāhu famā lahu min waliyyin min baʿdihi watarā l-ẓālimīna lammā ra-awū l-ʿadhāba yaqūlūna hal ilā maraddin min sabīlin
ayahs.42:45: watarāhum yuʿraḍūna ʿalayhā khāshiʿīna mina l-dhuli yanẓurūna min ṭarfin khafiyyin waqāla alladhīna āmanū inna l-khāsirīna alladhīna khasirū anfusahum wa-ahlīhim yawma l-qiyāmati alā inna l-ẓālimīna fī ʿadhābin muqīmin
ayahs.42:46: wamā kāna lahum min awliyāʾa yanṣurūnahum min dūni Allāhi waman yuḍlili Allāhu famā lahu min sabīlin
ayahs.42:47: istajībū lirabbikum min qabli an yatiya yawmun lā maradda lahu mina Allāhi mā lakum min malja-in yawma-idhin wamā lakum min nakīrin
ayahs.42:48: fa-in aʿraḍū famā arsalnāka ʿalayhim ḥafīẓan in ʿalayka illā l-balāghu wa-innā idhā adhaqnā l-insāna minnā raḥmatan fariḥa bihā wa-in tuṣibhum sayyi-atun bimā qaddamat aydīhim fa-inna l-insāna kafūrun
ayahs.42:49: lillāhi mulku l-samāwāti wal-arḍi yakhluqu mā yashāu yahabu liman yashāu ināthan wayahabu liman yashāu l-dhukūra
ayahs.42:50: aw yuzawwijuhum dhukrānan wa-ināthan wayajʿalu man yashāu ʿaqīman innahu ʿalīmun qadīrun
ayahs.42:51: wamā kāna libasharin an yukallimahu Allāhu illā waḥyan aw min warāi ḥijābin aw yursila rasūlan fayūḥiya bi-idhnihi mā yashāu innahu ʿaliyyun ḥakīmun
ayahs.42:52: wakadhālika awḥaynā ilayka rūḥan min amrinā mā kunta tadrī mā l-kitābu walā l-īmānu walākin jaʿalnāhu nūran nahdī bihi man nashāu min ʿibādinā wa-innaka latahdī ilā ṣirāṭin mustaqīmin
ayahs.42:53: ṣirāṭi Allāhi alladhī lahu mā fī l-samāwāti wamā fī l-arḍi alā ilā Allāhi taṣīru l-umūru
ayahs.43:3: innā jaʿalnāhu qurānan ʿarabiyyan laʿallakum taʿqilūna
ayahs.43:4: wa-innahu fī ummi l-kitābi ladaynā laʿaliyyun ḥakīmun
ayahs.43:5: afanaḍribu ʿankumu l-dhikra ṣafḥan an kuntum qawman musrifīna
ayahs.43:6: wakam arsalnā min nabiyyin fī l-awalīna
ayahs.43:7: wamā yatīhim min nabiyyin illā kānū bihi yastahziūna
ayahs.43:8: fa-ahlaknā ashadda minhum baṭshan wamaḍā mathalu l-awalīna
ayahs.43:9: wala-in sa-altahum man khalaqa l-samāwāti wal-arḍa layaqūlunna khalaqahunna l-ʿazīzu l-ʿalīmu
ayahs.43:10: alladhī jaʿala lakumu l-arḍa mahdan wajaʿala lakum fīhā subulan laʿallakum tahtadūna
ayahs.43:11: wa-alladhī nazzala mina l-samāi māʾan biqadarin fa-ansharnā bihi baldatan maytan kadhālika tukhrajūna
ayahs.43:12: wa-alladhī khalaqa l-azwāja kullahā wajaʿala lakum mina l-fulki wal-anʿāmi mā tarkabūna
ayahs.43:13: litastawū ʿalā ẓuhūrihi thumma tadhkurū niʿmata rabbikum idhā istawaytum ʿalayhi wataqūlū subḥāna alladhī sakhara lanā hādhā wamā kunnā lahu muqrinīna
ayahs.43:15: wajaʿalū lahu min ʿibādihi juzan inna l-insāna lakafūrun mubīnun
ayahs.43:16: ami ittakhadha mimmā yakhluqu banātin wa-aṣfākum bil-banīna
ayahs.43:17: wa-idhā bushira aḥaduhum bimā ḍaraba lilrraḥmāni mathalan ẓalla wajhuhu muswaddan wahuwa kaẓīmun
ayahs.43:18: awaman yunasha-u fī l-ḥilyati wahuwa fī l-khiṣāmi ghayru mubīnin
ayahs.43:19: wajaʿalū l-malāikata alladhīna hum ʿibādu l-raḥmāni ināthan ashahidū khalqahum satuktabu shahādatuhum wayusalūna
ayahs.43:20: waqālū law shāʾa l-raḥmānu mā ʿabadnāhum mā lahum bidhālika min ʿilmin in hum illā yakhruṣūna
ayahs.43:21: am ātaynāhum kitāban min qablihi fahum bihi mustamsikūna
ayahs.43:22: bal qālū innā wajadnā ābāʾanā ʿalā ummatin wa-innā ʿalā āthārihim muhtadūna
ayahs.43:23: wakadhālika mā arsalnā min qablika fī qaryatin min nadhīrin illā qāla mutrafūhā innā wajadnā ābāʾanā ʿalā ummatin wa-innā ʿalā āthārihim muqtadūna
ayahs.43:24: qāla awalaw jiʾtukum bi-ahdā mimmā wajadttum ʿalayhi ābāʾakum qālū innā bimā ursiltum bihi kāfirūna
ayahs.43:25: fa-intaqamnā minhum fa-unẓur kayfa kāna ʿāqibatu l-mukadhibīna
ayahs.43:26: wa-idh qāla ibrāhīmu li-abīhi waqawmihi innanī barāon mimmā taʿbudūna
ayahs.43:28: wajaʿalahā kalimatan bāqiyatan fī ʿaqibihi laʿallahum yarjiʿūna
ayahs.43:29: bal mattaʿtu hāulāi waʾābāʾahum ḥattā jāʾahumu l-ḥaqu warasūlun mubīnun
ayahs.43:30: walammā jāʾahumu l-ḥaqu qālū hādhā siḥrun wa-innā bihi kāfirūna
ayahs.43:31: waqālū lawlā nuzzila hādhā l-qurānu ʿalā rajulin mina l-qaryatayni ʿaẓīmin
ayahs.43:32: ahum yaqsimūna raḥmata rabbika naḥnu qasamnā baynahum maʿīshatahum fī l-ḥayati l-dunyā warafaʿnā baʿḍahum fawqa baʿḍin darajātin liyattakhidha baʿḍuhum baʿḍan sukhriyyan waraḥmatu rabbika khayrun mimmā yajmaʿūna
ayahs.43:33: walawlā an yakūna l-nāsu ummatan wāḥidatan lajaʿalnā liman yakfuru bil-raḥmāni libuyūtihim suqufan min fiḍḍatin wamaʿārija ʿalayhā yaẓharūna
ayahs.43:35: wazukhrufan wa-in kullu dhālika lammā matāʿu l-ḥayati l-dunyā wal-ākhiratu ʿinda rabbika lilmuttaqīna
ayahs.43:36: waman yaʿshu ʿan dhikri l-raḥmāni nuqayyiḍ lahu shayṭānan fahuwa lahu qarīnun
ayahs.43:37: wa-innahum layaṣuddūnahum ʿani l-sabīli wayaḥsabūna annahum muhtadūna
ayahs.43:38: ḥattā idhā jāʾanā qāla yālayta baynī wabaynaka buʿda l-mashriqayni fabiʾsa l-qarīnu
ayahs.43:39: walan yanfaʿakumu l-yawma idh ẓalamtum annakum fī l-ʿadhābi mushtarikūna
ayahs.43:40: afa-anta tusmiʿu l-ṣuma aw tahdī l-ʿumya waman kāna fī ḍalālin mubīnin
ayahs.43:41: fa-immā nadhhabanna bika fa-innā minhum muntaqimūna
ayahs.43:42: aw nuriyannaka alladhī waʿadnāhum fa-innā ʿalayhim muqtadirūna
ayahs.43:43: fa-istamsik bi-alladhī ūḥiya ilayka innaka ʿalā ṣirāṭin mustaqīmin
ayahs.43:44: wa-innahu ladhikrun laka waliqawmika wasawfa tusalūna
ayahs.43:45: wasal man arsalnā min qablika min rusulinā ajaʿalnā min dūni l-raḥmāni ālihatan yuʿbadūna
ayahs.43:46: walaqad arsalnā mūsā biāyātinā ilā firʿawna wamala-ihi faqāla innī rasūlu rabbi l-ʿālamīna
ayahs.43:47: falammā jāʾahum biāyātinā idhā hum minhā yaḍḥakūna
ayahs.43:48: wamā nurīhim min āyatin illā hiya akbaru min ukhtihā wa-akhadhnāhum bil-ʿadhābi laʿallahum yarjiʿūna
ayahs.43:49: waqālū yāʾayyuha l-sāḥiru udʿu lanā rabbaka bimā ʿahida ʿindaka innanā lamuhtadūna
ayahs.43:50: falammā kashafnā ʿanhumu l-ʿadhāba idhā hum yankuthūna
ayahs.43:51: wanādā firʿawnu fī qawmihi qāla yāqawmi alaysa lī mulku miṣra wahādhihi l-anhāru tajrī min taḥtī afalā tubṣirūna
ayahs.43:52: am anā khayrun min hādhā alladhī huwa mahīnun walā yakādu yubīnu
ayahs.43:53: falawlā ulqiya ʿalayhi aswiratun min dhahabin aw jāʾa maʿahu l-malāikatu muqtarinīna
ayahs.43:54: fa-istakhaffa qawmahu fa-aṭāʿūhu innahum kānū qawman fāsiqīna
ayahs.43:55: falammā āsafūnā intaqamnā minhum fa-aghraqnāhum ajmaʿīna
ayahs.43:57: walammā ḍuriba ubnu maryama mathalan idhā qawmuka minhu yaṣiddūna
ayahs.43:58: waqālū aʾālihatunā khayrun am huwa mā ḍarabūhu laka illā jadalan bal hum qawmun khaṣimūna
ayahs.43:59: in huwa illā ʿabdun anʿamnā ʿalayhi wajaʿalnāhu mathalan libanī isrāīla
ayahs.43:60: walaw nashāu lajaʿalnā minkum malāikatan fī l-arḍi yakhlufūna
ayahs.43:61: wa-innahu laʿilmun lilssāʿati falā tamtarunna bihā wa-ittabiʿūni hādhā ṣirāṭun mustaqīmun
ayahs.43:62: walā yaṣuddannakumu l-shayṭānu innahu lakum ʿaduwwun mubīnun
ayahs.43:63: walammā jāʾa ʿīsā bil-bayināti qāla qad jiʾtukum bil-ḥikmati wali-ubayyina lakum baʿḍa alladhī takhtalifūna fīhi fa-ittaqū Allāha wa-aṭīʿūni
ayahs.43:64: inna Allāha huwa rabbī warabbukum fa-uʿbudūhu hādhā ṣirāṭun mustaqīmun
ayahs.43:65: fa-ikhtalafa l-aḥzābu min baynihim fawaylun lilladhīna ẓalamū min ʿadhābi yawmin alīmin
ayahs.43:66: hal yanẓurūna illā l-sāʿata an tatiyahum baghtatan wahum lā yashʿurūna
ayahs.43:67: al-akhilāu yawma-idhin baʿḍuhum libaʿḍin ʿaduwwun illā l-mutaqīna
ayahs.43:68: yāʿibādi lā khawfun ʿalaykumu l-yawma walā antum taḥzanūna
ayahs.43:71: yuṭāfu ʿalayhim biṣiḥāfin min dhahabin wa-akwābin wafīhā mā tashtahīhi l-anfusu wataladhu l-aʿyunu wa-antum fīhā khālidūna
ayahs.43:72: watilka l-janatu allatī ūrithtumūhā bimā kuntum taʿmalūna
ayahs.43:73: lakum fīhā fākihatun kathīratun minhā takulūna
ayahs.43:74: inna l-mujrimīna fī ʿadhābi jahannama khālidūna
ayahs.43:75: lā yufattaru ʿanhum wahum fīhi mublisūna
ayahs.43:76: wamā ẓalamnāhum walākin kānū humu l-ẓālimīna
ayahs.43:77: wanādaw yāmāliku liyaqḍi ʿalaynā rabbuka qāla innakum mākithūna
ayahs.43:78: laqad jiʾnākum bil-ḥaqi walākinna aktharakum lilḥaqqi kārihūna
ayahs.43:80: am yaḥsabūna annā lā nasmaʿu sirrahum wanajwāhum balā warusulunā ladayhim yaktubūna
ayahs.43:81: qul in kāna lilrraḥmāni waladun fa-anā awwalu l-ʿābidīna
ayahs.43:82: subḥāna rabbi l-samāwāti wal-arḍi rabbi l-ʿarshi ʿammā yaṣifūna
ayahs.43:83: fadharhum yakhūḍū wayalʿabū ḥattā yulāqū yawmahumu alladhī yūʿadūna
ayahs.43:84: wahuwa alladhī fī l-samāi ilāhun wafī l-arḍi ilāhun wahuwa l-ḥakīmu l-ʿalīmu
ayahs.43:85: watabāraka alladhī lahu mulku l-samāwāti wal-arḍi wamā baynahumā waʿindahu ʿilmu l-sāʿati wa-ilayhi turjaʿūna
ayahs.43:86: walā yamliku alladhīna yadʿūna min dūnihi l-shafāʿata illā man shahida bil-ḥaqi wahum yaʿlamūna
ayahs.43:87: wala-in sa-altahum man khalaqahum layaqūlunna Allāhu fa-annā yuʾfakūna
ayahs.43:88: waqīlihi yārabbi inna hāulāi qawmun lā yuʾminūna
ayahs.43:89: fa-iṣfaḥ ʿanhum waqul salāmun fasawfa yaʿlamūna
ayahs.44:3: innā anzalnāhu fī laylatin mubārakatin innā kunnā mundhirīna
ayahs.44:5: amran min ʿindinā innā kunnā mursilīna
ayahs.44:6: raḥmatan min rabbika innahu huwa l-samīʿu l-ʿalīmu
ayahs.44:7: rabbi l-samāwāti wal-arḍi wamā baynahumā in kuntum mūqinīna
ayahs.44:8: lā ilāha illā huwa yuḥyī wayumītu rabbukum warabbu ābāikumu l-awalīna
ayahs.44:10: fa-irtaqib yawma tatī l-samāu bidukhānin mubīnin
ayahs.44:12: rabbanā ikshif ʿannā l-ʿadhāba innā muʾminūna
ayahs.44:13: annā lahumu l-dhikrā waqad jāʾahum rasūlun mubīnun
ayahs.44:14: thumma tawallaw ʿanhu waqālū muʿallamun majnūnun
ayahs.44:15: innā kāshifū l-ʿadhābi qalīlan innakum ʿāidūna
ayahs.44:16: yawma nabṭishu l-baṭshata l-kubrā innā muntaqimūna
ayahs.44:17: walaqad fatannā qablahum qawma firʿawna wajāʾahum rasūlun karīmun
ayahs.44:18: an addū ilayya ʿibāda Allāhi innī lakum rasūlun amīnun
ayahs.44:19: wa-an lā taʿlū ʿalā Allāhi innī ātīkum bisulṭānin mubīnin
ayahs.44:20: wa-innī ʿudhtu birabbī warabbikum an tarjumūni
ayahs.44:22: fadaʿā rabbahu anna hāulāi qawmun mujrimūna
ayahs.44:24: wa-utruki l-baḥra rahwan innahum jundun mughraqūna
ayahs.44:29: famā bakat ʿalayhimu l-samāu wal-arḍu wamā kānū munẓarīna
ayahs.44:30: walaqad najjaynā banī isrāīla mina l-ʿadhābi l-muhīni
ayahs.44:31: min firʿawna innahu kāna ʿāliyan mina l-musrifīna
ayahs.44:32: walaqadi ikhtarnāhum ʿalā ʿilmin ʿalā l-ʿālamīna
ayahs.44:33: waʾātaynāhum mina l-āyāti mā fīhi balāon mubīnun
ayahs.44:35: in hiya illā mawtatunā l-ūlā wamā naḥnu bimunsharīna
ayahs.44:37: ahum khayrun am qawmu tubbaʿin wa-alladhīna min qablihim ahlaknāhum innahum kānū mujrimīna
ayahs.44:38: wamā khalaqnā l-samāwāti wal-arḍa wamā baynahumā lāʿibīna
ayahs.44:39: mā khalaqnāhumā illā bil-ḥaqi walākinna aktharahum lā yaʿlamūna
ayahs.44:41: yawma lā yughnī mawlan ʿan mawlan shayan walā hum yunṣarūna
ayahs.44:42: illā man raḥima Allāhu innahu huwa l-ʿazīzu l-raḥīmu
ayahs.44:48: thumma ṣubbū fawqa rasihi min ʿadhābi l-ḥamīmi
ayahs.44:50: inna hādhā mā kuntum bihi tamtarūna
ayahs.44:56: lā yadhūqūna fīhā l-mawta illā l-mawtata l-ūlā wawaqāhum ʿadhāba l-jaḥīmi
ayahs.44:57: faḍlan min rabbika dhālika huwa l-fawzu l-ʿaẓīmu
ayahs.45:2: tanzīlu l-kitābi mina Allāhi l-ʿazīzi l-ḥakīmi
ayahs.45:3: inna fī l-samāwāti wal-arḍi laʾāyātin lilmuʾminīna
ayahs.45:4: wafī khalqikum wamā yabuthu min dābbatin āyātun liqawmin yūqinūna
ayahs.45:5: wa-ikhtilāfi al-layli wal-nahāri wamā anzala Allāhu mina l-samāi min rizqin fa-aḥyā bihi l-arḍa baʿda mawtihā wataṣrīfi l-riyāḥi āyātun liqawmin yaʿqilūna
ayahs.45:6: tilka āyātu Allāhi natlūhā ʿalayka bil-ḥaqi fabi-ayyi ḥadīthin baʿda Allāhi waʾāyātihi yuʾminūna
ayahs.45:8: yasmaʿu āyāti Allāhi tutlā ʿalayhi thumma yuṣirru mustakbiran ka-an lam yasmaʿhā fabashirhu biʿadhābin alīmin
ayahs.45:9: wa-idhā ʿalima min āyātinā shayan ittakhadhahā huzuwan ulāika lahum ʿadhābun muhīnun
ayahs.45:10: min warāihim jahannamu walā yughnī ʿanhum mā kasabū shayan walā mā ittakhadhū min dūni Allāhi awliyāʾa walahum ʿadhābun ʿaẓīmun
ayahs.45:11: hādhā hudan wa-alladhīna kafarū biāyāti rabbihim lahum ʿadhābun min rijzin alīmun
ayahs.45:12: Allāhu alladhī sakhara lakumu l-baḥra litajriya l-fulku fīhi bi-amrihi walitabtaghū min faḍlihi walaʿallakum tashkurūna
ayahs.45:13: wasakhara lakum mā fī l-samāwāti wamā fī l-arḍi jamīʿan minhu inna fī dhālika laʾāyātin liqawmin yatafakkarūna
ayahs.45:14: qul lilladhīna āmanū yaghfirū lilladhīna lā yarjūna ayyāma Allāhi liyajziya qawman bimā kānū yaksibūna
ayahs.45:15: man ʿamila ṣāliḥan falinafsihi waman asāʾa faʿalayhā thumma ilā rabbikum turjaʿūna
ayahs.45:16: walaqad ātaynā banī isrāīla l-kitāba wal-ḥukma wal-nubuwata warazaqnāhum mina l-ṭayibāti wafaḍḍalnāhum ʿalā l-ʿālamīna
ayahs.45:17: waʾātaynāhum bayyinātin mina l-amri famā ikhtalafū illā min baʿdi mā jāʾahumu l-ʿilmu baghyan baynahum inna rabbaka yaqḍī baynahum yawma l-qiyāmati fīmā kānū fīhi yakhtalifūna
ayahs.45:18: thumma jaʿalnāka ʿalā sharīʿatin mina l-amri fa-ittabiʿhā walā tattabiʿ ahwāʾa alladhīna lā yaʿlamūna
ayahs.45:19: innahum lan yughnū ʿanka mina Allāhi shayan wa-inna l-ẓālimīna baʿḍuhum awliyāu baʿḍin wallāhu waliyyu l-mutaqīna
ayahs.45:20: hādhā baṣāiru lilnnāsi wahudan waraḥmatun liqawmin yūqinūna
ayahs.45:21: am ḥasiba alladhīna ijtaraḥū l-sayiāti an najʿalahum ka-alladhīna āmanū waʿamilū l-ṣāliḥāti sawāʾan maḥyāhum wamamātuhum sāʾa mā yaḥkumūna
ayahs.45:22: wakhalaqa Allāhu l-samāwāti wal-arḍa bil-ḥaqi walitujzā kullu nafsin bimā kasabat wahum lā yuẓlamūna
ayahs.45:23: afara-ayta mani ittakhadha ilāhahu hawāhu wa-aḍallahu Allāhu ʿalā ʿilmin wakhatama ʿalā samʿihi waqalbihi wajaʿala ʿalā baṣarihi ghishāwatan faman yahdīhi min baʿdi Allāhi afalā tadhakkarūna
ayahs.45:24: waqālū mā hiya illā ḥayātunā l-dunyā namūtu wanaḥyā wamā yuhlikunā illā l-dahru wamā lahum bidhālika min ʿilmin in hum illā yaẓunnūna
ayahs.45:25: wa-idhā tutlā ʿalayhim āyātunā bayyinātin mā kāna ḥujjatahum illā an qālū iʾtū biābāinā in kuntum ṣādiqīna
ayahs.45:26: quli Allāhu yuḥyīkum thumma yumītukum thumma yajmaʿukum ilā yawmi l-qiyāmati lā rayba fīhi walākinna akthara l-nāsi lā yaʿlamūna
ayahs.45:27: walillahi mulku l-samāwāti wal-arḍi wayawma taqūmu l-sāʿatu yawma-idhin yakhsaru l-mubṭilūna
ayahs.45:28: watarā kulla ummatin jāthiyatan kullu ummatin tudʿā ilā kitābihā l-yawma tujzawna mā kuntum taʿmalūna
ayahs.45:29: hādhā kitābunā yanṭiqu ʿalaykum bil-ḥaqi innā kunnā nastansikhu mā kuntum taʿmalūna
ayahs.45:30: fa-ammā alladhīna āmanū waʿamilū l-ṣāliḥāti fayudkhiluhum rabbuhum fī raḥmatihi dhālika huwa l-fawzu l-mubīnu
ayahs.45:31: wa-ammā alladhīna kafarū afalam takun āyātī tutlā ʿalaykum fa-istakbartum wakuntum qawman mujrimīna
ayahs.45:32: wa-idhā qīla inna waʿda Allāhi ḥaqqun wal-sāʿatu lā rayba fīhā qultum mā nadrī mā l-sāʿatu in naẓunnu illā ẓannan wamā naḥnu bimustayqinīna
ayahs.45:33: wabadā lahum sayyiātu mā ʿamilū waḥāqa bihim mā kānū bihi yastahziūna
ayahs.45:34: waqīla l-yawma nansākum kamā nasītum liqāʾa yawmikum hādhā wamawākumu l-nāru wamā lakum min nāṣirīna
ayahs.45:35: dhālikum bi-annakumu ittakhadhtum āyāti Allāhi huzuwan wagharratkumu l-ḥayatu l-dunyā fal-yawma lā yukhrajūna minhā walā hum yustaʿtabūna
ayahs.45:36: falillahi l-ḥamdu rabbi l-samāwāti warabbi l-arḍi rabbi l-ʿālamīna
ayahs.45:37: walahu l-kibriyāu fī l-samāwāti wal-arḍi wahuwa l-ʿazīzu l-ḥakīmu
ayahs.46:2: tanzīlu l-kitābi mina Allāhi l-ʿazīzi l-ḥakīmi
ayahs.46:3: mā khalaqnā l-samāwāti wal-arḍa wamā baynahumā illā bil-ḥaqi wa-ajalin musamman wa-alladhīna kafarū ʿammā undhirū muʿriḍūna
ayahs.46:4: qul ara-aytum mā tadʿūna min dūni Allāhi arūnī mādhā khalaqū mina l-arḍi am lahum shirkun fī l-samāwāti iʾtūnī bikitābin min qabli hādhā aw athāratin min ʿilmin in kuntum ṣādiqīna
ayahs.46:5: waman aḍallu mimman yadʿū min dūni Allāhi man lā yastajību lahu ilā yawmi l-qiyāmati wahum ʿan duʿāihim ghāfilūna
ayahs.46:6: wa-idhā ḥushira l-nāsu kānū lahum aʿdāʾan wakānū biʿibādatihim kāfirīna
ayahs.46:7: wa-idhā tutlā ʿalayhim āyātunā bayyinātin qāla alladhīna kafarū lilḥaqqi lammā jāʾahum hādhā siḥrun mubīnun
ayahs.46:8: am yaqūlūna iftarāhu qul ini iftaraytuhu falā tamlikūna lī mina Allāhi shayan huwa aʿlamu bimā tufīḍūna fīhi kafā bihi shahīdan baynī wabaynakum wahuwa l-ghafūru l-raḥīmu
ayahs.46:9: qul mā kuntu bidʿan mina l-rusuli wamā adrī mā yufʿalu bī walā bikum in attabiʿu illā mā yūḥā ilayya wamā anā illā nadhīrun mubīnun
ayahs.46:10: qul ara-aytum in kāna min ʿindi Allāhi wakafartum bihi washahida shāhidun min banī isrāīla ʿalā mithlihi faʾāmana wa-istakbartum inna Allāha lā yahdī l-qawma l-ẓālimīna
ayahs.46:11: waqāla alladhīna kafarū lilladhīna āmanū law kāna khayran mā sabaqūnā ilayhi wa-idh lam yahtadū bihi fasayaqūlūna hādhā ifkun qadīmun
ayahs.46:12: wamin qablihi kitābu mūsā imāman waraḥmatan wahādhā kitābun muṣaddiqun lisānan ʿarabiyyan liyundhira alladhīna ẓalamū wabushrā lilmuḥsinīna
ayahs.46:13: inna alladhīna qālū rabbunā Allāhu thumma istaqāmū falā khawfun ʿalayhim walā hum yaḥzanūna
ayahs.46:14: ulāika aṣḥābu l-janati khālidīna fīhā jazāʾan bimā kānū yaʿmalūna
ayahs.46:15: wawaṣṣaynā l-insāna biwālidayhi iḥsānan ḥamalathu ummuhu kurhan wawaḍaʿathu kurhan waḥamluhu wafiṣāluhu thalāthūna shahran ḥattā idhā balagha ashuddahu wabalagha arbaʿīna sanatan qāla rabbi awziʿnī an ashkura niʿmataka allatī anʿamta ʿalayya waʿalā wālidayya wa-an aʿmala ṣāliḥan tarḍāhu wa-aṣliḥ lī fī dhurriyyatī innī tubtu ilayka wa-innī mina l-muslimīna
ayahs.46:16: ulāika alladhīna nataqabbalu ʿanhum aḥsana mā ʿamilū wanatajāwazu ʿan sayyiātihim fī aṣḥābi l-janati waʿda l-ṣidqi alladhī kānū yūʿadūna
ayahs.46:17: wa-alladhī qāla liwālidayhi uffin lakumā ataʿidāninī an ukhraja waqad khalati l-qurūnu min qablī wahumā yastaghīthāni Allāha waylaka āmin inna waʿda Allāhi ḥaqqun fayaqūlu mā hādhā illā asāṭīru l-awalīna
ayahs.46:18: ulāika alladhīna ḥaqqa ʿalayhimu l-qawlu fī umamin qad khalat min qablihim mina l-jini wal-insi innahum kānū khāsirīna
ayahs.46:19: walikullin darajātun mimmā ʿamilū waliyuwaffiyahum aʿmālahum wahum lā yuẓlamūna
ayahs.46:20: wayawma yuʿraḍu alladhīna kafarū ʿalā l-nāri adhhabtum ṭayyibātikum fī ḥayātikumu l-dunyā wa-istamtaʿtum bihā fal-yawma tujzawna ʿadhāba l-hūni bimā kuntum tastakbirūna fī l-arḍi bighayri l-ḥaqi wabimā kuntum tafsuqūna
ayahs.46:21: wa-udhkur akhā ʿādin idh andhara qawmahu bil-aḥqāfi waqad khalati l-nudhuru min bayni yadayhi wamin khalfihi allā taʿbudū illā Allāha innī akhāfu ʿalaykum ʿadhāba yawmin ʿaẓīmin
ayahs.46:22: qālū ajiʾtanā litafikanā ʿan ālihatinā fatinā bimā taʿidunā in kunta mina l-ṣādiqīna
ayahs.46:23: qāla innamā l-ʿilmu ʿinda Allāhi wa-uballighukum mā ursiltu bihi walākinnī arākum qawman tajhalūna
ayahs.46:24: falammā ra-awhu ʿāriḍan mustaqbila awdiyatihim qālū hādhā ʿāriḍun mumṭirunā bal huwa mā istaʿjaltum bihi rīḥun fīhā ʿadhābun alīmun
ayahs.46:25: tudammiru kulla shayin bi-amri rabbihā fa-aṣbaḥū lā yurā illā masākinuhum kadhālika najzī l-qawma l-mujrimīna
ayahs.46:26: walaqad makkannāhum fīmā in makkannākum fīhi wajaʿalnā lahum samʿan wa-abṣāran wa-afidatan famā aghnā ʿanhum samʿuhum walā abṣāruhum walā afidatuhum min shayin idh kānū yajḥadūna biāyāti Allāhi waḥāqa bihim mā kānū bihi yastahziūna
ayahs.46:27: walaqad ahlaknā mā ḥawlakum mina l-qurā waṣarrafnā l-āyāti laʿallahum yarjiʿūna
ayahs.46:28: falawlā naṣarahumu alladhīna ittakhadhū min dūni Allāhi qurbānan ālihatan bal ḍallū ʿanhum wadhālika ifkuhum wamā kānū yaftarūna
ayahs.46:29: wa-idh ṣarafnā ilayka nafaran mina l-jini yastamiʿūna l-qurāna falammā ḥaḍarūhu qālū anṣitū falammā quḍiya wallaw ilā qawmihim mundhirīna
ayahs.46:30: qālū yāqawmanā innā samiʿnā kitāban unzila min baʿdi mūsā muṣaddiqan limā bayna yadayhi yahdī ilā l-ḥaqi wa-ilā ṭarīqin mustaqīmin
ayahs.46:31: yāqawmanā ajībū dāʿiya Allāhi waʾāminū bihi yaghfir lakum min dhunūbikum wayujirkum min ʿadhābin alīmin
ayahs.46:32: waman lā yujib dāʿiya Allāhi falaysa bimuʿjizin fī l-arḍi walaysa lahu min dūnihi awliyāu ulāika fī ḍalālin mubīnin
ayahs.46:33: awalam yaraw anna Allāha alladhī khalaqa l-samāwāti wal-arḍa walam yaʿya bikhalqihinna biqādirin ʿalā an yuḥyiya l-mawtā balā innahu ʿalā kulli shayin qadīrun
ayahs.46:34: wayawma yuʿraḍu alladhīna kafarū ʿalā l-nāri alaysa hādhā bil-ḥaqi qālū balā warabbinā qāla fadhūqū l-ʿadhāba bimā kuntum takfurūna
ayahs.46:35: fa-iṣbir kamā ṣabara ulū l-ʿazmi mina l-rusuli walā tastaʿjil lahum ka-annahum yawma yarawna mā yūʿadūna lam yalbathū illā sāʿatan min nahārin balāghun fahal yuhlaku illā l-qawmu l-fāsiqūna
ayahs.47:1: alladhīna kafarū waṣaddū ʿan sabīli Allāhi aḍalla aʿmālahum
ayahs.47:2: wa-alladhīna āmanū waʿamilū l-ṣāliḥāti waʾāmanū bimā nuzzila ʿalā muḥammadin wahuwa l-ḥaqu min rabbihim kaffara ʿanhum sayyiātihim wa-aṣlaḥa bālahum
ayahs.47:3: dhālika bi-anna alladhīna kafarū ittabaʿū l-bāṭila wa-anna alladhīna āmanū ittabaʿū l-ḥaqa min rabbihim kadhālika yaḍribu Allāhu lilnnāsi amthālahum
ayahs.47:4: fa-idhā laqītumu alladhīna kafarū faḍarba l-riqābi ḥattā idhā athkhantumūhum fashuddū l-wathāqa fa-immā mannan baʿdu wa-immā fidāʾan ḥattā taḍaʿa l-ḥarbu awzārahā dhālika walaw yashāu Allāhu la-intaṣara minhum walākin liyabluwā baʿḍakum bibaʿḍin wa-alladhīna qutilū fī sabīli Allāhi falan yuḍilla aʿmālahum
ayahs.47:7: yāʾayyuhā alladhīna āmanū in tanṣurū Allāha yanṣurkum wayuthabbit aqdāmakum
ayahs.47:8: wa-alladhīna kafarū fataʿsan lahum wa-aḍalla aʿmālahum
ayahs.47:9: dhālika bi-annahum karihū mā anzala Allāhu fa-aḥbaṭa aʿmālahum
ayahs.47:10: afalam yasīrū fī l-arḍi fayanẓurū kayfa kāna ʿāqibatu alladhīna min qablihim dammara Allāhu ʿalayhim walilkāfirīna amthāluhā
ayahs.47:11: dhālika bi-anna Allāha mawlā alladhīna āmanū wa-anna l-kāfirīna lā mawlā lahum
ayahs.47:12: inna Allāha yudkhilu alladhīna āmanū waʿamilū l-ṣāliḥāti jannātin tajrī min taḥtihā l-anhāru wa-alladhīna kafarū yatamattaʿūna wayakulūna kamā takulu l-anʿāmu wal-nāru mathwan lahum
ayahs.47:13: waka-ayyin min qaryatin hiya ashaddu quwwatan min qaryatika allatī akhrajatka ahlaknāhum falā nāṣira lahum
ayahs.47:14: afaman kāna ʿalā bayyinatin min rabbihi kaman zuyyina lahu sūʾu ʿamalihi wa-ittabaʿū ahwāʾahum
ayahs.47:15: mathalu l-janati allatī wuʿida l-mutaqūna fīhā anhārun min māin ghayri āsinin wa-anhārun min labanin lam yataghayyar ṭaʿmuhu wa-anhārun min khamrin ladhatin lilshāribīna wa-anhārun min ʿasalin muṣaffan walahum fīhā min kulli l-thamarāti wamaghfiratun min rabbihim kaman huwa khālidun fī l-nāri wasuqū māʾan ḥamīman faqaṭṭaʿa amʿāʾahum
ayahs.47:16: waminhum man yastamiʿu ilayka ḥattā idhā kharajū min ʿindika qālū lilladhīna ūtū l-ʿilma mādhā qāla ānifan ulāika alladhīna ṭabaʿa Allāhu ʿalā qulūbihim wa-ittabaʿū ahwāʾahum
ayahs.47:17: wa-alladhīna ihtadaw zādahum hudan waʾātāhum taqwāhum
ayahs.47:18: fahal yanẓurūna illā l-sāʿata an tatiyahum baghtatan faqad jāʾa ashrāṭuhā fa-annā lahum idhā jāʾathum dhikrāhum
ayahs.47:19: fa-iʿlam annahu lā ilāha illā Allāhu wa-istaghfir lidhanbika walilmuʾminīna wal-muʾmināti wallāhu yaʿlamu mutaqallabakum wamathwākum
ayahs.47:20: wayaqūlu alladhīna āmanū lawlā nuzzilat sūratun fa-idhā unzilat sūratun muḥkamatun wadhukira fīhā l-qitālu ra-ayta alladhīna fī qulūbihim maraḍun yanẓurūna ilayka naẓara l-maghshiyi ʿalayhi mina l-mawti fa-awlā lahum
ayahs.47:21: ṭāʿatun waqawlun maʿrūfun fa-idhā ʿazama l-amru falaw ṣadaqū Allāha lakāna khayran lahum
ayahs.47:22: fahal ʿasaytum in tawallaytum an tufsidū fī l-arḍi watuqaṭṭiʿū arḥāmakum
ayahs.47:23: ulāika alladhīna laʿanahumu Allāhu fa-aṣammahum wa-aʿmā abṣārahum
ayahs.47:24: afalā yatadabbarūna l-qurāna am ʿalā qulūbin aqfāluhā
ayahs.47:25: inna alladhīna irtaddū ʿalā adbārihim min baʿdi mā tabayyana lahumu l-hudā l-shayṭānu sawwala lahum wa-amlā lahum
ayahs.47:26: dhālika bi-annahum qālū lilladhīna karihū mā nazzala Allāhu sanuṭīʿukum fī baʿḍi l-amri wallāhu yaʿlamu isrārahum
ayahs.47:27: fakayfa idhā tawaffathumu l-malāikatu yaḍribūna wujūhahum wa-adbārahum
ayahs.47:28: dhālika bi-annahumu ittabaʿū mā askhaṭa Allāha wakarihū riḍwānahu fa-aḥbaṭa aʿmālahum
ayahs.47:29: am ḥasiba alladhīna fī qulūbihim maraḍun an lan yukhrija Allāhu aḍghānahum
ayahs.47:30: walaw nashāu la-araynākahum falaʿaraftahum bisīmāhum walataʿrifannahum fī laḥni l-qawli wallāhu yaʿlamu aʿmālakum
ayahs.47:31: walanabluwannakum ḥattā naʿlama l-mujāhidīna minkum wal-ṣābirīna wanabluwā akhbārakum
ayahs.47:32: inna alladhīna kafarū waṣaddū ʿan sabīli Allāhi washāqqū l-rasūla min baʿdi mā tabayyana lahumu l-hudā lan yaḍurrū Allāha shayan wasayuḥbiṭu aʿmālahum
ayahs.47:33: yāʾayyuhā alladhīna āmanū aṭīʿū Allāha wa-aṭīʿū l-rasūla walā tubṭilū aʿmālakum
ayahs.47:34: inna alladhīna kafarū waṣaddū ʿan sabīli Allāhi thumma mātū wahum kuffārun falan yaghfira Allāhu lahum
ayahs.47:35: falā tahinū watadʿū ilā l-salmi wa-antumu l-aʿlawna wallāhu maʿakum walan yatirakum aʿmālakum
ayahs.47:36: innamā l-ḥayatu l-dunyā laʿibun walahwun wa-in tuʾminū watattaqū yuʾtikum ujūrakum walā yasalkum amwālakum
ayahs.47:37: in yasalkumūhā fayuḥfikum tabkhalū wayukhrij aḍghānakum
ayahs.47:38: hāʾantum hāulāi tudʿawna litunfiqū fī sabīli Allāhi faminkum man yabkhalu waman yabkhal fa-innamā yabkhalu ʿan nafsihi wallāhu l-ghaniyu wa-antumu l-fuqarāu wa-in tatawallaw yastabdil qawman ghayrakum thumma lā yakūnū amthālakum
ayahs.48:2: liyaghfira laka Allāhu mā taqaddama min dhanbika wamā ta-akhara wayutimma niʿmatahu ʿalayka wayahdiyaka ṣirāṭan mustaqīman
ayahs.48:4: huwa alladhī anzala l-sakīnata fī qulūbi l-muʾminīna liyazdādū īmānan maʿa īmānihim walillahi junūdu l-samāwāti wal-arḍi wakāna Allāhu ʿalīman ḥakīman
ayahs.48:5: liyudkhila l-muʾminīna wal-muʾmināti jannātin tajrī min taḥtihā l-anhāru khālidīna fīhā wayukaffira ʿanhum sayyiātihim wakāna dhālika ʿinda Allāhi fawzan ʿaẓīman
ayahs.48:6: wayuʿadhiba l-munāfiqīna wal-munāfiqāti wal-mushrikīna wal-mushrikāti l-ẓānīna billāhi ẓanna l-sawi ʿalayhim dāiratu l-sawi waghaḍiba Allāhu ʿalayhim walaʿanahum wa-aʿadda lahum jahannama wasāʾat maṣīran
ayahs.48:7: walillahi junūdu l-samāwāti wal-arḍi wakāna Allāhu ʿazīzan ḥakīman
ayahs.48:9: lituʾminū billāhi warasūlihi watuʿazzirūhu watuwaqqirūhu watusabbiḥūhu bukratan wa-aṣīlan
ayahs.48:10: inna alladhīna yubāyiʿūnaka innamā yubāyiʿūna Allāha yadu Allāhi fawqa aydīhim faman nakatha fa-innamā yankuthu ʿalā nafsihi waman awfā bimā ʿāhada ʿalayhu Allāha fasayuʾtīhi ajran ʿaẓīman
ayahs.48:11: sayaqūlu laka l-mukhalafūna mina l-aʿrābi shaghalatnā amwālunā wa-ahlūnā fa-istaghfir lanā yaqūlūna bi-alsinatihim mā laysa fī qulūbihim qul faman yamliku lakum mina Allāhi shayan in arāda bikum ḍarran aw arāda bikum nafʿan bal kāna Allāhu bimā taʿmalūna khabīran
ayahs.48:12: bal ẓanantum an lan yanqaliba l-rasūlu wal-muʾminūna ilā ahlīhim abadan wazuyyina dhālika fī qulūbikum waẓanantum ẓanna l-sawi wakuntum qawman būran
ayahs.48:13: waman lam yuʾmin billāhi warasūlihi fa-innā aʿtadnā lilkāfirīna saʿīran
ayahs.48:14: walillahi mulku l-samāwāti wal-arḍi yaghfiru liman yashāu wayuʿadhibu man yashāu wakāna Allāhu ghafūran raḥīman
ayahs.48:15: sayaqūlu l-mukhalafūna idhā inṭalaqtum ilā maghānima litakhudhūhā dharūnā nattabiʿkum yurīdūna an yubaddilū kalāma Allāhi qul lan tattabiʿūnā kadhālikum qāla Allāhu min qablu fasayaqūlūna bal taḥsudūnanā bal kānū lā yafqahūna illā qalīlan
ayahs.48:16: qul lilmukhallafīna mina l-aʿrābi satudʿawna ilā qawmin ulī basin shadīdin tuqātilūnahum aw yuslimūna fa-in tuṭīʿū yuʾtikumu Allāhu ajran ḥasanan wa-in tatawallaw kamā tawallaytum min qablu yuʿadhibkum ʿadhāban alīman
ayahs.48:17: laysa ʿalā l-aʿmā ḥarajun walā ʿalā l-aʿraji ḥarajun walā ʿalā l-marīḍi ḥarajun waman yuṭiʿi Allāha warasūlahu yudkhilhu jannātin tajrī min taḥtihā l-anhāru waman yatawalla yuʿadhibhu ʿadhāban alīman
ayahs.48:18: laqad raḍiya Allāhu ʿani l-muʾminīna idh yubāyiʿūnaka taḥta l-shajarati faʿalima mā fī qulūbihim fa-anzala l-sakīnata ʿalayhim wa-athābahum fatḥan qarīban
ayahs.48:19: wamaghānima kathīratan yakhudhūnahā wakāna Allāhu ʿazīzan ḥakīman
ayahs.48:20: waʿadakumu Allāhu maghānima kathīratan takhudhūnahā faʿajjala lakum hādhihi wakaffa aydiya l-nāsi ʿankum walitakūna āyatan lilmuʾminīna wayahdiyakum ṣirāṭan mustaqīman
ayahs.48:21: wa-ukhrā lam taqdirū ʿalayhā qad aḥāṭa Allāhu bihā wakāna Allāhu ʿalā kulli shayin qadīran
ayahs.48:22: walaw qātalakumu alladhīna kafarū lawallawū l-adbāra thumma lā yajidūna waliyyan walā naṣīran
ayahs.48:23: sunnata Allāhi allatī qad khalat min qablu walan tajida lisunnati Allāhi tabdīlan
ayahs.48:24: wahuwa alladhī kaffa aydiyahum ʿankum wa-aydiyakum ʿanhum bibaṭni makkata min baʿdi an aẓfarakum ʿalayhim wakāna Allāhu bimā taʿmalūna baṣīran
ayahs.48:25: humu alladhīna kafarū waṣaddūkum ʿani l-masjidi l-ḥarāmi wal-hadya maʿkūfan an yablugha maḥillahu walawlā rijālun muʾminūna wanisāon muʾminātun lam taʿlamūhum an taṭaūhum fatuṣībakum minhum maʿarratun bighayri ʿilmin liyudkhila Allāhu fī raḥmatihi man yashāu law tazayyalū laʿadhabnā alladhīna kafarū minhum ʿadhāban alīman
ayahs.48:26: idh jaʿala alladhīna kafarū fī qulūbihimu l-ḥamiyata ḥamiyyata l-jāhiliyati fa-anzala Allāhu sakīnatahu ʿalā rasūlihi waʿalā l-muʾminīna wa-alzamahum kalimata l-taqwā wakānū aḥaqqa bihā wa-ahlahā wakāna Allāhu bikulli shayin ʿalīman
ayahs.48:27: laqad ṣadaqa Allāhu rasūlahu l-ruʾyā bil-ḥaqi latadkhulunna l-masjida l-ḥarāma in shāʾa Allāhu āminīna muḥalliqīna ruʾūsakum wamuqaṣṣirīna lā takhāfūna faʿalima mā lam taʿlamū fajaʿala min dūni dhālika fatḥan qarīban
ayahs.48:28: huwa alladhī arsala rasūlahu bil-hudā wadīni l-ḥaqi liyuẓhirahu ʿalā l-dīni kullihi wakafā billāhi shahīdan
ayahs.48:29: muḥammadun rasūlu Allāhi wa-alladhīna maʿahu ashiddāu ʿalā l-kufāri ruḥamāu baynahum tarāhum rukkaʿan sujjadan yabtaghūna faḍlan mina Allāhi wariḍwānan sīmāhum fī wujūhihim min athari l-sujūdi dhālika mathaluhum fī l-tawrāti wamathaluhum fī l-injīli kazarʿin akhraja shaṭahu faʾāzarahu fa-istaghlaẓa fa-istawā ʿalā sūqihi yuʿjibu l-zurāʿa liyaghīẓa bihimu l-kufāra waʿada Allāhu alladhīna āmanū waʿamilū l-ṣāliḥāti minhum maghfiratan wa-ajran ʿaẓīman
ayahs.49:1: yāʾayyuhā alladhīna āmanū lā tuqaddimū bayna yadayi Allāhi warasūlihi wa-ittaqū Allāha inna Allāha samīʿun ʿalīmun
ayahs.49:2: yāʾayyuhā alladhīna āmanū lā tarfaʿū aṣwātakum fawqa ṣawti l-nabiyi walā tajharū lahu bil-qawli kajahri baʿḍikum libaʿḍin an taḥbaṭa aʿmālukum wa-antum lā tashʿurūna
ayahs.49:3: inna alladhīna yaghuḍḍūna aṣwātahum ʿinda rasūli Allāhi ulāika alladhīna imtaḥana Allāhu qulūbahum lilttaqwā lahum maghfiratun wa-ajrun ʿaẓīmun
ayahs.49:4: inna alladhīna yunādūnaka min warāi l-ḥujurāti aktharuhum lā yaʿqilūna
ayahs.49:5: walaw annahum ṣabarū ḥattā takhruja ilayhim lakāna khayran lahum wallāhu ghafūrun raḥīmun
ayahs.49:6: yāʾayyuhā alladhīna āmanū in jāʾakum fāsiqun binaba-in fatabayyanū an tuṣībū qawman bijahālatin fatuṣbiḥū ʿalā mā faʿaltum nādimīna
ayahs.49:7: wa-iʿlamū anna fīkum rasūla Allāhi law yuṭīʿukum fī kathīrin mina l-amri laʿanittum walākinna Allāha ḥabbaba ilaykumu l-īmāna wazayyanahu fī qulūbikum wakarraha ilaykumu l-kufra wal-fusūqa wal-ʿiṣyāna ulāika humu l-rāshidūna
ayahs.49:8: faḍlan mina Allāhi waniʿmatan wallāhu ʿalīmun ḥakīmun
ayahs.49:9: wa-in ṭāifatāni mina l-muʾminīna iqtatalū fa-aṣliḥū baynahumā fa-in baghat iḥdāhumā ʿalā l-ukhrā faqātilū allatī tabghī ḥattā tafīa ilā amri Allāhi fa-in fāʾat fa-aṣliḥū baynahumā bil-ʿadli wa-aqsiṭū inna Allāha yuḥibbu l-muqsiṭīna
ayahs.49:10: innamā l-muʾminūna ikhwatun fa-aṣliḥū bayna akhawaykum wa-ittaqū Allāha laʿallakum turḥamūna
ayahs.49:11: yāʾayyuhā alladhīna āmanū lā yaskhar qawmun min qawmin ʿasā an yakūnū khayran minhum walā nisāon min nisāin ʿasā an yakunna khayran minhunna walā talmizū anfusakum walā tanābazū bil-alqābi biʾsa l-smu l-fusūqu baʿda l-īmāni waman lam yatub fa-ulāika humu l-ẓālimūna
ayahs.49:12: yāʾayyuhā alladhīna āmanū ijtanibū kathīran mina l-ẓani inna baʿḍa l-ẓani ithmun walā tajassasū walā yaghtab baʿḍukum baʿḍan ayuḥibbu aḥadukum an yakula laḥma akhīhi maytan fakarihtumūhu wa-ittaqū Allāha inna Allāha tawwābun raḥīmun
ayahs.49:13: yāʾayyuhā l-nāsu innā khalaqnākum min dhakarin wa-unthā wajaʿalnākum shuʿūban waqabāila litaʿārafū inna akramakum ʿinda Allāhi atqākum inna Allāha ʿalīmun khabīrun
ayahs.49:14: qālati l-aʿrābu āmannā qul lam tuʾminū walākin qūlū aslamnā walammā yadkhuli l-īmānu fī qulūbikum wa-in tuṭīʿū Allāha warasūlahu lā yalitkum min aʿmālikum shayan inna Allāha ghafūrun raḥīmun
ayahs.49:15: innamā l-muʾminūna alladhīna āmanū billāhi warasūlihi thumma lam yartābū wajāhadū bi-amwālihim wa-anfusihim fī sabīli Allāhi ulāika humu l-ṣādiqūna
ayahs.49:16: qul atuʿallimūna Allāha bidīnikum wallāhu yaʿlamu mā fī l-samāwāti wamā fī l-arḍi wallāhu bikulli shayin ʿalīmun
ayahs.49:17: yamunnūna ʿalayka an aslamū qul lā tamunnū ʿalayya islāmakum bali Allāhu yamunnu ʿalaykum an hadākum lilīmāni in kuntum ṣādiqīna
ayahs.49:18: inna Allāha yaʿlamu ghayba l-samāwāti wal-arḍi wallāhu baṣīrun bimā taʿmalūna
ayahs.50:2: bal ʿajibū an jāʾahum mundhirun minhum faqāla l-kāfirūna hādhā shayon ʿajībun
ayahs.50:3: a-idhā mitnā wakunnā turāban dhālika rajʿun baʿīdun
ayahs.50:4: qad ʿalimnā mā tanquṣu l-arḍu minhum waʿindanā kitābun ḥafīẓun
ayahs.50:5: bal kadhabū bil-ḥaqi lammā jāʾahum fahum fī amrin marījin
ayahs.50:6: afalam yanẓurū ilā l-samāi fawqahum kayfa banaynāhā wazayyannāhā wamā lahā min furūjin
ayahs.50:7: wal-arḍa madadnāhā wa-alqaynā fīhā rawāsiya wa-anbatnā fīhā min kulli zawjin bahījin
ayahs.50:9: wanazzalnā mina l-samāi māʾan mubārakan fa-anbatnā bihi jannātin waḥabba l-ḥaṣīdi
ayahs.50:11: rizqan lilʿibādi wa-aḥyaynā bihi baldatan maytan kadhālika l-khurūju
ayahs.50:12: kadhabat qablahum qawmu nūḥin wa-aṣḥābu l-rasi wathamūdu
ayahs.50:14: wa-aṣḥābu l-aykati waqawmu tubbaʿin kullun kadhaba l-rusula faḥaqqa waʿīdi
ayahs.50:15: afaʿayīnā bil-khalqi l-awali bal hum fī labsin min khalqin jadīdin
ayahs.50:16: walaqad khalaqnā l-insāna wanaʿlamu mā tuwaswisu bihi nafsuhu wanaḥnu aqrabu ilayhi min ḥabli l-warīdi
ayahs.50:17: idh yatalaqqā l-mutalaqiyāni ʿani l-yamīni waʿani l-shimāli qaʿīdun
ayahs.50:18: mā yalfiẓu min qawlin illā ladayhi raqībun ʿatīdun
ayahs.50:19: wajāʾat sakratu l-mawti bil-ḥaqi dhālika mā kunta minhu taḥīdu
ayahs.50:20: wanufikha fī l-ṣūri dhālika yawmu l-waʿīdi
ayahs.50:21: wajāʾat kullu nafsin maʿahā sāiqun washahīdun
ayahs.50:22: laqad kunta fī ghaflatin min hādhā fakashafnā ʿanka ghiṭāʾaka fabaṣaruka l-yawma ḥadīdun
ayahs.50:23: waqāla qarīnuhu hādhā mā ladayya ʿatīdun
ayahs.50:24: alqiyā fī jahannama kulla kaffārin ʿanīdin
ayahs.50:26: alladhī jaʿala maʿa Allāhi ilāhan ākhara fa-alqiyāhu fī l-ʿadhābi l-shadīdi
ayahs.50:27: qāla qarīnuhu rabbanā mā aṭghaytuhu walākin kāna fī ḍalālin baʿīdin
ayahs.50:28: qāla lā takhtaṣimū ladayya waqad qaddamtu ilaykum bil-waʿīdi
ayahs.50:29: mā yubaddalu l-qawlu ladayya wamā anā biẓallāmin lilʿabīdi
ayahs.50:30: yawma naqūlu lijahannama hali imtalati wataqūlu hal min mazīdin
ayahs.50:32: hādhā mā tūʿadūna likulli awwābin ḥafīẓin
ayahs.50:33: man khashiya l-raḥmāna bil-ghaybi wajāʾa biqalbin munībin
ayahs.50:35: lahum mā yashāūna fīhā waladaynā mazīdun
ayahs.50:36: wakam ahlaknā qablahum min qarnin hum ashaddu minhum baṭshan fanaqqabū fī l-bilādi hal min maḥīṣin
ayahs.50:37: inna fī dhālika ladhikrā liman kāna lahu qalbun aw alqā l-samʿa wahuwa shahīdun
ayahs.50:38: walaqad khalaqnā l-samāwāti wal-arḍa wamā baynahumā fī sittati ayyāmin wamā massanā min lughūbin
ayahs.50:39: fa-iṣbir ʿalā mā yaqūlūna wasabbiḥ biḥamdi rabbika qabla ṭulūʿi l-shamsi waqabla l-ghurūbi
ayahs.50:41: wa-istamiʿ yawma yunādi l-munādi min makānin qarībin
ayahs.50:42: yawma yasmaʿūna l-ṣayḥata bil-ḥaqi dhālika yawmu l-khurūji
ayahs.50:43: innā naḥnu nuḥyī wanumītu wa-ilaynā l-maṣīru
ayahs.50:44: yawma tashaqqaqu l-arḍu ʿanhum sirāʿan dhālika ḥashrun ʿalaynā yasīrun
ayahs.50:45: naḥnu aʿlamu bimā yaqūlūna wamā anta ʿalayhim bijabbārin fadhakkir bil-qurāni man yakhāfu waʿīdi
ayahs.51:14: dhūqū fitnatakum hādhā alladhī kuntum bihi tastaʿjilūna
ayahs.51:16: ākhidhīna mā ātāhum rabbuhum innahum kānū qabla dhālika muḥsinīna
