ayahs.57:1: sabbaḥa lillāhi mā fī l-samāwāti wal-arḍi wahuwa l-ʿazīzu l-ḥakīmu
ayahs.57:2: lahu mulku l-samāwāti wal-arḍi yuḥyī wayumītu wahuwa ʿalā kulli shayin qadīrun
ayahs.57:3: huwa l-awalu wal-ākhiru wal-ẓāhiru wal-bāṭinu wahuwa bikulli shayin ʿalīmun
ayahs.57:4: huwa alladhī khalaqa l-samāwāti wal-arḍa fī sittati ayyāmin thumma istawā ʿalā l-ʿarshi yaʿlamu mā yaliju fī l-arḍi wamā yakhruju minhā wamā yanzilu mina l-samāi wamā yaʿruju fīhā wahuwa maʿakum ayna mā kuntum wallāhu bimā taʿmalūna baṣīrun
ayahs.57:5: lahu mulku l-samāwāti wal-arḍi wa-ilā Allāhi turjaʿu l-umūru
ayahs.57:6: yūliju al-layla fī l-nahāri wayūliju l-nahāra fī al-layli wahuwa ʿalīmun bidhāti l-ṣudūri
ayahs.57:7: āminū billāhi warasūlihi wa-anfiqū mimmā jaʿalakum mustakhlafīna fīhi fa-alladhīna āmanū minkum wa-anfaqū lahum ajrun kabīrun
ayahs.57:8: wamā lakum lā tuʾminūna billāhi wal-rasūlu yadʿūkum lituʾminū birabbikum waqad akhadha mīthāqakum in kuntum muʾminīna
ayahs.57:9: huwa alladhī yunazzilu ʿalā ʿabdihi āyātin bayyinātin liyukhrijakum mina l-ẓulumāti ilā l-nūri wa-inna Allāha bikum laraūfun raḥīmun
ayahs.57:10: wamā lakum allā tunfiqū fī sabīli Allāhi walillahi mīrāthu l-samāwāti wal-arḍi lā yastawī minkum man anfaqa min qabli l-fatḥi waqātala ulāika aʿẓamu darajatan mina alladhīna anfaqū min baʿdu waqātalū wakullan waʿada Allāhu l-ḥusnā wallāhu bimā taʿmalūna khabīrun
ayahs.57:11: man dhā alladhī yuqriḍu Allāha qarḍan ḥasanan fayuḍāʿifahu lahu walahu ajrun karīmun
ayahs.57:12: yawma tarā l-muʾminīna wal-muʾmināti yasʿā nūruhum bayna aydīhim wabi-aymānihim bushrākumu l-yawma jannātun tajrī min taḥtihā l-anhāru khālidīna fīhā dhālika huwa l-fawzu l-ʿaẓīmu
ayahs.57:13: yawma yaqūlu l-munāfiqūna wal-munāfiqātu lilladhīna āmanū unẓurūnā naqtabis min nūrikum qīla irjiʿū warāʾakum fal-tamisū nūran faḍuriba baynahum bisūrin lahu bābun bāṭinuhu fīhi l-raḥmatu waẓāhiruhu min qibalihi l-ʿadhābu
ayahs.57:14: yunādūnahum alam nakun maʿakum qālū balā walākinnakum fatantum anfusakum watarabbaṣtum wa-irtabtum wagharratkumu l-amāniyu ḥattā jāʾa amru Allāhi wagharrakum billāhi l-gharūru
ayahs.57:15: fal-yawma lā yuʾkhadhu minkum fidyatun walā mina alladhīna kafarū mawākumu l-nāru hiya mawlākum wabiʾsa l-maṣīru
ayahs.57:16: alam yani lilladhīna āmanū an takhshaʿa qulūbuhum lidhikri Allāhi wamā nazala mina l-ḥaqi walā yakūnū ka-alladhīna ūtū l-kitāba min qablu faṭāla ʿalayhimu l-amadu faqasat qulūbuhum wakathīrun minhum fāsiqūna
ayahs.57:17: iʿlamū anna Allāha yuḥyī l-arḍa baʿda mawtihā qad bayyannā lakumu l-āyāti laʿallakum taʿqilūna
ayahs.57:18: inna l-muṣadiqīna wal-muṣadiqāti wa-aqraḍū Allāha qarḍan ḥasanan yuḍāʿafu lahum walahum ajrun karīmun
ayahs.57:19: wa-alladhīna āmanū billāhi warusulihi ulāika humu l-ṣidīqūna wal-shuhadāu ʿinda rabbihim lahum ajruhum wanūruhum wa-alladhīna kafarū wakadhabū biāyātinā ulāika aṣḥābu l-jaḥīmi
ayahs.57:20: iʿlamū annamā l-ḥayatu l-dunyā laʿibun walahwun wazīnatun watafākhurun baynakum watakāthurun fī l-amwāli wal-awlādi kamathali ghaythin aʿjaba l-kufāra nabātuhu thumma yahīju fatarāhu muṣfarran thumma yakūnu ḥuṭāman wafī l-ākhirati ʿadhābun shadīdun wamaghfiratun mina Allāhi wariḍwānun wamā l-ḥayatu l-dunyā illā matāʿu l-ghurūri
ayahs.57:21: sābiqū ilā maghfiratin min rabbikum wajannatin ʿarḍuhā kaʿarḍi l-samāi wal-arḍi uʿiddat lilladhīna āmanū billāhi warusulihi dhālika faḍlu Allāhi yuʾtīhi man yashāu wallāhu dhū l-faḍli l-ʿaẓīmi
ayahs.57:22: mā aṣāba min muṣībatin fī l-arḍi walā fī anfusikum illā fī kitābin min qabli an nabra-ahā inna dhālika ʿalā Allāhi yasīrun
ayahs.57:23: likaylā tasaw ʿalā mā fātakum walā tafraḥū bimā ātākum wallāhu lā yuḥibbu kulla mukhtālin fakhūrin
ayahs.57:24: alladhīna yabkhalūna wayamurūna l-nāsa bil-bukhli waman yatawalla fa-inna Allāha huwa l-ghaniyu l-ḥamīdu
ayahs.57:25: laqad arsalnā rusulanā bil-bayināti wa-anzalnā maʿahumu l-kitāba wal-mīzāna liyaqūma l-nāsu bil-qisṭi wa-anzalnā l-ḥadīda fīhi basun shadīdun wamanāfiʿu lilnnāsi waliyaʿlama Allāhu man yanṣuruhu warusulahu bil-ghaybi inna Allāha qawiyyun ʿazīzun
ayahs.57:26: walaqad arsalnā nūḥan wa-ibrāhīma wajaʿalnā fī dhurriyyatihimā l-nubuwata wal-kitāba faminhum muhtadin wakathīrun minhum fāsiqūna
ayahs.57:27: thumma qaffaynā ʿalā āthārihim birusulinā waqaffaynā biʿīsā ibni maryama waʾātaynāhu l-injīla wajaʿalnā fī qulūbi alladhīna ittabaʿūhu rafatan waraḥmatan warahbāniyyatan ibtadaʿūhā mā katabnāhā ʿalayhim illā ibtighāʾa riḍwāni Allāhi famā raʿawhā ḥaqqa riʿāyatihā faʾātaynā alladhīna āmanū minhum ajrahum wakathīrun minhum fāsiqūna
ayahs.57:28: yāʾayyuhā alladhīna āmanū ittaqū Allāha waʾāminū birasūlihi yuʾtikum kiflayni min raḥmatihi wayajʿal lakum nūran tamshūna bihi wayaghfir lakum wallāhu ghafūrun raḥīmun
ayahs.57:29: li-allā yaʿlama ahlu l-kitābi allā yaqdirūna ʿalā shayin min faḍli Allāhi wa-anna l-faḍla biyadi Allāhi yuʾtīhi man yashāu wallāhu dhū l-faḍli l-ʿaẓīmi
ayahs.58:1: qad samiʿa Allāhu qawla allatī tujādiluka fī zawjihā watashtakī ilā Allāhi wallāhu yasmaʿu taḥāwurakumā inna Allāha samīʿun baṣīrun
ayahs.58:2: alladhīna yuẓāhirūna minkum min nisāihim mā hunna ummahātihim in ummahātuhum illā allāī waladnahum wa-innahum layaqūlūna munkaran mina l-qawli wazūran wa-inna Allāha laʿafuwwun ghafūrun
ayahs.58:3: wa-alladhīna yuẓāhirūna min nisāihim thumma yaʿūdūna limā qālū fataḥrīru raqabatin min qabli an yatamāssā dhālikum tūʿaẓūna bihi wallāhu bimā taʿmalūna khabīrun
ayahs.58:4: faman lam yajid faṣiyāmu shahrayni mutatābiʿayni min qabli an yatamāssā faman lam yastaṭiʿ fa-iṭʿāmu sittīna miskīnan dhālika lituʾminū billāhi warasūlihi watilka ḥudūdu Allāhi walilkāfirīna ʿadhābun alīmun
ayahs.58:5: inna alladhīna yuḥāddūna Allāha warasūlahu kubitū kamā kubita alladhīna min qablihim waqad anzalnā āyātin bayyinātin walilkāfirīna ʿadhābun muhīnun
ayahs.58:6: yawma yabʿathuhumu Allāhu jamīʿan fayunabbi-uhum bimā ʿamilū aḥṣāhu Allāhu wanasūhu wallāhu ʿalā kulli shayin shahīdun
ayahs.58:7: alam tara anna Allāha yaʿlamu mā fī l-samāwāti wamā fī l-arḍi mā yakūnu min najwā thalāthatin illā huwa rābiʿuhum walā khamsatin illā huwa sādisuhum walā adnā min dhālika walā akthara illā huwa maʿahum ayna mā kānū thumma yunabbi-uhum bimā ʿamilū yawma l-qiyāmati inna Allāha bikulli shayin ʿalīmun
ayahs.58:8: alam tara ilā alladhīna nuhū ʿani l-najwā thumma yaʿūdūna limā nuhū ʿanhu wayatanājawna bil-ithmi wal-ʿudwāni wamaʿṣiyati l-rasūli wa-idhā jāūka ḥayyawka bimā lam yuḥayyika bihi Allāhu wayaqūlūna fī anfusihim lawlā yuʿadhibunā Allāhu bimā naqūlu ḥasbuhum jahannamu yaṣlawnahā fabiʾsa l-maṣīru
ayahs.58:9: yāʾayyuhā alladhīna āmanū idhā tanājaytum falā tatanājaw bil-ithmi wal-ʿudwāni wamaʿṣiyati l-rasūli watanājaw bil-biri wal-taqwā wa-ittaqū Allāha alladhī ilayhi tuḥsharūna
ayahs.58:10: innamā l-najwā mina l-shayṭāni liyaḥzuna alladhīna āmanū walaysa biḍārrihim shayan illā bi-idhni Allāhi waʿalā Allāhi falyatawakkali l-muʾminūna
ayahs.58:11: yāʾayyuhā alladhīna āmanū idhā qīla lakum tafassaḥū fī l-majālisi fa-ifsaḥū yafsaḥi Allāhu lakum wa-idhā qīla unshuzū fa-unshuzū yarfaʿi Allāhu alladhīna āmanū minkum wa-alladhīna ūtū l-ʿilma darajātin wallāhu bimā taʿmalūna khabīrun
ayahs.58:12: yāʾayyuhā alladhīna āmanū idhā nājaytumu l-rasūla faqaddimū bayna yaday najwākum ṣadaqatan dhālika khayrun lakum wa-aṭharu fa-in lam tajidū fa-inna Allāha ghafūrun raḥīmun
ayahs.58:13: a-ashfaqtum an tuqaddimū bayna yaday najwākum ṣadaqātin fa-idh lam tafʿalū watāba Allāhu ʿalaykum fa-aqīmū l-ṣalata waʾātū l-zakata wa-aṭīʿū Allāha warasūlahu wallāhu khabīrun bimā taʿmalūna
ayahs.58:14: alam tara ilā alladhīna tawallaw qawman ghaḍiba Allāhu ʿalayhim mā hum minkum walā minhum wayaḥlifūna ʿalā l-kadhibi wahum yaʿlamūna
ayahs.58:15: aʿadda Allāhu lahum ʿadhāban shadīdan innahum sāʾa mā kānū yaʿmalūna
ayahs.58:16: ittakhadhū aymānahum junnatan faṣaddū ʿan sabīli Allāhi falahum ʿadhābun muhīnun
ayahs.58:17: lan tughniya ʿanhum amwāluhum walā awlāduhum mina Allāhi shayan ulāika aṣḥābu l-nāri hum fīhā khālidūna
ayahs.58:18: yawma yabʿathuhumu Allāhu jamīʿan fayaḥlifūna lahu kamā yaḥlifūna lakum wayaḥsabūna annahum ʿalā shayin alā innahum humu l-kādhibūna
ayahs.58:19: istaḥwadha ʿalayhimu l-shayṭānu fa-ansāhum dhikra Allāhi ulāika ḥizbu l-shayṭāni alā inna ḥizba l-shayṭāni humu l-khāsirūna
ayahs.58:20: inna alladhīna yuḥāddūna Allāha warasūlahu ulāika fī l-adhalīna
ayahs.58:21: kataba Allāhu la-aghlibanna anā warusulī inna Allāha qawiyyun ʿazīzun
ayahs.58:22: lā tajidu qawman yuʾminūna billāhi wal-yawmi l-ākhiri yuwāddūna man ḥādda Allāha warasūlahu walaw kānū ābāʾahum aw abnāʾahum aw ikhwānahum aw ʿashīratahum ulāika kataba fī qulūbihimu l-īmāna wa-ayyadahum birūḥin minhu wayudkhiluhum jannātin tajrī min taḥtihā l-anhāru khālidīna fīhā raḍiya Allāhu ʿanhum waraḍū ʿanhu ulāika ḥizbu Allāhi alā inna ḥizba Allāhi humu l-mufliḥūna
ayahs.59:1: sabbaḥa lillāhi mā fī l-samāwāti wamā fī l-arḍi wahuwa l-ʿazīzu l-ḥakīmu
ayahs.59:2: huwa alladhī akhraja alladhīna kafarū min ahli l-kitābi min diyārihim li-awwali l-ḥashri mā ẓanantum an yakhrujū waẓannū annahum māniʿatuhum ḥuṣūnuhum mina Allāhi fa-atāhumu Allāhu min ḥaythu lam yaḥtasibū waqadhafa fī qulūbihimu l-ruʿba yukhribūna buyūtahum bi-aydīhim wa-aydī l-muʾminīna fa-iʿtabirū yāulī l-abṣāri
ayahs.59:3: walawlā an kataba Allāhu ʿalayhimu l-jalāʾa laʿadhabahum fī l-dunyā walahum fī l-ākhirati ʿadhābu l-nāri
ayahs.59:4: dhālika bi-annahum shāqqū Allāha warasūlahu waman yushāqqi Allāha fa-inna Allāha shadīdu l-ʿiqābi
ayahs.59:5: mā qaṭaʿtum min līnatin aw taraktumūhā qāimatan ʿalā uṣūlihā fabi-idhni Allāhi waliyukhziya l-fāsiqīna
ayahs.59:6: wamā afāʾa Allāhu ʿalā rasūlihi minhum famā awjaftum ʿalayhi min khaylin walā rikābin walākinna Allāha yusalliṭu rusulahu ʿalā man yashāu wallāhu ʿalā kulli shayin qadīrun
ayahs.59:7: mā afāʾa Allāhu ʿalā rasūlihi min ahli l-qurā falillahi walilrrasūli walidhī l-qurbā wal-yatāmā wal-masākīni wa-ibni l-sabīli kay lā yakūna dūlatan bayna l-aghniyāi minkum wamā ātākumu l-rasūlu fakhudhūhu wamā nahākum ʿanhu fa-intahū wa-ittaqū Allāha inna Allāha shadīdu l-ʿiqābi
ayahs.59:8: lilfuqarāi l-muhājirīna alladhīna ukhrijū min diyārihim wa-amwālihim yabtaghūna faḍlan mina Allāhi wariḍwānan wayanṣurūna Allāha warasūlahu ulāika humu l-ṣādiqūna
ayahs.59:9: wa-alladhīna tabawwaū l-dāra wal-īmāna min qablihim yuḥibbūna man hājara ilayhim walā yajidūna fī ṣudūrihim ḥājatan mimmā ūtū wayuʾthirūna ʿalā anfusihim walaw kāna bihim khaṣāṣatun waman yūqa shuḥḥa nafsihi fa-ulāika humu l-mufliḥūna
ayahs.59:10: wa-alladhīna jāū min baʿdihim yaqūlūna rabbanā ighfir lanā wali-ikhwāninā alladhīna sabaqūnā bil-īmāni walā tajʿal fī qulūbinā ghillan lilladhīna āmanū rabbanā innaka raūfun raḥīmun
ayahs.59:11: alam tara ilā alladhīna nāfaqū yaqūlūna li-ikhwānihimu alladhīna kafarū min ahli l-kitābi la-in ukhrijtum lanakhrujanna maʿakum walā nuṭīʿu fīkum aḥadan abadan wa-in qūtiltum lananṣurannakum wallāhu yashhadu innahum lakādhibūna
ayahs.59:12: la-in ukhrijū lā yakhrujūna maʿahum wala-in qūtilū lā yanṣurūnahum wala-in naṣarūhum layuwallunna l-adbāra thumma lā yunṣarūna
ayahs.59:13: la-antum ashaddu rahbatan fī ṣudūrihim mina Allāhi dhālika bi-annahum qawmun lā yafqahūna
ayahs.59:14: lā yuqātilūnakum jamīʿan illā fī quran muḥaṣṣanatin aw min warāi judurin basuhum baynahum shadīdun taḥsabuhum jamīʿan waqulūbuhum shattā dhālika bi-annahum qawmun lā yaʿqilūna
ayahs.59:15: kamathali alladhīna min qablihim qarīban dhāqū wabāla amrihim walahum ʿadhābun alīmun
ayahs.59:16: kamathali l-shayṭāni idh qāla lilinsāni ukfur falammā kafara qāla innī barīon minka innī akhāfu Allāha rabba l-ʿālamīna
ayahs.59:17: fakāna ʿāqibatahumā annahumā fī l-nāri khālidayni fīhā wadhālika jazāu l-ẓālimīna
ayahs.59:18: yāʾayyuhā alladhīna āmanū ittaqū Allāha waltanẓur nafsun mā qaddamat lighadin wa-ittaqū Allāha inna Allāha khabīrun bimā taʿmalūna
ayahs.59:19: walā takūnū ka-alladhīna nasū Allāha fa-ansāhum anfusahum ulāika humu l-fāsiqūna
ayahs.59:20: lā yastawī aṣḥābu l-nāri wa-aṣḥābu l-janati aṣḥābu l-janati humu l-fāizūna
ayahs.59:21: law anzalnā hādhā l-qurāna ʿalā jabalin lara-aytahu khāshiʿan mutaṣaddiʿan min khashyati Allāhi watilka l-amthālu naḍribuhā lilnnāsi laʿallahum yatafakkarūna
ayahs.59:22: huwa Allāhu alladhī lā ilāha illā huwa ʿālimu l-ghaybi wal-shahādati huwa l-raḥmānu l-raḥīmu
ayahs.59:23: huwa Allāhu alladhī lā ilāha illā huwa l-maliku l-qudūsu l-salāmu l-muʾminu l-muhayminu l-ʿazīzu l-jabāru l-mutakabiru subḥāna Allāhi ʿammā yushrikūna
ayahs.59:24: huwa Allāhu l-khāliqu l-bāri-u l-muṣawiru lahu l-asmāu l-ḥusnā yusabbiḥu lahu mā fī l-samāwāti wal-arḍi wahuwa l-ʿazīzu l-ḥakīmu
ayahs.60:1: yāʾayyuhā alladhīna āmanū lā tattakhidhū ʿaduwwī waʿaduwwakum awliyāʾa tulqūna ilayhim bil-mawadati waqad kafarū bimā jāʾakum mina l-ḥaqi yukhrijūna l-rasūla wa-iyyākum an tuʾminū billāhi rabbikum in kuntum kharajtum jihādan fī sabīlī wa-ibtighāʾa marḍātī tusirrūna ilayhim bil-mawadati wa-anā aʿlamu bimā akhfaytum wamā aʿlantum waman yafʿalhu minkum faqad ḍalla sawāʾa l-sabīli
ayahs.60:2: in yathqafūkum yakūnū lakum aʿdāʾan wayabsuṭū ilaykum aydiyahum wa-alsinatahum bil-sūi wawaddū law takfurūna
ayahs.60:3: lan tanfaʿakum arḥāmukum walā awlādukum yawma l-qiyāmati yafṣilu baynakum wallāhu bimā taʿmalūna baṣīrun
ayahs.60:4: qad kānat lakum uswatun ḥasanatun fī ibrāhīma wa-alladhīna maʿahu idh qālū liqawmihim innā buraʾāu minkum wamimmā taʿbudūna min dūni Allāhi kafarnā bikum wabadā baynanā wabaynakumu l-ʿadāwatu wal-baghḍāu abadan ḥattā tuʾminū billāhi waḥdahu illā qawla ibrāhīma li-abīhi la-astaghfiranna laka wamā amliku laka mina Allāhi min shayin rabbanā ʿalayka tawakkalnā wa-ilayka anabnā wa-ilayka l-maṣīru
ayahs.60:5: rabbanā lā tajʿalnā fitnatan lilladhīna kafarū wa-ighfir lanā rabbanā innaka anta l-ʿazīzu l-ḥakīmu
ayahs.60:6: laqad kāna lakum fīhim uswatun ḥasanatun liman kāna yarjū Allāha wal-yawma l-ākhira waman yatawalla fa-inna Allāha huwa l-ghaniyu l-ḥamīdu
ayahs.60:7: ʿasā Allāhu an yajʿala baynakum wabayna alladhīna ʿādaytum minhum mawaddatan wallāhu qadīrun wallāhu ghafūrun raḥīmun
ayahs.60:8: lā yanhākumu Allāhu ʿani alladhīna lam yuqātilūkum fī l-dīni walam yukhrijūkum min diyārikum an tabarrūhum watuqsiṭū ilayhim inna Allāha yuḥibbu l-muqsiṭīna
ayahs.60:9: innamā yanhākumu Allāhu ʿani alladhīna qātalūkum fī l-dīni wa-akhrajūkum min diyārikum waẓāharū ʿalā ikhrājikum an tawallawhum waman yatawallahum fa-ulāika humu l-ẓālimūna
ayahs.60:10: yāʾayyuhā alladhīna āmanū idhā jāʾakumu l-muʾminātu muhājirātin fa-imtaḥinūhunna Allāhu aʿlamu biʾīmānihinna fa-in ʿalimtumūhunna muʾminātin falā tarjiʿūhunna ilā l-kufāri lā hunna ḥillun lahum walā hum yaḥillūna lahunna waʾātūhum mā anfaqū walā junāḥa ʿalaykum an tankiḥūhunna idhā ātaytumūhunna ujūrahunna walā tumsikū biʿiṣami l-kawāfiri wasalū mā anfaqtum walyasalū mā anfaqū dhālikum ḥukmu Allāhi yaḥkumu baynakum wallāhu ʿalīmun ḥakīmun
ayahs.60:11: wa-in fātakum shayon min azwājikum ilā l-kufāri faʿāqabtum faʾātū alladhīna dhahabat azwājuhum mithla mā anfaqū wa-ittaqū Allāha alladhī antum bihi muʾminūna
ayahs.60:12: yāʾayyuhā l-nabiyu idhā jāʾaka l-muʾminātu yubāyiʿnaka ʿalā an lā yushrikna billāhi shayan walā yasriqna walā yaznīna walā yaqtulna awlādahunna walā yatīna bibuhtānin yaftarīnahu bayna aydīhinna wa-arjulihinna walā yaʿṣīnaka fī maʿrūfin fabāyiʿhunna wa-istaghfir lahunna Allāha inna Allāha ghafūrun raḥīmun
ayahs.60:13: yāʾayyuhā alladhīna āmanū lā tatawallaw qawman ghaḍiba Allāhu ʿalayhim qad ya-isū mina l-ākhirati kamā ya-isa l-kufāru min aṣḥābi l-qubūri
ayahs.61:1: sabbaḥa lillāhi mā fī l-samāwāti wamā fī l-arḍi wahuwa l-ʿazīzu l-ḥakīmu
ayahs.61:2: yāʾayyuhā alladhīna āmanū lima taqūlūna mā lā tafʿalūna
ayahs.61:3: kabura maqtan ʿinda Allāhi an taqūlū mā lā tafʿalūna
ayahs.61:4: inna Allāha yuḥibbu alladhīna yuqātilūna fī sabīlihi ṣaffan ka-annahum bunyānun marṣūṣun
ayahs.61:5: wa-idh qāla mūsā liqawmihi yāqawmi lima tuʾdhūnanī waqad taʿlamūna annī rasūlu Allāhi ilaykum falammā zāghū azāgha Allāhu qulūbahum wallāhu lā yahdī l-qawma l-fāsiqīna
ayahs.61:6: wa-idh qāla ʿīsā ubnu maryama yābanī isrāīla innī rasūlu Allāhi ilaykum muṣaddiqan limā bayna yadayya mina l-tawrāti wamubashiran birasūlin yatī min baʿdī usmuhu aḥmadu falammā jāʾahum bil-bayināti qālū hādhā siḥrun mubīnun
ayahs.61:7: waman aẓlamu mimmani iftarā ʿalā Allāhi l-kadhiba wahuwa yudʿā ilā l-islāmi wallāhu lā yahdī l-qawma l-ẓālimīna
ayahs.61:8: yurīdūna liyuṭfiū nūra Allāhi bi-afwāhihim wallāhu mutimmu nūrihi walaw kariha l-kāfirūna
ayahs.61:9: huwa alladhī arsala rasūlahu bil-hudā wadīni l-ḥaqi liyuẓhirahu ʿalā l-dīni kullihi walaw kariha l-mushrikūna
ayahs.61:10: yāʾayyuhā alladhīna āmanū hal adullukum ʿalā tijāratin tunjīkum min ʿadhābin alīmin
ayahs.61:11: tuʾminūna billāhi warasūlihi watujāhidūna fī sabīli Allāhi bi-amwālikum wa-anfusikum dhālikum khayrun lakum in kuntum taʿlamūna
ayahs.61:12: yaghfir lakum dhunūbakum wayudkhilkum jannātin tajrī min taḥtihā l-anhāru wamasākina ṭayyibatan fī jannāti ʿadnin dhālika l-fawzu l-ʿaẓīmu
ayahs.61:13: wa-ukhrā tuḥibbūnahā naṣrun mina Allāhi wafatḥun qarībun wabashiri l-muʾminīna
ayahs.61:14: yāʾayyuhā alladhīna āmanū kūnū anṣāra Allāhi kamā qāla ʿīsā ubnu maryama lilḥawāriyyīna man anṣārī ilā Allāhi qāla l-ḥawāriyūna naḥnu anṣāru Allāhi faʾāmanat ṭāifatun min banī isrāīla wakafarat ṭāifatun fa-ayyadnā alladhīna āmanū ʿalā ʿaduwwihim fa-aṣbaḥū ẓāhirīna
ayahs.62:1: yusabbiḥu lillāhi mā fī l-samāwāti wamā fī l-arḍi l-maliki l-qudūsi l-ʿazīzi l-ḥakīmi
ayahs.62:2: huwa alladhī baʿatha fī l-umiyīna rasūlan minhum yatlū ʿalayhim āyātihi wayuzakkīhim wayuʿallimuhumu l-kitāba wal-ḥikmata wa-in kānū min qablu lafī ḍalālin mubīnin
ayahs.62:3: waʾākharīna minhum lammā yalḥaqū bihim wahuwa l-ʿazīzu l-ḥakīmu
ayahs.62:4: dhālika faḍlu Allāhi yuʾtīhi man yashāu wallāhu dhū l-faḍli l-ʿaẓīmi
ayahs.62:5: mathalu alladhīna ḥummilū l-tawrāta thumma lam yaḥmilūhā kamathali l-ḥimāri yaḥmilu asfāran biʾsa mathalu l-qawmi alladhīna kadhabū biāyāti Allāhi wallāhu lā yahdī l-qawma l-ẓālimīna
ayahs.62:6: qul yāʾayyuhā alladhīna hādū in zaʿamtum annakum awliyāu lillāhi min dūni l-nāsi fatamannawū l-mawta in kuntum ṣādiqīna
ayahs.62:7: walā yatamannawnahu abadan bimā qaddamat aydīhim wallāhu ʿalīmun bil-ẓālimīna
ayahs.62:8: qul inna l-mawta alladhī tafirrūna minhu fa-innahu mulāqīkum thumma turaddūna ilā ʿālimi l-ghaybi wal-shahādati fayunabbi-ukum bimā kuntum taʿmalūna
ayahs.62:9: yāʾayyuhā alladhīna āmanū idhā nūdiya lilṣṣalati min yawmi l-jumuʿati fa-isʿaw ilā dhikri Allāhi wadharū l-bayʿa dhālikum khayrun lakum in kuntum taʿlamūna
ayahs.62:10: fa-idhā quḍiyati l-ṣalatu fa-intashirū fī l-arḍi wa-ibtaghū min faḍli Allāhi wa-udhkurū Allāha kathīran laʿallakum tufliḥūna
ayahs.62:11: wa-idhā ra-aw tijāratan aw lahwan infaḍḍū ilayhā watarakūka qāiman qul mā ʿinda Allāhi khayrun mina l-lahwi wamina l-tijārati wallāhu khayru l-rāziqīna
ayahs.63:1: idhā jāʾaka l-munāfiqūna qālū nashhadu innaka larasūlu Allāhi wallāhu yaʿlamu innaka larasūluhu wallāhu yashhadu inna l-munāfiqīna lakādhibūna
ayahs.63:2: ittakhadhū aymānahum junnatan faṣaddū ʿan sabīli Allāhi innahum sāʾa mā kānū yaʿmalūna
ayahs.63:3: dhālika bi-annahum āmanū thumma kafarū faṭubiʿa ʿalā qulūbihim fahum lā yafqahūna
ayahs.63:4: wa-idhā ra-aytahum tuʿjibuka ajsāmuhum wa-in yaqūlū tasmaʿ liqawlihim ka-annahum khushubun musannadatun yaḥsabūna kulla ṣayḥatin ʿalayhim humu l-ʿaduwu fa-iḥdharhum qātalahumu Allāhu annā yuʾfakūna
ayahs.63:5: wa-idhā qīla lahum taʿālaw yastaghfir lakum rasūlu Allāhi lawwaw ruʾūsahum wara-aytahum yaṣuddūna wahum mustakbirūna
ayahs.63:6: sawāon ʿalayhim astaghfarta lahum am lam tastaghfir lahum lan yaghfira Allāhu lahum inna Allāha lā yahdī l-qawma l-fāsiqīna
ayahs.63:7: humu alladhīna yaqūlūna lā tunfiqū ʿalā man ʿinda rasūli Allāhi ḥattā yanfaḍḍū walillahi khazāinu l-samāwāti wal-arḍi walākinna l-munāfiqīna lā yafqahūna
ayahs.63:8: yaqūlūna la-in rajaʿnā ilā l-madīnati layukhrijanna l-aʿazu minhā l-adhala walillahi l-ʿizatu walirasūlihi walilmuʾminīna walākinna l-munāfiqīna lā yaʿlamūna
ayahs.63:9: yāʾayyuhā alladhīna āmanū lā tulhikum amwālukum walā awlādukum ʿan dhikri Allāhi waman yafʿal dhālika fa-ulāika humu l-khāsirūna
ayahs.63:10: wa-anfiqū min mā razaqnākum min qabli an yatiya aḥadakumu l-mawtu fayaqūla rabbi lawlā akhartanī ilā ajalin qarībin fa-aṣṣaddaqa wa-akun mina l-ṣāliḥīna
ayahs.63:11: walan yu-akhira Allāhu nafsan idhā jāʾa ajaluhā wallāhu khabīrun bimā taʿmalūna
ayahs.64:1: yusabbiḥu lillāhi mā fī l-samāwāti wamā fī l-arḍi lahu l-mulku walahu l-ḥamdu wahuwa ʿalā kulli shayin qadīrun
ayahs.64:2: huwa alladhī khalaqakum faminkum kāfirun waminkum muʾminun wallāhu bimā taʿmalūna baṣīrun
ayahs.64:3: khalaqa l-samāwāti wal-arḍa bil-ḥaqi waṣawwarakum fa-aḥsana ṣuwarakum wa-ilayhi l-maṣīru
ayahs.64:4: yaʿlamu mā fī l-samāwāti wal-arḍi wayaʿlamu mā tusirrūna wamā tuʿlinūna wallāhu ʿalīmun bidhāti l-ṣudūri
ayahs.64:5: alam yatikum naba-u alladhīna kafarū min qablu fadhāqū wabāla amrihim walahum ʿadhābun alīmun
ayahs.64:6: dhālika bi-annahu kānat tatīhim rusuluhum bil-bayināti faqālū abasharun yahdūnanā fakafarū watawallaw wa-istaghnā Allāhu wallāhu ghaniyyun ḥamīdun
ayahs.64:7: zaʿama alladhīna kafarū an lan yubʿathū qul balā warabbī latubʿathunna thumma latunabba-unna bimā ʿamiltum wadhālika ʿalā Allāhi yasīrun
ayahs.64:8: faʾāminū billāhi warasūlihi wal-nūri alladhī anzalnā wallāhu bimā taʿmalūna khabīrun
ayahs.64:9: yawma yajmaʿukum liyawmi l-jamʿi dhālika yawmu l-taghābuni waman yuʾmin billāhi wayaʿmal ṣāliḥan yukaffir ʿanhu sayyiātihi wayudkhilhu jannātin tajrī min taḥtihā l-anhāru khālidīna fīhā abadan dhālika l-fawzu l-ʿaẓīmu
ayahs.64:10: wa-alladhīna kafarū wakadhabū biāyātinā ulāika aṣḥābu l-nāri khālidīna fīhā wabiʾsa l-maṣīru
ayahs.64:11: mā aṣāba min muṣībatin illā bi-idhni Allāhi waman yuʾmin billāhi yahdi qalbahu wallāhu bikulli shayin ʿalīmun
ayahs.64:12: wa-aṭīʿū Allāha wa-aṭīʿū l-rasūla fa-in tawallaytum fa-innamā ʿalā rasūlinā l-balāghu l-mubīnu
ayahs.64:13: Allāhu lā ilāha illā huwa waʿalā Allāhi falyatawakkali l-muʾminūna
ayahs.64:14: yāʾayyuhā alladhīna āmanū inna min azwājikum wa-awlādikum ʿaduwwan lakum fa-iḥdharūhum wa-in taʿfū wataṣfaḥū wataghfirū fa-inna Allāha ghafūrun raḥīmun
ayahs.64:15: innamā amwālukum wa-awlādukum fitnatun wallāhu ʿindahu ajrun ʿaẓīmun
ayahs.64:16: fa-ittaqū Allāha mā istaṭaʿtum wa-ismaʿū wa-aṭīʿū wa-anfiqū khayran li-anfusikum waman yūqa shuḥḥa nafsihi fa-ulāika humu l-mufliḥūna
ayahs.64:17: in tuqriḍū Allāha qarḍan ḥasanan yuḍāʿifhu lakum wayaghfir lakum wallāhu shakūrun ḥalīmun
ayahs.65:1: yāʾayyuhā l-nabiyu idhā ṭallaqtumu l-nisāʾa faṭalliqūhunna liʿiddatihinna wa-aḥṣū l-ʿidata wa-ittaqū Allāha rabbakum lā tukhrijūhunna min buyūtihinna walā yakhrujna illā an yatīna bifāḥishatin mubayyinatin watilka ḥudūdu Allāhi waman yataʿadda ḥudūda Allāhi faqad ẓalama nafsahu lā tadrī laʿalla Allāha yuḥdithu baʿda dhālika amran
ayahs.65:2: fa-idhā balaghna ajalahunna fa-amsikūhunna bimaʿrūfin aw fāriqūhunna bimaʿrūfin wa-ashhidū dhaway ʿadlin minkum wa-aqīmū l-shahādata lillāhi dhālikum yūʿaẓu bihi man kāna yuʾminu billāhi wal-yawmi l-ākhiri waman yattaqi Allāha yajʿal lahu makhrajan
ayahs.65:3: wayarzuqhu min ḥaythu lā yaḥtasibu waman yatawakkal ʿalā Allāhi fahuwa ḥasbuhu inna Allāha bālighu amrihi qad jaʿala Allāhu likulli shayin qadran
ayahs.65:4: wa-allāī ya-isna mina l-maḥīḍi min nisāikum ini irtabtum faʿiddatuhunna thalāthatu ashhurin wa-allāī lam yaḥiḍna wa-ulātu l-aḥmāli ajaluhunna an yaḍaʿna ḥamlahunna waman yattaqi Allāha yajʿal lahu min amrihi yusran
ayahs.65:5: dhālika amru Allāhi anzalahu ilaykum waman yattaqi Allāha yukaffir ʿanhu sayyiātihi wayuʿẓim lahu ajran
ayahs.65:6: askinūhunna min ḥaythu sakantum min wujdikum walā tuḍārrūhunna lituḍayyiqū ʿalayhinna wa-in kunna ulāti ḥamlin fa-anfiqū ʿalayhinna ḥattā yaḍaʿna ḥamlahunna fa-in arḍaʿna lakum faʾātūhunna ujūrahunna watamirū baynakum bimaʿrūfin wa-in taʿāsartum fasaturḍiʿu lahu ukhrā
ayahs.65:7: liyunfiq dhū saʿatin min saʿatihi waman qudira ʿalayhi rizquhu falyunfiq mimmā ātāhu Allāhu lā yukallifu Allāhu nafsan illā mā ātāhā sayajʿalu Allāhu baʿda ʿusrin yusran
ayahs.65:8: waka-ayyin min qaryatin ʿatat ʿan amri rabbihā warusulihi faḥāsabnāhā ḥisāban shadīdan waʿadhabnāhā ʿadhāban nukran
ayahs.65:9: fadhāqat wabāla amrihā wakāna ʿāqibatu amrihā khusran
ayahs.65:10: aʿadda Allāhu lahum ʿadhāban shadīdan fa-ittaqū Allāha yāulī l-albābi alladhīna āmanū qad anzala Allāhu ilaykum dhikran
ayahs.65:11: rasūlan yatlū ʿalaykum āyāti Allāhi mubayyinātin liyukhrija alladhīna āmanū waʿamilū l-ṣāliḥāti mina l-ẓulumāti ilā l-nūri waman yuʾmin billāhi wayaʿmal ṣāliḥan yudkhilhu jannātin tajrī min taḥtihā l-anhāru khālidīna fīhā abadan qad aḥsana Allāhu lahu rizqan
ayahs.65:12: Allāhu alladhī khalaqa sabʿa samāwātin wamina l-arḍi mithlahunna yatanazzalu l-amru baynahunna litaʿlamū anna Allāha ʿalā kulli shayin qadīrun wa-anna Allāha qad aḥāṭa bikulli shayin ʿilman
ayahs.66:1: yāʾayyuhā l-nabiyu lima tuḥarrimu mā aḥalla Allāhu laka tabtaghī marḍāta azwājika wallāhu ghafūrun raḥīmun
ayahs.66:2: qad faraḍa Allāhu lakum taḥillata aymānikum wallāhu mawlākum wahuwa l-ʿalīmu l-ḥakīmu
ayahs.66:3: wa-idh asarra l-nabiyu ilā baʿḍi azwājihi ḥadīthan falammā nabba-at bihi wa-aẓharahu Allāhu ʿalayhi ʿarrafa baʿḍahu wa-aʿraḍa ʿan baʿḍin falammā nabba-ahā bihi qālat man anba-aka hādhā qāla nabba-aniya l-ʿalīmu l-khabīru
ayahs.66:4: in tatūbā ilā Allāhi faqad ṣaghat qulūbukumā wa-in taẓāharā ʿalayhi fa-inna Allāha huwa mawlāhu wajibrīlu waṣāliḥu l-muʾminīna wal-malāikatu baʿda dhālika ẓahīrun
ayahs.66:5: ʿasā rabbuhu in ṭallaqakunna an yubdilahu azwājan khayran minkunna muslimātin muʾminātin qānitātin tāibātin ʿābidātin sāiḥātin thayyibātin wa-abkāran
ayahs.66:6: yāʾayyuhā alladhīna āmanū qū anfusakum wa-ahlīkum nāran waqūduhā l-nāsu wal-ḥijāratu ʿalayhā malāikatun ghilāẓun shidādun lā yaʿṣūna Allāha mā amarahum wayafʿalūna mā yuʾmarūna
ayahs.66:7: yāʾayyuhā alladhīna kafarū lā taʿtadhirū l-yawma innamā tujzawna mā kuntum taʿmalūna
ayahs.66:8: yāʾayyuhā alladhīna āmanū tūbū ilā Allāhi tawbatan naṣūḥan ʿasā rabbukum an yukaffira ʿankum sayyiātikum wayudkhilakum jannātin tajrī min taḥtihā l-anhāru yawma lā yukhzī Allāhu l-nabiya wa-alladhīna āmanū maʿahu nūruhum yasʿā bayna aydīhim wabi-aymānihim yaqūlūna rabbanā atmim lanā nūranā wa-ighfir lanā innaka ʿalā kulli shayin qadīrun
ayahs.66:9: yāʾayyuhā l-nabiyu jāhidi l-kufāra wal-munāfiqīna wa-ughluẓ ʿalayhim wamawāhum jahannamu wabiʾsa l-maṣīru
ayahs.66:10: ḍaraba Allāhu mathalan lilladhīna kafarū imra-ata nūḥin wa-imra-ata lūṭin kānatā taḥta ʿabdayni min ʿibādinā ṣāliḥayni fakhānatāhumā falam yughniyā ʿanhumā mina Allāhi shayan waqīla udkhulā l-nāra maʿa l-dākhilīna
ayahs.66:11: waḍaraba Allāhu mathalan lilladhīna āmanū imra-ata firʿawna idh qālat rabbi ibni lī ʿindaka baytan fī l-janati wanajjinī min firʿawna waʿamalihi wanajjinī mina l-qawmi l-ẓālimīna
ayahs.66:12: wamaryama ibnata ʿimrāna allatī aḥṣanat farjahā fanafakhnā fīhi min rūḥinā waṣaddaqat bikalimāti rabbihā wakutubihi wakānat mina l-qānitīna
ayahs.67:1: tabāraka alladhī biyadihi l-mulku wahuwa ʿalā kulli shayin qadīrun
ayahs.67:2: alladhī khalaqa l-mawta wal-ḥayata liyabluwakum ayyukum aḥsanu ʿamalan wahuwa l-ʿazīzu l-ghafūru
ayahs.67:3: alladhī khalaqa sabʿa samāwātin ṭibāqan mā tarā fī khalqi l-raḥmāni min tafāwutin fa-irjiʿi l-baṣara hal tarā min fuṭūrin
ayahs.67:4: thumma irjiʿi l-baṣara karratayni yanqalib ilayka l-baṣaru khāsi-an wahuwa ḥasīrun
ayahs.67:5: walaqad zayyannā l-samāʾa l-dunyā bimaṣābīḥa wajaʿalnāhā rujūman lilshayāṭīni wa-aʿtadnā lahum ʿadhāba l-saʿīri
ayahs.67:6: walilladhīna kafarū birabbihim ʿadhābu jahannama wabiʾsa l-maṣīru
ayahs.67:7: idhā ulqū fīhā samiʿū lahā shahīqan wahiya tafūru
ayahs.67:8: takādu tamayyazu mina l-ghayẓi kullamā ulqiya fīhā fawjun sa-alahum khazanatuhā alam yatikum nadhīrun
ayahs.67:9: qālū balā qad jāʾanā nadhīrun fakadhabnā waqulnā mā nazzala Allāhu min shayin in antum illā fī ḍalālin kabīrin
ayahs.67:10: waqālū law kunnā nasmaʿu aw naʿqilu mā kunnā fī aṣḥābi l-saʿīri
ayahs.67:12: inna alladhīna yakhshawna rabbahum bil-ghaybi lahum maghfiratun wa-ajrun kabīrun
ayahs.67:13: wa-asirrū qawlakum awi ijharū bihi innahu ʿalīmun bidhāti l-ṣudūri
ayahs.67:14: alā yaʿlamu man khalaqa wahuwa l-laṭīfu l-khabīru
ayahs.67:15: huwa alladhī jaʿala lakumu l-arḍa dhalūlan fa-imshū fī manākibihā wakulū min rizqihi wa-ilayhi l-nushūru
ayahs.67:16: a-amintum man fī l-samāi an yakhsifa bikumu l-arḍa fa-idhā hiya tamūru
ayahs.67:17: am amintum man fī l-samāi an yursila ʿalaykum ḥāṣiban fasataʿlamūna kayfa nadhīri
ayahs.67:18: walaqad kadhaba alladhīna min qablihim fakayfa kāna nakīri
ayahs.67:19: awalam yaraw ilā l-ṭayri fawqahum ṣāffātin wayaqbiḍna mā yumsikuhunna illā l-raḥmānu innahu bikulli shayin baṣīrun
ayahs.67:20: amman hādhā alladhī huwa jundun lakum yanṣurukum min dūni l-raḥmāni ini l-kāfirūna illā fī ghurūrin
ayahs.67:21: amman hādhā alladhī yarzuqukum in amsaka rizqahu bal lajjū fī ʿutuwwin wanufūrin
ayahs.67:22: afaman yamshī mukibban ʿalā wajhihi ahdā amman yamshī sawiyyan ʿalā ṣirāṭin mustaqīmin
ayahs.67:23: qul huwa alladhī ansha-akum wajaʿala lakumu l-samʿa wal-abṣāra wal-afidata qalīlan mā tashkurūna
ayahs.67:24: qul huwa alladhī dhara-akum fī l-arḍi wa-ilayhi tuḥsharūna
ayahs.67:25: wayaqūlūna matā hādhā l-waʿdu in kuntum ṣādiqīna
ayahs.67:26: qul innamā l-ʿilmu ʿinda Allāhi wa-innamā anā nadhīrun mubīnun
ayahs.67:27: falammā ra-awhu zulfatan sīat wujūhu alladhīna kafarū waqīla hādhā alladhī kuntum bihi taddaʿūna
ayahs.67:28: qul ara-aytum in ahlakaniya Allāhu waman maʿiya aw raḥimanā faman yujīru l-kāfirīna min ʿadhābin alīmin
ayahs.67:29: qul huwa l-raḥmānu āmannā bihi waʿalayhi tawakkalnā fasataʿlamūna man huwa fī ḍalālin mubīnin
ayahs.67:30: qul ara-aytum in aṣbaḥa māukum ghawran faman yatīkum bimāin maʿīnin
ayahs.68:7: inna rabbaka huwa aʿlamu biman ḍalla ʿan sabīlihi wahuwa aʿlamu bil-muhtadīna
ayahs.68:15: idhā tutlā ʿalayhi āyātunā qāla asāṭīru l-awalīna
ayahs.68:17: innā balawnāhum kamā balawnā aṣḥāba l-janati idh aqsamū layaṣrimunnahā muṣbiḥīna
ayahs.68:19: faṭāfa ʿalayhā ṭāifun min rabbika wahum nāimūna
ayahs.68:22: ani ighdū ʿalā ḥarthikum in kuntum ṣārimīna
ayahs.68:24: an lā yadkhulannahā l-yawma ʿalaykum miskīnun
ayahs.68:28: qāla awsaṭuhum alam aqul lakum lawlā tusabbiḥūna
ayahs.68:29: qālū subḥāna rabbinā innā kunnā ẓālimīna
ayahs.68:32: ʿasā rabbunā an yubdilanā khayran minhā innā ilā rabbinā rāghibūna
ayahs.68:33: kadhālika l-ʿadhābu walaʿadhābu l-ākhirati akbaru law kānū yaʿlamūna
ayahs.68:34: inna lilmuttaqīna ʿinda rabbihim jannāti l-naʿīmi
ayahs.68:39: am lakum aymānun ʿalaynā bālighatun ilā yawmi l-qiyāmati inna lakum lamā taḥkumūna
ayahs.68:41: am lahum shurakāu falyatū bishurakāihim in kānū ṣādiqīna
ayahs.68:42: yawma yukshafu ʿan sāqin wayudʿawna ilā l-sujūdi falā yastaṭīʿūna
ayahs.68:43: khāshiʿatan abṣāruhum tarhaquhum dhillatun waqad kānū yudʿawna ilā l-sujūdi wahum sālimūna
ayahs.68:44: fadharnī waman yukadhibu bihādhā l-ḥadīthi sanastadrijuhum min ḥaythu lā yaʿlamūna
ayahs.68:46: am tasaluhum ajran fahum min maghramin muthqalūna
ayahs.68:48: fa-iṣbir liḥukmi rabbika walā takun kaṣāḥibi l-ḥūti idh nādā wahuwa makẓūmun
ayahs.68:49: lawlā an tadārakahu niʿmatun min rabbihi lanubidha bil-ʿarāi wahuwa madhmūmun
ayahs.68:51: wa-in yakādu alladhīna kafarū layuzliqūnaka bi-abṣārihim lammā samiʿū l-dhikra wayaqūlūna innahu lamajnūnun
ayahs.69:6: wa-ammā ʿādun fa-uhlikū birīḥin ṣarṣarin ʿātiyatin
ayahs.69:7: sakharahā ʿalayhim sabʿa layālin wathamāniyata ayyāmin ḥusūman fatarā l-qawma fīhā ṣarʿā ka-annahum aʿjāzu nakhlin khāwiyatin
ayahs.69:9: wajāʾa firʿawnu waman qablahu wal-muʾtafikātu bil-khāṭi-ati
ayahs.69:10: faʿaṣaw rasūla rabbihim fa-akhadhahum akhdhatan rābiyatan
ayahs.69:11: innā lammā ṭaghā l-māu ḥamalnākum fī l-jāriyati
ayahs.69:12: linajʿalahā lakum tadhkiratan wataʿiyahā udhunun wāʿiyatun
ayahs.69:13: fa-idhā nufikha fī l-ṣūri nafkhatun wāḥidatun
ayahs.69:14: waḥumilati l-arḍu wal-jibālu fadukkatā dakkatan wāḥidatan
ayahs.69:17: wal-malaku ʿalā arjāihā wayaḥmilu ʿarsha rabbika fawqahum yawma-idhin thamāniyatun

ayahs.69:25: wa-ammā man ūtiya kitābahu bishimālihi fayaqūlu yālaytanī lam ūta kitābiyah

ayahs.70:4: taʿruju l-malāikatu wal-rūḥu ilayhi fī yawmin kāna miqdāruhu khamsīna alfa sanatin
ayahs.70:11: yubaṣṣarūnahum yawaddu l-mujrimu law yaftadī min ʿadhābi yawmi-idhin bibanīhi

ayahs.70:27: wa-alladhīna hum min ʿadhābi rabbihim mushfiqūna
ayahs.70:30: illā ʿalā azwājihim aw mā malakat aymānuhum fa-innahum ghayru malūmīna
ayahs.70:31: famani ibtaghā warāʾa dhālika fa-ulāika humu l-ʿādūna
ayahs.70:38: ayaṭmaʿu kullu imri-in minhum an yudkhala jannata naʿīmin
ayahs.70:40: falā uqsimu birabbi l-mashāriqi wal-maghāribi innā laqādirūna
ayahs.70:41: ʿalā an nubaddila khayran minhum wamā naḥnu bimasbūqīna
ayahs.70:42: fadharhum yakhūḍū wayalʿabū ḥattā yulāqū yawmahumu alladhī yūʿadūna
ayahs.70:43: yawma yakhrujūna mina l-ajdāthi sirāʿan ka-annahum ilā nuṣubin yūfiḍūna
ayahs.70:44: khāshiʿatan abṣāruhum tarhaquhum dhillatun dhālika l-yawmu alladhī kānū yūʿadūna
ayahs.71:1: innā arsalnā nūḥan ilā qawmihi an andhir qawmaka min qabli an yatiyahum ʿadhābun alīmun
ayahs.71:2: qāla yāqawmi innī lakum nadhīrun mubīnun
ayahs.71:4: yaghfir lakum min dhunūbikum wayu-akhirkum ilā ajalin musamman inna ajala Allāhi idhā jāʾa lā yu-akharu law kuntum taʿlamūna
ayahs.71:5: qāla rabbi innī daʿawtu qawmī laylan wanahāran
ayahs.71:7: wa-innī kullamā daʿawtuhum litaghfira lahum jaʿalū aṣābiʿahum fī ādhānihim wa-istaghshaw thiyābahum wa-aṣarrū wa-istakbarū istikbāran
ayahs.71:9: thumma innī aʿlantu lahum wa-asrartu lahum isrāran
ayahs.71:10: faqultu istaghfirū rabbakum innahu kāna ghaffāran
ayahs.71:12: wayumdidkum bi-amwālin wabanīna wayajʿal lakum jannātin wayajʿal lakum anhāran
ayahs.71:13: mā lakum lā tarjūna lillāhi waqāran
ayahs.71:15: alam taraw kayfa khalaqa Allāhu sabʿa samāwātin ṭibāqan
ayahs.71:16: wajaʿala l-qamara fīhinna nūran wajaʿala l-shamsa sirājan
ayahs.71:21: qāla nūḥun rabbi innahum ʿaṣawnī wa-ittabaʿū man lam yazidhu māluhu wawaladuhu illā khasāran
ayahs.71:23: waqālū lā tadharunna ālihatakum walā tadharunna waddan walā suwāʿan walā yaghūtha wayaʿūqa wanasran
ayahs.71:24: waqad aḍallū kathīran walā tazidi l-ẓālimīna illā ḍalālan

ayahs.71:26: waqāla nūḥun rabbi lā tadhar ʿalā l-arḍi mina l-kāfirīna dayyāran

ayahs.71:28: rabbi ighfir lī waliwālidayya waliman dakhala baytiya muʾminan walilmuʾminīna wal-muʾmināti walā tazidi l-ẓālimīna illā tabāran
ayahs.72:1: qul ūḥiya ilayya annahu istamaʿa nafarun mina l-jini faqālū innā samiʿnā qurānan ʿajaban
ayahs.72:2: yahdī ilā l-rushdi faʾāmannā bihi walan nushrika birabbinā aḥadan
ayahs.72:3: wa-annahu taʿālā jaddu rabbinā mā ittakhadha ṣāḥibatan walā waladan
ayahs.72:4: wa-annahu kāna yaqūlu safīhunā ʿalā Allāhi shaṭaṭan
ayahs.72:5: wa-annā ẓanannā an lan taqūla l-insu wal-jinu ʿalā Allāhi kadhiban
ayahs.72:6: wa-annahu kāna rijālun mina l-insi yaʿūdhūna birijālin mina l-jini fazādūhum rahaqan
ayahs.72:7: wa-annahum ẓannū kamā ẓanantum an lan yabʿatha Allāhu aḥadan
ayahs.72:8: wa-annā lamasnā l-samāʾa fawajadnāhā muli-at ḥarasan shadīdan washuhuban
ayahs.72:9: wa-annā kunnā naqʿudu minhā maqāʿida lilssamʿi faman yastamiʿi l-āna yajid lahu shihāban raṣadan
ayahs.72:10: wa-annā lā nadrī asharrun urīda biman fī l-arḍi am arāda bihim rabbuhum rashadan
ayahs.72:11: wa-annā minnā l-ṣāliḥūna waminnā dūna dhālika kunnā ṭarāiqa qidadan
ayahs.72:12: wa-annā ẓanannā an lan nuʿjiza Allāha fī l-arḍi walan nuʿjizahu haraban
ayahs.72:13: wa-annā lammā samiʿnā l-hudā āmannā bihi faman yuʾmin birabbihi falā yakhāfu bakhsan walā rahaqan
ayahs.72:14: wa-annā minnā l-muslimūna waminnā l-qāsiṭūna faman aslama fa-ulāika taḥarraw rashadan
ayahs.72:16: wa-allawi istaqāmū ʿalā l-ṭarīqati la-asqaynāhum māʾan ghadaqan
ayahs.72:17: linaftinahum fīhi waman yuʿriḍ ʿan dhikri rabbihi yaslukhu ʿadhāban ṣaʿadan
ayahs.72:18: wa-anna l-masājida lillāhi falā tadʿū maʿa Allāhi aḥadan
ayahs.72:19: wa-annahu lammā qāma ʿabdu Allāhi yadʿūhu kādū yakūnūna ʿalayhi libadan
ayahs.72:20: qul innamā adʿū rabbī walā ushriku bihi aḥadan
ayahs.72:21: qul innī lā amliku lakum ḍarran walā rashadan
ayahs.72:22: qul innī lan yujīranī mina Allāhi aḥadun walan ajida min dūnihi multaḥadan
ayahs.72:23: illā balāghan mina Allāhi warisālātihi waman yaʿṣi Allāha warasūlahu fa-inna lahu nāra jahannama khālidīna fīhā abadan
ayahs.72:24: ḥattā idhā ra-aw mā yūʿadūna fasayaʿlamūna man aḍʿafu nāṣiran wa-aqallu ʿadadan
ayahs.72:25: qul in adrī aqarībun mā tūʿadūna am yajʿalu lahu rabbī amadan
ayahs.72:26: ʿālimu l-ghaybi falā yuẓhiru ʿalā ghaybihi aḥadan
ayahs.72:27: illā mani irtaḍā min rasūlin fa-innahu yasluku min bayni yadayhi wamin khalfihi raṣadan
ayahs.72:28: liyaʿlama an qad ablaghū risālāti rabbihim wa-aḥāṭa bimā ladayhim wa-aḥṣā kulla shayin ʿadadan

ayahs.75:4: balā qādirīna ʿalā an nusawwiya banānahu

ayahs.76:1: hal atā ʿalā l-insāni ḥīnun mina l-dahri lam yakun shayan madhkūran

ayahs.76:24: fa-iṣbir liḥukmi rabbika walā tuṭiʿ minhum āthiman aw kafūran

ayahs.76:30: wamā tashāūna illā an yashāʾa Allāhu inna Allāha kāna ʿalīman ḥakīman

ayahs.77:31: lā ẓalīlin walā yughnī mina l-lahabi

ayahs.77:48: wa-idhā qīla lahumu irkaʿū lā yarkaʿūna
ayahs.78:18: yawma yunfakhu fī l-ṣūri fatatūna afwājan
ayahs.78:24: lā yadhūqūna fīhā bardan walā sharāban

ayahs.78:39: dhālika l-yawmu l-ḥaqu faman shāʾa ittakhadha ilā rabbihi maʾāban

ayahs.79:16: idh nādāhu rabbuhu bil-wādi l-muqadasi ṭuwan
ayahs.79:18: faqul hal laka ilā an tazakkā

ayahs.79:27: a-antum ashaddu khalqan ami l-samāu banāhā

ayahs.81:20: dhī quwwatin ʿinda dhī l-ʿarshi makīnin
ayahs.81:29: wamā tashāūna illā an yashāʾa Allāhu rabbu l-ʿālamīna

ayahs.82:18: thumma mā adrāka mā yawmu l-dīni

ayahs.83:2: alladhīna idhā iktālū ʿalā l-nāsi yastawfūna
ayahs.83:7: kallā inna kitāba l-fujāri lafī sijjīnin
ayahs.83:12: wamā yukadhibu bihi illā kullu muʿtadin athīmin
ayahs.83:13: idhā tutlā ʿalayhi āyātunā qāla asāṭīru l-awalīna
ayahs.83:14: kallā bal rāna ʿalā qulūbihim mā kānū yaksibūna
ayahs.83:15: kallā innahum ʿan rabbihim yawma-idhin lamaḥjūbūna
ayahs.83:17: thumma yuqālu hādhā alladhī kuntum bihi tukadhibūna

ayahs.83:26: khitāmuhu miskun wafī dhālika falyatanāfasi l-mutanāfisūna

ayahs.89:8: allatī lam yukhlaq mithluhā fī l-bilādi
ayahs.89:15: fa-ammā l-insānu idhā mā ibtalāhu rabbuhu fa-akramahu wanaʿʿamahu fayaqūlu rabbī akramani
ayahs.89:16: wa-ammā idhā mā ibtalāhu faqadara ʿalayhi rizqahu fayaqūlu rabbī ahānani
ayahs.89:21: kallā idhā dukkati l-arḍu dakkan dakkan
ayahs.89:23: wajīa yawma-idhin bijahannama yawma-idhin yatadhakkaru l-insānu wa-annā lahu l-dhikrā
ayahs.90:5: ayaḥsabu an lan yaqdira ʿalayhi aḥadun
ayahs.90:14: aw iṭʿāmun fī yawmin dhī masghabatin
ayahs.90:17: thumma kāna mina alladhīna āmanū watawāṣaw bil-ṣabri watawāṣaw bil-marḥamati
ayahs.90:19: wa-alladhīna kafarū biāyātinā hum aṣḥābu l-mashamati
ayahs.91:13: faqāla lahum rasūlu Allāhi nāqata Allāhi wasuqyāhā
ayahs.91:14: fakadhabūhu faʿaqarūhā fadamdama ʿalayhim rabbuhum bidhanbihim fasawwāhā
ayahs.92:11: wamā yughnī ʿanhu māluhu idhā taraddā
ayahs.92:19: wamā li-aḥadin ʿindahu min niʿmatin tujzā
ayahs.95:4: laqad khalaqnā l-insāna fī aḥsani taqwīmin
ayahs.95:6: illā alladhīna āmanū waʿamilū l-ṣāliḥāti falahum ajrun ghayru mamnūnin
ayahs.96:15: kallā la-in lam yantahi lanasfaʿan bil-nāṣiyati
ayahs.97:3: laylatu l-qadri khayrun min alfi shahrin
ayahs.97:4: tanazzalu l-malāikatu wal-rūḥu fīhā bi-idhni rabbihim min kulli amrin
ayahs.98:1: lam yakuni alladhīna kafarū min ahli l-kitābi wal-mushrikīna munfakkīna ḥattā tatiyahumu l-bayinatu
ayahs.98:2: rasūlun mina Allāhi yatlū ṣuḥufan muṭahharatan
ayahs.98:4: wamā tafarraqa alladhīna ūtū l-kitāba illā min baʿdi mā jāʾathumu l-bayinatu
ayahs.98:5: wamā umirū illā liyaʿbudū Allāha mukhliṣīna lahu l-dīna ḥunafāʾa wayuqīmū l-ṣalata wayuʾtū l-zakata wadhālika dīnu l-qayimati
ayahs.98:6: inna alladhīna kafarū min ahli l-kitābi wal-mushrikīna fī nāri jahannama khālidīna fīhā ulāika hum sharru l-bariyati
ayahs.98:7: inna alladhīna āmanū waʿamilū l-ṣāliḥāti ulāika hum khayru l-bariyati
ayahs.98:8: jazāuhum ʿinda rabbihim jannātu ʿadnin tajrī min taḥtihā l-anhāru khālidīna fīhā abadan raḍiya Allāhu ʿanhum waraḍū ʿanhu dhālika liman khashiya rabbahu
ayahs.99:6: yawma-idhin yaṣduru l-nāsu ashtātan liyuraw aʿmālahum
ayahs.99:7: faman yaʿmal mithqāla dharratin khayran yarahu
ayahs.99:8: waman yaʿmal mithqāla dharratin sharran yarahu
ayahs.100:9: afalā yaʿlamu idhā buʿthira mā fī l-qubūri
ayahs.103:3: illā alladhīna āmanū waʿamilū l-ṣāliḥāti watawāṣaw bil-ḥaqi watawāṣaw bil-ṣabri
ayahs.105:1: alam tara kayfa faʿala rabbuka bi-aṣḥābi l-fīli
ayahs.106:4: alladhī aṭʿamahum min jūʿin waʾāmanahum min khawfin
ayahs.110:2: wara-ayta l-nāsa yadkhulūna fī dīni Allāhi afwājan
ayahs.110:3: fasabbiḥ biḥamdi rabbika wa-istaghfirhu innahu kāna tawwāban
ayahs.111:2: mā aghnā ʿanhu māluhu wamā kasaba
